Afhayeenka Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, Mudane Xuseen Aadan Cige (Dayr), ayaa faahfaahin ka bixiyay sababaha ay Xukuumaddu si taxaddar iyo feejignaan sare leh ugu maaraynayso macluumaadka la xidhiidha safarrada dibadda iyo hawlaha diblomaasiyadeed ee Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ku hawlan yahay. 

Afhayeenka ayaa qoraal uu ku baahiyay bartiisa X oo ay soo turjuntay Wakaaladda wararka Somaliland ee SOLNA ku sheegay in ilaalinta siraha qaranku ay tahay ficil waddaninimo oo ka tarjumaya hoggaan mabda’ leh, oo laf-dhabar u ah sugidda amniga qaranka iyo gaadhista himilooyinka istiraatiijiyadeed ee Somaliland.

Mudane Xuseen Aadan Cige Dayr wuxuu xusay in maaraynta xogta la xidhiidha safarrada Madaxweynuhu ay ka hortagayso faragelin cadawtinimo, isla markaana ay suurtagelinayso in wadahadallada muhiimka ahi u dhacaan si deggan oo midho-dhal ah, iyada oo aan la carqaladayn.

Afhayeenku wuxuu carrabka ku adkeeyay in dunida maanta ay ka jirto dagaal xogeed iyo dabagal joogto ah, sidaas darteedna aanay xigmadi ku jirin buuq iyo muuqaal badan, hasa yeeshee ay ku jirto xakamayn, feejignaan, iyo ilaalinta danaha qaranka.

Afhayeenka ayaa hoosta ka xariiqay in Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ay dooratay in danta qaranka laga hormariyo muuqaallo iyo buuq warbaahineed, si loo hubiyo in diblomaasiyaddu ay keento natiijooyin dhab ah, halkii ay ka abuuri lahayd mashquul ama khatar amni.

Afhayeenku wuxuu intaas ku daray in xilkasnimadan ula kac ahi ay xoojinayso madaxbannaanida Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, isla markaana ay ilaalinayso faa’iidada istiraatiijiyadeed ee qaranka, iyadoo lagu shaqaynayo kalsooni, mas’uuliyad, iyo u heellan danta guud ee shacabka.

Ugu dambayn, Afhayeenka Madaxweynaha ayaa caddeeyay in hoggaaminta casriga ah ee Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland aanay ahayn buuq, is-muujin ama bandhig muuqaal ah, balse uu yahay awoodda aamusnaanta leh ee keenta natiijooyin dhab ah oo waxtar u leh shacabka, laguna gaadhayo go’aan cad iyo ujeeddo fog, ka hor inta aanay cadawgu fursad u helin inay ka falceliyaan ama xitaa ay ogaadaan waxa Somaliland xaqiiqsatay, ayuu afhayeenku yidhi

At Davos, Trump humiliated the United States on the world stage and threatened the alliances that made us powerful. Reports describe gasps, groans, nervous laughter. The kind of laughter you hear when powerful people realize the guy with the big stick is also unhinged.

First target: Greenland. He called it “cold and poorly located,” then demanded “immediate negotiations” to take “complete and total control.” He claimed he wouldn’t use force… then warned Europe they can agree and America will be grateful, or refuse and “we will remember.” 

Then he moved on to Europe itself. 

He told them their countries “don’t even work” without the U.S. He joked that if America hadn’t stepped in during WWII, they’d all be speaking German and Japanese.
 
And because it’s Trump, he couldn’t resist the culture-war junk either. 

He mocked clean energy, recycled his wind-turbine obsession, and tossed out claims that don’t match the reality of how much wind power the U.S. and China actually use. Meanwhile, the people in that room are trying to plan around climate disasters and economic shocks. He treated it like stand-up.

It got so sloppy he appeared to confuse Greenland with Iceland and blamed “Iceland” for a stock market dip tied to investor anxiety about his Greenland threats. 

Then came the ugliest part. Somali immigrants. 

He referenced a fraud scandal and used it as an excuse to insult an entire community’s intelligence. People near the front audibly groaned. That wasn’t a slip. That was scapegoating, on purpose, for applause.

He even admitted tariffs are personal. Switzerland’s president “rubbed him the wrong way,” so he raised tariffs to 39%. Not policy. A grudge.

He took shots at Canada’s prime minister. He complained the Federal Reserve doesn’t consult him. And on Ukraine, he called Zelensky and Putin “stupid” if they don’t “get it done,” like a war is a negotiation show he can score points on.

This is the real danger of Trump’s second term: it’s not just cruelty at home. It’s chaos abroad. Allies get humiliated. Markets get rattled. Immigrants get targeted. And U.S. power gets used like a weapon for ego.

If you’re wondering why Europe looks panicked right now, this is why. They aren’t just watching a president. They’re watching an unstable man holding the lever of NATO, tariffs, and global security, and treating it like a toy.

Ku Tallaabsiga Somaliland ee Shirarka Caalamiga ah – Xadgudub Qaranimo oo Cad

Ka-qaybgalka hoggaamiyaha Somaliland ee shirarka caalamiga ah, gaar ahaan shirarka heerka sare ee ay isugu yimaadaan madaxda dalalka adduunka, waa arrin si cad u muujinaysa xadgudub siyaasadeed iyo sharci-jab ku ah midnimada Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya. Tani ma aha arrin aragti uun ah, balse waa xaqiiqo saldhig u ah sharciga caalamiga ah iyo nidaamka dowladnimo ee adduunka maanta jira.

Soomaaliya waa dal leh dawlad rasmi ah, dastuur qaran, madaxweyne la doortay, iyo kursi Qaramada Midoobay. Caalamkuna wuu aqoonsan yahay. Sidaas darteed, cid kasta oo ka tirsan dhulka Soomaaliya oo isu soo bandhigta madax dal kale, ama si gaar ah uga hadasha masiirka qaranka fagaarayaasha caalamiga ah, waxay si toos ah ugu xadgudbaysaa jiritaanka iyo sharafta qaranka Soomaaliyeed.

Somaliland, inkastoo ay maamul u gaar ah samaysatay tan iyo 1991-kii, weligeed laguma aqoonsan dal madax-bannaan. Taasi waa xaqiiqo aan la dafiri karin. Haddaba maxay tahay sababta hoggaamiye gobol uu isu dhigayo madaxweyne dal, isaga oo iska indho-tiraya jiritaanka dawlad Soomaaliyeed oo sharci ah? Tani waa talaabo aan ahayn mid u adeegaysa dan shacabka, balse ah mid sii hurinaysa kala-qaybsanaan, isla weynaanta siyaasadeed iyo khiyaamo qaran.

Arrinta ka sii daran ayaa ah in shirarkan caalamiga ah loo adeegsanayo olole aqoonsi raadis ah, iyadoo la ogyahay in arrintaasi aysan ahayn mid lagu xallin karo fagaarayaal dibadeed, balse u baahan wada-hadal Soomaaliyeed oo gudaha ah. Ku orodka shisheeye iyo ku gorgortanka masiirka dhulka Soomaaliya waa dhaqan taariikh ahaan lagu yaqaan kuwa doonaya kala-qaybin, mana aha mid sharaf u leh dad Soomaaliyeed.

Waxaa sidoo kale mas’uuliyad culus saaran dawladda Federaalka Soomaaliya, oo looga baahan yahay inay si cad uga hortagto tallaabooyinkan, kana muujiso mowqif adag oo diblomaasiyadeed. Aamusnaanta ama dayacaadda arrimahan waxay u diraysaa fariin qaldan caalamka, taasoo dhalin karta jahawareer siyaasadeed iyo dhaawac ku yimaadda midnimada dalka.

Soomaaliya waa dal jira, leh dawlad, leh calan, leh cod iyo sharci. Cidna xaq uma laha inay masiirkaas ku ciyaarto, kuna beddesho dano siyaasadeed oo gaar ah. Khilaafka jira waa mid Soomaaliyeed, xalkiisuna waa inuu noqdaa mid Soomaaliyeed. Shirar shisheeye laguma kala goyn karo qaran, lagumana dhisi karo dawladnimo been ah.

Kiron Open Higher Education waa barnaamij waxbarasho oo online ah oo lagu taageero dhalinyarada iyo dadka ku jira xaaladda qaxootiga ama ka soo jeeda bulshooyin nugul ee dalalka soo koraya. Waxa ay bixisaa koorsooyin tayo leh, webinars, iyo fursado horumarineed oo caalami ah, iyadoo iskaashi la leh jaamacadaha iyo barnaamijyada waxbarasho sida Coursera. Haddii aad boggaaga xaqiijiso, waxaad si bilaash ah wax uga baran kartaa oo xirfado badan ka heli kartaa Coursera.

Sida Account loogu yeesho Kiron:

• Booqo websaytka rasmiga ah ee Kiron Campus: https://www.kiron.ngo/ 
• Dooro "Sign Up" ama "Register".
• Buuxi macluumaadkaaga shakhsiyeed (magaca, email, password).

Shuruudaha Account Verification:

Si aad uga mid noqoto barnaamijka Coursera for Refugees, waxaad u baahan tahay:
• Inaad ka weyn tahay 18 sano.
• Inaad haysato dukumenti sharci ah oo caddeynaya inaad tahay qaxooti, magangalyo-doone, ama ilaalin caalami ah ku jirto. Waxa doorkan la siiyey 1,000 boos.
• Ama In aad tahay Soomaali, Itoobiyaan, ama Ereteriyaan, in aadna haysato dukumenti aad ku cadaynaysid sida (Passport, National ID). Si gaar ah, 700 oo boos baa la siiyey Soomaalida, Itoobiyaan iyo Ereteriyaanka.

Verification Round-ka Soo Socda:

• Taariikhda: 5 Febraayo 2026
• Maalintaas waa in aad gudbisaa dukumentiyadaada (Passport ama National ID) si loo hubiyo aad tahay dadka loogu talo galay.
• Si aad uga mid noqotid dadka fursadaas hela, Kiron waxa ay tixgelisaa sida ay dadku u soo kala horeeyaan, marka isla maalintaasna dir documents-kaaga.

Faa’iidada Account Verification:

• Helitaanka Coursera for Refugees oo kuu oggolaanaya inaad barato koorsooyin jaamacadeed oo tayo sare leh.
• Shahaadooyin caalami ah oo kaa caawinaya shaqo-helidda ama waxbarasho dheeraad ah.
• Fursad aad kula xiriiro arday kale oo caalami ah iyo xirfadlayaal.

Gunaanad:

Kiron Open Higher Education waa dariiq muhiim ah oo dhalinyarada Soomaaliyeed iyo kuwa ku jira xaalado nugul ku gaari karaan waxbarasho casri ah oo caalami ah. Fursaddu waxay furmaysaa Febraayo 2026, sidaa darteed waxaa muhiim ah in isla maalintaas aad soo gudbiso dukumentiyadaada si aad uga mid noqoto dadka ugu horreeya ee xaqiijinta hela.

Waxbarashada bilaashka ahi waa fursad aan sahlaneyn in mar walba la helo, gaar ahaan marka ay bixiyaan jaamacado iyo barnaamijyo caalami ah oo sumcad leh. Sidaas darteed, dhalinyarada Soomaaliyeed waxaan ku boorinayaa in ay fursadan ka faa’iidaystaan si ay u kobciyaan xirfadohooda, uga shaqeeyaan mustaqbal ifaya, uguna adeegaan bulshadooda iyo dalkooda.

Sannadkii 1954, dowladda Ingiriiska (UK) iyo Itoobiya ayaa kala saxiixday heshiis, kaas oo 1955 si rasmi ah u dhaqan galay, laguna wareejiyay maamulka dhulka somali galbeed , ama ogadenia 
Hashiiskan 1955 waxaa taariikhda Soomaalida lagu xusuustaa mid ka mid ah dhacdooyinkii ugu xanuunka badnaa ee lagu lumiyay dhul Soomaaliyeed iyada oo aan oggolaansho laga helin dadka deegaanka.

Xasuusta taariikhdu waa muraayadda aan ku aragno halka aan ka nimid, si aan u garanno halka aan u soconno. 23-dii January 1993-dii ma ahayn maalin si sahlan ku timid. Waxay ahayd mid ku timid dhiigga geesiyaal, dhididka halgamayaal iyo dulqaadka hooyooyin badan oo u harraaddanaa inay maruun arkaan ubadkooda oo ku hadlaya afkooda hooyo, waxna ku baranaya, isla markaana maamulaya dadkooda iyo Deegaankooda. 

Waa maalintii uu shacabka deegaanku markii ugu horraysay taariikhda casriga ah hantiyey maamul magaciisa wata, midabkiisa leh, afkiisana ku hadla. Waa maalintii laga gudbay marti-u-ahaanshaha maamul shisheeye, loona gudbay milgaha iyo maamuuska is-maamulka. Waa maalintii laga gudbay quudhsigii iyo takoorriddii, loona gudbay hannaanka federaalka qawmiga ah, kaas oo u gogol-xaadhay in shacabka Deegaanku yeeshaan haykalka dawladnimo ee maanta jira. Waa guul ku timi wadajir iyo isku-duubni, waana dhaxal qaali ah oo ay tahay inaan u ilaalino sida aan indhaha u ilaalino. 

Ugu dambayn, waxaan hambalyo mug iyo miisaan leh, u dirayaa dhammaan bulsho-weynta Dawladda Deegaanka Soomaalida, qurbajoog iyo qol-qol-joogba. Waxaan leeyahay: Hambalyo 33-guurada aasaaska dawladnimadeena ka soo wareegtay. Alle ha u naxariisto intii u geeriyootay dhismaha iyo difaaca deegaankeena, inta noolna Eebbe ha waafajiyo wadada toosan ee horumarka iyo badhaadhaha aan ku gaadhi karo. Allow Deegaankeena ka dhig mid barwaaqo, nabad, iyo caddaalad ku naalooda abid. Allow calankaas xiddigta leh ka yeel mid weligii si sharaf leh u babada. Guul iyo Gobanimo!

Falanqayntani waxay baadhaysaa sida Somaliland ay u maamusho dhaqdhaqaaqa malaayiin doollar iyada oo aan haysan aqoonsi caalami ah, iyo xeeladaha uu Baanka Dhexe u isticmaalo in uu kaga gudbo xayiraadaha nidaamka SWIFT iyo IMF. Waxay muujinaysaa sida nidaam isugu jira bangiyada gaarka ah, xawaaladaha, iyo taageerada farsamo ee Baanka Adduunku ay u suurageliyeen in Somaliland ay ka dhex abuurto marinno maaliyadeed oo shaqaynaya go'doonka caalamiga ah dhexdiisa.

Baanka Dhexe ee Somaliland miyuu heli karaa macaamilka maaliyadeed ee caalamiga ah? Muuqaalkan xog-daahfurka ah, waxaan ku baadhaynaa caqabadaha horyaalla Baanka Dhexe ee Somaliland iyo booska gaarka ah ee uu kaga jiro nidaamka maaliyadeed ee dunida. In kasta oo ay weydo aqoonsi rasmi ah oo ka yimaada hay'adaha sida Qaramada Midoobay (𝗨𝗡) iyo Sanduuqa Lacagta Caalamiga ah (𝗜𝗠𝗙), Somaliland waxay macaamilka bangiyada caalamiga ah u martaa marinno dadban. Maqal sida bangiyada gaarka loo leeyahay, xidhiidhada bangiyada dibadda (𝗖𝗼𝗿𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗡𝗲𝘁𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀), iyo taageerada hay'adaha sida 𝗕𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗔𝗱𝗱𝘂𝘂𝗻𝗸𝘂 ay door muhiim ah uga qaataan fududaynta lacagaha. Waxaan si qoto dheer u eegaynaa saamaynta juquraafi-siyaasadeed ee dhaqdhaqaaqa maaliyadeed ee Somaliland iyo waxa beddeli kara xaaladdeeda mustaqbalka. 

𝗦𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗲 𝗪𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮𝗻 𝗮𝗮𝗻 𝘀𝗶 𝗿𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶 𝗮𝗵 𝘂 𝗷𝗶𝗿𝗶𝗻 𝘂𝘂 𝗕𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗮𝘆𝗶𝗶𝗻 𝗗𝗼𝗼𝗹𝗮𝗿 𝗫𝘂𝗱𝘂𝘂𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝘂𝗴𝗮 𝗚𝘂𝗱𝗯𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗮?
Somaliland, oo ah dawlad iskeed ugu dhawaaqday madaxbannaani, waa mid deggan oo leh dawlad shaqaynaysa, haddana aan caalamka laga aqoonsan. Waddamada intiisa badan, baanka dhexe ayaa maamula socodka lacagta, isagoo si toos ah ugu xidhan nidaamka maaliyadeed ee adduunka. Laakiin xaqiiqada Somaliland waa mid ka duwan. 𝗕𝗮𝗱𝗯𝗮𝗮𝗱𝗮𝗱𝗲𝗲𝗱𝗮 𝗺𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗱𝗲𝗲𝗱 𝘄𝗮𝘅𝗮𝘆 𝗸𝘂 𝘁𝗶𝗶𝗿𝘀𝗮𝗻 𝘁𝗮𝗵𝗮𝘆 𝗔𝗱𝗸𝗮𝘆𝘀𝗶, 𝗟𝗮-𝗾𝗮𝗯𝘀𝗶, 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗫𝗶𝗱𝗵𝗶𝗶𝗱𝗵𝗼 𝗮𝗮𝗻 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶 𝗮𝗵𝗮𝘆𝗻.
Aqoonsi la'aan awgeed, Baanka Dhexe ee Somaliland ma heli karo nidaamyada lacag bixinta caalamiga ah, kumana hayn karo kaydka lacagaha qalaad dibadda si toos ah. Beddelkeeda, wuxuu ku tiirsan yahay xeelado ay sameeyaan bangiyada ganacsiga, shirkadaha xawaaladaha, iyo lammaanayaasha caalamiga ah. Tani waa wax ka badan sheeko bangi; waa halganka qaran ee badbaadada dhaqaale iyo sharciyadda.

𝗖𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗠𝗮𝗮𝗺𝘂𝘂𝘀𝗸𝗮 "𝗦𝗪𝗜𝗙𝗧"
Nidaamka maaliyadeed ee caalamiga ahi waa naadi u xidhan dad gaar ah. Xubinnimadu waxay u baahan tahay madaxbannaani dawladnimo, taas oo inta badan lagu muujiyo kursiga UN-ka. La'aanteed, waddanku wuxuu ka xidhan yahay 𝗜𝗠𝗙 iyo Baanka Adduunka. Sidoo kale, nidaamka 𝗦𝗪𝗜𝗙𝗧, oo ah laf-dhabarta lacag bixinta caalamiga ah, wuxuu u baahan yahay 𝗸𝗼𝗼𝗱𝗵 𝘄𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮𝗻 (𝗖𝗼𝘂𝗻𝘁𝗿𝘆 𝗖𝗼𝗱𝗲) 𝗼𝗼 𝗹𝗮 𝗮𝗾𝗼𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗮𝗻 𝘆𝗮𝗵𝗮𝘆, kaas oo ay Somaliland weydo. Aqoonsi siyaasadeed waa baasaboorka looga gudbo maaliyadda caalamiga ah.

𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗚𝘂𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗚𝗼'𝗱𝗼𝗼𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗗𝗶𝗯𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮
Somaliland gudaheeda, Baanka Dhexe wuxuu u shaqeeyaa sidii hay'ad qaran oo dhab ah: wuxuu soo saaraa lacag, nidaamiyaa bangiyada, isagoo maamula siyaasadda lacagta. Laakiin awooddiisu waxay ku joogsataa xuduudda. Ma furan karo xisaabaad bangiyada dhexe ee waaweyn, kamana qaybgali karo dooodaha siyaasadeed ee caalamiga ah. Maadaama lagu qasbay go'doon, baanku wuxuu xoogga saaray xoojinta nidaamka gudaha, gaar ahaan lacagaha moobaylka iyo ka hortagga lacag dhaqidda.

𝗪𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗗𝗮𝗱𝗯𝗮𝗻 𝗲𝗲 𝘀𝗼𝗰𝗼𝗱𝗸𝗮 𝗟𝗮𝗰𝗮𝗴𝘁𝗮 (𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝗻𝗲𝘆)
★★ 𝗫𝗮𝘄𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮: Marka kalkaaliye caafimaad oo London jooga uu lacag u soo diiro gurigii, waxay soo martaa xisaabaadka caalamiga ah ee shirkadda xawaaladda, ka dibna waxaa laga bixiyaa gudaha iyadoo ah lacag moobayl, iyadoon la taaban Baanka Dhexe.
★★ 𝗚𝗶𝗱𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗱𝗮 (𝗔𝗶𝗱): Qaadhaan-bixiyeyaashu waxay lacagta u soo diraan hay'adaha 𝗨𝗡-𝗸𝗮 ama 𝗡𝗚𝗢-𝘆𝗮𝗱𝗮, kuwaas oo maamula lacagta oo bixiya mushaharka ama qandaraasyada, iyadoo la dhaafayo dawladda Somaliland.
★★ 𝗚𝗮𝗻𝗮𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗮: Ganacsadaha gudaha ayaa lacag dhiga bangi ku yaalla Somaliland, kaas oo isticmaala xisaabtiisa (𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗮𝗰𝗰𝗼𝘂𝗻𝘁) ee Jabuuti, Kenya ama Imaaraadka si uu lacag ugu diiro alaab-qeybiyaha dibadda isagoo isticmaalaya 𝗦𝗪𝗜𝗙𝗧.

𝗧𝗮𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗕𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗔𝗱𝗱𝘂𝘂𝗻𝗸𝗮
In kasta oo aanu Baanka Adduunku aqoonsan Somaliland, haddana wuxuu siiyaa taageero farsamo iyo dhisidda awoodda (𝗖𝗮𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗕𝘂𝗶𝗹𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴). Tani waxay ka caawisaa bangiyada Somaliland inay ilaashadaan xidhiidhada dibadda, waxayna kordhisaa kalsoonida lammaanayaasha shisheeye.

𝗚𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗯𝗼: 𝗔𝗱𝗸𝗮𝘆𝘀𝗶 𝗸𝗮 𝗱𝗵𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗮𝘆 𝗖𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮
Ma u heli karaa Baanka Dhexe ee Somaliland macaamil caalami ah si toos ah? Jawaabtu waa Maya. Laakiin ficil ahaan, dhaqaalaheedu wuxuu helay marinno dadban. Sheekada Somaliland waa cashar ku saabsan adkaysiga; waa xusuusin ah in xitaa marka albaabadu xidhan yihiin, dadku ay helayaan daaqado iyo buundooyin ay mustaqbalkooda ku dhistaan. Waa naqshad muujinaysa in go'doonku aanu ahayn dhammaadka, balse uu yahay caqabad looga gudbi karo hal-abuurnimo iyo go'aan adayg.

I was present today for the planting of this tree in memory of my dad: Derek Cox OBE, who came to the area in the nineteen-sixties to be a youth and community worker and was present through the historic events of the seventies as incoming Bangladeshis established themselves in the face of a hostile reception, working right up until 2009. His main projects, Avenues Unlimited for the YWCA, Christchurch Gardens, and New Avenues were a core part of the childhoods of several generations of immigrant people, including Irish, Caribbean, Bangladeshi, and Somali. In addition, his outreach work in the homes of these people helped many families with immigration and other issues and he held a privileged position of trust for many families, including being a connection to first generation women who didn't have much contact outside of their homes. He had many voluntary contributions to other projects over the years, such as at the Montefiore Centre, helping found the Tower Hamlets Law Centre, acting as a school governor, and latterly, for the final chapter of his life, spending twenty years as a nominated carer for foster babies. He received many awards and tokens of recognition over the years, most notably his OBE for services to children and young people, from her majesty Queen Elizabeth II. I've also experienced several times people telling me that he was like a father to them or that he is/was the best person they ever knew in their lives.

The actual planting was a bit of a photo opportunity for a couple of councillors but if that's what it took to bend the rules for this to be done for the local people who wanted it 🤷.

Fardaha Soomaalida( Somali pony horse)

Fardaha Soomaalida ee dhaladka ah waa kuwa xajmi-ahaan yar, fudud oo aad u dheereeya.
Wax ka badan 300 oo jaad-hoosaad ayaa caalamka laga dhaqdaa, waxayna ku kala fiican yihiin adkaysiga, xoogga iyo xawaaraha, mid kastana waxaa jaangooya dagaanka uu ku noolyahay.
Fardaha Soomaalidu maaddaama ay dhul kulul, oo oommane u badan ku tarmaan waa kuwa fudud, adkaysi fiicanna u leh oonka iyo gaajada.
Qolada taxonomy-gu waxay u bixisay Somali pony, pony horse waa fardo aad u yaryar oo Yurubiyaan ah, lkn magaca ayay la wadaajiyeen jiryarida awgeed.
Sida la sheego waxay si fiican ugu dhaqmi jireen oo Soomaalidu meel ay joogtaba ka soo doonan jidhay dooxooyinka Nugaaleed.
Galguduud iyo galbeedka ayaa ayaguna ah goobaha ay sida fiican ugu dhaqmi jireen.
Soomaalida dhexdeeda waxaa jira magacya looga yaqaan fardaha asalka ah, sida qoobyar iyo sunnaari.
Sunnaari inay Afsoomaali tahay ma hubo, se magaca qoobyar waa magac tilmaamaya astaanta ay uga duwan yihiin kuwa bariga iyo dhulka Carabtta naga soo gali jiray.

Midab-ahaan waxaa u badan xamarka, ashkirka, boodka iyo caddaanka. 
Halka caynabka, qaajaha iyo baroorku aad ugu yar yihiin.
Midabka farasku wax wayn kama sheego tayadiisa sida Soomaalidu aamminsan tahay, lkn haddana wuxuu mararka qaar u saamayn karaa cimila-ahaan. 
Tusaale, qaajuhu(albino like color) qorraxda uma adkayso, halka caynabka laftiisu aad ugu daalo.
Soomaalidu intaan arkay waxay aad u ammaantaa midabka baroorka, oo ah sida la sheego iskujirka uguyaraan afar midab.
In baroorku yahay faraska ugu tayada fiican, waxay la macna tahay in tayada farasku midabkiisa ku xiran tahay, taasna maaha wax cilmi-ahaan la xaqiijiyay intaan arkay. 
Sheekada in baroorku fardaha ugu tayada badan yahayna waxaan u malaynayaa inay ka timid gabay qarnigii 19aad uu tiri gabyaa caan ah oo Faarax-afcad la oran jiray.
Wuxuu gabay cillad ugu wada yeelayaa dhammaan midabbada fardaha, marka laga reebo baroor oo uu asagu rabay, mar uu abtiyaashi faras ka doontay sida la wariyo.
Waxaa kaloo asna la hayaa Sayidka oo xamarka ku tilmaamaya faras kan ugu fiican. 

Sigguud, fardaha Soomaalidu wali way jiraan, waase gabaabsi oo fardahoo iska sii yaraanaya iyo iskutaranka fardaha dibadda ka yimid baa isu raacay.

#Somalia’s most prominent religious scholar, Sheikh Mustafe Hajji Ismail Harun, has warned that Somaliland would gain no benefit from engagement with Israel, which he described as the world’s current biggest aggressor, with consequences extending to both this life and the hereafter.

Speaking in Somaliland, Sheikh Mustafe said Israel had killed and wounded 200,000 Muslims, destroyed more than a thousand mosques and starved two million people. He said it was deeply unfortunate that Somaliland sought recognition from a state he said had fresh Muslim blood on its hands. He argued that such a move would morally implicate Somaliland in the suffering of Palestinians, whom he said had been invaded, displaced from their land and subjected to ongoing occupation and daily killings.

To illustrate his point, the scholar drew a parallel with Somaliland’s own recent history. He recalled the 1988 military crackdown by the Siad Barre regime, which forced residents of Hargeisa and Burao to flee to Ethiopia. He said that if others had settled those towns during the displacement and a separate entity had later recognised them, Somalilanders would view that recognition as deception and injustice. He said this, in his view, mirrored how Palestinians would perceive Somaliland’s position today.

Sheikh Mustafe added that even Siad Barre, widely regarded in Somaliland as the worst aggressor and symbol of brutality, had never sided with occupation, instead aligning himself with Nelson Mandela and the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.

     🇸🇴🇿🇦 Somali Community in Thoyondo

Good morning! Cruelty is not an error, excess, or misunderstanding, as the Trump administration repeatedly showed this week. In Minnesota, where winter didn’t stop anything. Clergy knelt on the road outside Minneapolis–St. Paul International Airport, sang hymns, prayed, and refused to move. About 100 of them were arrested, not by federal agents, but by airport staff and local law enforcement, for the crime of public witness. Their demand was simple and radical: that airlines, particularly Delta and Signature Aviation, stop pretending neutrality while ICE uses airports and airport workers as hunting grounds. That image, pastors zip-tied for praying, is now the face of Trump’s “law and order.”

Outside the airport, Minnesota shut itself down. Bars closed, bakeries closed, and workers walked off jobs and marched anyway through brutal cold. Organizers called it a general strike, and for once that wasn’t hyperbole. This wasn’t performative outrage; it was a community saying daily life cannot continue as usual while masked federal agents roam neighborhoods, deploy tear gas, and kill civilians. One of the central demands was accountability for the ICE agent who fatally shot Renee Good, a U.S. citizen, earlier this month as she observed enforcement activity in her neighborhood. Watching ICE has become so dangerous that it can now get you killed.

Hot damn, Minnesota! You make us all proud!

In Minneapolis, resistance has taken on a particular form: whistles, phones, Signal chats, masks. Neighbors track unmarked vehicles, while parents patrol school routes. Protesters gather outside the Whipple federal building day after day, sometimes dancing, sometimes choking on tear gas, sometimes watching photographers pinned to the ground. It feels festive until it doesn’t. It feels absurd until it feels like an occupation, because that’s what it is.

Five years after George Floyd, Minnesota has muscle memory. People remember what secrecy costs. Their tactic of choice is noise. ICE cannot operate quietly if every movement is seen, recorded, and shouted into the open. That visibility is now what ICE is trying to crush.

Across the country in Maine, the pattern is unmistakable. Three days into an ICE surge centered on Portland and Lewiston, DHS bragged about arresting more than 100 people and compiling a list of 1,400 more. Organizers say African asylum seekers, Somali, Congolese, Angolan, are being disproportionately targeted. Schools are emptying. Workers are disappearing. Families can’t find loved ones after they’re taken because Maine doesn’t even have an immigration detention facility, people are just moved, fast, out of sight.

This isn’t happening in a vacuum. It’s the domestic application of a worldview Trump articulated plainly just days ago on the world stage. At Davos, Trump declared that the West cannot “import foreign cultures which have failed to ever build a successful society of their own,” explicitly invoking Somalia, a country he has long derided as a “shithole.” That line wasn’t an offhand insult. It was a thesis. Once entire nations are defined as civilizational failures, their people become suspect by default. Their asylum claims become inconveniences. Their presence becomes framed as contamination rather than refuge.

Seen through that lens, Maine makes perfect sense. Volunteers who legally observe and document ICE activity say agents have begun showing up at their homes, masked, armed, and issuing warnings. “We know you live here.” They tell observers that following and filming them is “impeding federal law enforcement,” despite the First Amendment being crystal clear on the right to record public officials in public spaces. In Minneapolis, observers were detained. In Maine, they’re being threatened. The message is the same: stop watching, or we’ll make this personal. ICE doesn’t fear protesters, it fears witnesses.

Which brings us to the children. Earlier this week, ICE detained a five-year-old boy, Liam, wearing a Spider-Man backpack, in the Minneapolis suburb of Columbia Heights. Officials claimed they had “no choice.” They lied. School officials were on scene. Other adults offered to take him. His mother was inside the house. ICE took him anyway and flew him, along with his father, to a family detention center in Texas.

Liam’s attorney, Mark Proish, has been unequivocal about what actually happened. “They did everything right when they came in,” he said. “They used the app, they presented themselves at the border, they shared all of their information with the government, and they were following the process.” His conclusion was even more damning: “ICE didn’t care about the fact that they had those pending claims, and just arrested them.”

This detail obliterates the administration’s favorite excuse. This was not a family hiding in the shadows; they were complying with the law, and discovering that compliance no longer protects anyone.

School officials who witnessed the arrest say there was ample opportunity to safely hand Liam to adults on the scene. ICE refused, then used the child as leverage, removed him from his community, and transported him hundreds of miles away before lawyers could intervene. The administration isn’t embarrassed by the image of a kindergartner disappearing into federal custody; instead, they want to broadcast it as a deterrent.

Just days later, ICE went further, and crossed a line that is impossible to explain away. Agents detained a two-year-old girl and her father in Minneapolis, smashed a car window while the child was inside, refused repeated pleas to hand the toddler to her mother, and then transported both of them out of state. They did so after a federal judge explicitly ordered the child released, citing the “risk of irreparable harm.”

Defying a court order to seize and transport a child across state lines is not enforcement by any ordinary understanding of the word. In plain terms, it bears the hallmarks of kidnapping, and in any other context, moving a child hundreds of miles against a judge’s command would raise immediate questions about trafficking. That the actors here wore federal badges does not change the underlying facts; it only underscores how far the administration believes its power extends.

If the rule of law means anything at all, it cannot stop at the border, or at the doors of a detention bus. The Guardian’s reporting makes the broader picture impossible to ignore. ICE booked about 3,800 minors into family detention in the first ten months of last year alone, including toddlers, with more than 2,600 apprehended inside the United States. Instead of a border surge, it’s a domestic dragnet. Families with pending asylum claims, work authorization, even refugee status are being detained anyway. Legal process has become a registry, not a shield.

This is a deliberate revival and expansion of family detention, a policy halted five years ago because it was recognized as abusive and unlawful. Republicans are now openly trying to scrap the Flores Settlement, the legal framework that limits how long and under what conditions children can be detained. The detention budget has exploded. As one child-advocacy lawyer put it: this is “100% unnecessary and 100% designed to hurt kids.”

All of this is happening while Donald Trump struts around the world pretending to be a humanitarian. From Air Force One, returning from Davos, Trump claimed that his threats alone stopped Iran from executing more than 800 protesters, a claim Iran flatly denied as “completely false.” He boasted about sending an American “armada” toward Iran while posturing as the defender of human rights abroad. The grotesque irony would be funny if it weren’t so deadly: the same administration threatening war over protesters overseas is zip-tying clergy, threatening witnesses, and flying toddlers across the country as leverage.

The economic reality Trump tried to shout down in Switzerland keeps intruding. Housing is collapsing, pending home sales just cratered, inflation is creeping back up, and disposable income is falling. Consumers are spending more, but mostly on health care, housing, energy, and debt, not signs of prosperity but of survival. Foreign capital is still pouring into U.S. equities, not because the economy is healthy, but because American markets are a liquid parking garage for global wealth. Treasury demand is weakening, and allies are hedging. Canada, of all countries, just made a highly public break toward deeper partnership with China, a signal that the world is adjusting to a United States that no longer acts like a reliable anchor. Trump responded by whining that Canada should be “grateful.” The bully is discovering limits.

After all this, I am ready for schadenfreude with my coffee. In a rare moment where power was forced to blink, a federal judge openly questioned whether Trump has any legal authority to demolish part of the White House to build himself a $400 million ballroom. U.S. District Judge Richard Leon appeared unconvinced by the administration’s attempt to justify the project through a legal Rube Goldberg machine involving obscure Interior Department gift rules and Gerald Ford’s swimming pool. “The president is a temporary resident,” one lawyer argued. Leon agreed, reminding the courtroom that Trump is a steward, not a landlord, and that Congress does not hide elephants in mouse holes.

The White House is still trying to plow ahead, of course, stacking review boards with loyalists and insisting the ballroom is “important to the president,” which now seems to be their entire constitutional theory. But for one afternoon, it was nice to watch the law clear its throat and say no.

And finally, in news that surprised absolutely no one except perhaps the people who greenlit it, Melania, the glossy biopic meant to rebrand the former first lady as a misunderstood icon of elegance and endurance, landed with a thud so loud it could be heard echoing off the East Wing Trump still isn’t allowed to knock down. The film debuted to weak ticket sales, brutal reviews, and an audience response best described as polite confusion followed by immediate disengagement. Critics struggled to identify a narrative arc, emotional core, or reason for existence, while viewers appeared unmoved by yet another attempt to launder the Trump brand through soft lighting, somber music, and the insistence that silence is depth. In a week where Americans are watching children dragged into detention and clergy arrested for praying, the market delivered its own verdict: the public is not in the mood for revisionist fluff about a woman who spent four years saying nothing, doing nothing, and then quietly cashing checks afterward. Even the culture industry has limits.

It is humiliating that this country elected a convicted felon who governs through menace, lies, and collective punishment. That shame is real and earned. But it is also true, and deeply heartening, that Americans are standing up anyway. Clergy kneel, neighbors blow whistles, and teachers escort kids home. Parents show up at bus stops, lawyers file emergency petitions through the night, and superintendents break protocol to tell the truth. Ordinary people refuse to let terror operate quietly.

Authoritarianism feeds on inevitability, on the lie that this is unstoppable, that nothing can be done, that cruelty is just the weather now. But that lie is cracking. The resistance is real, it is growing, and it is coming not from abstractions but from people: clergy kneeling on cold pavement, neighbors blowing whistles, teachers protecting kids, lawyers filing through the night, communities refusing to let terror operate quietly.

And here’s the part the GOP would very much like you to forget: they can end this. This isn’t an act of God, it’s policy. Budgets can be cut, and oversight can be enforced. Republicans in Congress could stop the detention of children, rein in ICE, and restore the rule of law tomorrow if they chose to. Every day they don’t is a choice, and they should be made to own it loudly, publicly, and relentlessly.

So keep the pressure on. Support the groups doing the work on the ground. Make it impossible for this administration, or its enablers, to hide behind silence, process, or cruelty dressed up as inevitability.

Marz and I are sending our moonbeams full of love, pride, and solidarity to all the real Americans out there doing the hard, scary, necessary work of protecting our democracy. You are not alone or invisible. You are the reason this story is not over yet.

Donald Trump once again stirred controversy after making derogatory remarks about Somalia, describing Somalis as “very low-IQ people” during a public appearance. The comment quickly circulated online, drawing widespread attention and sparking criticism from individuals, advocacy groups, and members of the Somali community.

Many users on social media condemned the statement as offensive, dehumanizing, and harmful. Human rights advocates emphasized that such language reinforces negative stereotypes and can perpetuate prejudice against Somali communities both in the U.S. and abroad. Somali-Americans, in particular, expressed concern about the social and political impact of remarks that target their heritage and identity.

This is not the first time Trump has faced backlash for making racially charged or disparaging comments about specific groups. Critics argue that when public figures use demeaning language, it not only inflames tensions but also normalizes disrespect toward marginalized communities. Supporters of accountability have stressed the importance of holding leaders responsible for their words, noting that rhetoric matters in shaping public discourse and influencing societal attitudes.

The incident has reignited broader discussions about political rhetoric, racism, and the ethical responsibilities of those in positions of power. Experts have noted that even casual or offhand statements can have real-world consequences, from influencing public opinion to affecting how communities are treated in policy and everyday life.

While Trump’s supporters often dismiss such remarks as exaggeration or satire, many observers see a pattern that underscores the ongoing debate over the limits of free speech, political accountability, and the societal cost of demeaning language. The controversy highlights the tension between political expression and the responsibility to avoid perpetuating harmful stereotypes in a diverse society.

Shirka “ World Economic Forum” 

Shirkan “ World Economic Forum” waa mid la qabto sanad kasta gaar ahaan bisha Janaayo. Waxaana shirkaas lagu qabtaa magaalada Davos ee dalka Switzerland.

Shirkan waxaa sanad kasta looga doodaa ama xoogga lagu saaraa mowduucyo taagan sanadkaas iyo kuwa dhici kara mustaqbalka, kuwaas oo saameyn kara dhaqan dhaqaalaha dunida.

Waxay u muuqataa in shirka sanadkan uu aad uga duwan yahay kuwii duacay sanadihii hore laba sababood aawadeed. 

Midda koowaad, sanadkan waxaa shirka joogay madaxdii reer galbeedka ( EU iyo USA) oo aan isku fiicnayn gaar ahaan Mareykanka iyo Yurub oo isku haya arrinka Greenland. Dhinaca kale, waxaa joogay shirka wafdiga dalka Canada oo aan jecleysan siyaasadda Mareykanka ee xiriirka dhaqaale ee Canada iyo Mareykanka.

Arrinkan wuxuu jahwareer geliyey shirka gaar ahaan waddamada dunida saddaxaad oo ka walaacsan kuna mashquulsan waxa dhici kara sanadaha soo socda. Sanadihii hore, madaxda dunida saddaxaad wuxuu shirkan u ahaa meel looga doodi jiray hormarka iyo iskaashiga dhaqaale ee loo baahan yahay si loo hormariyo dunida.

Midda labaad ee shirka sanadkan uu ugu duwan yahay kuwii hore waa mowduucyada. Sanadihii hore waxaa kaalmaha hore geli jiray arrimaha cimilada, xuquuqul insaanka, hormarinta dhalinyarada iyo hormar dhaqaale oo loo dhan yahay. 

Laakiin, sanadkan waxaa kaalmaha hore ku jira isbedelka siyaasadda Mareykanka iyo saameynta ay ku yeelan karto dunida sida dhaqaalaha, iyo Teknoolajiyadda (AI). Waxaa si gaar ah la iskaga wareysanayey canshuuraha ( Tariffs) uu Mareykanka ku soo rogay alaabaha dibedda uga imaanaya, suuqa shidaalka iyo isbedelka ku yimid ku dhaqanka shuruucda caalamiga ah.

Maxay Soomaaliya uga dhigan tahay?

Ka qeyb galka Soomaaliya ee shirkan ma uusan laheyn ahmiyad weyn marka la barbardhigo sanadihii hore. 

Balse, sanadkan waxaa ka qeyb galay wafdi ka socda “ Somaliland” oo uu hogaaminayo Md. Cirro, kaas oo isku dayaya in uu kulamo muhim ah la yeesho qaar kamid ah ka qeybgalayaasha shirka. 

Taasi waxay keentay in Soomaalida ay aad ula socdaan dhaq dhaqaaqa wafdiga Cirro iyo natiijada kasoo bixi karta safarkiisa magaalada Davos.

Waa comments ay bixiyeen dad maraykan ah oo ka hadlaya aragtida ay ka qabaan bulshada soomaalida. 

Haddii aad ku nooshahay waddan ka baxsan Dalkaaga, ilaali dhaqankaaga in ka badan inta aad ilaalin lahayd marka aad dalkaaga joogto. 

Marka qofka Soomaaliga ahi dhexgalo bulsho kale, haddii dabeecaddiisa, ixtiraamkiisa, naxariistiisa iyo hufnaantiisa shaqo ba ay noqdaan kuwa la isaga marag kaco sida ka muuqata sawirrada, waxay saameyn weyn ku yeelanaysaa sida bulshada uu qofkaasi la noolyahay ay u arkayso Soomaalida guud ahaan. Hal qof oo wanaagsan ayaa magac dheer oo wanaagsan u soo jiidikara bulshada uu ka soo jeedo, isaga oo dadka kalena u horseedi kara in ay dadkiisa u arkaan bulsho leh qiyam, qiime iyo sharaf.

Dadka faalladan ku ammaanay soomaalida,  keliya ma aha dad wanaagsan e, waxa ay dabbaqayaan wax cilmi-nafsiga loogu yeero “warm–competent exemplar”. Taas micnaheedu yahay qof lagu arkay naxariis iyo xirfad shaqo oo wada socda. Ama dhanka kale bulsho la dhaqankiisu sarreeyo. 

Aragtida Stereotype Content Model ee cilmiga bulshada, waxay caddeyneysaa in marka bulsho kale ay qof ajnabi ka ah oo la nool ku aragto labadaa sifo oo isku dhafan, ay noqdaan kuwa sifooyinka ay qofkaa ku arkeen siiya bulshada uu ka yimid ama kasoo jeedo. Waa wax cilmi-nafsigu ugu yeero “positive representative effect”, taas oo ah  in hal qof oo togan uu beddelikaro fikirka guud ee laga qabo bulsho dhan.

Fadhigaas haddii aan wax yar ka iftiimiyana, sida la wariyo, rag badan oo Cabdi na uu ku jiro ayaa galab iskugu yimid guri Hargaysa ku yaallay, raggaas waxa ka mid ahaa Maxamed Axmed Kuluc, ka dib na Cabdi lidaan ayaa dibadda u yara baxay, cabbaar ba isaga oo aan maqanayn, ayay akhyaarti waxa u soo gashay gabadhi u Cabdi lidaan jeclaa; amarka Ilaahay bartii uu ka kacay ayay fadhiisatay.           Cabdi nasiib darnaayee, markii ay wax yar maqnayd ayuu is na irridda agalka ka soo galay. Waa nin boogtiisa la wada yagaanno e, halkii qosol ha lala kala jeesto. Cabdi wax dareen, saa haddii uu toyda waxa jira na, waxa ay ku yidhaahdeen, "Qof aad kuugu dheer ayaa bartad fadhiday sii fadhiistay, imminka ayaanu naga baxaye, bal garo qofkaasi kuu ahaa". 'Ma hebalbaa' da hadba wax u guraba, soo saari waa qofkii. "LUUL ayaa ka kacday..." Kii yidhi, ayaa hadalkiisu Cabdi Iidaan wadnaha u dhaafay! Gorodda ayuu laadlaadshay, boogtii dalooshay goor ay balbashay ayuu garan waayay, fool furnaantii iyo farxaddii ayaa ka luntay, sidii nin raysmo u lahaa la gabagabeeyay ayuu hadal tahli waayay. Nabar markii u aamusnaa ayaa lagu yidhi, "Cabdiyaw hadda ma garatay?" saa wax kale ha u danbeeyaane, ma garatay miyay meeshaba leegayd. Indho aad mooddid in ay ilmo ku soo taagantahay inta u ninkii saa yidhi ku soo firiyay, ayuu si degdeg badan ugu deexday, "Saw iguma beernaba, Saw uma balweeyaba..."
         Intaasi haddii ay gundhig iyo guudmar kooban ba innoo tahay, aan u soo noqdo ujeeddadii aan heestan u rabay in aynu u dhuuxno. Cabdi midhaha afkiisa ka soo baxay, uurkiisa iyo maankiisana ka soo maaxday waxa ay sideen farriimo mudan in biyo dahab lagu qoro, hal mar ayay maskaxdu wada godlatay gocasho, garnaqsi iyo go'aan yaab leh! Cabdi markiiba waxa uu sawir buuxa ka bixiyay inantu halka ay kaga taallo iyo sida ay agtiisa ugu weyntahay. In ay ka tagtay, wax la qaban wayday, cid kale ka raacday, xumaysay, ka cudurdaaratay... waxaas oo dhan iyo ka badan kii ay noqon lahayd sababta maqnaanteeduba inta uu meel iska dhigay, ayaa uu wixii uurkiisa yaallay uu si dhab ah afka ugu muujiyay, waxaasina waa sida hubantida ah ee jacaylkeedu uu ugu beeranyahay boggiisa!  
      Marka uu labada meeris ee hore ku sheego sida ay ugu tallaalantahay, iyo sida ay ugu weyntahay ee uu ugu heesaayo, labada meeris ee ku xiga waxa uu ku muujinayaa garnaqsi ah sida uu la rabay iyo sida ay ka yeeshay! Waxa asluubta iyo farshaxanka leh ayaa ah in halabuurka Cabdi uu ixtiraamka garasho ku dhex muujiyay labadaas sadar ee labaad, waa marka uu yidhi, "Saw wayga baydhee, Barbarkayga kuma wadin" waxa asluubta meerisyadani ay caddaynayaan sida Cabdi u qiraaqo madaxbannaanida gabadha, xornimada dookheeda, xuduudda rabitaankiisa iyo jacayl haddii uu dhammays noqon lahaa ku dhisnaan lahaa is dhinac joog, ee aan ku dhisnaadeen isku-dhaqan-joog! Sababta aan sidaas u leeyahay na waxa ay tahay, Cabdi waxa uu innoo sheegay inanta in uu barbarkiisa rabay in ay ka soo muuqato, ee sida halabuurka qaar dareenkooda rabitaan, quruxeed, ubad dhalis iyo cid kale la xifaaltan meesha kama muuqdo.
        Masalan ma odhan, 'yaad u bad u dhashaa, reerkaad ka dhalataa goba, jidhkaaga yaa isku mara, yaad cunto u samaysaa, yaad, yaad, yaa...' waxaas oo dhammi iyaga oo damac iyo hunguri ah meeshan kama muuqdaan, waxa se halkan ku cad qof raba qof uu rabo, una raba si dabiici ah oo hunguri oo dhanba ka xeelfog! Waxa se qofkii kale uu si ikhtiyaari ah u qaatay in uu waddo kale oo ta loogu baaqay ahayn uu qaado. Labada meeris ee caanka ah, "Jacayl biri ma goysoo, Biyo kaama maydhaan" iyaguna waxa ay tilmaamayaan go'aan ah in Cabdi uu qirtay heerka jacaylkiisa, aqbalay ka leexashada gabadha, se uu go'aansaday in uu waligiiba la noolaado jacaylkeeda ruuxda la falgalay, maaddaama aanay biyona ka maydhi karin, birina aanay ka goyn karin! Sidaa awgeed, heestani waxa ay ka mid tahay shakhsiyan heesaha aan ixtiraamka wen ee Suugaaneed u hayo. Swedish MP:s
”NOW IS IT SWEDEN’S AND EUROPE’S TURN TO RECOGNIZE SOMALILAND”

”Israel's recognition is strategic - an independent Somaliland is a reliable partner in the fight against terrorism, piracy and irregular migration.”

"We can no longer turn a blind eye to the fact that in practice we are punishing a people for having succeeded where many thought it was impossible,"

When Israel is now the first UN state to formally recognize the Republic of Somaliland as a sovereign and independent state, a new chapter is written in the modern history of Africa. It is a decision that does not come a day too soon. For over three decades, Somaliland has shown the world that peace, democracy and development are possible even in one of the world’s most troubled regions – without having received the international recognition it so clearly deserves.

Somaliland is not a new phenomenon. Back in 1991, it unilaterally declared its independence from Somalia after suffering greatly under the Siad Barre dictatorship and the subsequent civil war. Unlike the rest of Somalia, Somaliland chose a different path: reconciliation between clans, demobilization of militias, reconstruction of society and gradual, free elections.
Today, the country has a functioning constitution, a multi-party system, regular presidential and parliamentary elections that have been judged free and fair by international observers, and a growing economy where the port of Berbera is becoming an increasingly important hub in the Red Sea and a hub for the entire African continent.

All of this has happened without a single penny in aid. On the contrary, Somaliland has often been punished for its success. While billions of kronor have been pumped into Somalia's capital, Mogadishu - often without visible results - Somaliland's capital, Hargeisa, has been left to fend for itself. 

Yet, it has succeeded in what so many others have failed to do: build a stable, democratic state on the Horn of Africa.
Israel's recognition is not only fair, it is also strategic. An independent Somaliland is a reliable partner in the fight against terrorism, piracy and irregular migration. The country already has deep security cooperation with several countries, such as the United States and the United Kingdom. With Israel's recognition comes the possibility of formal trade agreements, investments and a clear alternative to the authoritarian model that is spreading in the region.

It would not be a day too early for Sweden and the rest of the free world to follow suit. Sweden has long been a proud voice for democracy and human rights. We can no longer turn a blind eye to the fact that we are in practice punishing a people for succeeding where many thought it was impossible. 
Continuing to treat Somaliland as part of collapsed Somalia is not neutrality – it is actively opposing a successful democracy.

An independent Somaliland is a reliable partner in the fight against terrorism, piracy and irregular migration.
Recognition of Somaliland is not a departure from the principle of the inviolability of African borders – it is a recognition of the reality on the ground. When a people has shown for three decades that they can and want to govern themselves in peace and democracy, then the world has a moral obligation to listen.
Israel is now leading the way. Let Sweden be among the first in Europe to follow suit.

Magnus Oscarsson (KD)
Chairman of the Swedish-Somaliland parliamentary friendship association

Markus Wiechel (SD)
Vice-Chairman of the Swedish-Somaliland parliamentary friendship association

Taariikh la marin habaabiyey 
=======================

Gumaysigii talyaaniga ee Soomaaliya gaar ahaan gobalada Koonfur wuxuu dhamaaday 1941. Waxaa la wareegay UK oo horay u gumaysanayey gobalada Waqooyi.

Gumaysiga Koonfur ee UK waxa uu ku ekaa 1950 .. oo Soomaaliya oo dhan ay hoos gashay maganta UN (Trusteeship). Waxaa u tartamay wadamo badan in ay gacanta ku sii hayaan maamulka inta looga diyaarinayo in ay hanan karaan dawladnimada muddo 10 sano ah gudahood.

Waxaa gobalada Koonfureed ay Soomaalidii markaa joogtay doorbideen in Talyaanigu gaarsiiyo dawladnimada .. halka ay ka diideen in UK sii joogto. Waxaase korjoogto looga dhigay dhowr waddan oo kala ah Colombia, iyo Philippines oo iyagu Report joogta ah kana madax banaanaa maamulka Talyaaniga iyo UK si joogta ah u siinayey UN.

Taas macnaheedu waa in gumaysigu dhamaaday 1950 .. 10 sano loo diyaarinayey dawladnimo oo ay gacanta ku haysay UN.

Waxaa ballantu ahayd in 1 July 1960 laba gobal ee Waqooyi iyo Koonfur wada xoroobaan. Dabcan UK iyada oo ka ciilqabta diidka Koonfur ee sii maamulida ayay 5 maalmood ka hormareen xorriyada.

MW Cigaal oo 2 bilood ka hor xornimada waraysi siiyey BBC wuxuu caddeeyey in lagu ballamay 1 July in labada gobal xornimada wada qaataan.

10 sano waxaa jiray golayaal ka kooban Soomaali oo maamulka uga hooseeyey waddamada reer Yurub ee UN u xilsaaray in ay dawladnimo gaarsiiyaan .. 

Dawladdii ugu horaysay oo abid Soomaali yeelato waxaa dhidibada loo taagay 1960, 1 July .. isla markaasna UN aqoonsaday.

Soomaalida intaas kuma hakan .. waxay isku dayeen in ay raadiyaan gobalada maqan ee DDS, DJabouti iyo NFD ilaa OAU uu ka go'aamiyey 1963 in xuduudaha markaas la kala joogay aan lagu xad gudbi karin. Sidaas oo ay tahay weli xuduuda aan la leenahay Ethiopia iyo Kenya waa xuduud beenaad ilaa burburkii.

Waxaa la oran karaa Soomaaliya waxay xorowday 1950 - technically.

Afhayeenka Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, Mudane Xuseen Aadan Cige (Dayr), ayaa sheegay in Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ay duruufo aad u adag kaga soo gudubtay geesinimo, naf-hurnimo iyo go’aan adag oo aan marnaba la jabin karin.

Afhayeenka Madaxweynaha ayaa qoraal uu ku baahiyey bartiisa X, kaas oo ay soo turjuntay Wakaaladda Wararka Somaliland ee SOLNA ayuu ku sheegay in qaran kastaa maro waqtiyo adag oo tijaabiya adkaysigiisa, dulqaadkiisa iyo midnimada dadkiisa. 

Muddane Dayr Waxa uu tilmaamay in shacabka Somaliland, ay hore u soo mareen marxalado ka ad-adag kuwa maanta jira, oo ay ka mid ahaayeen go’doon iyo xasuuq baahsan.

Afhayeenku waxa uu carrabka ku adkeeyey in shacabka Somaliland ay kaga adkaadeen caqabadahaas geesinimo, alla bari iyo go’aan adag, isla markaana maanta ay mideysan yihiin, kuna filan yihiin inay ka gudbaan khatar kasta oo soo food saarta qarankooda.

Sidoo kale, Afhayeenka Madaxweynaha ayaa sheegay in waqtigan uu yahay mid u baahan feejignaan qaran iyo midnimo buuxda, si wadajir ahna looga hortago cid kasta oo ka soo horjeedda jiritaanka, amniga iyo danaha Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland.

Ugu dambayn, waxa uu xusay baahida loo qabo in si adag loola dagaallamo shakhsiyaadka ama kooxaha ku dhuumanaya diinta, balse diidan xuquuqda sharciga ah ee Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland u leedahay inay noqoto dal xor ah, madax-bannaan, isla markaana ka mid noqda beesha caalamka.

Waxa uu si gaar ah u sheegay in Somaliland ay si adag ula dagaallamayso shakhsiyaadka ama kooxaha ku dhuumanaya magaca diinta, balse dhab ahaantii u adeegaya dano shisheeye, kana hor imanaya xaqa sharciga ah ee Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland u leedahay inay noqoto dal xor ah, madax-bannaan, oo ka mid ah beesha caalamka.

Ugu dambayn, Afhayeenka Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland waxa uu farriin cad u diray cadowga gudaha iyo dibadda, isaga oo sheegay in Somaliland aanay marna dib uga laaban doonin ilaalinta jiritaankeeda, qaranimadeeda iyo go’aankeeda madax-bannaan.

Karin waa Austrian waxa ayna ku dhalatay Vienna sanadkii 1965.

Dhalashada Austria waxaa aas'aas u ah inaa daacad u tahay Austria, sidoo kale aadan ka qeyb noqon karin wax walba amniga iyo danaha dalka liddi ku ah.

Sidee kula tahay?

post_author_name_pi: 365 Things To Do In The Twin Cities
post_text_pi:
✨ Hey Twin Cities!! One of the most magical winter nights in Minnesota is back! ✨

The Luminary Loppet returns to Lake of the Isles in Minneapolis on February 7, 2026, and it’s pure winter magic. Picture walking across a frozen lake surrounded by glowing ice luminaries, fire features, live music, food trucks, and a festive party atmosphere.

This is not a race. It’s a candlelit winter experience you can walk, snowshoe, or ski at your own pace. Perfect for date night, family fun, or a night out with friends.

🎆 Ice luminaries
🔥 Fire dancers & warming bonfires
🎶 Live music & winter vibes
🍫 S’mores, food trucks, and more

❄️ Don’t miss one of the most unforgettable Twin Cities winter events of the year!

"Bulshada Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland waxa ay maanta taagan tahay marxalad taariikhi ah oo u baahan midnimo qaran, is-aaminaad, iyo aragti wadaag mustaqbalka fog. Midnimadu ma aha oo keliya qiime bulsho, balse waa tiir istiraatiiji ah oo saldhig u ah jiritaanka, horumarka, iyo adkeysiga qarannimada Somaliland. Taariikh ahaan, guulaha waaweyn ee ay Somaliland gaadhay sida nabadgelyada, dimuqraadiyadda, iyo dhismaha hay’adaha dawliga ah waxay ku yimaaddeen wadajir iyo isku-duubni bulsho. Mustaqbalku waa mid rajo leh, fursado badanna waa ay muuqdaan, balse hirgelintoodu waxa ay si toos ah ugu xidhan tahay awoodda ay Somaliland u leedahay inay ilaaliso midnimadeeda gudaha.

Dhanka kale, waa in si miyir leh loo aqoonsadaa in xoogag cadow ah ay dib isu abaabulayaan, kuna hawlan yihiin isku dayo lagu wiiqayo xasilloonida iyo jiritaanka Somaliland. Xaaladdan, midnimadu waa hubka ugu awoodda badan ee lagu difaaci karo qaranka. Haddii reer Somaliland ay sii wadaan midnimo, wada-shaqayn, iyo ilaalinta danaha guud, ma jiri doonto awood ka adkaan karta rabitaanka shacabka. Sidaas awgeed, adkeysiga midnimada qaranku waxa uu noqonayaa furaha guusha iyo xaqiijinta himilada qaran ee Somaliland, waana dariiqa kaliya ee lagu gaadhi karo guul waarta iyo aqoonsi buuxa."La Taliyaha Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland  ee dhanka siyaasadda Dibadda Maxamed Xaaji.

Soomaalida Canada Oo Wajahaya Xaalad Cimilo Oo Aan Horey Loo Arag
=========== ===========

Canada waxaa ka taagan xaalad cimilo oo aad u adag, kaddib markii baraf culus uu si ballaaran u daboolay guryaha, waddooyinka, gaadiidka iyo kaabayaasha muhiimka ah ee magaalooyin badan. Barafkan oo ay wehliyaan dabaylo xooggan ayaa hakad geliyey isu-socodkii, isla markaana sababay xiritaanka waddooyin iyo baajinta duulimaadyo.

Arrintan ayaa si gaar ah u saameysay Soomaalida ka shaqaysa Canada, kuwaas oo wajahaya xaalad adag oo dhanka cimilada ah, maadaama aysan horey u soo marin qabow iyo baraf noocan ah. Qaar badan ayaa la kulmay caqabado shaqo sida gaadiid la’aan, shaqo-joojin ku-meel-gaar ah, iyo khataro amni halka nolosha maalinlaha ahna ay ku adkaatay la-qabsiga qabowga daran.

Dawlada Canada ayaa soo saaray digniino degdeg ah, iyagoo ku boorriyey dadka inay guryahooda ku nagaadaan haddii aanay jirin baahi daruuri ah. Iskuullo ayaa la xiray ama loo wareejiyey waxbarasho online ah, halka adeegyada gurmadku ay wadaan furista waddooyinka iyo caawinta dadka ku go’doonsan barafka.

UK Oo Wajahaysa Dacwad: Heshiis La Laalay, Tarxiil La Waayay, Lacagna La Isku Haysto
===================

Dowladda Rwanda ayaa dacwad rasmi ah ka gudbisay dowladda Boqortooyada Midowday (UK), kaddib markii ay ku eedeysay inay ka gaabisay bixinta lacag ku dhow £50 milyan oo ka mid ahayd heshiiskii lagu tarxiili lahaa magangalyo-doonka.

Dacwaddan oo la horgeeyay maxkamad caalami ah ayaa salka ku haysa heshiiskii la baxay UK–Rwanda Migration and Economic Development Partnership, kaas oo UK ay ku ballanqaadday maalgelin si Rwanda u qaabisho magangalyo-doon la filayay in loo soo wareejiyo. 
Inkasta oo qorshahaasi la joojiyay isla markaana aan hal qofna la tarxiilin, Rwanda waxay sheegtay in waajibaadkii dhaqaale ee heshiiska aan si buuxda loo bixin.

Heshiiskan waxa uu si gaar ah u khusayay dadka magangalyo-doon si sharci-darro ah ku galay UK, badanaa kuwa ka tallaaba Kanaalka Ingiriiska. Qorshuhu wuxuu ahaa in UK aysan gudaha dalka ka baadhin codsiyadooda, balse Rwanda loo diro, halkaas oo laga baari lahaa magangelyada, islamarkaana haddii la aqbalo ay Rwanda ku degi lahaayeen, kana mid noqon lahaayeen bulshada dalkaas, halkii ay UK ku laaban lahaayeen.

Xogta la shaaciyay ayaa muujinaysa in UK hore u bixisay ku dhowaad £290 milyan, balse Rwanda ay ku adkaysanayso in weli lagu leeyahay lacagaha harsan ee heshiiska. Dhanka kale, warbixinno UK laga helay ayaa tilmaamaya in guud ahaan qorshaha la laalay uu canshuur-bixiyeyaasha UK ku kacay ilaa £715 milyan.

Khilaafkan sharci ayaa imanaya xilli uu muran siyaasadeed iyo mid sharci labadaba ka taagan yahay heshiiska tarxiilka, waxaana hadda go’aanka ugu dambeeya la sugayaa maxkamadda, iyadoo la filayo in arrintani saameyn ballaaran ku yeelato heshiisyada socdaalka ee mustaqbalka iyo xiriirka Rwanda iyo UK.

Halbeeg Media Inc

Xukuumaddu waa inay meesha ka saartaa baahinta BBC u dhextaal wasaaradda Warfaafinta.

Waxaan arkayaa in cadowgii Somaliland ay maanta soo dhigeen war sheegaaya in Erig Trump oo ah wiilka uu dhalay Madaxweyne Trump uu beeniyay in uu la kulmay madaxweynaha qaranka Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland.

Warbaahintaa waxaa hogaaminaaya idaacada UK laga lee yahay ee Been-been C ( BBC) iyo talefishinkii dalka laga mamnuucay ee Universal TV, waxana ay isku dayayaan inay dadka reer Somaliland ku niyad jebiyaan, iyagoo nuxurka ay noo sheegayaan ay tahay in Madaxweyne Ciro uu iska tegay meel aan lagu casuumin.

Muhiim maaha in aan u sharaxno waxa meesha ka dhacay, laakiin waxa ay tahay keliya inaan u sheegno caqli gaabka arrinkaa wada in miiskaa dadka fadhiyay oo uu ka mid ahaa madaxweynaha dalka Israel in aan cid aan ku casuunayn aanay ka qayb geli karayn, iskaba daa in uu hadal ka jeediyee.

Xukuumadda Somaliland iyo wefdigii madaxweynuhu midna nooma sheegin dekedo iyo mashaariic laga wada hadlay, mana dafiri kartaan in ujeedadii wefdiga ee ahayd in fariinta Somaliland la qaado in Erik Trump uu ka mid ahaa dadkii sida weyn u dhegaystay ee ka xumaaday dhibkii uu madaxweynuhu ka sheegay madasha ee midnimadii Soomaalida ay shacabkan u gaysatay.

Today the Somali Community in Uitenhage led by its Chairperson Mr. Abdul Omar held a meeting with Uitenhage Provincial Hospital Board.The meeting was chaired by Mr Tim Mcquire, who hold a portfolio of Treasurer and Sub-Committee Chairperson for  Infrastructure.In the Meeting another board member Ms Charlotte Bouwer who hold Chairperson :Patient Care & Quality Assurance attended. Organised Labour was also represented in the meeting.

The Somali Community representatives expressed appreciation for the warm welcome by the Board. They have requested to partner up with the hospital on service improvement and mentioned that they are aware of the challenges faced by the the public sector.

Challenges of patient care with specific reference to the Somali community is in the main the language barrier and more so cultural barriers. The concerns were acknowledged,and protocol when dissatisfied with service was explained to them. Staff shortages and infrastructure challenges were also raised .The board stated that it plans to turnaround the current status  through engagement with the Department of Health, Community-Based Organizations and the private sector. The formation of this partnership is meant to benefit all within the catchment area of the hospital.It is also to equip the clients (patients & visitors) on the hospital policies.

Mrs. Bouah will compile a comprehensive report for the hospital management with proposals as per the discussions of the meeting. It is thus envisioned that out of this noble gesture, the Somali community will comply with the hospital policies/ prescripts of the department  of health.

STATEHOUSE PRESS RELEASE (UPDATED)

WE ARE TARGETING $5BILLION TRADE VOLUME WITH NIGERIA- PRESIDENT ERDOGAN

President Recep Tayyip Erdogan of the Republic of Türkiye, on Tuesday in Ankara, said his country targets a $5 billion trade volume with Nigeria, adding that discussions to actualise this have already commenced. 

President Erdogan stated this during a joint press briefing with President Bola Ahmed Tinubu during the Nigerian President's State Visit.

At present, the trade volume between the two nations is about $2 billion. Turkey exports  planes, helicopters, machinery, iron and steel, and chemical products to Nigeria. .Nigeria exports crude oil and agricultural products to Türkiye.

President Erdogan said the establishment of the Joint Economy and Trade Committee between the two countries will create opportunities to expand Turkish investments in Nigeria to realise the target.

President Erdogan praised the commitment of President Tinubu to develop Nigeria and highlighted the presence of several ministers and high-ranking officials as the most unambiguous indication of this political determination:

“Today, we conducted a comprehensive review of our relations with the esteemed President and his delegation in the fields of trade, investments, energy, education and defence industry.

“Firstly, we see that we have significant potential in the fields of trade and investment. In today's meetings, our commitment is to the $5 billion trade volume target, and we discussed the steps needed. 

“We also discussed opportunities to support our investments in Nigeria. We believe that the joint Economy and Trade Committee, which we agreed to establish today, will be instrumental in this regard.”

President Erdogan hailed the Nigerian President’s strides in the energy sector, which has resulted in the restructuring of the country’s economy. 

He hoped that the cooperation between the Turkish Petroleum Corporation, their Nigerian counterparts, and organisations would yield the expected outcomes.  

 President Erdogan promised to assist Nigeria in tackling insurgency,  given its history with a similar problem.

“Terrorist organisations emerging, particularly in Africa's Sahel region, unfortunately, pose a threat to the peace of the entire continent. We stand by the friendly people of Nigeria in their fight against terrorism under the leadership of President Tinubu.

“In fact, today, we addressed opportunities for closer cooperation in the fields of military training and intelligence. We stated that we are ready to share our country's significant experience in combating terrorism.

“Also, I believe that we will soon see positive outcomes from the meetings that Nigerian officials will hold with our leading defence industry companies during this visit,” he said. 

In his remarks, President Tinubu expressed gratitude to the Republic of Türkiye for its openness and willingness to collaborate in promoting global freedom, stability, and prosperity. 

He emphasised the importance of creating an inclusive economy, particularly focusing on vulnerable people. 

 President Tinubu commended the Turkish leader for being “willing to collaborate, willing to help, willing to work together to promote freedom, stability and prosperity, shared prosperity across the world.

“What is very important to the countries being discussed, trade, business, no restrictions, giving opportunity to those who are ready to learn to work and prosper. How do we build an inclusive economy together? How do we reform the economy and involve vulnerable people? How do we ensure peace in the world?" he asked.

President Tinubu stressed that Nigeria would continue to play a significant role in promoting peace and stability in Africa despite security challenges in some parts of the country.

"We discussed efforts against terrorism. We discussed how to defeat agents of destabilisation."

President Tinubu also praised President Erdogan for his commitment towards promoting global peace, particularly his efforts in Somalia. 

At the end of the bilateral meeting, officials from the two countries signed 9 agreements. 

They were: Agreement on Cooperation in the Field of Diaspora Policy; Agreement on Defence Cooperation; Joint Declaration Establishing the Economy and Trade Joint Committee; and Agreement in the Field of Halal Quality Infrastructure.

Others include Cooperation in the Field of Higher Education; Cooperation in the Field of Media and Communication; Cooperation in the Field of Education; Cooperation Between the Republic of Türkiye, Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Diplomacy Academy, and the Federal Republic of Nigeria, Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Foreign Affairs Academy; and Cooperation Between the Republic of Türkiye, Ministry of Social services and the Federal Republic of Nigeria, Ministry of women Affairs and Social Development.

Weli ma isweydiisay sababta isirka Soomaaliyeed weerarka loogu yahay iyo cidda ka damaysa? 

Isku daygii dil ee Congresswoman Ilhan Omar waxuu tusaale cad u yahay weerarka qaawan ee isirka Soomaaliyeed loogu yahay. Waxaan aragnay raafka iyo dhibaatada lagu hayo jaaliyada Soomaaliyeed ee Maraykana siiba Gobolka Minnesota.

Weerarka isirka Soomaaliyeed lagu wado waa mid af iyo adin ah, siduu ku socdona Maraykana kuma eka ee dalkii ayaa lagu wadaa, meelkasta oo jaaliyad Soomaaliyeed joogtona waa lagu wadaa.

Weerarkan waxaa ka dameeya labo qolo oo isbiirsatay waa Neonazi (cunsuriyiin xagjir ah) iyo Zionist (sahyuuniyad), sababta weerarkuna waa quurjebin isirka Soomaaliyeed. Waxaa la arkay Soomaalidu in ay tahay bulsho isku kalsoon, aan libiqsan, siyaasada Maraykana si wacan ugu soo baxay, Ilhaan Cumar, Hodon Dhalac, Nafiisa Maxamed, Ismaaciil Maxamed, Jamal Cusmaan iyo kuwo kale oo badan. Dad aan si fudud loo duufsan karin, bulsho aan milmin (un assimilated). Bulshooyinka kale ee Muslim ka dumarkoodu badankood xijaabka kuma dhegana, dalalka ay tagaana waa ku milmaan. Halka gabadha Soomaaliyeed ay markasta xijaabkeeda ka tegin (visible) tahay.

Jiilka labaad (second generation) ee Soomaalida ku dhalatay qurbaha sida ; Maraykan, Canada Australia iyo Europe waa dad aad wax u bartay siiba gabdhaha oo aad u dhiiraan, taas ayaa sababtay qolyahaan weerarka ina ku ah in ay qaadan waayaan, ciirina (intimidated) dareemaan. Si kale hadaan u dheho waa qolyo qaadan waa aha oo wax inoo ogoleyn.

Dhibta keliya ee Ina haysata waa dalka oo siyaasiyiin naftooda keliya u adeega (selfish and corrupted) ay dadka hortaagin yihiin.

Weerarkaan hadaan iskaashano, oo isku duubnaano waan iska caabin iddamnka alle.

If it was truly unknown and threatening, why no hazmat response, hospital check, or even a wardrobe change? And the "assailant"? This isn't random violence; it's theater. Even Trump called it out: "She probably had herself sprayed." No chaos, no panic—just a perfectly timed "incident" at a town hall where she's pushing to abolish ICE amid immigration debates. The FBI took over the probe, but with vinegar as the "weapon," charges are minor assault at best—hardly the terrorist act her camp spins it as.

For decades, American taxpayers have sent foreign aid to Somalia and other countries as part of U.S. humanitarian, security, and development programs. In recent years, overall U.S. assistance to Somalia has declined sharply compared with earlier levels, with the U.S. providing about $128 million in total aid in 2025—down from hundreds of millions in prior years—even as millions of Somalis face food insecurity and conflict.

Under the current administration, the U.S. also suspended all assistance to the Somali federal government after accusing Somali officials of destroying U.S.-funded food aid intended for vulnerable populations, part of a broader review of foreign aid programs.

It’s true that U.S. aid has been a major source of revenue for Somalia’s government and humanitarian programs, and critics argue that past aid efforts have been plagued by corruption and poor outcomes. Supporters of continued engagement counter that aid has also provided food assistance, helped counter extremist groups like al‑Shabaab, and contributed to stability efforts.

As for the suggestion that money “flows back overseas,” claims that Minnesota welfare fraud directly funded terrorism abroad are unsubstantiated and have been disputed by fact‑based reporting; while fraud schemes in Minnesota involving Somali Americans have drawn political attention, there’s no confirmed evidence tying stolen taxpayer funds to terrorist groups.

Representative Ilhan Omar — originally a Somali refugee — has been a target of political criticism for her heritage and for policy positions, but there’s no evidence she personally benefits from U.S. foreign aid to Somalia or directs it for private use.

Today, I’m sharing my interview with Ohio Somali TV / SONNA Production LLC about the GHASD Fresh Farm Initiative and the work we are carrying out through the Ohio Department of Agriculture (ODA) Specialty Crop Block Grant.

The GHASD Fresh Farm Initiative is designed to strengthen community knowledge and practical skills related to home gardening and nutrition. Through hands-on education, we support families in learning how to grow fresh produce, make informed nutrition decisions, and increase access to specialty crops. Our aim is to promote healthier households while building long-term wellbeing through learning, consistency, and community partnership.

Thank you to Ohio Somali TV for helping us share this message with the broader community, and thank you to the GHASD Fresh Farm Initiative team for your continued commitment and hard work. I also encourage Central Ohio residents to join us for our next education and training event on February 21, 2026, on the West Side of Columbus, Ohio. We look forward to welcoming you and learning together.

This is why Raila placed his trust in a select few friends like Junet.

After the 2013 elections, Raila found himself deserted not only by the government he once served as prime minister, but also by many members of his own political party, ODM. The Uhuru-Ruto administration stripped him of nearly all his security and resources, leaving him with just one official vehicle, the iconic Toyota V8 KBR.

Raila frequently visited Kisumu on weekends, and as loyal ODM youths, we would head to Kisumu airport to provide him with security. We usually relied on older vehicles from Kisumu Spectre International to make our way to the airport. Raila enjoyed organizing his political activities at his Milimani home, located across from the Nyanza Golf Club and next to the Sovereign Hotel.

Raila Odinga's residence is right next to Evans Kidero's house. During those weekends when Raila was in Kisumu, many individuals heading to Kidero's home for handouts would pass by Raila’s gate, often muttering in Dholuo, "Dala Raila ni tinde odong' gunda," which translates to "Raila's home has become an abandoned shack."

Here are the friends who stood by Raila during that challenging time. Junet Mohamed was with him every weekend in Kisumu, often spending time at the Kisumu Yacht Club. It was my first encounter with Junet, and initially, I mistook him for a woman simply due to his name. Other loyal supporters included Jimi Wanjigi, Oparanya, Muthama, Joho, Rasanga Pemblepe, Cyprian Awiti Ja Mawego, Aduma Kowuor, and the Kajwangs. Junet remained at Raila's side, acting as a steadfast aide, and I believe that’s how their friendship solidified.

At times, I would question if that was truly Raila, given how many had abandoned him. Many speculated that his political career had come to an end after the 2013 elections.

But who is Raila? After spending a few months abroad, he returned with an unprecedented vigor, sparking the phrase, "Raila, while you were away." That's when many returned to Raila, and he welcomed them all.

Apart from Junet, numerous supporters from the Somali community in Migori remained close to him but stayed out of the public eye. So when you see people like Oketch Salah emerging today, don’t dismiss their claims or by asking for photographs they took before 2025; there’s much more to Raila's circle that Winnie may not be aware of. 

For Oketch Salah, Winnie likely knows him well, but perhaps she was just having an off day when she denied knowing him on a national TV. Personally, I don’t know him, but I recall asking about him on the first day when some overzealous bouncers had him removed from the dais at a Kisumu rally. I was told, "Mago Osiepe Winnie," meaning he is part of Winnie’s circle. He was later permitted back on the dais and, not long after, Raila introduced him as his son, noting that he’s a businessman from Migori.

So, if someone claims they were with Raila or that Raila shared something with them, let’s encourage them to enjoy their moment. Many of us were deeply affected by the passing of RAO, but we’re carrying on.

Waxay kale oo la socday Ducaale Iddiris oo ahaa nin Isaaq ah (Habar Awal), iyo ciidan badan oo ay hub u qaybiyeen oo loo xil saaray wadista awrta gaadiidka ah ee sahaydu u saarnayd nimankaa caddaanka ah. Ducaale wuxuu ahaa nin jid-mariya sahamiyayaasha Yurubiyaankana ah, meelo badan oo qaaradda Afrika ahna la maray. Wuxuu kale oo ahaa turjubaan u kala af naqa iyaga iyo bulshada ay dhex marayaan. 

Qoraallada xusuus-qorka ah ee uu ku diyaariyay safarkiisa Berbera ilaa Bayaxow, haddaynu in kooban uun ka soo qaadanno ah inta qusaysa title’ka aan maqaalka ku billaabay, wuxuu Franky odhanayaa; 
 
Ogaadeen markii aannu gaadhno, jifooyinka aannu halkaa kula kulmi doonno, waxay canshuur nagaga dhigi doonaan inaannu siinno dhar iyo kuulaha makaawiga ah, laakiin ka hor intaannaan Ogaadeen gaadhin, qabiilkada kale een sii dhex mari doonno, iyagu waxay naga aqbali doonaan inay naga qaataan lacag ama aannu warqad ugu qorno Mr. Walsh oo hadhow siiya wixii aannu u garannay. Ogaadeenku se lacag iyo warqad toona kaa aqbali maayaane, waa in wixii aannu wadano ee dhar ama kuulaha makaawiga ah siinno. 

Meel kame kale wuxuu Franky odhanayaa; Suldaanka Habaryoonis, Suldaan Cawad Suldaan Diiriye, ayaa ii sheegay inuu nagu dari doono 2 ama 3 nin oo jidka na la mara oo gabdhahoodu u dhaxeen rag Bah Xawaadle ah. 

Markay soo gaadhaan Garloogube, ayay salaaddiinta beesha reer Dalal waxay Franky ku wargelinayaan inuu bixiyo canshuur dhan 4 kun oo tashtaash (khamiis). Franky ayaa dabadeed wuxuu odhanayaa; Turjubaankaygii ayaa ii sheegay in reer Dalalku garab ka heli doonaan jifo la yidhaahdo reer Ugaas Cilmi oo fardooley ah, dagaalyahamiin iyo colwad miidhanna ah. 

Wuxuu Franky odhanayaa; Turjubaankaygu aad buu uga walaacsanaa reer Ugaas Cilmi, oo dhammaantood nin iyo faras ah, inay meel dhow ku suganyihiin, oo ay ku taageerayaan reer Dalal shuruuddooda ah inaan bixinno 4 kun oo tashtaash. 

Wuxuu Franku odhanayaa; Wajiga turjubaankayga ayaan eegay oo ay murugo madoobaysay, saa waxaan eegay wajiga Lort-Phillips, saa isna waa la mid oo wuxuu haystay diirad uu ku bidhaaminayo bal inuu arko wax siigo ah oo fardaha reer Ugaas Cilmi ah. 

Wuxuu kale oo Franky odhanayaa; 

Nimankii aannu ku murmaynay canshuurta ay na saareen ayaa nooga dhaqaaqay dhinaca kaynta, deedna si lama filaan ah ayunbaa hal mar waxaa na soo galay boqollaal fardooley ah oo reer Ugaas Cilmi ah, waxaana ku xigay ciidan tiro badan oo lug ah oo dagaalyahannada reer Dalal ah. Qaylo iyo sawaxan iyo qoobka fardaha ayaa is qabsaday. Meel halka aannu degganayn u dhaw ayay is joojeen, iyagoo si tab iyo xeel leh warmaha dhulka ugu tuuraya, deedna iyagoon fardaha ka degin, dib u soo dhufanaya warmaha. 

Deedna bidix iyo midigba intay naga soo mareen ayay noo hareereeyeen qaab aad mooddo inay isu diyaarinayaan weerar. Haddana si lama filaan ayunbay fardahoodii dib u rogeen oo dhankii ay ka yimaaddeen ku noqdeen, iyagoo aad u sawaxmaya oo fardaha kolba qaab u jeeraarinaya sidii ay dagaal dhab ah ku jiraan, ciidankii lugta ahaayina waxay isku dareen sacabka oo ay si fiican isula heleen. 

Dhab ahaantii, muuqaal xiiso leh baannu daawannay oo ay halkaa ku soo bandhigeen, neeftii baana naga soo baxday markii ay dib nooga noqdeen.
——————

Taariikh kooban oo ku saabsan Ducaale Iddiris; Ducaale Idiris wuxuu ahaa Soomaali jid-mariye u ahaa sahamiyayaashii reer Yurub ee iman jiray dhulka Soomaalida. Isagoo aad u da' yar oo 15 sano jir ah, ayuu shaqadaas galay, aabbihiina wuxuu ka mid ahaa bilayskii Ingiriiska ee Cadan.

Wuxuu la soo shaqeeyay, jid-tusena u ahaa saraakiil iyo shaqsiyaad Reer Yurub ah oo uu la gooshay dunida gaafaheeda. Waxaa raggaas ka mid ahaa; H.M Stanley, Count Semel Teleki, Frederick Jackson, Frankly James, Capt. Frederick Lugard, iyo qaar Maraykan ah oo ka mid ahaayeen Daniel Giraud Elliot, Arthur Donaldson Smith iyo Carl Ethan Akeley.  Wuxuu ku hadli jiray English, Swahili, iyo Carabi. 

Waxaynu maqaallo kale ku wadaagi doonnaa, safarro kale oo uu soo jid-mariyay qaar ka mid ah sahamiyayaashaas.
