Shirkii Ansixinta Dastuurka Soomaaliya – Mogadishu, 2012 (Shirka Dastuurka Soomaaliyeed)

Shirkii Ansixinta Dastuurka ee Soomaaliya waxa uu ahaa dhacdo siyaasadeed oo muhiim u ahayd dib u dhiska hay’adaha qaran kadib in ka badan labaatan sano oo fowdo iyo burbur ay dalka ka jirtay. Geedi socodka dastuur samaynta ayaa socday muddo dheer, iyadoo shirka ansixinta uu ahaa mid ka mid ah marxaladihii ugu dambeeyay ee lagu dhisayo hanaan dastuuri ah.  ￼

1. Qorshaha iyo ujeeddada shirka
Ujeeddada shirkan ayaa ahayd in lagu soo bandhigo laguna ansixiyo Qabyada Dastuurka Federaalka ee Soomaaliya ee 2012 (Provisional Constitution), taas oo ahayd mid ay muddo sanado ah ka soo shaqeynayeen Guddiyada Qaranka ee Dastuurka iyo kooxaha khubarada ah, iyadoo qayb ka ahayd Roadmap-ka iyo heshiisyadii siyaasadeed ee la gaaray si loo soo afjaro xukuumaddii ku-meelgaarka ahayd.  ￼

2. Furitaanka shirka
Shirku waxa uu ka furmay magaalada Mogadishu bartamihii Luulyo 2012 (bisha July), waxaana ka qayb galay in ka badan 800 ergo oo ka kala socday beelo, ururo bulshada rayidka ah, siyaasiyiin iyo madax dhaqameedyo kala duwan. Goobta shirku ka dhacay waxay ahayd xarunta tababarka booliiska ee Muqdisho. Sida lagu soo wariyey, waddooyinka aagga shirka waxaa si weyn loo xoojiyey amnigooda si loo xaqiijiyo nabadgelyada ka qaybgalayaasha.  ￼

3. Dib u dhac iyo diyaar garow
Shirku marar dhowr ahaa wuu dib u dhacay ka hor inta uusan si rasmi ah u furmin, sababo la xiriira arrimo farsamo sida diiwaangelinta ergada iyo diyaarinta liiska ka qaybgalayaasha. Dowladdu waxay markii dambe ku dhawaaqday in shirka si rasmi ah u billaaban doono 25‑ka Luulyo 2012.  ￼

4. Socdaalka shirka
Shirku waxa uu socday dhowr maalmood (qiyaastii sagaal maalmood) intii uu ka socday Muqdisho, iyadoo ergadu ay dib u eegis ku sameeyeen qabyada dastuurka, ka dibna ay ka doodeen qodobo muhiim ah. Waxaa jirtay hawlo diiwaangelin iyo qaybin nuqulo dastuurka ka hor inta aan la gaarin codbixin.  ￼

5. Ansixinta Dastuurka
Shirka Ka dib, 1da Agoosto 2012, Golaha Qaran ee Ansixinta Dastuurka (National Constituent Assembly) ayaa si weyn u Codeeyay una ansixiyey Dastuurka Federaalka ee Ku-meel Gaarka ah ee Soomaaliya, kaas oo helay taageero aad u ballaaran (in ka badan 96% cod). Taas waxay calaamad u ahayd dhammaadka xilligii kala guurka ee Xukuumaddii Federaalka ku-meelgaarka ahayd.  ￼

6. Waxyaabaha muhiimka ah ee Dastuurka
Dastuurka cusub wuxuu qeexayaa qaab-dhismeedka federaalka, xeerarka aasaasiga ah ee dowladnimada, xuquuqda aasaasiga ah ee muwaadiniinta, iyo nidaamka sharci dejinta. In kasta oo loo qorsheeyey in si guud loo codeeyo, amniga darteedna aan la qaban referendum, ayaa markii dambe loo gudbiyey baarlamaanka cusub si uu u ansixiyo si rasmi ah.  ￼

7. Saameyn iyo dhammaan geeddi‑socodka
Ansixinta dastuurku waxay ahayd talaabo muhiim ah oo lagu dhisayo hay’adaha dowladnimo ee Soomaaliya, taasoo dhidibada u aasay nidaam federaal ah oo hadana wali ku jira dib-u-eegis iyo muran siyaasadeed.  ￼

Gunaanad:
Shirkii Ansixinta Dastuurka ee Muqdisho 2012 wuxuu calaamad u ahaa guul siyaasadeed oo muhiim ah kadib burburkii dalka, iyadoo lagu go’aamiyey qaab-dhismeedka federaalka iyo xeerarka aas-aasiga ah ee dalka. Hase yeeshee, geedi socodka dhammaystirka iyo hirgelinta dastuurka ayaa weli ka sii socday Soomaaliya ilaa maanta.  ￼

Shirkii Ansixinta Dastuurka 2012 hirgelintiisa iyo guushiisaba waxaa door weyn ka qaatay shaqsiyaad dadaal badan muujiyey, gaar ahaan:
Wasiir Cabdi Xoosh Jibriil – oo xilka Wasiirka Dastuurka hayay waqtigaas. Wuxuu ahaa maskaxdii iyo matoorkii siyaasadeed ee geeddi-socodka dastuurka, isaga oo si joogto ah u maareynayay wadatashi, cadaadis siyaasadeed, iyo isku xirnaanta beelaha iyo beesha caalamka. Dad badan waxay ku tilmaamaan “laf-dhabartii” dastuur samaynta 2012.
Abwaan Maxamed Xasan (Guulwade) oo door muuqda ayuu ka qaatay wacyigelinta, dhiirrigelinta ergada, iyo kor u qaadista niyadda shirka. Hal-abuurka iyo hadallada uu jeediyay waxay ahaayeen kuwo mideyn, xasuusinaya muhiimadda taariikhiga ah ee go’aanka la qaadanayay.

Doodda Kulul: Wadadka vs. Muqayilka – Yaaba Guri-joog ah?
1. Ninka Wadadka ah (Wadaad-u-yahay)

Dadka difaaca wadadka waxay ku doodaan:

Mas’uuliyadda: Wuxuu aaminsan yahay in haweenku ay yihiin amaano, sidaas darteedna uu xaqooda u ilaaliyo si diini ah.

Dhaqaalaha: Maadaama uusan lacag ku bixin qaad ama balwad, dhaqaalihiisu wuxuu toos u aadaa reerka iyo carruurta.

Xushmadda: Wuxuu ku dadaalaa inuu guriga keeno deganaansho iyo akhlaaq wanaagsan.

Dhinaca kale (Mucaaradka): Dadka dhaleeceeya waxay yiraahdaan, "Wadadka mararka qaarkood aad ayuu u ad-adag yahay (Strict), waxaa laga yaabaa inuu waqti badan ku bixiyo dacwada ama masaajidka, isagoo xaqii xaaska ee dhanka 'shukaansiga' iyo madadaalada yareeya."

2. Ninka Muqayilka ah (Sheeko-badane)

Dadka difaaca muqayilka waxay ku doodaan:

Dhuuxa Sheekada: Ninka muqayilka ah badanaa waa qof "Open" ah, sheeko badan, oo xaaskiisa ka dhiga saaxiibtiis marka uu mirqaansan yahay.

**Farxadda: ** Dadka qaar waxay yiraahdaan muqayilku dabeecad ahaan wuu ka dabacsan yahay wadadka, xaalad kasta oo adagna "Kaftan" ayuu ku dhaafiyaa.

Ilaalinta Murwada: Waxaa la yiraahdaa "Muqayilku hadduu ku jiro xaalad mirqaan ah, xaaskiisa dahab ayuu ka dhigaa."

Dhinaca kale (Mucaaradka): "Sidee laguugu kalsoonaan karaa haddii mushaharkii reerka nus ka mid ah uu marfashka ku baxo? Muqayilku waqtigiisa ugu qaalisan wuxuu ku bixiyaa saaxiibbadiis, isagoo xaaskii oo keligeed ah guriga uga taga habeenkii dambe."

Haddii Raaliyo ay tahay mid raadinaysa Sheeko, Dabacsanaan, iyo Saaxiibtinimo qosol leh, waxaa laga yaabaa inay u janjeerto dhanka kale (inkastoo qiimaha laga bixinayo uu qaali yahay).

#winterpoalnd > Poland ayaa isu diyaarinaysa qabow daran oo aan sanado badan la arag, iyadoo saadaasha cimiladu muujinayso in hawada Arctic ay dalka ku sii jiri doonto ilaa bartamaha Febraayo. Heerka qabowga wuxuu gaari karaa -21°C gobollada bari, halka inta badan dalka ay wajihi doonaan baraf iyo dabaylo qabow oo halis ah.

Talooyin Muhiim ah oo loogu talagalay Dadka Socda iyo Darawallada:

Xiro dhar ku habboon qabowga daran: Isticmaal lakabyo badan, koofiyad, galoofyo, iyo kabo baraf u adkaysata si aad uga hortagto qabowga iyo barafka.

hubso xaaladda waddooyinka ka hor safarka: Raac wararka cimilada iyo digniinaha taraafikada; dib u dhig safarka haddii ay suurtagal tahay.

iska fiiri gaadhigaaga  Hubi batari-ga, taayirrada barafka, antifreeze-ka, iyo shidaal ku filan. diyaarso  buste, biyo, iyo cunto fudud haddii aad ku xannibanto.

Ka fogow safarka habeenkii: Heerkulka ugu hooseeya iyo barafka ugu badan badanaa habeenkii iyo aroortii hore ayay dhacaan.

U fiirso calaamadaha hypothermia: Haddii aad dareento gariir xooggan, daal, ama wareer, raadi meel diirran isla markiiba.

La soco waayeelka iyo carruurta: Kuwani waa kuwa ugu nugul qabowga daran hubi in ay helaan diirimaad ku filan.

Dhaqaalaha Adduunka iyo Doorka Soomaaliya
Dhaqaalaha adduunka waa shabakad adag oo isku xira dalalka caalamka iyada oo loo marayo ganacsi, maaliyad, tiknoolaji, iyo shaqaale. Dhaqaalaha waxaa kaxeeya wax-soo-saarka, isticmaalka, iyo is-weydaarsiga alaabta iyo adeegyada. Dalalka dhaqaale ahaan waaweyn sida Mareykanka, Shiinaha, Midowga Yurub, iyo Japan ayaa door muhiim ah ka ciyaara ganacsiga caalamiga ah, maalgashiga, iyo socodka lacagaha. Qaybaha ugu muhiimsan waxaa ka mid ah warshadaha, beeraha, tamarta, tiknoolajiyada, iyo adeegyada.
Soomaaliya, oo ku taalla Geeska Afrika, waa dal dhaqaale ahaan soo koraya oo leh wax-soo-saar iyo caqabado gaar ah. Dhaqaalaha Soomaaliya wuxuu ku tiirsan yahay xoolaha, beeraha, kalluumaysiga, iyo lacagaha ay soo diraan Soomaalida ku nool dibadda (diaspora). Ganacsiga xoolaha, gaar ahaan geel, ari, iyo lo’, ayaa ah isha ugu weyn ee dakhliga, iyadoo alaabtaas loo dhoofiyo dalalka deriska ah sida Sacuudiga, Imaaraadka Carabta, iyo Yemen. Xeebaha dheer ee Soomaaliya waxay sidoo kale fursad u siinayaan kalluumaysiga iyo ganacsiga badda.
In kasta oo saamiga Soomaaliya ee dhaqaalaha adduunka uu yar yahay, haddana dalka wuxuu door istiraatiiji ah ka ciyaaraa ganacsiga gobolka iyo marin-biyoodka muhiimka ah. Lacagaha ay soo diraan dadka Soomaaliyeed ee dibadda waxay si weyn uga qeyb qaataan nolosha qoysaska iyo suuqyada gudaha, iyaga oo ah xoog dhaqaale oo xasilin kara. Intaa waxaa dheer, Soomaaliya waxay si tartiib tartiib ah u sahminaysaa fursadaha kaabayaasha, isgaarsiinta, iyo tamarta la cusboonaysiin karo, taasoo horumarin karta isku xirnaanta dalalka kale.
Caqabadaha sida siyaasadda aan xasilloonayn, isbeddelka cimilada, iyo awoodda warshadaha oo kooban ayaa saameeya koboca dhaqaalaha Soomaaliya. Laakiin, haddii la sameeyo siyaasado waara, la maalgeliyo aqoonta iyo xirfadaha dadka, iyo horumarinta kaabayaasha ganacsi, Soomaaliya waxay leedahay awood ay door muuqda uga ciyaarto dhaqaalaha gobolka iyo, mustaqbalka fog, adduunka oo dhan.

Somali Spaza Owners Advocate for Inclusive Healthcare in Eastern Cape 🇿🇦🤝

The Eastern Cape board representing Somali spaza shop owners has engaged with public hospital board members to highlight challenges around patient care, language barriers, and cultural sensitivity affecting the Somali community. The group is urging improved inclusion and equitable access to healthcare, in line with the values and principles of South Africa’s Constitution.

“Somali Community Confronts EC Hospital Management Over Language and Cultural Barriers”

Members of the Somali community held a meeting with the hospital’s board of directors, voicing frustration over language difficulties and what they described as a lack of cultural recognition. They called for staff to accommodate their language needs and to show greater respect for their cultural practices, arguing that this would improve patient comfort and overall satisfaction.

JIGJIGA Waxaa Maanta Si rasmi ah loo daahfurayaa Xarunta Dalxiiska Shabeelay ee Ku taalla Deegaanka Soomaalida, taas Oo ay ka soo qeybgalayaan madax ka kala socota qaaradda Afrika. 

Daahfurka xaruntan dalxiiska ayaa lagu tilmaamay mid muhiim u ah horumarinta dalxiiska, dhaqaalaha, iyo fursadaha shaqo ee deegaanka.

Mas’uuliyiinta deegaanka iyo martida sharafta leh ayaa la filayaa in ay jeediyaan khudbado ku saabsan doorka xaruntani ka qaadan doonto kobcinta dalxiiska iyo kor u qaadista iskaashiga dalalka Afrika. Xarunta Dalxiiska Shabeelay ayaa la rajeynayaa inay noqoto goob soo jiidata dalxiisayaal gudaha iyo dibadda ah, isla markaana sare u qaadda sumcadda Deegaanka Soomaalida.

ETV

Ra’iisul Wasaaraha Itoobiya, Dr. Abiy Axmed Cali, oo ay weheliyaan Madaxweyne-ku-xigeenka Xisbiga Barwaaqo, ahna Madaxa Xarunta Dhexe ee xisbiga, Mudane Aadan Faarax, iyo Madaxweynaha Dowlad-Deegaanka Soomaalida, Mudane Mustafe Maxamed Cumar, ayaa saaka garoonka diyaaradaha ee Jigjiga ku soo dhaweeyey Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Jabuuti, Mudane Ismaaciil Cumar Geelle, iyo Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Mudane Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud.

Madaxda martida ah ayaa si diirran loogu soo dhaweeyey magaalada Jigjiga, iyagoo muujiyey xiriirka walaaltinimo iyo iskaashiga xooggan ee ka dhexeeya dalalka gobolka.

Wafdiga iyo masuuliyiinta soo dhoweysay ayaa la filayaa inay u sii gudbaan Mashruuca Dalxiiska ee Shabeelle, halkaas oo si wadajir ah loogu xadhig-jari doono Mashruuca Shabeelle Resort. Mashruucani waxa uu ka tarjumayaa horumarinta dalxiiska, kobcinta dhaqaalaha deegaanka, iyo xoojinta iskaashiga dalalka Geeska Afrika.

Dhammaadka Nidaamka Caalamiga ah.
Qaybtii 1aad. (1/2)

Khatarta ugu weyn ee uu Trump dunida ka wado ma aha Venezuela ama Iran, balse waa Greenland. Haddii Maraykanku qabsado jasiiraddaas sida uu madaxweynaha Maraykanku sheegay, taasi waxay noqon doontaa dhammaadka nidaamka caalamiga ah, iyo bilowga xilli aad u weyn oo fowdo ah oo aan hore loo arag. Waa fowdo ay Carabtu bixin doonaan qiimaheeda, xitaa xulafada Maraykanka ee ugu dhow. Sidee bay Greenland u noqonaysaa dhulgariirka burburin doona dunidii hore oo dhan? Arrintaas aan isla gorfayno;-

Wararku waxay soo wadaan wax aynaan filaynin. Maxay si gaar ah u yihiin? In Yurub ay isu diyaarinayso inay saarto cunaqabatayn dhaqaale Maraykanka, oo ay ku jiraan shirkado sida Google, Meta, iyo Microsoft, iyo sidoo kale bangiyada iyo hay’adaha maaliyadeed ee Maraykanka; xitaa waxaa suuragal ah in la xidho saldhigyada milatari ee Maraykanka ee Yurub lagana eryo askarta Maraykanka.
 Haddii Qof kuu sheegi lahaa wararkan maalmo kooban ka hor, waxad ku tilmaami lahayd  nin waalan; balse tani waa waxa ay wargeyska Ingiriiska ah ee Daily Telegraph ka soo xigatay mas’uuliyiin reer yurub ah, iyagoo sheegay inay yihiin tallaabooyin suuragal ah oo Midowga Yurub ka fiirsanayo haddii Maraykanku qabsado Greenland.

Dagaalkii Labaad ee Adduunku wuu dhammaaday, Yurubna waxay garatay in xilligii gumaysigu dhammaaday. Yurub mar dambe ma ahayn maamulaha dunida, labadeeda baal ee Ingiriiska iyo Faransiiskuna way dhammaadeen; balse siyaasad ahaan waxay noqotay quwado boqortooyo oo kala daatay, kuwaas oo ku khasbanaa inay askartooda ka ururiyaan oo kala baxaan gudaha Hindiya, Aljeeriya, Fiyatnaam iyo Bariga Dhexe, kuna koobnaadaan difaaca xuduudahooda kooban ee qaarad dagaalku daaliyay, khasaarihii ka dhashayna uu ka badnaa afartan milyan oo qof. Laakiin waxa ay reer yurub ogaadeen wax ka sii darnaa, xataa xuduudahooda keligood ma difaaci karin. Waxaa jiray cadow cusub oo ku dheggan xuduudaha Yurub, magaciisuna yahay Midowgii Soofiyeeti, kaas oo noqday waddankii labaad ee haysta bamka nukliyeerka, kuna xoojiyay hubka hydrogen-ka, isla markaana noqday waddankii ugu horreeyay ee adduunka ku tuura gantaallo ballistik ah, gaar ahaan gantaalka R-7 ee loo diray hawada sare isagoo sida dayax-gacmeedka Sputnik 1(Oct 4,1957). Horteeda cadow sida Soofiyeetka ah, lama haysan wax kale oo aan ahayn in Maraykanka la kaashado. Halkan waxaan ka hadlaynaa ku dhowaad konton saldhig milatari oo Maraykan ah oo Yurub ku yaalla, kuna shaqeeya awood bini’aadam oo ku dhow 1.2m(hal milyan iyo laba boqol oo kun oo askari). Laga bilaabo saldhigga cirka ee (Ramstein Air Base)  ee Jarmalka, xeryaha Rhein-Pfalz Base, Ansbach, Munich, Stuttgart(waa halka laga maamulo AFRICOM iyo EUCOM), iyo Wiesbaden, ilaa saldhigyada Lakenheath iyo Mildenhall ee Ingiriiska, Rota ee Isbaanishka, iyo Souda ee Giriigga, ilaa saldhig weyn ee ku yaalla Talyaaniga oo si buuxda u xukuma amniga Badda Dhexe, kaas oo ah “Sigonella”. Intaas u dhexeysa waxaa jira tobanaan saldhig oo kale oo ku yaalla dhulka Yurub, oo ay ku jirto saldhigga Thule ee Greenland. Yurub waxay yeelatay gaashaan iyo seef; balse waa gaashaan la soo dhoofiyay iyo seef Maraykan ah oo daxaloobi karta. Yurub waxay ku guulaysatay, illaa hadda ilaalinta Maraykanka, inay ka gudubto caqabaddii Soofiyeetka, isla markaana ay badbaadiso hadalka liberal-ka reer Galbeed ee ka dhex jiray go’doonka casaanka ah ee Moscow ku soo rogtay Berlin, Prague iyo Warsaw. Laakiin qiime noocee ah? Waa tamaryari ceeb ku ah.
 
Sagaashamaadkii waxaa soo baxay eray bixin ku cusub siyaasadda aduunka oo la odhan jiray: The Forgotten Europe - Yurubtii la illoobay. Dunidu waxay ogaatay in ay jirto qayb ka mid ah Yurub oo weli ku qaylinaysa dagaallo qabiil/diimeed ah, kana dambaysa taariikhda qaaradda ku dhowaad qarni. Qaybtani waxay ahayd Balkans(البلقان). Yugoslavia way sii kala socotaa; hoggaanka Serbiya ee Orthodox-ka ah ayaa kasii go'aya Kurwaatiyada Katooligga ah iyo Muslimiinta Bosniak-ga, isagoo saadaalinaya lix dal oo cusub oo ka dhasha burburka dawladdii Yugoslavia. Yaa ugu xaq badan inuu farageliyo xudunta qalalaase Yurub ah? Hubaal Yurub, gaar ahaan Ingiriiska, Faransiiska iyo Jarmalka. Laakiin yaa laba jeer farageliyay? Markii koowaad Bosnia, iyada oo la saxiixay “Heshiiska Dayton” si loo soo afjaro dagaalka; markii labaad Kosovo, iyadoo la duqeeyay ciidammadii Yugoslavia iyo xarumihii madaxweyne Slobodan Milošević, laguna siiyay Kosovo is-maamul. Ciddii faragelisay waxay ahayd Maraykanka. 

Xaqiiqo aan laga baxsan karin ayaa halkan ka dhalatay: Yurub, afartan sano oo ay ku qabatimay ilaalinta Maraykanka ka dib, xitaa ma awooddo inay farageliso dagaal ka qarxa dhulkeeda. Maxaa Yurub ka dhigay mid sidan u daciif ah? Ma yaraanta awoodaha? Maya. Waa sida loo maalgeliyo difaaca. Aan kuu fududeeyo: aan ka bilowno Jarmalka—Jarmalkii Galbeed gaar ahaan—oo dib u helay xaqii uu u lahaa dhisidda ciidan sannadkii 1954 heshiiskii Paris. Run, Jarmalku wuxuu bixiyay ciidammo ka badan rubuc milyan oo diyaarsan inay wajahaan Jarmalka Bari ee hoos yimid Soofiyeetka, balse isagoo ku tiirsan awoodda madaafiicda, gantaallada iyo nukliyeerka Maraykanka. 

Jarmalka, ka hor iyo ka dib midnimadiisa, waa qaran si xad-dhaaf ah u danaysi badan; wuxuu ku tiirsanaa Maraykanka, miisaaniyadda difaacana wuxuu ku kharash gareeyay barnaamijyada daryeelka bulshada. Halkan waxaan ka hadlaynaa lacag ka badan 300 bilyan oo yuuro sanadkii, taas oo ka dhigtay muwaadinka Jarmalka inuu helo daryeel caafimaad, waxbarasho jaamacadeed, iyo gunnooyin shaqo-la’aan oo ballaadhan, balse iyadoo cirku furan yahay iyo dhul si fudud loo jebin karo wakhti kasta. Kadib Ingiriiska—qodax Maraykan ah oo dhuunta Yurub ku mudan—kaas oo ka horyimid mashruuc kasta oo iskaashi difaac wadajir ah oo qaaradeed, maadaama uu doorbidayo ku tiirsanaanta isbahaysiga taariikhiga ah ee Maraykanka. Waxa kaliya ee hadhay waa Faransiiska, kaas oo ahaa dalka Yurub ee keliya ee saadaaliyay khatarta Maraykanka una hawlgalay inuu beddelo markii uu ka baxay hoggaanka wadajirka ah ee NATO xilligii de Gaulle; balse wuu ku guul-darreystay inuu qanciyo Jarmalka iyo Ingiriiska. Si aad u fahanto baaxadda masiibada, aan kuu sheego qisadan:

Ka dib dagaalkii Balkans, gaar ahaan 1999, Yurub waxay isugu timi shirkii Helsinki. Waxay yidhaahdeen: mar dambe ma aqbalayno ilaalinta Maraykanka; waa ceeb in amniga Yurub uu noqdo mid ku xidhan Maraykanka. Natiijooyinka shirku aad bay u waaweynaayeen: Yurub waxay dhisi doontaa ciidan wadajir ah oo ka kooban 60,000  oo askari, iyo hub cir, bad iyo berriba ah oo ka kooban 400 diyaarado dagaal iyo 100 markab oo dagaal. Maxaa xigay oo hirgalay!! Yurub waxay yeelatay ciidan. Laakiin sug… 2002 waxaa Prague lagu qabtay shir kale oo hoos u dhigay awooddaas si ay u noqoto ciidan faragelin degdeg ah(Rapid Intervention Force) oo ka kooban 21,000 askari(halkay ka ahayd 60,000). Dhib ma leh—hoos u dhac saddex-meelood meel ah. Laakiin yaab ayaa dhacay: awooddaasi waxay isu beddeshay waxa loo yaqaan Battle Groups, oo ah kooxo dagaal oo ka kala socda jinsiyado reer Yurub ah, kana kooban 1,500 askari, kana hawlgeli kara hub dhexdhexaad iyo mid fudud meel kasta oo colaadeed oo 6,000 km u jirta Brussels. Laga bilaabo ciidan weyn oo leh hub culus ilaa kooxo aan hub culus lahayn—halkaas ayuu ku dhammaaday riyadii difaaca wadajirka ah. 

Taasina waa Yurubta saxda ah: quwad maaliyadeed iyo dhaqaale oo ku tiirsan Maraykanka amnigeeda, isla markaana aan xitaa awoodin inay dhisto ciidan mideysan. Yurub waa ayga daacadda ah ee Maraykanka; eraygani ma aha gef hadal ah, balse waa sifayn dhab ah: qaran ka kooban 400 milyan oo qof, leh wax-soo-saarka guud ee gudaha oo gaadhaya 27 tirilyan oo doollar, haddana midkoodna ciidammadeedu kelidood ma wajihi karaan Ruushka, isla markaana aan awoodin inay dhisto ciidan mideysan. Yurub waxay mustaqbalkeeda oo aan la saadaalin karin u hibeysay daqiiqad farxad ah oo ku dhisan joogitaanka ilaalineed ee Maraykan. Intaas kaliya ma aha: Yurub waxay u qaadatay in dhaqaaluhu yahay wax walba. Sida ay amnigeeda ugu xidhay Maraykanka, ayay dhaqaalahooda ugu xidhanyahay Ruushka, Jarmalkuna waa halyeeyga qisada, markii uu oggolaaday inuu Yurub ka dhaawaco xudunta, isagoo hirgeliyay mashaariicda Nord Stream 1 iyo 2 si ay balaayiin mitir cubic oo gaas dabiici ah uga soo qaadaan Vyborg ee Ruushka una geeyaan Greifswald ee Jarmalka. Kadibna yurub waxay ku baraarugtay riyadeedii ugu xumayd.
Dhaqaaluhu ma uusan joojin Ruushka inuu bilaabo ku duullaanka Yurub, ciidammada Maraykankuna kama aysan ilaalin damacyada ballaadhinta ee Ruushka. Yurub markii ugu horreysay ayay qaawanaan noqotay iyadoo aragta Boqorka Ruushka oo ku duulaya Georgia kana goynaya Abkhazia iyo South Ossetia, dabadeed Crimea oo ka tirsan Ukraine, ka dibna dagaalkii ugu dambeeyay ee Ukraine oo lagu qaatay 20% dhulka Kyiv.

Reer yurub waxay ku tiirsanaayeen joogtaynta siyaasadda arrimaha dibadda ee Maraykanka, oo u aragta Yurub meel laga duulo milatari ahaan si loo sugo dunidii hore iyo meel lagu xakameeyo gobolka ugu muhiimsan dunida, Eurasia. Yurub waxay ka tageen feejignimadii, waxayna ku dadaashay fulinta ajandaha Maraykanka ee Ukraine iyadoo ku boorrisay Zelensky inuu ku biiro NATO iyo Midowga Yurub, iyagoo rajaynaya in Washington mar uun faragelin doonto si ay Putin ugu qasabto ugu danbayna uu u aqbalo. Laakiin Washington waxay dib u istaagtay inta ku filan inay sugto amnigeeda; Putin-na wuxuu hore u galay inta ku filan inuu burburiyo amniga Yurub oo dhan. Inkastoo Yurub ay aragtay natiijooyinkii xilligii hore ee Trump, haddana waxay u qaadatay inuu ahaa waqti dhaafay kadib imaatinkii Biden—si lama filaan ahna Trump ayaa mar kale soo laabtay, markan ajande si buuxda loo shaaciyay: Yurub waa tii hore, waa in la kala diro midnimadeeda, lana xoojiyo kacdoonka qulqulatooyinka qaran-dooniga asaasiga ah. Ukraine waxba nagama gelin; Trump-na wuxuu taageeri doonaa in Putin haysto shan meelood oo ka mid ah dhulkeeda. Maraykanku wuxuu waqtiga dib ugu noqday boqol iyo konton sano, wuxuuna ku adkaysanayaa inuu Yurub la noqdo. Haddii Trump doonayo inuu soo ceshado aasaaska barwaaqada Maraykanka isagoo diiradda saaraya nuska dunida cusub—Ameerikada—soo noqoshada Yurub waxay ka dhigan tahay idagaallo gudaha ah iyo wajahidda damacyada deriska, ugu horreyna Ruushka. Kadibna  yurub waxaa ku timid dharbaaxo aanay filayn: Greenland. Waxay ogaadeen wax ka sii xun—si aan la qiyaasi karin—ah in maamulka Maraykanku ula dhaqmo qaaradda oo dhan sida uu ula dhaqmo dalalka dunida saddexaad: qaniimo gumaysi. Haddaba ka fikir muuqaalka soo socda:

Haddii Trump qabsado Greenland sida uu marar badan ku adkeysto, taasi waxay noqon doontaa markii ugu horreysay ee Maraykanku xoog militari ku qabsado qayb ka mid ah Yurubtii hore. Waxay noqon doontaa markii ugu horreysay ee Axdiga NATO uu istaago qarka burburka, maadaama aas-aasayaashu aanay waligood malaynin in dal xubin ka ah NATO uu qabsado dhul dal kale oo xubin ka ah NATO. 

Fikradda istiraatiijiga ah ee aasaasayaasha isbahaysigu waxay ahayd in khatartu ka timaaddo bannaanka—Ruushka. Laakiin miisaannadu way rogmadeen, khatarta halista ku ah NATO-na waxay noqotay Maraykanka laftiisa. Tani waa rog-rogasho siyaasadeed oo aan la arag tan iyo Dagaalkii Labaad ee Adduunka; xitaa taariikhda casriga ah tan iyo heshiisyadii Metternich "waa nidaamkii qarnigii 19aad ee xasilloonida Yurub ilaalinayay." lama arag. Waxaa laga yaabaa inaad is weydiiso sababta Putin uga aamusay la wareegidda Maraykanka ee maraakiib ka tirsan kuwa Ruushka “الأسطول الظل الروسي”.

Warbixinta waxaa lagu sheegay in Amiir Khalid uu u sheegay Yahuudda , haddii uusan Trump fulin hanjabada ka soo baxaya ee la xiriira inuu weerarrayo Iiraan, taasi inay ka dhalanayso nidaamka kacaanka Iiraan inuu xoogeysto. Hadalladan oo ka duwan kuwa boqortooyadda ay warbaahinta ku soo gudbiso ee looga digo weerar lagu qaado Iiraan, xataa iyadoo dhaxal-sugaha Boqortooyadda Sacuudiga oo Arbacadii telefoon kula hadlay madaxweynaha Iiraan uu u sheegay inuusan oggolaan doonin hawada Sacuudiga in laga weerarro Iiraan. 

Warbaahintan, waxaa kaloo ay soo bandhigtay inta wasiirka difaaca Sacuudiga uu ku jiray kulanka xiran ee ururrada Yahuudda uu la qaatay inuu u sheegay in Sacuudigu uusan ka sii fogaanayn Israa’iil, sidoo kalena uusan u janjeerin Ikhwaanul Muslimiin. Wuxuu sidoo kale diiday walaaca laga muujiyay kororka nacaybka Israa’iil ee ka muuqda warbaahinta iyo baraha bulshada Sacuudiga, inkasta oo mid ka mid ah ka-qaybgalayaashii kulanka uu sheegay in hadalkaasi uusan si buuxda u qancin.

Wasiirka difaaca Sacuudiga, Amiir Khalid Bin Salman ayaa sidoo kale Jimcihii shalay Aqalka Cad ee Mareykanka kulan saacad socday kula yeeshay xog-hayaha arrimaha dibadda Mareykanka, Marco Rubio, xoghayaha difaaca Mareykanka, Pete Hegseth, ergayga Aqalka Cad Steve Witkoff, iyo Taliyaha Guud ee Ciidamada Mareykanka, Jeneraal Dan Caine, balse Axios waxay sheegtay kulankan inuu dhammaaday , iyadoo uusan wax fahan ah ka helin wasiirka difaaca Sacuudiga , qorshaha Mareykanka ee uu ku wajahayo Iiraan. 

Wax kasta oo ku jira warbixintan ayaa ah wax naadir iyo mowqifka ka duwan midkii horey Sacuudiga uu usoo bandhigi jiray , iyadoo xataa wakaaladda wararka Turkiga ee Anadolu oo dabcan baahisa warar taxaddar leh loo hubiyay ay soo xigatay warbixinta Axios , wallow illaa hadda aysan jirin wax falcelin ah oo ka soo baxday boqortooyadda Sacuudiga oo la xiriira kulammada ay Axios soo bandhigay , balse dhacdooyinkii u dambeeyay waxay ahaayeen kuwa laga arkay dib u qaabeynta koowaad ee isbeddelada caalamiga ah ee la saadaalinayo inay ka dhacayaan gobolka bariga dhexe.

American generosity should never be taken for granted.

Reports that U.S. food aid was destroyed in Somalia have sparked outrage, and the response from Secretary of State Marco Rubio signals a clear shift in how foreign assistance may be handled going forward. Ending aid under these circumstances sends a strong message: U.S. taxpayer money is not an unlimited resource, and it comes with expectations of responsibility and respect.

Foreign aid is often framed as charity, but in reality it is a strategic tool meant to advance American interests while addressing humanitarian needs. When governments undermine that purpose by mismanaging or destroying aid meant for vulnerable populations, they erode trust and accountability. Supporting human rights and responding to humanitarian crises should never mean writing blank checks to systems that fail the very people they claim to serve.

Putting America first does not mean turning away from the world; it means ensuring that every dollar spent abroad strengthens U.S. foreign policy, protects national security, and reflects respect for the American people who fund it. Aid must be effective, transparent, and aligned with clear outcomes—or it shouldn’t continue at all.

It is often said that Nairobi’s Eastleigh was built largely on diaspora money. Some even go further and allege that part of this wealth came from fraud committed abroad, particularly in the USA, by members of the Somali community.

But selective outrage is dishonest. History shows that many major cities and states were built on far worse foundations and are rarely scrutinized with the same intensity. New York, for example, was heavily financed by shipping, insurance, and banking profits deeply tied to the transatlantic slave economy, all while presenting itself as morally upright.

California’s Gold Rush wealth was built on Indigenous genocide, land theft, and racial exclusion. South Carolina’s prosperity came from rice plantations sustained by extreme slave exploitation. Virginia combined slavery with massive land seizures, followed by political power consolidation.

Mississippi’s early wealth was built almost entirely on enslaved African labor, stolen Indigenous land, and cotton plantations that fed British and Northern U.S. industries.

The point is simple: wealth everywhere has a history. Singling out one community while sanitizing the foundations of others is not honesty, it’s hypocrisy.

Appointment of Secretary General - Somali Diaspora Returnees Network (SDRN)

MAGACAABISTA XOGHAYAHA GUUD ee Shabakadda Soo-noqoshada Qurbajoogta Soomaaliyeed (SDRN)
Shabakadda Soo-noqoshada Qurbajoogta Soomaaliyeed (SDRN) waxay ku faraxsan tahay inay si rasmi ah ugu dhawaaqdo magacaabista Eng. Bashir Mohamed Soofe oo ah Xoghayaha Guud ee Shabakadda Soo-noqoshada Qurbajoogta Soomaaliyeed (SDRN), laga bilaabo 28 Janaayo 2026.

Magacaabistani waxay ka tarjumaysaa ballanqaadka joogtada ah ee SDRN ee ku aaddan xoojinta hoggaanka hay'adaha iyo horumarinta ka qaybgalka macnaha leh ee qurbajoogta Soomaaliyeed ee dib ugu soo laabtay horumarinta qaranka, dhismaha nabadda, iyo hababka maamulka. 

Eng. Bashir Mohamed Soofe wuxuu leeyahay khibrad xirfadeed oo ballaaran, aqoonsi hoggaamineed oo xooggan, iyo taariikh la xaqiijiyay oo ku saabsan ka-qaybgalka siyaasadda, horumarinta hay'adaha, iyo isku-dubaridka daneeyayaasha.
Isagoo ah Xoghayaha Guud, Eng. 

Bashir Mohamed Soofe wuxuu kormeeri doonaa maamulka maalinlaha ah ee SDRN, wuxuu isku dubbaridi doonaa ka-qaybgalka istaraatiijiyadeed ee hay'adaha dowladda iyo la-hawlgalayaasha horumarinta, wuxuuna taageeri doonaa hirgelinta aragtida Shabakadda iyo mudnaanta istaraatiijiyadeed.
Isagoo ka hadlayay magacaabista, Guddoomiyaha SDRN, Mr. Salamallah, ayaa yiri:
Waxaan ku kalsoonnahay in Eng. Bashiir Maxamed Soofe inuu si weyn u horumarin doono waxtarka hay'adaha SDRN waxayna xoojin doontaa doorka qurbajoogta Soomaaliyeed ee dib ugu soo laabtay wadanka si ay uga qayb qaataan soo kabashada Soomaaliya iyo horumarkeeda waara."

Shabakadda Soo Noqoshada Qurbajoogta Soomaaliyeed waxay u hambalyeynaysaa Eng. Bashir Maxamed Soofe magacaabistiisa waxayna rajeyneysaa inay si dhow ula shaqeyso hay'adaha qaranka, oo ay ku jiraan Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda iyo Iskaashiga Caalamiga ah iyo Waaxda Arrimaha Qurbajoogta, iyo sidoo kale la-hawlgalayaasha horumarinta iyo daneeyayaasha.

Hadda waxaan joogaa Minneapolis, anigoo wax baranaya oo dhegaysanaya bulshada Soomaaliyeed ee halkan ku nool. Tani waa Maryan. Waxay muwaadinad Mareykan ah ahayd tan iyo 1984 — si dhab ahna, ka hor intaanan anigu dhalan.

Minnesota waa hoyga bulshada Soomaaliyeed ee ugu weyn Mareykanka, tiradooduna lagu qiyaaso 80,000 ilaa 100,000 qof oo asal Soomaali ah. Qiyaastii 95% Soomaalida Minnesota waa muwaadiniin Mareykan ah, kuwaas oo ay ku jiraan kuwa halkan ku dhashay iyo muhaajiriin qaatay dhalashada Mareekan. Sidoo kale, Soomaalida ku dhalatay dibadda ee ku nool Minnesota, inta badan (qiyaastii 87%) waxay noqdeen muwaadiniin Mareykan ah.

Taas micnaheedu waa in Soomaalida Minnesota ay sanad walba bixiyaan ku dhowaad $67 milyan oo ah canshuuraha gobol iyo kuwa degmo.

Hase yeeshee, inkasta oo inta badan Soomaalida Minnesota ay yihiin muwaadiniin Mareykan ah ama deggenaansho sharci ah haysta, haddana U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) waxay weli ka dhigtaa mid ka mid ah bartilmaameedyada ugu waaweyn ee howlgalladeeda weerarrada ah.

What Really Happened in London 2012—and How Somaliland Recognition Was Stopped

Somali Report - Fresh revelations by former Turkish Prime Minister Ahmet Davutoğlu have reignited debate over the 2012 London Conference, where the possible international recognition of Somaliland was openly discussed before being derailed through behind-the-scenes diplomacy.

In a recent interview, Davutoğlu disclosed that then British Foreign Secretary William Hague privately acknowledged Somaliland’s case for statehood.

“Somaliland deserves to be a state; it has a military force, a parliament, and no terrorism,” Davutoğlu quoted Hague as saying during the conference, which brought together African, European, and international stakeholders to discuss Somalia’s future.

Davutoğlu said he moved quickly to shut down the momentum. 

He raised the unresolved issue of Northern Cyprus, telling the British side that recognition of Somaliland would set a precedent.

“Then you should also recognize the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus; all of that exists there as well,” he said, admitting that he used the Cyprus issue to block European and African support for Somaliland’s recognition.

More controversially, Davutoğlu described pulling Somaliland’s president aside for a private conversation framed around shared religious identity.

“We are Muslims; let’s meet alone,” he recalled saying—remarks that critics say reveal how religious sentiment was leveraged to influence political outcomes.

Davutoğlu went further, boasting that Turkey’s actions ultimately allowed Ankara to gain decisive influence in Somalia. 

He linked the diplomatic outcome to Turkey’s later dominance in key sectors, including the establishment of its largest overseas military base, as well as strategic involvement in Somalia’s port, airport, and broader economic infrastructure.

While Turkey insists its role is stabilizing rather than expansionist, the former prime minister’s comments have fueled accusations of double standards. 

Turkey remains the only country to recognize Northern Cyprus, while actively opposing Somaliland’s recognition—an approach critics say reflects principles applied selectively to serve Ankara’s interests.

Davutoğlu, however, defended Turkey’s position, arguing that its engagement was aimed at preserving Somalia’s unity. Recounting his exchange with Hague, he said he warned that recognition efforts would divide Somalia.

“We are bringing stability to Somalia. You are trying to divide it,” he said, adding that if London was serious about recognition, it should first recognize Northern Cyprus.

He also pointed to later Turkey-hosted talks in Ankara between Somali and Somaliland leaders as evidence of Turkey’s commitment to unity.

For critics in the Horn of Africa, these revelations paint a stark picture: a moment when Somaliland’s recognition was “on the table” was lost, while Somalia became a strategic outpost for Turkey’s growing influence—raising questions about sovereignty, regional politics, and the true cost of foreign intervention.

Qoys muhaajiriin ah oo ka soo jeeda Ecuador kuna noolaa Minneapolis ayaa xiliyadii udanbeeyay wajahayay xaalad adag oo cabsi ku dhisan, waxayna ku xirnaayeen guriga iyaga oo ka cabsi qabay in ay ICE qabato, waxayna la mid noqdeen Maxaabiis xabsi ku jirta oo aduunka oo dhan daaqada un ka eega.

Waxay go'aansadeen in ay iyagu is Masaafuriyaan oo dalkoodii dib ugu noqdaan.

Gabi ahaan  xaafaddii ay daganayeen oo ku taalla koonfurta Minneapolis, hawlgalkii maamulka Trump ee Operation Metro Surge ayaa si xooggan uga socday. Muhaajiriin ayaa laga jiidayay baabuurtooda daaqadaha laga jebiyey, waxaana guryahooda lagaga soo saarayay iyagoo lagu waday qabowga daran.

Segundo, oo 43 jir ah, xaaskiisa Maria oo 40 jir ah, iyo shantooda carruur ah waxay ku jireen waddo sharciyeysan oo ay ku helayaan deganaansho, waxayna sheegeen in kiiskooda socdaalka uu ahaa mid cusboonaysiisan. Hase yeeshee, qoyska reer Ecuador ayaa waxaa ku sii kordhayay  cabsida ay ka qabaan inay aadaan shaqo, iskuul, ama xitaa dukaanka si ay u soo iibsadaan cunto iyo xafaayado ay u baahan yihiin wiilkooda ay ayeeyada u yihiin.

“Umaanaan imaan halkan annagoo leh ujeeddo xun,” ayuu yiri Segundo. “Waxaan u nimid inaan shaqeyno. Hadda waxaan ka baqaynaa inaan sii joogno. Waxaan ka baqaynaa inaan bannaanka u baxno.”

23-kii Janaayo, Segundo, Maria, iyo wiilkooda ugu yar Jairo—oo 14 jir ah kana yar da’da shaqada—ayaa qaatay go’aan adag oo ah inay ku noqdaan Ecuador. Go’aankaas wuxuu yimid kaddib bilo badan oo ay ka fiirsanayeen iyo masaafurinta lama filaanka ah ee xubnaha qoyska  ku imaankarta.

Waxay ka mid noqonayaan tobannaan kun oo muhaajiriin ah oo lagu qiyaaso inay si iskood ah uga tageen Mareykanka sanadkii la soo dhaafay, halkii ay halis ugu jiri lahaayeen xarig iyo masaafurin.

Qoyska ayaa yimid Mareykanka sannadkii 2021, iyagoo ka gudbay xadka meel u dhow Eagle Pass, Texas, si ay magangalyo u raadsadaan. Segundo wuxuu u shaqeyn jiray shirkad ku taalla Minneapolis isagoo saqafyo dhisa (roofer), halka Maria ay ka shaqeyn jirtay warshad ay ku samayso taajyo (wreaths).

🇪🇨 Ecuador ayaa wajahaya dhibaato amni oo aad u daran: heerka dilalka (murder rate) ayaa si weyn u kordhay, waxaana dalka ku fiday kooxo burcad ah oo ka dhashay dagaallo u dhexeeya kooxaha daroogada iyo kuwa dambiilayaasha ah. Guayaquil iyo gobollada xeebaha ayaa gaar ahaan halis ah.

Xigasho: The Minnesota Star Tribune

Bulshada ku nool deegaanka soomaalida gaar ahaan degmoyinka gobalka sitti waxaa la gudboon in lagu baraarugo muhiimada kaarka aqoonsiga muwaadinimada (National ID) oo ah furaha dhamaanba adeegyada dowladeed iyo xuquuqaha dastuuriga ah ee qofka muwaadinka ah.

Faa’idooyinkiisa waxaa kamid ah : caafimaad, waxbarasho, cod-bixinta doorashooyinka, safaro gudaha iyo dibadda iyo helitaanka adeeg kasta oo rasmi ah, dhamaantood waxay ku xidhnaan doonaan in aad haysato National ID.

-Waxaa la gaadhi doonaa wakhti qofka aan haysan [ National ID ] aanan lagu daweyn doonin isbitaallada dowlada.

- Wakhti qofkii aan lahayn aqoonsiga [ National ID ] uusan kiraysan karin hotel oo ay safaradiisu u xannibmi doonaan.

- Wakhti qofkii aan haysan [ National ID ] uusan Ka gudbi karin keelaayasha baadhitaannada amniga (Checkpoints) oo ay suurtagal noqon weydo.

- Wakhti qofkii aan haysan aqoonsiga [ National Id ] uu waayi doono dhamaan adeegyada muhiimka ah sida waxbarasho, caafimaad iyo codbixinta doorashooyinka, safarada dibadda iyo gudaha iwm.

Waxaa intaas dheer in mustaqbalka qof kasta uu u baahnaan doono aqoonsiga [ National ID-ga ] si uu uhelo adeeg dowladeed oo noloshiisa saameeysa.

Hadaba, inta adeega muhiimka ah, laga helayo degmo kasta iyo magaalo kasta oo Deegaanka ka mid ah, bulshada waxaa looga baahan yahay in ay fursadaan ka faa’iideystaan si aysan berri u waayin xuquuqdooda dastuuriga.

Haddii aad maanta weydo fursad ama wakhti aad ku qaadato isaga oo aad si fudud uga heli karto degmada aad ku nooshahay, ogow berri laga yaabo in adeegga laga joojiyo ama shardi adag lagu xidho. 

Haddii aad maanta qaadan weydo, berri ma jiri karo, qof kugu meteli kara muwaadinimadaada marka lagaa waayo [ National ID-ga ]. 

Aqoonsiga qaran ee national ID waa xuquuqdaada, fadlan ha lumin, hana dayacin ee qaado maanta, kana faa’iidayso.

In recent months, the Somali community in Minnesota has been at the center of national media attention as news of widespread fraud in government programs has come to light.

On a routine basis, Somalis living abroad send money to their relatives in Somalia. These transfers, called remittances, make up a significant portion of the country’s GDP. Somalis living in Minnesota have sent unknown millions to Somalia via the remittance process.

During her time as a senator, Klobuchar has tried to ensure that the Somali community in Minnesota can send money to Somalia. In 2012, Keith Ellison reported that Klobuchar was part of a meeting with a U.S. Treasury official to ensure Somali remittances kept flowing.

Klobuchar also lobbied the Obama Administration to establish a “sustainable, long-term” way for remittances to be transferred via “secure and transparent channels.”

In a 2015 public statement to that end, Klobuchar said “Somali-Americans in Minnesota are a vital financial lifeline for their relatives in Somalia, and we need to ensure a secure, legal and transparent way for them to send remittances.”

In 2023, Klobuchar and Minnesota’s Democratic congressional delegation authored a letter which urged the United States Agency for International Development (USAID) to prioritize aid to Somalia.

Qoys muhaajiriin ah oo ka soo jeeda Ecuador kuna noolaa Minneapolis ayaa xiliyadii udanbeeyay wajahayay xaalad adag oo cabsi ku dhisan, waxayna ku xirnaayeen guriga iyaga oo ka cabsi qabay in ay ICE qabato, waxayna la mid noqdeen Maxaabiis xabsi ku jirta oo aduunka oo dhan daaqada un ka eega.

Waxay go'aansadeen in ay iyagu is Masaafuriyaan oo dalkoodii dib ugu noqdaan.

Gabi ahaan  xaafaddii ay daganayeen oo ku taalla koonfurta Minneapolis, hawlgalkii maamulka Trump ee Operation Metro Surge ayaa si xooggan uga socday. Muhaajiriin ayaa laga jiidayay baabuurtooda daaqadaha laga jebiyey, waxaana guryahooda lagaga soo saarayay iyagoo lagu waday qabowga daran.

Segundo, oo 43 jir ah, xaaskiisa Maria oo 40 jir ah, iyo shantooda carruur ah waxay ku jireen waddo sharciyeysan oo ay ku helayaan deganaansho, waxayna sheegeen in kiiskooda socdaalka uu ahaa mid cusboonaysiisan. Hase yeeshee, qoyska reer Ecuador ayaa waxaa ku sii kordhayay  cabsida ay ka qabaan inay aadaan shaqo, iskuul, ama xitaa dukaanka si ay u soo iibsadaan cunto iyo xafaayado ay u baahan yihiin wiilkooda ay ayeeyada u yihiin.

“Umaanaan imaan halkan annagoo leh ujeeddo xun,” ayuu yiri Segundo. “Waxaan u nimid inaan shaqeyno. Hadda waxaan ka baqaynaa inaan sii joogno. Waxaan ka baqaynaa inaan bannaanka u baxno.”

23-kii Janaayo, Segundo, Maria, iyo wiilkooda ugu yar Jairo—oo 14 jir ah kana yar da’da shaqada—ayaa qaatay go’aan adag oo ah inay ku noqdaan Ecuador. Go’aankaas wuxuu yimid kaddib bilo badan oo ay ka fiirsanayeen iyo masaafurinta lama filaanka ah ee xubnaha qoyska  ku imaankarta.

Waxay ka mid noqonayaan tobannaan kun oo muhaajiriin ah oo lagu qiyaaso inay si iskood ah uga tageen Mareykanka sanadkii la soo dhaafay, halkii ay halis ugu jiri lahaayeen xarig iyo masaafurin.

Qoyska ayaa yimid Mareykanka sannadkii 2021, iyagoo ka gudbay xadka meel u dhow Eagle Pass, Texas, si ay magangalyo u raadsadaan. Segundo wuxuu u shaqeyn jiray shirkad ku taalla Minneapolis isagoo saqafyo dhisa (roofer), halka Maria ay ka shaqeyn jirtay warshad ay ku samayso taajyo (wreaths).

🇪🇨 Ecuador ayaa wajahaya dhibaato amni oo aad u daran: heerka dilalka (murder rate) ayaa si weyn u kordhay, waxaana dalka ku fiday kooxo burcad ah oo ka dhashay dagaallo u dhexeeya kooxaha daroogada iyo kuwa dambiilayaasha ah. Guayaquil iyo gobollada xeebaha ayaa gaar ahaan halis ah.

QOYS GO’AAN KU GAARAY IN AY IYAGU IS TARXIILAAN OO WADANKOODA KU NOQDAAN

MINNESOTA - Sidda aan ka soo xiganay Wargeyska Star Tribune ee ku yaala magaaladda Minneapolis ee gobolka Minnesota, Segundo, oo 43 jir ah, xaaskiisa Maria, oo 40 jir ah, iyo shan carruur ah oo ay dhaleen ayaa si sharci ah ku joogay dalka Mareykanka, waxayna sheegeen in kiiskooda sharciga dhabta ah ay ku qaadan lahaayeen uu meel fiican u marayey, hadda see ay go’aan sadeen in ay gebi ahaanbanba ay dib u tahriibaan.  

Qoyska oo asal ahaan ka yimid wadanka Ecuador oo magangalyo ay waydiisteen dalka Mareykanka ku joogay, ayaa cabsi ay ka qabaan ciidanka ICE ee dadka qaqabanaya, iyo baqitaan isa soo taraysay oo ay ka baqayeen inay shaqo tagaan, carruurtooda Iskuul u diraan, in ay soo adeegtaan ama ay banaaka u baxaan oo carruurta cunto u soo gataan ayaa go’aan waxay ku gaadheen in intii ay cabsi joogto ah ku noolaan lahaayeen ay iyagu iskood isku tarxiilaan oo wadankooda ku noqdaan. 

Segundo, Maria iyo wiilkooda ugu yar, Jairo, oo 14 jir ah, ayaa gaaray go'aan adag oo ah in ay ku laabtaan Ecuador. Waxay dhoofeen oo ay wadankooda Ecuador dib ugu noqdeen January 23, 2026 . Tallaabadan ay qoskani qaadeen ayaa timid kadib mudo labbo bilood ka baddan oo ay hawlgalo lagu masaafurinayo oo so degdegga ah wadanka looga tarxiilayo dadka soo galootiga ah ee iyagu sharci sugaya ama sharci la’aan ah ciidanka ICE ay ka wadeen gobolka Minnesota. 

Haddba qoyskan ayaa kamid ah tobanaan kun oo muhaajiriin ah oo si iskood ah uga tagay Mareykanka sannadkii la soo dhaafay ee 2025 iyo sannadkan cusub ee 2026, halkii ay halis ugu jiri lahaayeen in la tarxiilo ama cabsi joogta ah ku noolaan lahaayeen.

Waxan halkan hambalyo uga dirayaa Sarkaal Sare Cabdimajiid Cabdillaahi Sheekh Xuseen, oo u dalacay darajada Laba-Xiddigle Taliye.
Abdimajiid Abdullahi Hussein,waa wiil ka dhashay qoys halgan iyo waddaniyad ku suntan. Maanta wuxuu u dalacay darajada Laba-Xiddigle, taas oo ah midho ka dhashay hidde-dhaqankii halganka ee uu ka dhaxlay aabbihii, Mujaahid Cabdillaahi Sheekh Xuseen (Cabdillaahi Xiddigle).

Mujaahid Cabdillaahi Xiddigle wuxuu ka mid ahaa Ciidankii Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed, wuxuuna ahaa raggii u istaagay difaaca tolkii Isaaq maalintii ay baahida ugu jireen geesinimo iyo naf-hur. Wuxuu ku biiray Jabhaddii Somali National Movement (SNM), isagoo si miyir iyo go’aan adag leh u doortay inuusan raadin shilimaad iyo darajooyin, balse uu la dagaallamo Dawladdii Millatariga ee dulmiga ku haysay ummadda Isaaq. Wuxuu ka mid ahaa raggii xorreeyey Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland.

Mujaahid Cabdillaahi Sheekh Xuseen wuxuu ahaa raggii ka halgamay min galbeed ilaa Gobolka Sanaag, gaar ahaan Ceerigaabo. Waa raggii ay aabbahay ku wada jireen halgankii Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland lagu xorreeyey, kana wada tirsanaa Jabhaddii SNM.

Sidaa darteed, Sarkaal Sare Cabdimajiid Cabdillaahi Sheekh Xuseen wuxuu ka soo jeedaa rag dalkan u soo halgamay, darajadiisuna waa sii wadidda jidkii sharafka iyo adeegga qaranka Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland. Waa astaan muujinaysa in halgankii shalay uu maanta dhalay hoggaan leh karti iyo wacyi qaran.

Adeerkay, Mujaahid Cabdillaahi Sheekh Xuseen, Ilaahay ha kuu barakeeyo cimriga iyo caafimaadka.
Adigana, ina-adeer, waxaan kuu rajaynayaa guul iyo horumar, iyo inaad noqoto raggeedii qaranka Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland ilaalin lahaa, Taliye. 🫡

President A.M.M. Silaanyo iyo guloyaashii  waagaa 2012 London, oo UK danayneysay inay #Somaliland aqoonsato. Iyo waxii dhacay.layaaku waa Wasiirii arimaha dibada #Turkey  ee hore  Ahmed Oglo oo ku faanaya inuu fashiliyey aqoonsiga #Uk siin lahayd Sld  Waxaa qeexa qoraalkan hoos ku xusan:

waxaana qoray Abdalla Farah Mumin:

23kii Febraayo 2012, goobtu waa London, waxaa isugu yimid ergo ka kala timid 55 waddan oo ka hadleysay arrimaha Soomaaliya. Shirka London ee Soomaaliya.

Dowladda #UK waxay dedaal xooggan u gashay sidii loo aqoonsanaa lahaa #Somaliland, waxaana durba aqbalaad laga heley dhowr iyo toban dal, sida uu qiraayo Wasiirkii hore Arrimaha Dibadda #Turkey.

Shirka London waxaa wada guddoominayay UK iyo Turkey. Xilligaas Turkidu way ku cusbaayeen Soomaalida oo la isma aqoonin. Waxay u muuqdeen dhexdhexaad.  Qorshihii aqoonsiga Somaliland waxaa bedelay khiyaano ay Turkidu u dhigeen Somaliland. 

Maalin ka bacdi shirka London, waxay Turkey casuumaad u direen Madaxweyne Siilaanyo (AUN), waxayna ku casumeen Ankara, halkaas oo la sheegay in lagu wada hadalsiinaayo Soomaaliya.  Shirkii u horreeyay ee Somaliland iyo Soomaaliya oo ay Turkey wadeen ayaa qabsoomay 13 April, 2013.

Statement from the Minnesota Somali Community Center

The Minnesota Somali Community Center stands in full solidarity with our partners and community members calling for an end to the ongoing federal occupation and harm being inflicted on immigrant families in our neighborhoods.

On Saturday, February 7 at 9:30 AM, we are joining OLM – Organizations of Liberians in Minnesota, SEIU Healthcare Minnesota & Iowa, Unidos MN, and community allies for a peaceful march in Brooklyn Park to demand one clear message:

ICE OUT — NOW.

Our northwest suburban communities are under attack. Families are living in fear. Neighbors are being targeted. This is unacceptable. Immigrant communities deserve safety, dignity, and the right to live without intimidation or collective punishment.

March Details

Meet at: 7300 Brooklyn Blvd, Minneapolis, MN 55443

Start gathering: 9:30 AM

Program: Brief remarks from community speakers, then we march

End at: 7616 Brooklyn Blvd, Minneapolis, MN 55443

Bring your signs, bring a friend, and wear your union or community gear.

RSVP & more info: ICE OUT MARCH – Northwest Suburbs

We stand shoulder to shoulder with immigrant families across Minnesota and across this country. Our message is clear, united, and unwavering:

ICE OUT NOW!

Solidarity with our neighbors always.

Minnesota Somali Community Center

Ali yaasin daahir [ Ali Bashi ] waa siyaasi & aqoonyahan ka mid ah soomaalida Iswiidhan.

Toddoba sano ayuu xildhibaan ka yahay golaha deegaanka magaalo jaamacadeedka ku taal waqooyiga Iswiidhan ee Umeå. Muddo 11 sano ah waxuu xubin joogta yahay waaxda dhaqanka ee degmada Umeå, hay'da waxbarashada iyo wacyigelinta ABF iyo weliba qaybta matxafyada gobollada waqooyiga.

Shahaadada labaad ee jaamacadda waxu ku qaatay maamulka & agaasinka nabadda oo u ku diyaariyey Umeå universitet oo ka mid ah jaacadaha ugu caansan uguna taariikhda dheer Iswiidhan.

Magaalada aan deganahay ee Eskilstuna ayuu kaga qaybgalay shirka dhaqanka & dadka [ Folk & kultur], oo ah shir sanadle ah oo dalka oo dhan la isaga yimaado,kaasoo ay  martigelisay Eskilstuna.

Ali yaasiin waa khabiir saamayn ku leh siyaasada xisbigiisa shaqalaaha iyo magaalada uu degan yahay ee Umeå. Xaqiiqdii waa ruugcadaa waxweyn ka ku biirin lahaa dalkii hooyo, somalia.

Moving to the diaspora taught me lessons I didn’t ask for but deeply needed.

I had to start over and learn that life is not a race.
I had to build a new community as an adult, accepting that some friendships would stay and others would end.
I learned that God’s hand is not too far and never limited by borders or systems .His word is still alive and favour still finds you.
And above all, I learned patience… because some seasons move slowly, but they still move.

If this is your journey too, you’re not alone

Gurigii Shacabka Soomaaliyeed u dhiseen Madaxweynihii 9-aad ee dalka Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo oo xarigga laga jaray.

Hoggaamiyeyaasha bulshada ee deegaanka Ceeljaalle (Degmada Marka, Shabeellaha Hoose) ayaa xarigga ka jaray Guriga “Mahadsanid Madaxweyne”, 

Shacabka Soomaaliyeed ku maamuuseen Madaxweynihii 9-aad ee Soomaaliya, Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo.

Gurigan waxaa lagu hirgeliyey olole qaran oo ay maalgelinayeen muwaadiniinta gudaha iyo dibadda, waxaana laga dhisay deegaan uu Farmaajo ka hirgeliyey nabadda, dib-u-heshiisiinta iyo xoreynta AS.

Madaxweyne Farmaajo ayaa u mahadceliyay shacabka ka qaybqaatay ololaha, isagoo sheegay in tallaabadan ay muujinayso baraarugga shacabka iyo qiimaha dowladnimada

Mashruuca oo la dhagax-dhigay 21 Luulyo 2023, dhismihiisuna ku kacay $295,000, ayaa astaan u noqday qaddarin qaran iyo midnimo bulsho.

Reerka Mareexaan laba Madaxweyne ayaa ka soo baxay,oo Soomaaliya xukumay,mid wuxuu ahaa Aun Maxamed Siyaad Barre,intii uusan Madaxweynaha noqon hal ama laba guri ayaa la sheegaa in uu lahaa oo weliba intii madaxa Ciidanka ahaa ay Saaxiibo u dhiseen,markii uu Madaxweynaha noqday ayuu guryihii ku wareejiyay Hay’adaha Dowladda,21 Sano oo uu Madaxweyne ahaa hal guri ma yeelan,isaga oo aan guri kiisa ah lahayn ayaa xukunka laga tuuray,oo uusan hal shilin Bank dal iyo dibadba u oolin,isaga iyo caruurtiisiiba qaxooti ayay wadanka dibadiisa ku wada  noqdeen. 

Deegaanada ay qabiilkiisu degaan waxay ahaayeen welina yihiin kuwa ugu dib dhacsan gayiga Soomaaliyeed oo xitaa hal waddo oo laami ah uma uusan dhisin. 

Iminka kama hadlayo kalitalisnimadii iyo dadkii ay xukunka isku qabsadeen ee uu laayay,ama tacadiyadii la gaystay waqtigii xukuumaddiisa.

Farmaajo’s $295K Marka House Inaugurated – But Will He Ever Live There?

Somali Report - Former Somali president Mohamed Abdullahi Farmaajo has been honoured with a newly built house in the El-Jale district of Marka town in the Lower Shabelle region, his media team said in a statement, noting that the project was funded through a nationwide public fundraising campaign.

The house, named “Mahadsanid Madaxweyne” (“Thank You, Mr President”), cost approximately $295,000, according to the statement. 

Construction began on July 21, 2023, after supporters inside Somalia and across the diaspora raised nearly $300,000 to finance the project.

Farmaajo’s media office said the initiative was intended to recognise his leadership and contributions to state-building efforts during his time in office. 

Local officials and community elders attended the inauguration ceremony in El-Jale, marking the formal completion of the residence. 

In a statement, Farmaajo thanked Somali citizens for their contributions, describing the campaign as evidence of public commitment to statehood and leadership that prioritises national interests.

However, sources close to the former president say it is unlikely he will reside in the house anytime soon. 

Security concerns remain a major factor, as Marka lies outside Mogadishu and has experienced periodic instability. 

Farmaajo also maintains a residence in Qatar, where he has spent much of his time since leaving office, and continues to use a house in Mogadishu when in the capital. 

Reports indicate he will remain abroad most of time while preparing for the next presidential elections in 2026-2027.

The inauguration comes as Farmaajo re-engages in Somalia’s political landscape ahead of the electoral cycle, reviving debate over his legacy and ambitions.

The house project has also reignited controversy surrounding its fundraising. 

Critics argue that the campaign, coordinated by individuals linked to Farmaajo’s former inner circle and launched shortly after his 2022 election defeat, was politically motivated. 

Local media reports have raised allegations of money laundering and misuse of political networks, prompting calls for transparency and investigation into the sources and management of the funds.

Some commentators argue that public fundraising for a former head of state is inappropriate in a country facing widespread poverty, drought, and displacement, suggesting the funds could have been redirected toward humanitarian aid, schools, or public infrastructure.

Farmaajo’s allies reject these allegations, insisting the donations were voluntary, symbolic, and transparent.

Is Former President Farmaajo Lying? Villa Somalia Says His House Fundraising Claim Is False

Somali Report - Somalia’s Office of the President has dismissed former President Mohamed Abdullahi Farmaajo’s claim that he paused fundraising for his Marka house at the request of current President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud, calling it untrue and misleading.

Farmaajo stated that after two weeks of fundraising, he was contacted by the President, who allegedly asked him to stop the fundraising campaign because the elections campaign had ended and the fundraising was distracting the new government as it formed the cabinet and set its priorities. Farmaajo described the halt as due to obstacles perceived by officials.

Villa Somalia officials strongly denied any such conversation took place. Cabdicasiis Golf, Director of Villa Somalia’s Media Office, said: “There was no discussion between President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud and former President Farmaajo about the house or its funding. Farmaajo’s claim is far from reality and does not reflect the leadership responsibilities and pressures at that time.”

The presidency emphasized that during the house project, the government was fully engaged in critical national priorities, including countering al‑Shabaab, securing debt relief, lifting the arms embargo on Somalia, strengthening diplomatic ties, and building state institutions.

Critics and local media then questioned the timing and optics of the fundraising, saying it diverted attention from urgent humanitarian crises and was inappropriate for a former head of state in a country facing drought and displacement. Some reports also linked the fundraising campaign to potential money-laundering concerns.

Farmaajo’s $295,000 house in El‑Jale, Marka, was inaugurated today. His media team described it as a gesture of gratitude for leadership and service. Sources say insecurity in Marka and Farmaajo’s continued residence abroad make it unlikely he will live in the house soon.

While critics call public fundraising for a former president controversial, Farmaajo’s supporters insist the donations were voluntary, symbolic, and transparent.

Tulude: Dari Tanah Sangihe, Menggema ke Nusantara dan Dunia

Mari anak rantau kita kumpul, sambil inga-inga torang pekampung, kali ini kucoba tulis "Tulude" di Rantau...

Ada yang mengira Tulude hanyalah acara tahunan milik Kabupaten Kepulauan Sangihe, sebuah pesta adat yang selesai bersamaan dengan potongan terakhir kue tamo dan musik yang perlahan dimatikan. Dugaan itu tidak sepenuhnya salah, ia lahir dari kebiasaan zaman ini yang gemar memenjarakan tradisi di balik batas administrasi, seolah kebudayaan pun harus patuh pada peta, stempel, dan SK. Padahal Tulude justru membuktikan ironi itu: adat yang hidup tidak pernah bertanya di mana ia boleh dirayakan.

Tulude memang lahir dari rahim sejarah masyarakat Sangihe. Ia adalah ritus syukur, penanda tutup tahun lama dan buka tahun baru, yang beriringan dengan peringatan ulang tahun Kabupaten Kepulauan Sangihe. Sebuah pengakuan rendah hati bahwa hidup masih diberi kesempatan untuk berlanjut, dan manusia masih pantas bersyukur. Namun Tulude tidak pernah berjanji untuk tinggal diam di satu pulau. Ketika orang Sangihe merantau, ke kota-kota di Nusantara, hingga menyeberang ke negeri orang, Tulude ikut berjalan. Ia tidak ditinggalkan sebagai artefak museum, melainkan dibawa sebagai bekal batin.

Menariknya, di tanah perantauan, Tulude sering justru terasa lebih jujur. Di tempat orang lain menanam akar, identitas diuji. Kue tamo tak lagi sekadar hidangan; ia menjelma ingatan kolektif. Doa adat bukan formalitas; ia menjadi pengikat solidaritas. Dalam lingkaran itu, status sosial runtuh dengan sendirinya. Yang tersisa hanyalah rasa sesama anak kampung yang saling menguatkan, "Marau Sumata Marani Sunaung".

Seperti yang kami lakukan di Pontianak tadi malam,(Malam Sabtu, 6-2-2026), komunitas keluarga Sangihe yang tergabung dalam Ikatan Keluarga “Sengkanaung” merayakan Tulude secara sederhana namun hangat. Di bawah komando Ketua Umum Sengkanaung Ibu Yohana Selvi Olongsongke, Ketua Panitia Ibu Martha Sanggili, dan Sekretaris Ibu Ester Jacobus, para ibu yang bekerja tanpa banyak sorotan, Tulude hadir apa adanya, tapi penuh makna. Sebuah pengingat bahwa merantau sejauh apa pun tidak harus berarti tercerabut dari nilai.
Lebih dari itu, Tulude di perantauan adalah ruang pendidikan budaya yang hidup. Anak-anak yang lahir jauh dari Sangihe belajar bahwa identitas bukan sekadar cerita nostalgia orang tua, melainkan pengalaman yang dirayakan bersama. 

Maka benar, Tulude hari ini menggema bukan hanya di Kepulauan Sangihe, tetapi juga di Siau, Tagulandang, Biaro, Talaud, Bitung, Manado, Minahasa, Bolaang Mongondow, Gorontalo, Pohuwato, Papua, Pontianak, bahkan hingga komunitas diaspora di luar negeri. Dan hampir selalu, ia ditutup dengan Masamper, pato-pato, dan empat wayer, sebuah penegasan bahwa syukur paling indah memang dirayakan bersama.
Tulude mengajarkan satu hal penting: adat tidak pernah mati selama manusia masih mau mengingat, merayakan, dan memaknainya. Dari sanalah semangat kolektif sebuah bangsa terus menemukan harapannya. "Sangehe Ikekendage".

#Somalia 
Somalia has launched a comprehensive voter identification program, issuing biometric ID cards to citizens as a requirement for voting in upcoming elections.

The initiative, spearheaded by President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud's administration, is being implemented to prevent fraud and make sure that every eligible voter only votes one time.

The program integrates biometric data like fingerprints to create a secure voter registry. Launched in phases starting in 2025, it has already distributed nearly 200,000 voter cards in the capital region of Banaadir, with plans to issue up to 15 million nationwide by the 2026 polls.

Meanwhile, democrats in the United States, including Somali migrant Omar, are vehemently opposed to voter ID in the U.S. claiming it would be racist suppression rather than security.

Omar, representing Minnesota's 5th District, which includes a large Somali migrant population has been a vocal critic of voter ID requirements.

In 2025, she voted against the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act, a Republican-backed bill that would mandate proof of citizenship for federal elections.

Omar described the legislation as a "voter suppression bill" that could disenfranchise millions,

"These efforts are un-American"

She is currently being investigated for voter fraud (as well as immigration fraud, and for her connection to fraudsters who carried out the $9 billion welfare fraud scheme)

Democrats are dead set against voter ID laws despite polls showing the majority of Americans want voter ID.

A 2025 Pew Research survey found that 81% of U.S. adults favor requiring photo ID to vote, including majorities across party lines.

Why does the Somali government continue to implement policies aligned with Donald Trump’s foreign policy agenda in Somalia, even while fully aware of the consequences such policies have produced for Somali communities in Minnesota and across the United States?

This alignment raises urgent questions about political accountability, moral responsibility, and the role of a post-conflict state toward its own diaspora. Policies shaped by securitization, militarization, travel bans, surveillance, and external counterterrorism priorities have not been neutral. They have directly contributed to the marginalization, criminalization, and psychological insecurity of Somali families abroad—particularly in places like Minnesota, where Somali communities have become deeply embedded in civic, economic, and cultural life.

At a moment when Somalis in the diaspora face heightened scrutiny, racialized policing, and the long afterlives of exclusionary immigration regimes, the continued replication of these same frameworks by the Somali state suggests a troubling disconnect. Rather than advocating for the dignity, safety, and political agency of its people—both at home and abroad—the government appears to prioritize alignment with foreign powers over the lived realities of its people.

This raises a deeper concern: whose security is being prioritized, and at what cost? A “sovereign government” should not mirror policies that have demonstrably harmed its own people, especially when those harms are visible, documented, and ongoing within Somali communities in Minnesota and beyond—unless it has accepted the role of a vassal state. True leadership demands not compliance, but discernment—an ethical break from policies that reproduce vulnerability rather than protect life.

In this context, the question is not merely diplomatic. It is historical, moral, and profoundly human.

Maj. Gen. Francis Takirwa, the Deputy Commander of Land Forces in the Uganda People’s Defence Forces (UPDF), has died after a period of illness. The army is expected to release an official statement and further details, including a postmortem report.

His death has deeply affected the military community and residents of his home district, Mbarara, where he is remembered as a distinguished son and a highly decorated officer who served Uganda with dedication and professionalism.

Born on November 7, 1965, in Mbarara District, Maj. Gen. Takirwa joined the UPDF in 1989 and rose through the ranks during a long and accomplished military career. He previously served as the Commanding Officer of the UPDF Second Division in Mbarara and held several key leadership and administrative positions, including Chief of Education, Sports, and Culture in the UPDF.

He received extensive military training locally and abroad, including courses in Uganda, Tanzania, China, Egypt, and South Africa. He also served on an international mission in Somalia with the UPDF under AMISOM from 2011 to 2012.

Maj. Gen. Takirwa is widely remembered for his strategic acumen, discipline, and commitment to Uganda’s national security, leaving behind a lasting legacy of service and leadership.

Kulankan oo ka dhacay magaalada Columbus, ayaa waxaa ka soo qeyb galay qeybaha kala duwan ee bulshada Soomaaliyeed ee reer Ohio. 

Maamulka Amal USA Inc ayaa faahfaahin ka bixiyey app-kan cusub, faa’iidooyinkiisa, iyo doorka uu ku yeelan karo horumarinta adeegyada bulshada. 

Dadkii ka soo qeyb galay ayaa si weyn u soo dhoweeyey, iyagoo isla markiiba isu diiwaangeliyey isticmaalka AmalPay.

Dhibka jira Niman qurba joog aha oo wax bartey oo madaxyo dhaqameedyo ah ayaa kuwo magaalo na Muqdisho ka arkey dowladnimo na waxa Soomaalia ka jira u yaqaan ayaa waxey lee yihiin madax dhaqameedku siyaasada ha ka fogaadaan.

Waxaa qoray ex-president CMC.

Soomaalida iyo Awood Qaybsiga Itoobiya:

Markii Ugu Horraysay ee Soomaalidu Qayb Ka Noqoto Go’aanka Itoobiya Laga Soo Bilaabo Agaar ilaa Xisbi Xaakim Socdaalkii Siyaasadeed ee Deegaanka Soomaalida.

Taariikh ahaan, hoggaamiyayaal badan oo Soomaaliyeed ayaa si joogto ah ugu hawlanaa in Soomaalidu si buuxda uga mid noqoto ururkii talada hayay ee EPRDF, si ay u helaan saamayn dhab ah oo ay ku yeeshaan go’aannada masiiriga ah ee dalka. Dadaalladaasi waxay ku salaysnaayeen aragti siyaasadeed oo ku dhisnayd in ka-qaybgalka tooska ah ee nidaamka talada uu yahay dariiqa keliya ee lagu xaqiijin karo xuquuqda siyaasadeed iyo dhaqaale ee bulshada Soomaaliyeed.

Alle ha u naxariisto Dr. Cabdil-Majiid Xuseen, wuxuu ahaa hoggaamiye si cad u aaminsanaa in Soomaalidu ay Itoobiya si nabad ah uga dhex heli karto xuquuqdooda siyaasadeed iyo kuwa dhaqaale, kuna dhisan cadaalad wax-ku-qaybsasho loo siman yahay. Wuxuu ku bixiyay dadaal kasta oo suurtagal ah in ururkii uu hoggaaminayay ka mid noqdo EPRDF, hase yeeshee mar walba waxa lagu jawaabi jiray hadal ku soo ururaya aragti khaldan oo ah in Soomaalidu yihiin bulsho xoolo-dhagato ah oo aan buuxin shuruudaha ka-mid-noqoshada.

Dhamaan madaxdii xisbigu waxay si cad u muujinayeen dadaal dheeri ah iyo mowqif siyaasadeed oo qeexan, hase yeeshee jawaabtu mar walba waxay ahayd mid aan wax isbeddel ah xambaarsanayn, kuna soo koobnayd isla hadalkii hore ee ahaa: “waxaad tihiin xoolo-dhagato.”

Si kastaba ha ahaatee, ka-mid-ahaansho la’aanta ururkii talada dalka hayay ayaa si weyn nooga hor istaagtay ka-qaybgalka shirarka lagu go’aaminayay masiirka siyaasadeed, dhaqaale, iyo arrimaha bulshada ee dalka. Waxaan guul weyn u aragnay markii EPRDF noo oggolaatay in aan ka-qaybgalno shirarka golaha dhexe, inkastoo ka-qaybgalkaasi uu ku koobnaa ka-qaybqaadasho dood oo keliya, isla markaana aanu lahayn wax cod ah, hase yeeshee wuxuu noo ahaa fursad aan ku galo shirka golaha dhexe.

Markaan intaas dhaho kadib, isbeddelku wuxuu ka ujeeddo iyo micno ballaaran yahay hadalka inta badan la adeegsado ee ah “miiska wada-hadalka ayaanu fadhinaa.” Arrintani ma aha mid ereyo lagu soo koobayo, balse waa mid la xiriirta cadaalad wax-ku-qaybsiga iyo qadiyadda Soomaalida. Si arrintaas loo caddeeyo, bal aan soo bandhigo xaqiiqo ay ogyihiin dhammaan madaxda Xisbiga PP, gaar ahaan hoggaaminta sare ee PP-da Soomaalida.

Xilligii la dooranayay Ra’iisul-Wasaare Hailemariam Desalegn, aniga iyo Mudane Maxamed Rashiid Isaaq, iyo madaxda afarta degaan ee kale, waxaan ka-qaybgalnay shirkii golaha dhexe, hase yeeshee markii la gaaray xilligii tartanka doorashada Ra’iisul-Wasaaraha waxa nalagu wargeliyay in aanu shirka ka baxno. Markii aanu dibadda u baxnay, waxaan madaxdii deegaannada kale ku idhi waxay ahayd in aynu ugu yaraan ka hadalno si go’aanka loo geliyo dood iyo falanqayn wadajir ah. Go’aankaas hore oo maskaxdayda ku sii dhex jiray, mar kale ayaa arrin la mid ah kii hore soo noqotay.

Waxaan ka-qaybgalnay Shirkii golaha dhexe ee EPRDF ee lagu doortay Dr. Abiy Ahmed Ali. Markii la gaaray xilligii codbixinta, waxa mar kale nalagu amray in aanu shirka ka baxno. Kadib waxaan eegay dhinacyada hoolka, anigoo sugaya in aan arko masuul ka socda deegaannada kale oo arrintan ka hadla. Markii aan arki waayay cid gacanta taagtay, ayaan si degdeg ah gacanta u taagay, anigoo si cad u muujiyay hadal aan ku diidanahay go’aankaas, halka dhinacayga bidixna waxa fadhiyay Dr. Abiy Ahmed Ali. Kadib shirku wuxuu codkii i siiyay. Markaan soo koobo, waxaan soo jeediyay dood loo waayay jawaab.

Kadibna waxa loo baxay nasashadii shaaha, halkaas oo ay heleen waqti ay kaga tashadaan jawaabta ay na siin lahaayeen. Aniga iyo Maxamed Rashiid Isaaq oo meel gooni ah taagan oo falanqaynayna jawaabta nala siin doono, ayaa waxa si kadis ah gadaasheyda iga yimid Dr. Abiy Ahmed, intuu garabka igu dhuftayna yidhi: “Waxaad jeedisay dood sax ah, laakin khaladka dhabta ahi ma aha go’aanka shirka la idinka saarayo, balse waa in la idinku yeedho Agaar ama Bahwadaag.” Waxaan ku idhi: “Aad ayaad u mahadsan tahay.”

Markii la soo noqday, shir guddoonkii ayaa nagu wargeliyay go’aankii ay soo gaadheen. Sidaas darteed, Soomaalida iyo afartii degaan ee kale ayaa loo oggolaaday inay goob joog ka noqdaan doorashada Ra’iisul-Wasaaraha cusub.

Sida uu Dr. Abiy Ahmed marar badan sheegay, ee aanu aniga iyo masuuliyiinta federaalka ee Soomaalida ahiba goob joog ka ahayn, matoorkii saarnaa gaadhigii isbeddelkan dhalay ee ay iyagu ku yimaadeen wuxuu ka shidnaa gudaha EPRDF, gabiinkiisuna wuxuu ahaa Software ee ma ahayn Hardware. Xasadka ka dhasha kalsooni darrada, ay sababto cuqdadaha digitalka ahi, anigoo ka madax bannaan ayaan qirayaa in Guddoomiyihii Xisbiga Deegaanka ee isbeddelka, Mudane Axmed Shide, ay taariikhdu u gashey inuu galinka ku duugo ka-mid-noqoshada Xisbiga Prosperity Party.

Sidaas ayay Soomaalidu ku hanatay masiirkii iyo maqaamkii siyaasadeed, midkii dhaqaale, iyo kii arrimaha bulshada. Go’aankaas ayaa sabab u noqday in xukuumadda deegaanka iyo madaxda Soomaalida ee PP ay qayb ka noqdaan diyaarinta qorshayaasha siyaasadeed, dhaqaale, kuwa arrimaha bulshada, diblomaasiyadda, iyo xiriirka caalamiga ah ee dalka Itoobiya, isla markaana ay maanta iyagu hagayaan jihooyinka siyaasadeed ee dalka Itoobiya.

Go’aankan taariikhiga ahi wuxuu xukuumadda deegaanka siiyay fursado siyaasadeed, dhaqaale, amni, iyo kuwo arrimo bulsho oo aanay waligood helin xukuumadihii deegaanka soo maray. Jihooyinka siyaasadeed ee ururka Prosperity Party iyo dowladdiisa Madhamer ayaa fursadaha dahabiga ah deegaanka gaadhsiiyay. Amniga maanta, shacabka deegaanku wuxuu helay nabad; madaxda deegaankuna waxay ku shaqo tagaan macawis iyo cimaamado iyagoo garabka ku wataan, mana ka walwalaan weerar, jidgooyo iyo amni darro. Eebe kasokow, guushaas waxa iska leh Dr. Abiy Ahmed Ali.

Xilligayagii, comments-yada nalagu mucaaradi jiray waxay ahaayeen baasuuke iyo miinooyin jidka lagugu aasay, weerarro joogto ah oo si toos ah lagula soo beegsado guryaha masuuliyiinta oo la qarxiyo. Ninkii aad saaka shirka wada gashaan, marka uu galabtii daaho, adiga oo tiigsanaya ayaa lagu soo sheegi jiray geeridiisa.

Guulaha uu gaadhay Xisbiga Prosperity Party waxaa ka mid ah in maanta waxaas oo dhan aanay ka jirin deegaanka. Maanta comments-ku wuxuu noqday hadal iyo qoraal oo keliya. Ujeeddada gormadani waxay tahay in aan cabbiro fursadaha dahabiga ah ee ay Soomaalidu ku heleen Prosperity Party.

Mude Cabdi Maxamuud Cumar
Madaxweynihii Hore DDSI
February 8, 2026

Sida uu Dr. Abiy Ahmed marar badan sheegay, ee aanu aniga iyo masuuliyiinta federaalka ee Soomaalida ahiba goob joog ka ahayn, matoorkii saarnaa gaadhigii isbeddelkan dhalay ee ay iyagu ku yimaadeen wuxuu ka shidnaa gudaha EPRDF, gabiinkiisuna wuxuu ahaa Software ee ma ahayn Hardware. Xasadka ka dhasha kalsooni darrada, ay sababto cuqdadaha digitalka ahi, anigoo ka madax bannaan ayaan qirayaa in Guddoomiyihii Xisbiga Deegaanka ee isbeddelka, Mudane Axmed Shide, ay taariikhdu u gashey inuu galinka ku duugo ka-mid-noqoshada Xisbiga Prosperity Party.

Sidaas ayay Soomaalidu ku hanatay masiirkii iyo maqaamkii siyaasadeed, midkii dhaqaale, iyo kii arrimaha bulshada. Go’aankaas ayaa sabab u noqday in xukuumadda deegaanka iyo madaxda Soomaalida ee PP ay qayb ka noqdaan diyaarinta qorshayaasha siyaasadeed, dhaqaale, kuwa arrimaha bulshada, diblomaasiyadda, iyo xiriirka caalamiga ah ee dalka Itoobiya, isla markaana ay maanta iyagu hagayaan jihooyinka siyaasadeed ee dalka Itoobiya.

Go’aankan taariikhiga ahi wuxuu xukuumadda deegaanka siiyay fursado siyaasadeed, dhaqaale, amni, iyo kuwo arrimo bulsho oo aanay waligood helin xukuumadihii deegaanka soo maray. Jihooyinka siyaasadeed ee ururka Prosperity Party iyo dowladdiisa Madhamer ayaa fursadaha dahabiga ah deegaanka gaadhsiiyay. Amniga maanta, shacabka deegaanku wuxuu helay nabad; madaxda deegaankuna waxay ku shaqo tagaan macawis iyo cimaamado iyagoo garabka ku wataan, mana ka walwalaan weerar, jidgooyo iyo amni darro. Eebe kasokow, guushaas waxa iska leh Dr. Abiy Ahmed Ali.

Xilligayagii, comments-yada nalagu mucaaradi jiray waxay ahaayeen baasuuke iyo miinooyin jidka lagugu aasay, weerarro joogto ah oo si toos ah lagula soo beegsado guryaha masuuliyiinta oo la qarxiyo. Ninkii aad saaka shirka wada gashaan, marka uu galabtii daaho, adiga oo tiigsanaya ayaa lagu soo sheegi jiray geeridiisa.

Guulaha uu gaadhay Xisbiga Prosperity Party waxaa ka mid ah in maanta waxaas oo dhan aanay ka jirin deegaanka. Maanta comments-ku wuxuu noqday hadal iyo qoraal oo keliya. Ujeeddada gormadani waxay tahay in aan cabbiro fursadaha dahabiga ah ee ay Soomaalidu ku heleen Prosperity Party.

📌 Wararka rasmiga ah ee hadda jira👇

Dowladda Iran ayaa sheegtay in qaar ka mid ah hubka qarxa ee Mareykanku ku weeraray goobaha nukliyeerka ee Fordow, Natanz, iyo Isfahan bishii June 2025 aysan qarxin, ayna weli ku jiraan dhulka hareeraha goobahaas. 

Wasiirka arrimaha dibadda ee Iran, Abbas Araghchi, ayaa sheegay in tan ay tahay halis amni oo u baahan in laga heshiiyo khubarada caalamiga ah ka hor inta aan la gelin baaritaanno ama booqashooyiin caalami ah. 

🧨 Waa maxay hubkaas?👇

Hubka looga hadlayo wuxuu u badan yahay nooca bunker buster ee GBU-57 Massive Ordnance Penetrator (MOP) — miisaankiisu qiyaastii waa 13-ton, oo loogu talagalay inuu galo dhulka ama dhagaxa si uu u gaadho goobaha si qoto dheer loo dhisay ka hor inta uusan qarxin. 

Mareykanku ayaa weerar lagu magacaabo “Operation Midnight Hammer” ku qaaday dhowr goobood oo nukliyeer ah 22-ka June 2025, iyadoo lagu soo daadiyay ilaa 14 bomb bunker buster iyo gantaallo Tomahawk ah. 

🤔 Su’aasha ku saabsan “copy-gareynta” hubka
Waxaa jira warar la faafiyey oo sheegaya in Mareykanku uu ka cabsanayo in hubkani laga afduubo/dhexda laga helo si ay u bartaan dalal sida Shiinaha ama Ruushka, islamarkaana uu doonayo in laga ilaaliyo hal-abuurnimadiisa. Laakiin ilaa hadda ma jiro wax war rasmi ah oo la xaqiijiyey oo muujinaya in Mareykanku si cad u sheegay qorshe cusub oo weerar kale ah si uu u burburiyo hub aan qarxin ama u xannibo faafitaanka tiknoolajiyadda. Sidaas darteed, doodahaas waa sheekooyin warbaahineed ama falanqayn qoyseed oo aan wali helin cadeyn rasmi ah.

🛡️ Maxaa ay tani ka dhigan tahay👇

Hub aan qarxin oo ku yaalla meelaha weerarka lagu qaaday waxa uu halis gelinayaa shaqsiyaad, shaqaale caalami ah, iyo booqashooyinka hay’adaha sida IAEA, haddii aan si wanaagsan loo qorsheynin badbaadada. 

Xaaladda gobolka wali waa mid xasaasi ah — Iran waxay durba xustay inay arrintan ku lifaaqayso in la heshiiyo kahor dib u bilaabista baaritaannada caalamiga ah. 

Waxa jira kala duwanaansho ku saabsan sida ay saameyn ugu yeelatay barnaamijka nukliyeerka Iran: Mareykanka wuxuu ku adkaysanayaa in weerarku si weyn hoos u dhigay awoodeeda, halka qiimeynaha kale ay tilmaamayaan in kaliya dib u dhigis lagu sameeyey.

Soo-laabasho Cajiib ah | FT: Liverpool 1–2 Manchester City 🔵🔥

Manchester City ayaa soo bandhigtay soo-laabasho cajiib ah daqiiqadihii ugu dambeeyay, iyagoo 2–1 ku garaacay Liverpool garoonka Anfield, kulan si weyn u saameyn karo tartanka horyaalka.

Liverpool ayaa hoggaanka ciyaarta qabatay kaddib laad xor ah oo qurux badan oo uu dhaliyay Dominik Szoboszlai, taasoo u muuqatay inay City gelisay xaalad adag. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, City ma quusan. Bernardo Silva ayaa barbareeyay ciyaarta daqiiqadihii dambe, ka hor inta uusan Erling Haaland rigoore u beddelin gool waqtigii dhimashada, taasoo si buuxda ciyaarta u rogtay.

Saameynta Tartanka Horyaalka 🏆

Guushan dahabiga ah waxay rajada Manchester City ee hanashada horyaalka ka dhigtay mid nool, iyagoo hadda lix dhibcood oo keliya ka dambeeya Arsenal. Waxaa si dhab ah loo dhihi karaa: tartanka Horyaalka wuu furmay.

Mid ka mid ah sababaha City ay uga harayeen Arsenal xilli-ciyaareedkan ayaa ahayd dhibaatooyinka ka soo wajahayay qeybaha labaad ee kulamada, gaar ahaan marka cadaadisku bato oo ay ku adkaato inay kubadda ilaashadaan. Kulankan se, City waxay muujiyeen adkeysi difaac iyo bisayl maskaxeed oo ka duwan wixii hore loo arkay.

Inay soo-laabasho ku sameeyaan Liverpool, isla markaana ay jebiyaan taariikh xumada Anfield waxay siin kartaa City kalsooni weyn marka la galayo wajiga ugu dambeeya ee tartanka horyaalka. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waqtiga ayaa go’aamin doona sida ay arrintani ku dambayn doonto.

Maxaa xiga?

Manchester City waxay Arbacada la ciyaari doontaa Fulham, halka Arsenal ay Khamiista wajihi doonto Brentford. Farqigu hadda u dhexeeyo waa lix dhibcood, balse fariinta City ee caawa Arteta u dirtay ayaa ah: tartanka weli dhinac uma dhicin!

Guddoomiyaha Maamulka Gobolka Banaadir ahna Duqa Magaalada Muqdisho, Dr. Xasan Maxamed Xuseen (Muungaab), ayaa maanta u baxay safar shaqo oo dibadda ah, waana markii ugu horreysay ee uu dalka ka dhoofo tan iyo markii uu xilka la wareegay bishii May ee sannadkii hore.

Guddoomiye Dr. Muungaab ayaa si joogto ah ugu sugnaa Muqdisho tan iyo magacaabistiisa, isaga oo ku adkeystay in uu marka hore waqtigiisa geliyo gudashada waajibaadkii loo xilsaaray oo ay ka mid ahaayeen meelmarinta  qorshayaasha horumarineed ee Caasimadda iyo taageeridda ajandayaashii qaran sida Doorashooyinka Golayaasha Deegaanka ee ka qabsoomay Muqdisho. 

Joogitaankiisii dheeraa ee uusan xafiiska uga bixin muddadii uu xilka haayay waxa ay suurtogalisay in ay bulshada Caasimaddu maanta ka wada marqaati-kacayaan isbeddelka iyo waxqabadka muuqda ee laga sameeyay dadaallada dib-u-dhiska, bilic-soo-celinta, dib-u-habaynta Maamulka iyo horumarinta adeegyada bulshada oo uu ku guuleystay Maamulka Gobolka Banaadir.

Dab xooggan ayaa saaka aroortii hore baabi’iyay warshaddii ugu weynayd ee rootiga Jokioinen Leipä ee ku taalla degmada Jokioinen, koonfurta Finland. Dabku wuxuu qarxay wax yar kadib 4:30 subaxnimo, isagoo ka bilowday xarunta warshadda ee waddada Leivänkuja.

Dabka ayaa si degdeg ah ugu fiday dhismaha, wuxuuna gaaray saqafka sare. Ciidamada gurmadka degdegga ah ayaa saacado la dagaallamayay dabka, balse mas’uuliyiintu waxay sheegeen in dhismaha gebi ahaanba la waayay.

Xilliga uu dabku dhacay warshaddu way marneyd, mana jirin wax khasaare naf ah oo la soo sheegay. Booliska waaxda Häme ayaa furay baaritaan ku saabsan sababta dabka, iyagoo xusay in aan weli meesha laga saarin suurtagalnimada fal dambiyeed.

Adeegyada gurmadka ayaa soo saaray digniin dadweyne sababo la xiriira qiiq aad u badan oo hawada ku faafay. Dadka deegaanka ayaa lagu wargeliyay inay guryahooda ku nagaadaan isla markaana ay damiyaan nidaamyada hawada qaada. Qiiq cad oo qaro weyn ayaa hoos u dhigay aragtida waddooyinka ku dhow.

Shirkadda Jokioinen Leipä waa ganacsi qoys oo la aasaasay sanadkii 1983, iyadoo xarunta Jokioinen ay ahayd saldhiggeeda ugu weyn tan iyo bilowgii. Agaasimaha guud, Mikko Virtanen, ayaa u sheegay wargeyska Ilta-Sanomat in dabku ka bilowday bannaanka hool cabbirkiisu yahay qiyaastii 2,500 mitir oo laba jibbaaran.
