Hay’adda socdaalka ee Qaramada Midoobay ayaa maanta oo Isniin ah sheegtay in 53 qof ay dhinteen ama la la’yahay ka dib markii ay doon ku degtay badda Mediterranean-ka ee xeebaha Liibiya. Laba qof oo kaliya ayaa la badbaadiyay.

Hay’adda socdaalka caalamiga ah ayaa sheegtay in doonidu ay ku rogmatay waqooyiga Zuwara Jimcihii la soo dhaafay.

Kaliya labo haween ah oo u dhashay dalka Nigeria ayaa la soo badbaadiyay intii ay socdeen howlgalo lagu baadigoobayay mas’uuliyiinta Liibiya, IOM ayaa war ay soo saartay ku sheegtay in mid ka mid ah dadkii badbaaday ay sheegtay in ninkeeda ay ku weyday, midda kalena ay sheegtay in ay ku weyday masiibadaas labo caruur ah oo ay dhashay.

Sida laga soo xigtay AFP, IOM waxay sheegtay in kooxaheedu ay siiyeen labada badbaade daryeel caafimaad oo degdeg ah markii ay soo degeen.
Sida laga soo xigtay xisaabaadka badbaadayaasha, doonta sidday muhaajiriin iyo qaxooti dhalasho Afrikaan ah ayaa ka soo duushay Al-Zawiya, Libya, abbaare 11:00 habeenimo ee February 5. Qiyaastii lix saacadood ka dib, waxay degtay ka dib markii ay biyo qaadatay, ayay hay'addu sheegtay.

IOM waxay baroor diiqaysaa dadka ku dhintay shil kale oo dad lagu dilay oo ka dhacay marinka dhexe ee Mediterranean-ka.

Hay’adda fadhigeedu yahay magaalada Geneva ayaa sheegtay in shabakadaha tahriibinta iyo tahriibinta ay si xun uga faa’iidaystaan ​​dadka tahriibayaasha ah ee mara jidka ka yimaadda woqooyiga Afrika ee ku sii jeeda koonfurta Yurub, kuwaas oo ka macaashaya marinada halista ah ee doomaha aan badnayn ee ay maraan iyagoo dadka u soo bandhigaya tacaddiyo xooggan.

Waxay ku baaqday iskaashi caalami ah oo xooggan si wax looga qabto shabakadaha, oo ay barbar socdaan dariiqyada socdaalka ee badbaadada iyo joogtada ah si loo yareeyo khatarta loona badbaadiyo nolosha.

2 qof oo keliya ayaa ka badbaaday Doon ay saarnaayeen muhaajiriin badan oo ku rogmatay badda Mediterranean-ka.

Hay’adda Caalamiga ah ee Socdaalka (IOM) ayaa xaqiijisay in ugu yaraan 53 muhaajiriin ah, oo ay ku jiraan laba carruur ah, ay ku dhinteen badda Liibiya kaddib markii ay la degtay dooni ay saarnaayeen. 

Doontan oo 55 ruux sidday ayaa kasoo dhaqaaqdaay magaalada Zuwara habeenkii 5-ta Febraayo, balse lix saacadood kaddib ayay rogmatay, waxaana musiibadaas ka badbaaday oo kaliya laba haween ah oo u dhashay dalka Nayjeeriya.

Warbixinta IOM-ta ayaa intaas ku dartay in tan iyo bilowgii sannadkan, ay badda Mediterranean-ka ku naf-waayeen ugu yaraan 375 ruux, taasoo muujinaysa khatarta ba'an ee wali ka jirta marinkaas badda ah ee loo maro qaarada Yurub.

Abdihakim Olad

Doon ay saarnaayeen muhaajiriin ayaa ku qalibantay xeebaha dalka Liibiya. Shilkaas waxaa ku dhintay 53 qof, oo ay ku jiraan laba carruur ah . Laba qof oo kaliya ayaa ka badbaaday shilka, sida ay sheegtay Hay’adda Caalamiga ah ee Socdaalka (IOM).

Sida ay sheegeen dadka badbaaday, doonta caagga ah ayaa ka baxday fiidkii Jimcaha magaalada Saawiyah oo ku taalla waqooyi-galbeed caasimadda Tripoli, waxa ay doonta qalibantay lix saacadood kadib waxa ayna ku qalibantay meel u dhow xeebaha magaalada Suwaara ee waqooyiga dalka Liibiya.
Laba haween ah oo u dhashay Nigeria ayaa waxaa badbaadiyay ciidamada Liibiya. Mid ka mid ah haweenkaas waxay weyday ninkeeda, halka tan kalena ay ka kuweesay laba carruur ah oo aad uyaryar. Labada haweenba waxaa gargaar caafimaad siiyay hay’adda IOM.

Sida ku cad tirakoobyada IOM, sanadkii hore in ka badan 1,300 qof ayaa la la’yahay ama ku dhintay isku daygii ay ku doonayeen inay Yurub uga gudbaan Badda Mediterranean-ka oo khatar ah. Sannadkan, ilaa hadda, ugu yaraan 484 qof ayaa la xaqiijiyay inay dhinteen ama la la’yihiin, sida ay sheegtay IOM.

War Deg Deg ah: 53 Qof oo ku haftay xeebaha Liibiya. 🚨

Hay’adda Socdaalka Adduunka ee (IOM) ayaa Isniintan maanta ah xaqiijisay geerida iyo maqnaanshaha 53 muhaajiriin ah ka dib markii ay la gadoontay doon cinjir ah oo ay saarnaayeen 55 qof.

Dadka maqan waxaa ka mid ah labo carruur ah, halka labo haween ah oo kaliya ay ka badbaadeen masiibadan. Labada haween ee badbaaday ayaa mid kastaa ay weysay xubin muhiim ah oo qoyskeeda ka mid ah (Saygeedii iyo labo canug oo ay dhashay).

Badda Mediterranean-ka ayaa weli ah marinka ugu khatarta badan ee ay maraan dadka nolol raadiska ah.

Qaabkii Deegaanka Soomaalida Itoobiya (Ogaden/DDS) loogu gacan-geliyay Itoobiya
Arrintani ma ahayn “gacan-gelin hal mar ah”, ee waxay ahayd geeddi-socod taariikhi ah oo isku daray ballaarin boqortooyo, heshiisyo gumeysi, iyo awood militari. Sida ay u dhacday, waa tan:
1. Ka hor gumaysiga Yurub
Dhulka maanta loo yaqaan DDS waxaa deggenaa Soomaali xornimo ku nool.
Ma jirin xuduudo casri ah; qabiillo ayaa dhulka iska maamuli jiray.
Itoobiya ma aysan xukumin dhulkan si rasmi ah.
2. Ballaarintii Boqor Menelik II (1880meeyadii–1900)
Boqor Menelik II wuxuu bilaabay ballaarin dhul si uu Itoobiya u weyneeyo.
Ciidamo Itoobiyaan ah ayaa si tartiib ah ugu fiday Ogaden.
Soomaalidu ma aysan aqbalin, balse awood militari ayaa lagu muquuniyay.
➡️ Tani waa bilowgii gacan-ku-haynta Itoobiya.
3. Doorkii quwadihii gumaysiga Yurub
Halkaan ayaa arrintu si rasmi ah u adkaatay:
Britain, France iyo Italy ayaa gumaysanayay dhulal Soomaaliyeed.
Si ay danahooda u ilaashadaan, waxay:
Ogolaadeen in Ogaden lagu daro Itoobiya
Taageereen Menelik II
🔴 Soomaalida wax talo ah lagama siin.
4. Heshiisyadii qarsoonaa (1897)
Britain & Itoobiya waxay kala saxiixdeen heshiis:
Ogaden waxaa loo aqoonsaday inuu Itoobiya hoos yimaado
Britain-na waxay ilaalisay dhulkii ay gumaysanaysay
➡️ Heshiis shisheeye oo lagu iibiyay dhul Soomaaliyeed.
5. Xilligii gumaysiga kadib (1948–1954)
Britain ayaa mar maamuli jirtay Ogaden (British Military Administration).
Soomaalidu waxay rajaynaysay in lagu daro Soomaaliya.
Laakiin:
1954 Britain waxay si rasmi ah Ogaden ugu wareejisay Itoobiya.
🔴 Tani waa tan Soomaalidu ugu yeerto: “Gacan-gelintii Ogaden.”
6. Kadib: iska caabin & halgan
Dadka deegaanka ma aqbalin:
Waxaa bilaabmay kacdoonno
Jabhado sida WSLF iyo ONLF
Dagaalkii 1977–78 (Soomaaliya vs Itoobiya) wuxuu ahaa natiijadii murankaas.
Gunaanad
Deegaanka Soomaalida Itoobiya:
Laguma wareejin rabitaanka shacabka
Waxaa lagu daray Itoobiya:
Ballaarin xoog ah
Heshiisyo shisheeye
Danaha gumaysiga

Today, February 9, 2026, I attended Shabelle Bank share sale promotion platform in Djibouti for members of the Somali community residing there. The bank provides Islamic banking services and its activities in Djibouti are believed to boost the two countries' bilateral relations in political, economic, and cultural aspects. The event was attended by H.E. Ibrahim Usman, Vice President of the Somali Regional State and Chairman of the bank's board; Youssouf Moussa, President of the Djibouti Chamber of Commerce; other high-level sector officials; and diaspora members originating from the region. In my remarks, I thanked the Somali Regional State government for organizing the platform and the Government of Djibouti, which always stands in partnership with Ethiopia. I stated that the macroeconomic reforms being implemented in Ethiopia are yielding wide-ranging results and are increasingly benefiting Ethiopians both at home and abroad. I recalled that the opportunity Shabelle Bank has created gives a favorable chance to integrate into Ethiopia's banking system. I called on the region's diaspora in Djibouti, other Ethiopians, and business enterprises to utilize this opportunity and become part of national development and prosperity. I also affirmed the Embassy's readiness to support the efforts of the region's diaspora in Djibouti to come under one umbrella association to enhance their national contribution. On the sidelines of the platform, during a meeting with H.E. Ibrahim Usman, Vice President of the Somali Regional State, I discussed ways to enhance the contribution of the region's diaspora to national development.

Ilaahay ha u naxariisto 53 qof oo maanta ku geeriyooday badda Liibiya kadib markii ay degtay doon ay saarnaayeen muhaajiriin tahriibayay. Dadkan oo badankood ahaa dhalinyaro ayaa la sheegay inay ku wajahnaayeen qaaradda Yurub, iyagoo ka ambabaxay xeebaha dalka Liibiya.

Dhacdadan murugada leh ayaa si weyn u gilgishay quluubta dad badan, gaar ahaan jaaliyadaha ay ka soo jeedaan dadka ku naf waayay, iyadoo ehelada marxuuminta loo dirayo tacsi iyo duco ah in Alle ka siiyo samir iyo iimaan.

Khubarro iyo dadka arrimaha socdaalka ka faallooda ayaa sheegaya in sababaha weli ku kalifaya dhalinyarada tahriibka ay ka mid yihiin rajo la’aan baahsan, shaqo la’aan, amni darro, cadaadis qoys iyo bulsho, iyo warar been ah oo ay faafiyaan shabakadaha tahriibinta. Qaar ka mid ah tahriibayaasha ayaa sidoo kale aaminsan in khatarta safarka tahriibku ka yar tahay duruufaha adag ee ay ku nool yihiin maalin kasta.

Si kastaba ha ahaatee, xaqiiqdu waxay tahay in tahriibku yahay naf halis gelin, iyadoo baddu aysan lahayn naxariis. Dhacdadan ayaa mar kale muujisay baahida degdegga ah ee loo qabo wacyigelin ballaaran oo lagu baraarujinayo dhalinyarada, laguna muujinayo xaqiiqada dhabta ah ee tahriibka, oo ah khatar iyo dhimasho, halkii laga arki lahaa riyo mustaqbal.

Tahriib: Safar Nolol Raadin : 1,300 Muhaajiriin oo Naf ku Waayey Tan iyo Bilowgii 2025
=============

Hay’adda Caalamiga ah ee Socdaalka (IOM) ayaa sheegtay in 53 muhaajiriin, oo ay ku jiraan laba carruur ah, ay geeriyoodeen ama la la’yahay kaddib markii doon ay saarnaayeen ay ku qalibantay xeebaha dalka Liibiya.

Hay’addu waxay xaqiijisay in doonidaasi ay ka shiraacatay magaalada Zawiya maalintii Khamiista, balse ay ku qalibantay xeebaha Zuwara maalintii Jimcaha, xilli ay saarnaayeen ku dhowaad 55 qof.

IOM ayaa sidoo kale sheegtay in laba haween ah laga badbaadiyey badda intii ay socotay howlgallo samatabbixin ah oo ay fuliyeen ciidamada Liibiya. 
Mid ka mid ah haweenka la badbaadiyey ayaa sheegtay inay wayday ninkeeda, halka tan kalena ay xaqiijisay inay bada ku qarqameen labadeeda carruur ah intii musiibadu socotey.

Sida ay hay’addu tilmaantay, in ka badan 1,300 muhaajiriin ayaa ku naf waayey ama la la’yahay Badda Dhexe tan iyo bilowgii 2025. 
Kaliya bishii Janaayo ee sanadkan, waxaa la diiwaangeliyey ugu yaraan 375 qof oo ku dhintay ama ku waayey shilal la xiriira doonyo tahriib ah.

Liibiya ayaa tan iyo sanadkii 2011, markii xukunka laga tuuray Mucammar Al-Qaddafi, noqotay marin halis ah oo ay tahriibayaal badani uga gudbaan badda iyagoo u socda Yurub, iyaga oo ka cararaya colaad, faqri iyo duruufo adag.

Have you ever wondered why the Somali community seems to thrive financially wherever they go? Their financial discipline and unity provide valuable lessons for everyone.

First, Somalis have mastered the art of 𝐬𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐲. You will rarely find them spending recklessly in clubs or eateries. Instead, they prefer to eat at home and invest their money wisely. It’s also uncommon to see them taking frequent vacations; they often find joy and rest in the comfort of their homes.

Another strong pillar of their success is their 𝐜𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐜𝐨𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧. Somalis understand the power of unity — they pull money together to start businesses, buy property, or support one another in times of need. This spirit of teamwork allows them to achieve what individuals alone could not.

They are also 𝐞𝐱𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐧𝐞𝐠𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐬. Bargaining isn’t just a skill to them; it’s a lifestyle. This ability helps them save money and make profitable deals in business.

𝐅𝐚𝐦𝐢𝐥𝐲 𝐯𝐚𝐥𝐮𝐞𝐬 also play a key role. Having large families with strong moral principles helps reduce promiscuity and adultery — social ills that often lead to poverty. Their sense of family keeps them grounded and focused on progress.

Financially, many Somalis benefit from 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐭-𝐟𝐫𝐞𝐞 𝐥𝐨𝐚𝐧𝐬 (𝐇𝐚𝐥𝐚𝐚𝐥 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐧𝐠) within their community. This enables them to start and expand businesses without the burden of debt. Additionally, many have 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐬 𝐚𝐛𝐫𝐨𝐚𝐝,  especially in America and Europe, who support them through remittances and investment partnerships.

Above all, Somalis are 𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐮𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐲-𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝. They love one another deeply, trust each other, and often work together toward a common goal. Their success isn’t luck — it’s built on discipline, unity, and faith.

In the end, their story reminds us that wealth doesn’t come from how much you earn, but from how wisely you live, how united your community is, and how strong your values remain.

Doon caag ah oo siday qaxooti iyo muhaajiriin tiro badan ayaa ku qalibantay xeebaha waqooyi-galbeed ee dalka Liibiya, taasoo sababtay dhimashada ama waynta ugu yaraan 53 qof, oo ay ku jiraan laba caruur ah, sida ay xaqiijisay Hay’adda Caalamiga ah ee Socdaalka  oo magaceeda loo soo gaabiyo (IOM).

Bayaan ay Isniintii soo saartay IOM ayaa lagu sheegay in doonta, oo waday 55 qof, ay ku rogmatay waqooyiga magaalada xeebta ah ee Zuwara 6-dii  bishaan Febraayo. Hay’addu waxay sheegtay in laba qof oo kaliya ay ka badbaadeen shilka, kuwaas oo la siiyay gargaar caafimaad oo degdeg ah markii ay badda ka soo badbaadeen, iyadoo lala kaashanayo hay’adaha ay khusayso.

Sida ay sheegeen labada qof ee badbaaday, doontu waxay siday qaxooti iyo muhaajiriin ka kala yimid dalal Afrikaan ah, kuwaas oo doonayay inay u gudbaan Yurub iyagoo maraya marinka khatarta badan ee Bartamaha Badda Mediterranean-ka.

Doonta ayaa ka ambabaxday magaalada Al-Zawiya ee waqooyi-galbeed Liibiya abbaaro 11-kii fiidnimo ee 5-tii bishaan Febraayo, hase yeeshee waxay ku qalibantay badda qiyaastii lix saacadood kadib, xilli ay jireen xaalado cimilo oo adag.

Sida laga soo xigtay Mashruuca Dadka La La’yahay ee IOM (Missing Migrants Project), in ka badan 1,300 qof ayaa la lawaayay sannadkii 2025, iyagoo marayay marinka Bartamaha Mediterranean-ka. Dhacdadan ugu dambeysay ayaa tirada guud ee qaxootiga iyo muhaajiriinta la soo sheegay inay dhinteen ama la la’yihiin waddarta sannadkan ka dhigaysa ugu yaraan 484 qof.

IOM ayaa sidoo kale sheegtay in bishii Janaayo oo keliya ay diiwaangelisay ugu yaraan 375 muhaajiriin ah oo la soo sheegay inay dhinteen ama la la’yihiin, kadib shilal badeed aad ubadan oo aan si buuxda loo ogaan, kuwaas oo ka dhacay Bartamaha bada Mediterranean-ka, xilli ay jireen xaalado cimilo oo aad u daran.

Hay’addu waxay ka digtay in dhacdooyinkan isdaba-joogga ah ay muujinayaan khatarta joogtada ah ee halista ah ee ay wajahayaan qaxootiga iyo muhaajiriinta isku dayaya inay ka tallaabaan badda khatarta badan, iyadoo mar kale ku baaqday in la xoojiyo dadaallada badbaadinta iyo ilaalinta nolosha dadka tahriibayaasha ah.

28th & Blaisdell has long been recognized as a Latin Kings stronghold on Minneapolis’ south side. For years, this block carried weight—marked by colors, symbols, and an identity that was known well beyond the neighborhood itself.

📍 The Set & The Streets
This area wasn’t just a pin on the map. It represented structure, hierarchy, and presence. Members tied to this location were known to hold their ground, navigating constant pressure from rivals, law enforcement, and shifting street politics.

⚔️ History Over Hype
Like many historic sets, 28th & Blaisdell reflects an era when street organizations played a visible role in neighborhood dynamics—bringing both loyalty and loss. The stories tied to this corner are layered with conflict, consequences, and names that locals still remember.

🕯️ Reality Check
Behind every tag or symbol are real outcomes—prison sentences, funerals, and families changed forever. This isn’t glorification; it’s documentation of a chapter in Minneapolis street history that shaped lives on all sides.

📖 Know the block. Know the past.
Because understanding the history is the only way to see the full picture.

Waxaa uu nagala hadlaayay mashruuc muhim ahaa oo rag kale oo aqoonyano Soomaaliyeed ahaana ay wada wadeen kaa oo ahaa barnaamij siyaasadeed ay u arkaayeen dalka in lagu badbaadin karay laguna nabadayn karay waagaa, marar badan oo kalena waan kulannay oo sanadihii dambe ahaa, waxaa uu deganaa sanadihii u danbeeyay magaalada Baardheere, asagoo mar mar Canada tagi jiray, waxaa uu ii sheegay in burburkii ka hor uu ahaa ganacsade magaalada Muqdisho.

Markii aan magaciisa aan maqlo iiga horaysay Sheekh Cabdikariin Cali Magan waxay ahayd 1996dii dhamaadkeedii ilaa 1997dii bilawgeeda markaa oo warka nagu soo gaaray Kismaayo oo aan ku sugnaa, waxaana uu ahaa warkaan ku maqlay in uu ka mid ahaa culimo iyo odayaal reer Canada ah oo wafdi ka soo diray dalka Canada, wafdigaa oo ka koobnaa sedex qof, wafdigaa oo isku dayay in ay ka shaqeeyaan nabadda gobolka Gedo gaar ahaan dagaalkii markaa dhex maraayay ururka Al Itixaad iyo SNF oo si aad ah la isugu diyaargaroobaayay.

Ugaas Cumar Ugaas Xirsi Allaah ha u naxariistee oo noolaa markaa ayay ugu tageen xaruntiisa Baamba Xaliima, isku daygaa nabadda oo meel fiican maraaya ayaa dagaalkii dambe dhacay ee 1997dii kaa oo nabaddii fogeeyay sababayna dhimasho, qax iyo dhaawac kumanaan qof oo reer Gedo ah, ilaa markii dambe 1998dii lagu heshiiyay magaalada Ceelcadde.

Tan iyo maalintaa aan magaciisa bartay Sheekh Cabdikariin waxaa uu ka shaqaynaayay nabad, dacwo, horumarin, kheyr iyo wax Ummadda anfacaaya, ha joogo gudaha dalka ama dibaddiisa.

Sheekh Cabdikariin waxaa uu ahaa nabadoon, Sheekh iyo nin aad uga fekera danta caamka ah, waxaa uu ahaa waaya arag marka loo eego raggii wadaadada ahaa ee dhamaadkii qarnigii tagay qurbaha isugu tagay, waxaa uu ka mid ahaa culimadii dacwada ka bilawday jaaliyadda Soomaliyeed ee Canada gaar ahaan magaalada Toronto madaxdoodii iyo odayaashoodii ayuu ka mid ahaa.

Waagaa 1997dii aan Xamar ku kulannay waxaa uu nooga sheekeeyay dhismaha masjidkii ugu horeeyay ee ugu waynaa ee Soomaalida qurbaha ka dhisato wadamada reer galbeedka in ay dhiseen oo markaa ay dhamaystireen ka jaaliyad ahaan Canada, masjidkaa oo la oran jiray Khaalid Bin Waliid oo ilaa hadda jira, xasuustayda waxay ii sheegaysaa in uu igu yiri lacag ilaa 100 kun doolar ayaa nooga baxday, waxaana uu ka mid ahaa odayaashii iyo culimadii hogaaminaayay dhismaha masjidkaa oo laga dhisay Toronto, Canada.

Sheekh Cabdikariin Cali Magan waxaa uu ahaa oday khabiir ah qiyaas ahaan da’diisa waxaa ehelkiisa ay iigu sheegeen 75 jir, Sheekh Cabdikariin aad ayuu u jeclaa dadkiisa iyo dalkiisa waxaana uu dalka u soo guuray xiligaa aan Xamar aan isku baranaynay 1997dii ama ka horba, asagoo noo sheegay waagaa in Boorame uu ciyaalka keenay, Sheekh Cabdikariim waxaan ka dareemi jiray waayihii dambe markaan ku kulanno Muqdisho ama Beerdheere welwel wayn xaaladda Soomaaliya ay ku sugantahay, arinkaa oo muujinaysa dareenkiisa mas’uuliyadeed iyo u naxariisashadiisa dadkiisa Soomaliyeed ee dhibka ku habsaday.

Day 1 of the national four day training on Green Climate Fund frameworks officially started in Mogadishu.

We were honored to be part of the opening session, led by Liban Obsiye, Head of the National Climate Fund and National Designated Authority for the Green Climate Fund in Somalia.

The training is delivered by the NDA office in collaboration with the Global Water Partnership, and brings together participants from government institutions, civil society, and the private sector. This reinforces Somalia’s whole of country and whole of society approach to climate finance access.

The workshop focuses on strengthening national capacity for GCF programming, while advancing two key strategic documents that will guide Somalia’s climate finance readiness, project pipeline development, and structured private sector engagement.

Strong national institutions, improved intergovernmental coordination, and an engaged private sector remain central pillars for building resilience, food security, and energy security for the Somali people.

At Somali Norwegian Chamber of Commerce, we have been part of this journey since its early stages last year. We are proud to continue contributing, participating, and influencing how climate finance translates into real private sector driven impact on the ground.

Somali Norwegian Chamber of Commerce

الزواج لم يعد شرطًا اجتماعيًا لتكوين أسرة.

post_author_name_pi: Phần Lan 100 - lửa trời đuôi cáo
post_text_pi:
Phần Lan lần nữa xếp thứ hai trong Chỉ số Nhận thức Tham nhũng (CPI) toàn cầu 

Phần Lan xếp thứ hai trong Chỉ số Nhận thức Tham nhũng (CPI) toàn cầu năm 2025, theo Tổ chức Minh bạch Quốc tế. 

Với số điểm 88, Phần Lan chỉ đứng sau nước láng giềng Đan Mạch (89), Singapore (84) xếp hạng ba. Điểm số của Phần Lan không thay đổi so với năm ngoái.

Bảng xếp hạng dựa trên mức độ nhận thức về tham nhũng trong khu vực công trên thang điểm từ 0 (tham nhũng cao) đến 100 (rất trong sạch).

Ở đầu kia của thang điểm, mức độ tham nhũng cao nhất được ghi nhận ở Venezuela (10), Somalia (9) và Nam Sudan (9).

Trong thông cáo báo chí, Tổ chức Minh bạch Quốc tế giải thích rằng chỉ số này dựa trên điểm của 182 quốc gia và vùng lãnh thổ trên thế giới, "sử dụng dữ liệu từ 13 nguồn bên ngoài, bao gồm Ngân hàng Thế giới, Diễn đàn Kinh tế Thế giới, công ty tư vấn và rủi ro tư nhân, các viện nghiên cứu và những nguồn khác".

"Điểm số phản ánh quan điểm của các chuyên gia và doanh nhân, chứ không phải công chúng," Tổ chức Minh bạch Quốc tế lưu ý.

Thông cáo báo chí cho biết thêm rằng nhìn chung, tham nhũng dường như đang gia tăng. Chỉ 10 năm trước, có đến 12 quốc gia đạt điểm trên 80 – nghĩa là gần như "trong sạch". Năm nay, chỉ còn 5 quốc gia đạt điểm số đó.

"Trong khi 31 quốc gia đã giảm đáng kể mức độ tham nhũng kể từ năm 2012, thì phần còn lại đang thất bại trong việc giải quyết vấn đề - họ vẫn trì trệ hoặc thậm chí trở nên tồi tệ hơn trong cùng kỳ" - trang CPI 2025 của Tổ chức Minh bạch Quốc tế giải thích.

Điểm trung bình toàn cầu đã giảm xuống mức thấp kỷ lục là 42, trong khi hơn 2/3 số quốc gia đạt điểm dưới 50. Và người dân đang phải trả giá, vì tham nhũng "dẫn đến các bệnh viện thiếu kinh phí, không xây được công trình phòng chống lũ lụt, hủy hoại hy vọng và ước mơ của giới trẻ" - thông cáo tiếp tục.

Tổ chức này bày tỏ lo ngại về những diễn biến ở Mỹ, quốc gia xếp thứ 29 trong bảng xếp hạng.

"Mỹ (với số điểm 64) tiếp tục trượt dốc xuống mức thấp nhất từ ​​trước đến nay. Mặc dù tác động đầy đủ của những diễn biến năm 2025 vẫn chưa được phản ánh, nhưng những hành động gần đây, chẳng hạn như nhắm vào những tiếng nói phản biện, làm suy yếu tính độc lập của tư pháp, đang gây ra những lo ngại nghiêm trọng", Tổ chức Minh bạch Quốc tế cho biết.

Việt Nam được chấm 41 điểm, xếp hạng 81/182 - lên 1 hạng so với năm 2024. 

Theo Yle.

Poliisihallituksen ayaa ka hor yimid qorshaha dowladda ee xaddidaya qaadista sawirrada baasaboorka

Hay’adda Sare ee Booliska Finland (Poliisihallitus) ayaa si cad uga soo horjeesatay qorshe ay dowladda waddo oo lagu doonayo in sawirrada baasaboorka lagu koobo oo keliya goobaha ganacsiga ee sawir-qaadista. Hay’addu waxay sheegtay in tallaabadan ay kordhin doonto culeyska shaqo ee hay’adaha dowladda, isla markaana aysan dammaanad qaadayn kalsoonida sawirrada.

Kormeeraha sare ee Poliisihallituksen, Juhani Ruutu, ayaa sheegay in isbeddelkan uusan ka hortagi doonin khiyaanooyinka ama isticmaalka sawirrada ee ujeeddooyin dembiyeed.

Sida ku cad soo-jeedinta dowladda, sawirka wajiga ee baasaboorka iyo kaarka aqoonsiga waxaa, marka laga reebo xaalado gaar ah, qaadi kara oo keliya ganacsade ama hay’ad si rasmi ah uga diiwaangashan sawir-qaadis. Xaaladaha ka reeban waxaa ka mid ah:
 • Baasaboorka degdegga ah
 • Baasaboorrada diblomaasiyadeed iyo kuwa shaqada, kuwaas oo Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda ay mararka qaar si toos ah sawirka u qaadi karto.

Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha ee Finland ayaa haatan ururinaysa aragtiyo (lausuntoja) ku saabsan hindisaha sharciyeedka, kaas oo sidoo kale lagu doonayo in muddada ansaxnimada baasaboorrada iyo kaararka aqoonsiga loo kordhiyo 10 sano. Waqtiga aragti-ururintu wuxuu soconayaa ilaa 16-ka Febraayo.

Ruutu ayaa sheegay in haddii sharcigan la meel mariyo, ay si weyn u kordhi doonto shaqada hay’adaha, maadaama loo baahan doono in la baaro taariikhda iyo asalka sawir-qaadayaasha ka hor inta aan la aqbalin sawirrada baasaboorka, arrintaas oo uusan sahlanayn.

Wuxuu xusay in qof walba uu si fudud uga beddeli karo ganacsigiisa diiwaanka ganacsiga (kaupparekisteri) si uu ugu daro sawir-qaadis, maadaama aysan ahayn hawl xaddidan oo ruqsad gaar ah u baahan.

Soo-jeedinta sharciga ayaa sidoo kale dhigaysa in qofkii saddexdii sano ee la soo dhaafay lagu xukumay xabsi uusan qaadi karin sawirro baasaboorka, balse Ruutu wuxuu sheegay in kooxaha dambiyada abaabulan ay si sahlan u heli karaan dad ama shirkado leh taariikh “nadiif ah”.

Ugu dambeyn, Poliisihallituksen waxay carrabka ku adkaysay in isbedelkan uusan wax horumar ah ka sameyn doonin tayada sawirrada baasaboorka.

“Waxaan la macaamilayay Xawaaladda Tawakal tan iyo yaraantaydii, waxaana mar walba ka helay adeegyadeeda qanacsanaan.”

Ku dhawaad 55 qof oo muhaajiriin iyo qaxooti ah, oo ay ku jiraan laba carruur ah, ayaa la rumeysan yahay inay ku dhinteen kadib markii doon ay saarnaayeen ay ku qallibantay xeebta Liibiya, sida ay sheegtay Hay’adda Caalamiga ah ee Socdaalka ee Qaramada Midoobay (IOM).

Hay’addu waxay sheegtay in doonta, oo siday dad ka kala yimid dalal kala duwan oo Afrikaan ah, ay badda ku jirtay muddo ku dhow lix saacadood kadib markii ay ka baxday magaalada xeebta ah ee al-Zawiya, ee waqooyi-galbeed Liibiya, ka hor inta aysan degin.

IOM ayaa xaqiijisay in kaliya laba qof laga soo badbaadiyay shilkaas, kuwaas oo ah laba haween ah oo u dhashay dalka Nigeria. Mid ka mid ah haweenkaas ayaa sheegtay in ninkeeda uu kamid ahaa dadka ku dhintay shilka, halka tan kalena ay xaqiijisay in labadeeda carruur ah ay badda ku dhinteen. Labada haween ayaa la siiyay daryeel caafimaad iyo gargaar degdeg ah oo nafsiyeed.

Hay’adda Socdaalka Adduunka ayaa sheegtay in tan iyo bilowgii sanadkan 2026, ku dhawaad 500 muhaajiriin ah la soo sheegay inay dhinteen ama la la’yahay iyagoo isku dayaya inay ka gudbaan Badda Mediterranean-ka, iyagoo ka soo tallaabaya Liibiya una sii jeeda Yurub.

Liibiya ayaa muddo dheer noqotay waddan muhiim u ah muhaajiriinta ka imanaya dalalka ka hooseeya Saxaraha Afrika, kuwaas oo rajaynaya inay gaaraan Yurub. Socdaalkan halista ah ayaa si weyn u kordhay tan iyo markii la riday hoggaamiyihii muddada dheer xukunka hayay ee Muammar Gaddafi sanadkii 2011, taas oo keentay burbur ku yimid ammaanka iyo nidaamyadii xakamayn lahaa tahriibta.

Inkasta oo masiibooyin noocan ah ay si joogto ah u dhacayaan, haddana muhaajiriintu weli way sii wadaan isku dayga khatarta ah ee ay badda ku marayaan, iyagoo ka cararaya saboolnimo, colaad iyo xaalado nololeed oo adag.

Dhanka kale, horaantii sanadkan, hay’adaha amniga ee Liibiya ayaa sii daayay in ka badan 200 muhaajiriin ah oo ku xirnaa meel ay ku tilmaameen xabsi qarsoodi ah oo ku yaalla magaalada Kufra ee koonfur-bari dalkaas. Sida ay Reuters u sheegeen ilo-wareedyo dhanka amniga ah, dadkaasi waxaa lagu hayay xaalado ka baxsan bini’aadanimada.

Dhacdadan ugu dambeysay ayaa mar kale iftiiminaysa halista ba’an ee ay wajahayaan muhaajiriinta iyo baahida loo qabo xalal caalami ah oo wax ku ool ah, si loo yareeyo khasaaraha nafaha bini’aadamka ee socdaalka sharci darrada ah ee badda.

Saxafi Xaashi oo ah nin dhallinyaro ah oo reer Sool ah iyo Wasiirkii hore ee duulista iyo hawada ee xilligii Farmaajo maxaa kala qabsaday. Wasiir Oomaar waa qurba joog reer Mareekan ah oo siyaasada kusoo booday kkk Weliba Madaxweyne u sharraxan.

انخفاض تاريخي: انخفض المتوسط العالمي للمؤشر لأول مرة منذ أكثر من عقد ليصل إلى 42 نقطة من أصل 100.
تراجع الديمقراطيات: سجلت دول كبرى تراجعاً ملحوظاً في مراكزها، منها الولايات المتحدة (64 نقطة)، والمملكة المتحدة (70 نقطة)، وكندا (75 نقطة).
أزمة عالمية: أشار التقرير إلى أن 122 دولة من أصل 182 سجلت أقل من 50 نقطة، مما يشير إلى فشل واسع في كبح جماح الفساد في القطاع العام.

اما عن العراق
الترتيب العالمي: احتل العراق المرتبة 136 من أصل 182 دولة شملها التقرير.
الدرجة الإجمالية: حصل العراق على 28 نقطة من أصل 100، بزيادة قدرها نقطتان عن العام السابق (2024) حيث كان يمتلك 26 نقطة.
الترتيب العربي: ما يزال العراق في ذيل القائمة عربياً، حيث جاء في المرتبة الثامنة بين أكثر الدول العربية فساداً، متقدماً فقط على دول تعاني من نزاعات حادة مثل ليبيا، اليمن، السودان، سوريا، والصومال.

মোগাদিশুতে ভয়াবহ দুর্ঘটনা এড়াতে অসাধারণ দক্ষতা দেখিয়েছেন এক পাইলট। মঙ্গলবার সকালে টেক-অফের পরপরই প্রযুক্তিগত ত্রুটি দেখা দিলে ৫০ যাত্রী ও ৫ ক্রুসহ মোট ৫৫ জনকে বাঁচাতে তিনি বিমানটি রাজধানীর আন্তর্জাতিক বিমানবন্দরের পাশের সমুদ্রতটে জরুরি অবতরণ করান।

স্টারস্কি এভিয়েশন জানিয়েছে, পাইলটের দ্রুত সিদ্ধান্তই বড় ধরনের প্রাণহানি থেকে সবাইকে রক্ষা করেছে।

সোমালিয়ার সিভিল এভিয়েশন অথরিটি জানায়, ফকার ৫০ মডেলের বিমানটি রানওয়েতে নামলেও থামতে পারেনি এবং গড়িয়ে অগভীর পানিতে গিয়ে থামে। তবে সবাই জীবিত উদ্ধার হয়েছেন।

Press Release: Embassy of the Federal Republic of Somalia – Dar es Salaam

Permanent Secretary of Somalia’s Ministry of Foreign Affairs Inaugurates Ambassador’s Residence in Dar es Salaam

Dar es Salaam, Tanzania – The Embassy of the Federal Republic of Somalia in the United Republic of Tanzania today hosted a formal ceremony to inaugurate the new Residence of the Ambassador, officiated by the Honourable Hamza Adan Haadoow, Permanent Secretary of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation of Somalia.

The ceremony brought together representatives of the Government of Tanzania, members of the diplomatic corps, officials, and leaders of the Somali community, marking another milestone in Somalia’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its diplomatic institutions and international presence.

In his keynote address, the Permanent Secretary underscored the importance of institutional continuity, dignified diplomatic representation, and the Federal Government’s commitment to rebuilding and strengthening Somalia’s missions abroad. He noted that investments in diplomatic infrastructure reflect Somalia’s growing stability, confidence, and engagement with regional and global partners.

The inauguration of the Residence follows the successful renovation and upgrading of the Embassy Chancery inaugurated last year, representing the second major diplomatic infrastructure milestone achieved within a year under the leadership of H.E. Ambassador Ilyas Ali Hassan.

The Embassy in Dar es Salaam serves not only the United Republic of Tanzania but also represents Somalia, on a non-resident basis, to several countries across the region and to the East African Community (EAC), making it a key hub for Somalia’s diplomacy in East and Central Africa.

Speaking at the event, H.E. Ambassador Ilyas Ali Hassan emphasized that the Residence is a national asset designed to support institutional continuity and future diplomatic engagement, rather than a personal undertaking. He reaffirmed Somalia’s commitment to strengthening bilateral relations with Tanzania, advancing regional cooperation, and supporting the Somali diaspora.

Ambassador Ilyas Ali Hassan also expressed his sincere appreciation to His Excellency Dr. Hassan Sheikh Mohamud, President of the Federal Republic of Somalia; His Excellency Hamza Abdi Barre, Prime Minister; and the Honourable Abdisalan Abdi Ali, Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation, for their leadership, trust, and continued support. He further conveyed gratitude to the Government of the United Republic of Tanzania, members of the diplomatic corps, and the Somali community for their partnership, cooperation, and enduring friendship.

The Ambassador emphasized his firm belief in leaving a lasting institutional legacy, noting that public service should be measured not by tenure but by what is built and sustained for future generations. He underscored that the new Residence and the upgraded Embassy facilities are national assets intended to strengthen continuity, dignity, and effectiveness in Somalia’s diplomatic representation.

The Embassy also highlighted the historical significance of Somalia’s diplomatic presence in Tanzania, noting that the current compound—now reorganized into dedicated Embassy and Residential facilities—forms part of a broader national diplomatic footprint that includes additional strategic properties retained by the Government of Somalia in Dar es Salaam.

The ceremony concluded with the formal inauguration of the Residence and a reception attended by dignitaries and guests.

— End —

Email: daressalamembassy@mfa.gov.so

Die Vereinigten Staaten erleben unter Präsident Donald Trump einen historischen Absturz im internationalen Korruptionsranking. Im Korruptionswahrnehmungsindex 2025 von Transparency International fallen die USA auf Platz 29 zurück - so schlecht standen sie seit Beginn der Erhebungen noch nie da. Mit 64 von 100 möglichen Punkten verliert das Land weiter an Vertrauen in die Integrität von Politik und Verwaltung.

Transparency International macht dafür vor allem politische Eingriffe in unabhängige Institutionen verantwortlich. Behörden sollen demnach versucht haben, kritische Stimmen wie Journalisten und Hilfsorganisationen einzuschränken, während Entscheidungen von Staatsanwaltschaften politisch beeinflusst worden seien. Zudem wird kritisiert, dass ein Gesetz außer Kraft gesetzt wurde, das Bestechungen ausländischer Amtsträger durch US-Bürger und Unternehmen untersagte - ein Schritt, den die Organisation als gefährliches Signal für die Akzeptanz korrupter Praktiken wertet.

Der Index vergleicht 182 Staaten und basiert auf Einschätzungen von Experten und Führungskräften. Während die USA abrutschen, verbessert sich Deutschland im Jahr 2025 auf Platz 10 mit 77 Punkten und liegt damit deutlich vor den Vereinigten Staaten. An der Spitze stehen weiterhin Länder wie Dänemark, Finnland und Singapur, während Staaten wie der Südsudan und Somalia das Schlusslicht bilden. Die Entwicklung zeigt, wie stark politische Entscheidungen das internationale Vertrauen in staatliche Institutionen beeinflussen können.

Agenda Rabu Pagi di Kemenag Kuburaya

Ekoteologi : Sinergi Pemda dan Kemenag di Lahan Produktif

Pagi itu, sebelum kata-kata pembinaan ASN menggema di aula PLHUT, Kabupaten Kubu Raya, yang lebih dulu “berbicara” justru sebidang tanah di belakang kantor. Panjangnya 200 meter, luasnya lapang, dan, seperti banyak aset negara lainnya nyaris lebih banyak diam daripada digerakkan. Bedanya, tanah ini tidak sepenuhnya pasrah. Ia sudah memberi tanda-tanda kehidupan: 45 pohon pinang yang produktif berbuah, mangga, matoa, kelengkeng, durian, pisang, hingga talas yang tumbuh subur. Seolah ingin menyindir manusia yang kadang lebih lambat berbuah daripada tanaman.

Peninjauan lahan tersebut dilakukan bersama Wakil Bupati Kubu Raya, H. Sukiryanto, S.Ag., didampingi Kakankemenag Kubu Raya, Dr. H. Ekhsan, S.Ag., M.Si., beserta jajaran. Agenda utamanya bukan sekadar melihat tanah kosong, tetapi memastikan rencana pembangunan kandang ayam petelur berkapasitas 1.000 ekor, bantuan Wakil Bupati kepada IPHI yang bekerja sama dengan Kemenag Kubu Raya, benar-benar berdiri di atas visi, bukan sekadar wacana. Ini bukan kandang biasa. Ia dirancang sebagai proyek percontohan, simbol bahwa kantor agama pun bisa produktif secara ekonomi tanpa kehilangan ruh spiritualnya.

Sering kali kita pandai berbicara tentang kemandirian umat, tetapi lupa bahwa kemandirian tidak tumbuh dari pidato, melainkan dari pengelolaan aset yang konkret. Tanah yang subur namun dibiarkan kosong sejatinya adalah kritik diam terhadap manajemen yang belum maksimal. Maka ketika bibit durian ditanam oleh Wakil Bupati dan Kakankemenag, serta bibit matoa dan pinang ditanam oleh Kakanwil, itu bukan sekadar seremoni foto. Itu adalah pesan: menanam hari ini untuk menuai manfaat esok hari. Apalagi kegiatan ditutup dengan panen pisang dan talas sebuah bukti bahwa yang dirawat akan memberi hasil, dan yang diabaikan hanya akan menjadi semak.
Inilah praktik ekoteologi yang berdampak. Agama tidak berhenti di mimbar, tetapi hadir di tanah, di akar, di kandang ayam, dan di hasil panen. 

Halaman kantor yang dikelola baik dapat menjadi laboratorium kemandirian, ruang edukasi, sekaligus inspirasi. Wakil Bupati menunjukkan antusiasme dan dukungan penuh, sebuah kolaborasi yang patut diapresiasi di tengah sinisme publik terhadap birokrasi.

Barangkali yang paling mengagumkan bukanlah luasnya lahan atau jumlah ayam yang akan dipelihara, melainkan kesadaran bahwa aset negara harus hidup dan menghidupi. Jika 1.000 ekor ayam kelak bertelur setiap hari, semoga ia juga menetaskan kesadaran baru: bahwa kerja birokrasi tak cukup hanya administratif, tetapi harus produktif, inovatif, dan memberi manfaat nyata bagi umat dan masyarakat.

Taakulo Somali Community successfully facilitated a 3-day training for 50 Para-Social Community Volunteers from five DAC-hosting areas: Qoorgaab, Hayayaabe, Faaraxyood, Xaaslay, and Haddi.

The training strengthened participants’ capacities in community-based protection, human rights advocacy, and case referral mechanisms. It also aimed to establish strong linkages between community volunteers and Borama Municipality sub-offices to enhance coordination and collaboration at the neighborhood level.

This activity was implemented by Taakulo Somali Community in collaboration with Borama Local Municipality under the Cities Alliance project, hosted by UNOPS and funded by the European Union (EU). 

Together, we are building inclusive and resilient communities.

ஊழல் மிகுந்த நாடுகளின் பட்டியல் – இந்தியாவுக்கு 91ஆவது இடம்!

➤ பொ்லினை மையமாகக் கொண்டு இயங்கும் உலகளாவிய அரசு சாரா அமைப்பான 'டிரான்ஸ்பரன்சி இன்டர்நேஷ்னல்' அமைப்பு ஊழல் தரவரிசைப் பட்டியலை ஆண்டுதோறும் வெளியிட்டு வருகிறது.

➤ மொத்தம் 182 நாடுகள் இடம் பெற்றிருந்த இந்தப் பட்டியலில் இந்தியா 91வது இடத்தைப் பிடித்துள்ளது. 2024இல் 96வது இடத்தில் இருந்த இந்தியா, 2025இல் 100க்கு 39 புள்ளிகள் பெற்று 5 இடங்கள் முன்னேறியுள்ளது.

➤ ஊழலற்ற நாடாக 89 புள்ளிகளுடன் டென்மாா்க் முதலிடத்தையும், ஃபின்லாந்து (88), சிங்கப்பூா் (84) ஆகியவை அடுத்தடுத்த இடங்களிலும் உள்ளன.

➤ ஊழல் மிகுந்த நாடுகளாக 9 புள்ளிகளுடன் சோமாலியா மற்றும் தெற்கு சூடான் ஆகிய நாடுகள் 181வது இடத்தில் உள்ளன. 10 புள்ளிகளுடன் வெனிசுவேலா 180வது இடத்தில் உள்ளது.

➤ மேலும், ஊழல் குறித்து செய்தி வெளியிடும் பத்திரிகையாளர்களுக்கு ஆபத்தான நாடுகளின் பட்டியலிலும் இந்தியா இடம்பெற்றுள்ளது.

Today, like millions of our fellow citizens at home and across the diaspora, I stand proud of our nation’s election to the African Union’s Peace and Security Council for the 2026-2028 term, the first time since the Council was established.

This is more than a seat at the table and a statement that Somalia is not defined by its past trials, but by its present strength. Not a subject of continental deliberation, but a solution-provider in continental decision-making.

Our return to the AUPSC reflects years of patient state-building, institutional reform, and steadfast belief in the promise of our Republic. It affirms that when a people refuse to surrender their sovereignty, dignity, and hope, history bends in their favour.

Somalia has always been a nation of bridge-builders. We are a founding member of the African Union - formerly the OAU, and in 1974, our capital Mogadishu proudly hosted the 11th OAU Summit. Even then, we understood that Africa’s peace is indivisible, that our destinies are intertwined, and that leadership demands courage.

As we take our place on the Peace and Security Council, we do so with humility, but also with conviction. We bring the hard-earned lessons of resilience. We bring a voice shaped by experience. And we bring an unshakeable commitment to African-led mediation, reconciliation, and peacebuilding.

I extend my deepest gratitude to our friends and partners across the continent and around the world for their trust, their support, and their enduring belief in Somalia. Partnership is strongest when it is rooted in mutual respect, and today that respect has been reaffirmed.

I commend H.E. President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud and our Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation for their leadership, diplomacy, and tireless engagement that made this achievement possible.

This milestone belongs to every Somali mother who prayed for peace, every young person who believed in a better future, every public servant who chose integrity over ease.

The world is witnessing Somalia’s re-emergence. And this time, we rise not only for ourselves, but for Africa.

Somalia is back

SIDEE AY MARAYKANKU U HELAAN SADDAM XUSEEN
Kadib markii Baqdaad dhacday 2003, Saddam Xuseen si lama filaan ah ayuu u qarsoomay. Qasri ma joogin, fariin ma dirin, meel lagu arkayna ma jirin. Ninkii ugu la doonista badnaa dunida ayaa u ekaaday mid baaba’ay. Laakiin waxa xigay raad-raac aad u adag oo taariikhda galay.
🧠 Yaa ahaa Saddam Xuseen?
Saddam Xuseen wuxuu Ciraaq xukumayay 1979 ilaa 2003. Xukunkiisu wuxuu ku dhisnaa awood adag, cabsi, iyo dagaal.
Wuxuu hoggaamiyay dagaalkii Iran–Ciraaq (1980–1988).
Wuxuu 1990 weeraray Kuweyt, taasoo dhalisay Dagaalkii Khaliijka.
Waxaa lagu eedeeyay isticmaalka hub kiimiko ah iyo tacaddiyo ka dhan ah dad rayid ah.
2003, markii ciidammada Maraykanku hoggaaminayeen duullaanka Ciraaq, dowladdiisii way dhacday—laakiin isaga lama qaban markiiba.
🌫️ Maxaa dhacay kadib dhicitaankii Baqdaad?
Abriil 2003 dowladdii way burburtay, balse Saddam wuu dhuuntay.
Waxaa la bilaabay raad-raac ballaaran.
Saraakiil sare oo Ciraaqi ah ayaa la qabtay.
Waxaa la soo saaray kaararkii “Most Wanted” oo Saddam ka ahaa Ace of Spades.
Muddo bilo ah, wuxuu ku wareegayay beero, tuulooyin iyo guryo ammaan ah, gaar ahaan agagaarka Tikrit oo ah deegaankiisii.
🕵🏽‍♂️ Sidee dhab ahaantii loo helay?
Ma ahayn tiknoolajiyad casri ah ama dayax-gacmeed keliya. Waxa ugu muhiimsanaa sirdoonka bini’aadamka (human intelligence).
Waxaa la qabtay ilaaladiisii iyo farriin-wadayaashii.
Qof walba oo la qabto wuxuu bixiyay xog yar oo isku xirma.
Ugu dambayn, xogtu waxay tilmaantay meel u dhow Ad-Dawr, agagaarka Tikrit.
13-kii Diseembar 2003, howlgal la baxay Operation Red Dawn ayaa la fuliyay. Laba goobood oo beeraha ah ayaa la baaray. Mid ka mid ah waxaa laga helay god yar oo dhulka hoostiisa ah (“spider hole”) oo uu ku dhuumanayay.
Saddam waxaa laga soo saaray isagoo gadh dheer leh, wasakhaysan, isla markaana kaligiis ah. Wuxuu watay qori iyo lacag, balse ma jirin ciidan difaacaya. Isma difaacin.
⚖️ Maxaa xigay?
Waxaa loo gacan geliyay maamulka Ciraaq. Maxkamad Ciraaqi ah ayaa ku xukuntay dambiyo ka dhan ah aadanaha, waxaana la dilay Diseembar 2006.
🧩 Casharka ka baxaya
Sheekadu ma ahayn kaliya in la helo nin qarsoon. Waxay muujisay in nidaam kasta oo qarsoon ugu dambayn dillaaco marka dadkii ku dhowaa kala jabaan. Mararka qaar, awooddu kuma dhacdo rasaas—waxay ku dhacdaa marka xogtu soo baxdo.

**Czech Republic Improves Corruption Ranking in 2025 Index **

The Czech Republic is rated not as corrupt as it once was.  You may be surprised at some other findings from Transparency International’s global ratings.

The “Honest Guide” guys must be doing their jobs because Czechia now ranks 39th worldwide in corruption, improving from 46th place last year (the higher the number the worse the corruption).  But, most members of the European Union remain better than 39th on average.

Transparency International evaluated perceived corruption in the public sector across 182 countries and territories.

Transparency gives a score of 100 for a very clean public sector, while zero reflects severe corruption. The global average slipped to 42 points last year, meaning more corruption overall, with most countries scoring under 50.

Czechia recorded 59 points out of 100, three points more than a year earlier.

Across Central Europe, Slovakia moved in the opposite direction. Its score fell to 48 points, dropping the country from 59th place to 61st. Poland ranked 52nd with 53 points, while Hungary placed 84th with 40 points, among the weakest results in the European Union.

The Baltic states — Estonia, Latvia and Lithuania — all scored higher than the Czech Republic despite joining the EU in the same 2004 enlargement round. Denmark had the top  global ranking, followed by Finland and Singapore (meaning the least corrupt).

At the bottom were South Sudan, Somalia and Venezuela (the most corrupt).

Transparency International also points to a broader trend: that several established democracies, including the United States, Canada, New Zealand, the United Kingdom, France and Sweden, have seen worsening perceptions of corruption in recent years.

The United States ranked 29th with 64 points, down slightly year in a year. China placed 76th with 43 points, Russia ranked 157th with 22, and Ukraine came 104th with 36 points.

Waxaan ahay….

Waxaan ahay qof jecel qabiilka uu Alle ka dhaliyay, mase ihi qof u dabran aragtida reerkiisa. Waayo, marka hore waan ka dhashay, SE MA IHI. Marka labaadna, waxaan ogahay in tolnimadu tahay qof qatan quudintii, qof qaldan qabashadii iyo qof qumman quwayntii, se aanay ahayn sed-bursiino iyo qab-qab dhaafay.

Waxaan ahay muxaafad, waxaanan ahay mucaarad, mase ihi mucaarad madhan ama muxaafad madhan. Waayo, waxaan ogahay muxaafadka madhan in uu waddaniyad ka madhan yahay, mucaaradka madhina uu ujeeddo ka madhan yahay. 

Waxaan ahay qof jecel noloshii hore, mana ihi qof neceb casriyowga (modernity). Waayo, waxaan ogahay  fikrad kasta oo cusubi inaanay horumar ahayn, fikrad wal oo duug ahina aanay dibudhac ahayn. 

Ma ihi qof ay qaabayso   dadka kale aragtiyahooda, mana ihi qof aan qaadan waxa naftayda la iiga sheego. Waayo waxaan ogahay inaanay wada saxnayn sida la ii arko, sida aan isu arkana wada toosnayn, se ay muhiim tahay inaan  is-qiimeeyo oo la kaashado naftayda xaqiiqada ah. 

Ma ihi qof wax kasta ka falceliya, mana ihi qof aan diirrin ama aan dareen lahayn. Waayo, waxaan ogahay in falcelintu aanay mar walba ahayn jawaab, qabowniduna aanay mar walba ahayn xikmad.

Inaan dareen leeyahay igama dhigayso qof jilicsan, is-cabudhintuna igama dhigayso qof adag. Waayo waxaan ogahay in qaan-gaadhnimada nafeedi  ay ku jirto naf xakamaynta, se aanay ku jirin is-diidsiinta (dinal).   

Inaad iga aragti duwan tahay igama dhigayso inaan kaa soo horjeedo, inaan kaa soo horjeedinna igama dhigayso inaan isku fikir nahay. Waayo waxaan ogahay in kala duwanaanshuhu aanay ahayn in la is-dagaalsan yahay, sida is-afgaradkuna aanu mar walba u ahayn in fikrad-wadaag la yahay.   

— Mubarak Hadi

Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda Masar, Dr. Badr Cabdulaati, oo gudoomiyay shirka Golaha Nabadda iyo Ammaanka ee Midowga Africa, ayaa soo dhoweeyay horumarka dowladda Soomaaliya, isaga oo xaqiijiyay taageerada joogtada ah ee Masar u hayso midnimada, madaxbannaanida, iyo wadajirka dhuleed ee dalka. Wasiirka ayaa sheegay in uu hadalkaan wakiil ugu yahay madaxweynaha Masar Al Sisi.

Wasiir Cabdulaati ayaa ka digay isku day kasta oo dibadeed oo lagu kala qeybinayo Soomaaliya ama lagu abuuro saldhigyo militari oo ay yeeshaan dalal aan ka tirsanayn kuwa ku teedsanayn Badda Cas, taasoo uu ku tilmaamay xadgudub ku ah mabda’a madaxbannaanida iyo faragelin la’aanta arrimaha gudaha dalalka.

Sidoo kale, Masar waxay adkaysay muhiimadda taageeridda hay’adaha amniga Soomaaliya si ay ula tacaalaan argagixisada iyo xagjirnimada, iyo in la helo maalgelin ku filan oo joogto ah oo lagu taageero Hawlgalka Midowga Afrika ee Taageerada iyo Xasillinta Soomaaliya (AUSSOM), si uu u guto waajibaadkiisa.

Masar waxay sidoo kale ku boorisay iskaashi caalami iyo mid goboleed si loo xoojiyo nabadda, amniga, iyo horumarka Soomaaliya, iyadoo muujisay in dalka uu ka go’an yahay taageeridda dhismaha hay’adaha dowladda iyo xasilloonida gobolka.

Shirka oo ay fadhiyeen dhamaan wasiiradda arrimaha dibada Africa iyo gudoonka ugu sareeya Ururka ayaa Masar ku canaanatay in Africanku ku fashilmeen taageerada Soomaaliya iyo Suudaan ayna tahay in go'aano iyo taabooyin geesino leh la qaato.

🔴 BREAKING: South Sudan Among the World’s Most Corrupt Countries, Transparency International Reports

Juba, South Sudan – February 12, 2026: South Sudan has once again been ranked near the bottom of global corruption rankings, scoring just 9 out of 100 in Transparency International’s 2025 Corruption Perceptions Index (CPI)—tying with Somalia.

The report highlights systemic corruption, weak oversight, politicized justice, and a shrinking civic space as major challenges undermining governance and development in the country.

Transparency International warned that piecemeal reforms without citizen oversight are unlikely to succeed. “Strong institutions, protected civic space, and credible accountability mechanisms are essential for sustainable development,” the report states.

By contrast, countries such as Denmark, Finland, Singapore, and New Zealand are ranked among the least corrupt in the world. Within Africa, nations like Seychelles (68), Senegal (46), and Côte d’Ivoire (43) are cited as success stories in tackling corruption.

South Sudan’s persistently low CPI score underscores the urgent need for comprehensive anti-corruption reforms and stronger institutions to protect citizens, strengthen governance, and promote democratic resilience.

WAR DEG-DEG AH: Jabra oo Live-ka TikTok ku soo Bandhigay Cabasho ka dhan ah Kooxda "Team Kaazow" Full Video Ka Daawo Comentiga 👇

​NAIROBI, Kenya – Magaalada Nairobi waxaa ka taagan xiisad xooggan oo ka dhalatay hadallo uu baraha bulshada ku baahiyay wiilka caanka ka ah barnaamijka TikTok ee loo yaqaano Jabra. Jabra ayaa fagaaraha Live-ka ee TikTok ka sheegay inuu la kulmay hanjabaad iyo cadaadis uga yimid kooxda loogu yeero Team Kaazow, kuwaas oo uu ku tilmaamay burcad dhibaato ku haysa dhalinyarada Soomaaliyeed ee ku nool magaalooyinka Nairobi iyo Gaarisa.
​Baad iyo Hanjabaad
​Jabra ayaa shaaca ka qaaday in kooxdan ay weydiisteen lacag baad ah, isagoo si gaar ah magaca ugu dhuftay shaqsi la yiraahdo Farah Bareeno oo uu ku sifeeyay "nin timo raamole ah" oo ka tirsan horjoogayaasha kooxdaas.
​Baxsashada Yaxbul iyo Kala fogaanshaha Saaxiibada
​Warka ayaa intaas ku daraya in Jabra uu sheegay in saaxiibkiisii dhowaa ee loo yaqaanay Yaxbul uu gabi ahaanba isaga cararay magaalada Nairobi, ka dib markii uu u dulqaadan waayay khatarta kooxdan, isagoo haatan magangalyo u raadsaday dalka Uganda, gaar ahaan magaalada Kampala.
​Xaaladda Guud iyo Baraha Bulshada
​In kastoo maalmihii la soo dhaafay baraha bulshada lagu baahinayay in Jabra laftiisu uu horay uga tirsanaa kooxdan, haddana muuqaalkiisii ugu dambeeyay ayaa u muuqda mid uu kaga fogaanayo kooxdaas isagoo u arkaya inay yihiin burcad dhibaato ku haysa amniga dhalinyarada Soomaaliyeed ee ku dhaqan dalka Kenya.
​Ilaa hadda ma jiro hadal rasmi ah oo ka soo baxay hay'adaha amniga ee ku aadan cabashada Jabra iyo dhaqdhaqaaqa kooxdan lagu magacaabo "Team Kaazow".
​Ma jeceshahay inaan qoraalkan u bedelo qaab maqaal ah oo loogu talagalay Facebook ama inaan ku daro digniin ku socota dhalinyarada?
Kiiska Jabra iyo Kooxda Team Kaazow
Xaaladdan ka dhex qaraxday TikTok ma ahan mid ku kooban muran laba qof dhex maray oo kaliya, balse waa arrin muujinaysa isbeddelka amni ee dhalinyarada Soomaaliyeed ee ku nool Kenya.
1. Dhinaca Amniga iyo Burcad-nimada (The Security Aspect)
Kooxda lagu magacaabay Team Kaazow, haddii ay u dhaqmayaan sida uu Jabra sheegay (weydiisasho baad iyo hanjabaad), waxay u xuub-siibanayaan waxa loo yaqaano Organized Crime ama burcad abaabulan.
Baadda (Extortion): In qof Tiktoker ah oo dad badan yaqaanaan la weydiisto lacag, waxay muujinaysaa in kooxdu ay dareemayso awood ay ku cabsigelin karaan dadka hantida ama magaca leh.
Baxsashada Yaxbul: In saaxiibkiis uu u qaxay dalka Uganda (Kampala) waxay calaamad u tahay in khatartu tahay mid dhab ah (credible threat), oo uusan ahayn qof ka cararaya hadal baraha bulshada kaliya, balse uu ka cararayo waxyeello jireed.
2. Doorka Baraha Bulshada (The Digital Influence)
TikTok hadda wuxuu noqday madal lagu kala baxo (Battleground).
Live-ka Jabra: Waxay u muuqataa istaraatiijiyad uu ku doonayo "Badbaado Bulsho" (Public Safety). Markii qofku dareemo in naftiisu khatar ku jirto, wuxuu u soo baxaa fagaaraha si uu dadka markhaati uga dhigo, taas oo mararka qaarkood yareysa fursadda ay burcaddu ku dhibaatayn karaan maadaama indhaha lagu hayo.
Sumcad-dilka: Isku-xirka Jabra lala xiriirinayo inuu horay uga tirsanaa kooxda waxay daciifinaysaa kiiskiisa, taasoo ah farsamo inta badan burcaddu u isticmaasho inay ku yiraahdaan "waa mid naga mid ah oo na khilaafay."
3. Saameynta Bulshada ee Nairobi iyo Gaarisa
Magaalooyinka Nairobi (gaar ahaan xaafadda Islii) iyo Gaarisa waa xarumaha ugu waaweyn ee dhalinyarada Soomaaliyeed ee Kenya.
Farah Bareeno: Magac-dhabista dadka gaarka ah waxay keeni kartaa laba arrimood: In sharcigu soo farageliyo ama in khilaafku isu beddelo mid gacan ka hadal ah oo dhex mara taageerayaasha labada dhinac.
Cabsi-gelinta Dhalinyarada: Marka kooxaha noocan ahi ay xoogaystaan, waxay cuuriyaan hal-abuurka dhalinyarada iyo ganacsiga, maadaama qof kasta oo guulaysta la beegsanayo.
Gunaanad iyo Saadaal
Haddii aysan booliska Kenya (gaar ahaan qeybta dambi baarista ee DCI) soo faragelin:
Khatarta Jirta: Waxaa dhici karta inuu kordho is-ugaarsiga dhalinyarada dhexdeeda ah.
Guuritaanka Hal-abuurka: Sida Yaxbul, dhalinyaro badan oo kale ayaa laga yaabaa inay Nairobi isaga qaxaan ammaan darrada darteed.
Dhaqanka Baadda: Haddii Jabra laga adkaado ama la aamusiyo, waxay dhiirigelin u noqonaysaa kooxda "Team Kaazow" inay dad kale oo badan beegsadaan.
Talo: Waxaa muhiim ah in dadka saameynta leh ay kiiskan u gudbiyaan laamaha amniga, halkii lagu deyn lahaa oo kaliya qaylada TikTok.
Ma jeceshahay inaan kuu diyaariyo qoraal talo-siin ah oo ku socda dhalinyarada ku nool Nairobi si ay uga digtoonaadaan kooxahaas?

Em 2025, Brasil repetiu a segunda pior nota (35 pontos, numa escala de 0 a 100) da série histórica e continuou na 107ª posição, entre 182 países e territórios avaliados no Índice de Percepção da Corrupção (IPC), elaborado pela Transparência Internacional. Em relação a 2024, o Brasil subiu um ponto, variação estatisticamente insignificante, o que indica estagnação.

Divulgado nesta terça-feira (10), o IPC é o principal indicador da corrupção no mundo. Em sua escala, quanto menor a nota, maior é a percepção de corrupção. 

O índice avaliou a percepção da corrupção em 182 países através de indicadores técnicos e visões de especialistas sobre o setor público. No Brasil, a análise manteve o padrão do ano passado, utilizando oito indicadores para medir condutas corruptas e a eficácia dos mecanismos de prevenção.

O IPC é publicado anualmente desde 1995, mas, a partir de 2012, uma reforma metodológica permitiu a análise em série histórica, ou seja, comparar ano a ano os resultados dos países. Na série histórica, o Brasil pontuou melhor em 2012 e 2014 (com 43 pontos), em 2013 (42 pontos) e 2016 (40 pontos). As piores pontuações do país foram registradas em 2024 (34 pontos), 2018 e 2019 (35 pontos), e em 2023 (36 pontos). Desde 2015, o Brasil esteve estagnado abaixo da média global dos países.

O IPC 2025 posiciona o Brasil abaixo da média das Américas (42 pontos) e da média dos 182 países (42 pontos). Os melhores classificados em 2025 foram Dinamarca (com 89 pontos), Finlândia (88 pontos) e Cingapura (84 pontos). Os piores foram Somália e Sudão do Sul (ambos com apenas 9 pontos) e Venezuela (com 10 pontos).

Pontuaram próximos ao Brasil: Sri Lanka (também com 35 pontos); Argentina, Belize e Ucrânia (36 pontos, um a mais que o Brasil); e Argélia, Bósnia e Herzegovina, Indonésia, Laos, Malawi, Nepal e Serra Leoa (todos com 34 pontos, um a menos que o Brasil).

➡️ Fonte: Transparência Internacional.

Em um gesto raro no cenário político mundial, cidadãos da Somália financiaram a construção de uma nova residência para o ex-presidente Mohamed Abdullahi Mohamed, conhecido como Farmaajo.

A iniciativa começou em junho de 2022 e mobilizou tanto moradores do país quanto a diáspora somali ao redor do mundo. Ao todo, foram arrecadados cerca de 300 mil dólares por meio de doações voluntárias.

A casa foi construída na histórica cidade costeira de Marka, às margens do Oceano Índico, em um terreno amplo próximo à praia. O imóvel, apelidado de “Obrigado, Sr. Presidente”, foi oficialmente inaugurado no dia 6 de fevereiro.

Farmaajo governou a Somália entre 2017 e 2022 e, após deixar o cargo, declarou que vivia em imóvel alugado na capital, Mogadíscio. Diferente de muitos países, ex-líderes somalis não recebem pensões substanciais ou benefícios vitalícios.

Em mensagem publicada nas redes sociais, o ex-presidente agradeceu aos cidadãos civis e membros das forças de segurança que contribuíram para o projeto.

A cidade escolhida para a residência também carrega forte simbolismo político: Marka abriga a antiga casa do primeiro presidente do país, Aden Abdulle Hassan.

Analistas apontam que o gesto representa uma demonstração pública de reconhecimento popular e pode ecoar como exemplo de relação entre liderança e sociedade em outros países africanos.

Eedeymo culus oo loo jeediyay koox lagu tuhunsan yahay inay ka hawlgasho Eastleigh

Nayroobi 

Eedeymo culus ayaa loo jeediyay koox si caadi ah loogu yaqaan “Team Kazow”, taas oo la sheegay inay ka hawlgasho xaafadda Eastleigh ee magaalada Nayroobi. Ilo ka tirsan bulshada ayaa ku andacoonaya in kooxda lagu xiriiriyay falal dambiyeedyo isdaba joog ah, arrintaas oo dhalisay walaac ballaaran.

Sida ay sheegeen ilo deegaanka ah, kooxda waxaa lagu tuhunsan yahay inay hoggaamiyaan Ilkacase Qeys, oo ah fannaan Soomaaliyeed oo la sheegay inuu ku nool yahay Mareykanka, iyo Dahir Alasow, oo la rumeysan yahay inuu ku sugan yahay Yurub. Ilo isku mid ah ayaa sidoo kale sheegaya in taageero dhaqaale iyo mid abaabul ay ka helaan meel ka baxsan Kenya. Eedeymahan weli si madax-bannaan looma xaqiijin.

Xubno bulshada ka tirsan ayaa ku doodaya in kooxda lagu tuhunsan yahay ku lug lahaanshaha afduubyo, cabsi gelin iyo rabshado abaabulan, iyadoo la sheegay in bartilmaameedyo gaar ah ay ahaayeen dad caan ka ah deegaanka. Warbixinno la helay ayaa tilmaamaya in dhibanayaal qaar lagu khasbay tacaddiyo iyo cadaadis, oo ay ku jirto in laga wareejiyo maamulka akoonnadooda dijitaalka ah iyo baraha bulshada.

Kiiskii ugu dambeeyay ayaa la sheegay inuu khuseeyo nin ganacsade ah oo dhalinyaro ah oo ka soo jeeda Nayroobi, kaas oo la sheegay in la afduubay lana gaarsiiyay jirdil culus. Dhibbanaha ayaa hadda lagu daweynayaa isbitaal, iyadoo xaaladdiisa caafimaad ay walaac ka muujinayaan xubno ka tirsan bulshada.

U doodayaasha xuquuqda aadanaha iyo qaar ka mid ah hoggaamiyeyaasha bulshada ayaa ugu baaqay hay’adaha ammaanka ee Kenya inay sameeyaan baaritaan dhammaystiran, hufan oo madax-bannaan si loo xaqiijiyo ama loo beeniyo eedeymahaas. Waxay sidoo kale ku booriyeen bulshada inay ku tiirsanaadaan macluumaad la hubiyay, kana fogaadaan hadallo kicin kara colaad, iyagoo taageeraya dadaallada sharci ee lagu xaqiijinayo caddaalad iyo amni.

Ciidamada Soomaaliya oo laga sifeynayo shaqsiyaadka isticmaala maandooriyaha

Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga ee Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga Soomaaliya ayaa si rasmi ah u shaacisay in shaqada laga eryay askar ka tirsanaa Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed, kaddib markii baaritaanno lagu sameeyay lagu ogaaday inay ku lug lahaayeen isticmaalka maandooriyaha.

Muqdisho – Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ayaa qaaday tallaabo adag oo lagu sifeynayo ciidanka qalabka sida, iyadoo Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga ay xaqiijisay in askar dhowr ah laga saaray shaqada sababo la xiriira ku xad-gudub anshaxa militariga iyo isticmaalka maandooriyaha. Baaritaanno gudaha ah oo muddo socday ayaa lagu ogaaday in xubno ka tirsan ciidanka ay jebiyeen shuruucda iyo nidaamka u degsan ciidamada.

Qoraal ka soo baxay Wasaaradda ayaa lagu adkeeyay in aan la aqbali doonin wax kasta oo dhaawici kara sumcadda, hufnaanta iyo kalsoonida lagu qabo ciidanka qaranka. Mas’uuliyiin ka tirsan Wasaaradda ayaa sheegay in tallaabadan ay qayb ka tahay dadaallada dib-u-habeynta iyo tayeynta ciidamada, si loo helo ciidan leh anshax, karti iyo masuuliyad qaran.

Saraakiil ka tirsan ciidanka ayaa sidoo kale xusay in howlaha sifeynta iyo kormeerka joogtada ah ay sii socon doonaan, si loo xaqiijiyo in ciidanku ka madax bannaan yihiin falal wax u dhimaya waajibaadkooda amni.

Go’aankan waxaa loo arkaa mid muujinaya sida dowladda ay uga go’an tahay ilaalinta sumcadda iyo tayada Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed. Ciidan ku lug leh maandooriye ma awoodi karo inuu si buuxda u gutto waajibaadka difaaca iyo sugidda amniga dalka, sidaas darteed tallaabadan ayaa loo arki karaa mid kor u qaadaysa kalsoonida shacabka iyo isla xisaabtanka gudaha ciidanka.

Varför ska Mohamed vara med i namnsdagskalendern?

Om argumentet är att kalendern ska spegla dagens Sverige, då måste samma princip gälla alla större grupper – inte bara en.

Sverige har stora grupper med bakgrund i exempelvis:
* Finland
* Syrien
* Irak
* Polen
* Iran
* Somalia
* Bosnien och Hercegovina
* Afghanistan
* Tyskland
* Turkiet

Detta inkluderar människor med olika religioner och kulturella traditioner – kristna, muslimer, ortodoxa, katoliker och sekulära.

Om man vill modernisera namnsdagarna bör det ske konsekvent. Varför skulle just ett muslimskt namn prioriteras, men inte vanliga finska, polska eller bosniska namn som burits i Sverige i generationer?

Antingen behåller man traditionen som den är, eller så breddar man den på ett genomtänkt och likvärdigt sätt.

Federal Government of Somalia’s Weekly Briefing
Mogadishu, Friday, 13th February, 2026

1- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud has hailed the historic achievement of Somalia securing a seat on the African Union Peace and Security Council for the period 2026–2028.

2- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud sent a heartfelt condolence to the family, relatives, and the Somali medical community on the death of Dr. Omar Adan Adde, who was among the leaders of the country's health sector.

3- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud hosted a high-level delegation from the United Kingdom led by the Minister for International Development and Africa, Lady Jenny Chapman.

4- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud thanked the President of Egypt for the noticeable role his government plays in supporting unity, sovereignty, and the building of Somalia’s state institutions.

5- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud and President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi jointly held a press conference highlighting the historical relationship between Somalia and Egypt, cooperation in security and development, and their shared vision for regional stability and peace.

6- The Egyptian Ministry of Defense presented to President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud the forces prepared to participate in the African Union mission AUSSOM.

7- President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud, in Doha, Qatar, held productive meetings with various officials of the country, discussing enhancing cooperation in security, economy, and politics.

8- Prime Minister Hamza Abdi Barre hosted Iraqi Ambassador to Somalia Dr. Qahtan Taha Khalaf Al-Janabi, and they discussed strengthening historical relations and bilateral cooperation.

9- Prime Minister Hamza Abdi Barre inaugurated the new Arimas Terminal Lounge at Aden International Airport.

10- Prime Minister Hamza Abdi Barre, during an urgent inspection of Aden Airport, ordered that the health vaccination card provided by the Ministry of Health be made free of charge, following a public complaint.

11- Prime Minister Hamza Abdi Barre met with Germany’s State Minister for Economic Cooperation, Niels Annen, and they discussed in depth the interests of both countries.

12- Prime Minister Hamza Abdi Barre launched the 3rd National Education Conference, focusing this year on reforming and upgrading the national education system, developing the curriculum, enhancing teachers’ skills, and expanding educational opportunities.

13- Deputy Prime Minister of Somalia, Salah Ahmed Jama, closed the Somali Language Academy conference (AGA) held in Mogadishu.

14- Members of both houses of the Parliament of the Federal Republic of Somalia concluded the debate on Chapter Five of the Provisional Constitution (Draft Constitution).

15- The Federal Republic of Somalia warmly welcomed Sudan’s decision to return to IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Development).

16- The Federal Republic of Somalia reaffirmed its global diplomatic weight after being elected as a member of the African Union Peace and Security for the 2026–2028 term.

17- Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation, Abdisalam Abdi Ali, participated in a ministerial meeting at AU PSC in Addis Ababa, focusing on AUSSOM operations and the situation in Sudan.

18- The Chairperson of the Supreme Court, Bashe Yusuf Ahmed, opened the 8th National Judiciary Conference.

19- Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation Abdisalam Abdi Ali met with Kenya’s Foreign Affairs and Diaspora Minister Hon. Musalia Mudavadi in Addis Ababa.

28- Somali Minister of Defense Ahmed Moalim Fiqi, at the Islamic Military Counter-Terrorism Coalition (IMCTC) headquarters in Saudi Arabia, met with the Secretary-General, General Mohammed bin Sadi Al-Moghedi.

Xalay Hargaisa waxa lagu so bandhigay Buuga Cawayska Caruurta, oo ah buug baahi wayn bulshada ay u qabto, Buuga waxa ku qoran sheekooyin qoraaga ugu talo gashay korinta maskaxda caruurta.

Waqti badan baan ka shaqaynayay waxbarasho, waxa aan bahda waxbarashada Maraykan ka bartay in caruurta loo diyaariyo Critical thinking, oo Qofka caruurta ah lagu barbaarinayo, inu maskax ahaan koran yahay, oo isagu xalka raadiyo.

Waxa aan baadhay Soomalida dhaqankeedi asalka ahaa ayaa ku dhisna, in caruurta u diyaariyaan Critical thinking, inta aanay iman waxbarashadan manata la barto, caruurta waxa lala wadaagi jiray sheekooyin loogu talo galay in maskax ahaan u koro, kuna waano qaato, Xaaskayga aan jeclahay ayaan la wadaagay in waano aan la siin caruurta ee sheekooyin looga sheekeeyo , waanada ma cariso maskaxda, ee sheekadu way carisa .

Qoraa Nuura Axamed Toor waxay muujisay dadaal iyo damqashi umadeed, waxay dareentay baahida loo qabo in caruurta waqti lala qaato oo lala sheekaysto.Buugan runti waxa u baahan guud ahaan Bulshada Soomaalida, sheekooyinki layga sheekayn jiray marka aan yara , hada ayaa fahmay in qaar Qisaska Quraanka ahaayeen oo dadka si cilmiyaysan loogu sheegi jiray.

Cawayska qoyska waxa ku diyaar garooba emotionska  ayaa xaadir noqda, waxana ku siinayaan in jawaab haboon oo ku farxsantahay xaaskaaga aad siisid, waxayna ka helaan marwooyinki emotional  happiness ka u sareeyaa, buugan xata waxa uu qayb wayn ka yahay dhismaha qoyska.

Waan bogaadin qoraaga waxay qabatay shaqo umad badan qaban lahayd.

Grand Forum Global de la Diaspora Africaine 

C’est une immense fierté pour nous Diaspora Djibouti. 

Cette année, le Grand Forum Global de la Diaspora #Africaine se tiendra à Montréal, au Canada, et la diaspora djiboutienne sera bien présente. Après beaucoup d’efforts et de détermination pour participer à ce grand rendez-vous #international, nous y sommes enfin.

Ce forum #rassemblera des décideurs publics, des diplomates, des investisseurs, des innovateurs ainsi que des experts venus de la diaspora et des pays africains, avec #également la participation de l’Union africaine. 

La diaspora #djiboutienne participera en tant qu’exposant et interviendra dans des panels stratégiques.

Aujourd’hui, nous sommes au sommet.

I had a constructive meeting with H.E. Charles King, UK Ambassador to Somalia, to discuss the role of Global Somali Diaspora in supporting diaspora community and development efforts in Somalia.

Our discussion explored opportunities for collaboration aligned with the UK’s four priority portfolios in Somalia: governance and security, economic development, humanitarian resilience and climate action, and social development. We also discussed strengthening engagement between the UK Embassy to Somalia and the Somali diaspora to ensure inclusive and sustainable partnerships.

As a gesture of appreciation and cultural exchange, I was pleased to present a Somali traditional artefact, symbolising heritage, partnership, and shared commitment to future collaboration. 🇸🇴🇬🇧

Gabar Soomaaliyeed oo ka tirsan qurba-joogta ayaa muujisay walaaceeda ku saabsan shaqada Danny iyo hamigiisa siyaasadeed. Waxay sharraxaysaa, sida ay iyadu u aragto, inuusan ku habboonayn ama u qalmin hoggaamin sababtoo ah waxay aaminsan tahay inuusan gudan waajibaadkii aasaasiga ahaa ee bulshada. Waxay tusaale u soo qaadatay arrimo ay ka mid yihiin wax ka qabasho la’aanta abaaraha, adeegyo bulsho oo aan muuqan, iyo maqnaanshaha xarumo caafimaad ama goobo taageero oo loogu talagalay dadka nugul iyo bukaanka, oo ay ku jiraan kuwa qaba xanuunno sida Alzheimers. Sida ay iyadu qabto, arrimahani waxay caqabad ku noqdeen inuu kasbado kalsoonida dadweynaha.

Waxay sidoo kale ku doodaysaa in waajibaadyadan bulsho ay yihiin saldhigga waxa laga filayo siyaasiyiinta. Hadalkeedu wuxuu ka tarjumayaa aragti ay qabaan qaar ka mid ah dhalinyarada qurba-joogta ah oo ah in hoggaanka lagu qiimeeyo waxqabad dhab ah oo bulshada taabanaya, halkii lagu qiimeyn lahaa ballan-qaadyo ama hadal siyaasadeed oo keliya.

Isla mar ahaantaana, waxay muujinaysaa farxad ku aaddan in Soomaalida dibadda ku nool ay si sii kordheysa uga qayb qaadanayaan siyaasadda Soomaaliya, si dhow ula socdaan isbeddellada dalka, isla markaana ay samaynayaan aragtiyo madax-bannaan oo ku saabsan hoggaanka iyo jihada mustaqbalka qaranka

🌿 Peaceful Transition | Masjid Muhajirin Edition 🌿

Set over 2 Tuesdays, we brought our Peaceful Transition programme to Masjid Muhajiriin, in collaboration with NHG Health.

Death is a certainty we all know, yet it's a conversation many of us avoid. This session opened a sacred space to talk about what matters most - preparing for life's final journey with faith, dignity, and intention.

From advance care planning to understanding LPAs, the S+3Ms model (Subsidies, MediSave, MediShield, and MediFund), and the Islamic perspective on end-of-life care, we were reminded that planning ahead isn't morbid... it is a mercy. It is an amanah, a way to ease the burden on those we'll leave behind and to meet Allah with our affairs in order.

The room was filled with thoughtful questions, honest reflections, and a shared understanding: preparing for death is part of living well.

Our heartfelt thanks to the speakers, partners, and everyone who joined us. May the knowledge shared bring clarity, comfort, and peace to our hearts and homes. Ameen. 🤲🏼

The sun is rising over the Twin Cities this morning with a different kind of light, not the glare of a spotlight, but the steady, revealing glow of a community taking stock. While the headlines scream "drawdown," the streets are whispering "vigilance." We are moving from the harsh adrenaline of survival into the harder work of recovery, armed with the knowledge that our safety was never granted by a government… it was forged in the bonds we built as a community. 

Today is Saturday, February 14, 2026, here's what happened yesterday in Minneapolis:

1. "Drawdown" or Deception: State leaders warned yesterday that the federal "withdrawal" may be little more than a head fake. While 700 agents are leaving, Governor Walz noted that 2,300 federal personnel remain on the ground, a force larger than the entire Minneapolis Police Department, maintaining an effective "occupation." Border Czar Homan fueled these fears by confirming a pivot to invisible "fraud investigations" and threatening to return immediately if resistance resumes. City Council President Elliott Payne echoed the community’s distrust, stating plainly, "We'll believe it when we see it," as neighbors vowed to keep watching.

2. Surge Costs Minneapolis $203 Million and Leaves 1 in 5 Hungry: City officials laid bare the devastating toll of Operation Metro Surge yesterday, revealing a dual economic and humanitarian crisis. A new impact report confirms the operation cost the city $203.1 million in just one month, including $81 million in lost business revenue and $47 million in wages lost by workers too afraid to leave their homes. This paralysis has triggered a hunger emergency, with officials reporting that 1 in 5 Minneapolis residents (over 76,000 people) are now facing urgent food insecurity. Please contribute to your local food shelf if you can: https://clues.org/get-involved/donate/

3. ACLU Exposes "Systematic" Abuse: The ACLU of Minnesota escalated its legal battle yesterday, filing a massive amended complaint that exposes the true scale of federal misconduct. The filing adds over 80 new declarations (bringing the total to over 100) from residents, journalists, and legal observers who describe a "consistent pattern" of retaliation. The detailed testimonies allege that federal agents utilized chemical agents, excessive force, and unlawful surveillance specifically to silence those attempting to document their actions.

4. Rental Assistance Inquiries Skyrocket: Nonprofits reported yesterday that calls for emergency rent help have surged to record highs. The legal hotline HOME Line reported an approximate 80% increase in inquiries, while the United Way 211 service saw calls jump by 140%, as families who were too afraid to leave their homes for work now face a secondary crisis of potential mass evictions.

In the field of weeds, there can always grow flowers. Here’s some reasons to hope: 

1. ICE Admits Officers Likely Lied About Shooting: In a rare moment of federal accountability, ICE Acting Director Todd Lyons announced yesterday that two agents are under investigation after video evidence contradicted their sworn statements regarding a January 14 shooting in North Minneapolis. Federal prosecutors moved to dismiss assault charges against the two men the agents had accused, acknowledging that the newly discovered footage shows the officers "appear to have made untruthful statements."

2. Columbia Heights Schools Rally for Detained Students: The Columbia Heights School District issued a powerful statement of solidarity yesterday, confirming they are providing intense support for the families of seven students, including 5-year-old Liam Ramos, who were detained during the surge. The district's public stand goes beyond typical administrative duties, with Superintendent Zena Stenvik actively coordinating mental health resources and legal connections, signaling that schools have become the new frontline of community defense.

3. Training for "Constitutional Observers" Goes National: Organizers in the Twin Cities reported yesterday that their strategies for monitoring ICE are being adopted by groups nationwide. Following the training of over 23,000 Minnesotans as constitutional observers, Minnesota-based organizations held a national session yesterday to prepare other cities for potential future deployments, proving that the "Minneapolis model" of resistance has become a blueprint for community defense.

4. Legislature Moves to Ban Masked Federal Agents: While the federal "drawdown" dominates the headlines, state lawmakers quietly moved to ensure the chaos of the last month never happens again. State Rep. Michael Howard confirmed yesterday that the MN House is fast-tracking a bill that would legally require any federal agents operating in Minnesota to be unmasked and identifiable, part of a broader "Anti-Authoritarian" package designed to codify the right to document police activity.

Here are some quick national news stories you may have missed:

1. Trump Admin Flips on Tariffs: In a surprise reversal, the White House signaled yesterday that it is considering slashing duties on steel and aluminum to combat rising domestic prices. The move follows a new report showing that U.S. consumers are bearing nearly 90% of the cost of the administration's trade wars.

2. Schools and Hospitals Become "Places of Fear": A massive court filing yesterday featured testimony from 60 teachers and healthcare workers across 18 states, describing how the rescinding of "protected area" policies has devastated essential services, with parents too afraid to seek medical care for their children due to the presence of federal agents.

Don’t give up your power

Pulitzer Prize-winning novelist Alice Walker wrote, "The most common way people give up their power is by thinking they don't have any." Right now, many in Minnesota are rightfully wary. There is a deep, valid fear that the "drawdown" is a deception and that this occupation is far from over. But don’t let that skepticism obscure the magnitude of what has been achieved. The truth is that this week, Minneapolis didn't just hold onto its power… we multiplied it. We proved that when a community refuses to be strangled by fear, it becomes an immovable force. Federal agents may or may not truly leave our streets, but the bonds we forged in this fire are permanent. The trucks might stay, but so do we… and we are stronger than we were before. Stay watchful, stay kind, keep sharing and keep holding the line.

Shirkan oo taxane ah, waxa uu jirsaday sannadkiisii 62aad, waxa ka qaybgalaya madaxda adduunka, go'aan-sameeyayaal siyaasadeed, saraakiil ciidan oo sarsare, khuburro amni, indheergarad iyo aqoonyahanno aragti samaynta adduunka hoggaaminaya. Halkudhigga shirka sannadku waa "Burbur", taas oo ka dhigan in Nidaamkii Caalamiga ahaa ee ku dhisnaa xeerarka uu burburayo. 

Waxa arrinkaas si cad uga markhaati kacay Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Maraykanka ka hor inta uusan ka soo kicitamin dalkiisa, isaga oo sheegay in dunidu ay si xawli ah isu beddelayso, dunidii horana ay soo gebagabowday, lana galay waqti cusub oo juquraafi-siyaasadeed. Waxa sidaas oo kale sheegay Raysawasaaraha Jarmalka oo shirka furay, waxa uu xusay in Nidaamkii Caalamiga ahaa ee ku dhisnaa xuquuqda aanu mar danbe sii jiri doonin. 

Qodobka ugu weyn ee shirka lagala baxayo waa sida uu hoobad ugu jiro Nidaamkii Caalamiga ahaa kaas oo dawlado badan gabbaad iyo difaac u ahaa. Waxa uu muujinayaa cabsida adduunka ku soo socota. Waa digniin ku wajahan dalalka nugul sida Soomaaliya oo kale, oo ay daashatay dawladxumo, hay'ado daciif ah, saboolnimo, kalaqaybsanaan siyaasadeed, hoggaanxumo iyo halisaha argagixisada oo badan. 

Haddaba, marka uu Nidaamkii Caalamiga ahaa ee ay dawladaha jilicsani dugsanayeen uu kala daadanayo, kalaqaybsanaanta gudaha iyo hubanti la'aanta siyaasadeed ee marxaladda kalaguurka ahi waxay isu beddeli doontaa nugayl istiraatiiji ah iyo in dalku baylah u noqo faragelin shisheeye iyo cadaadis dibadeed oo qaawan. Midnimada, iyo bisaylka lagu maareeyo marxaladda kalaguurka waa mid horseedaysa awood iyo xasillooni siyaasadeed. 

Arrinkan masuuliyaddiisa waa mid ay wada saaran tahay dhammaan siyaasiyiinta iyo hoggaamiyayaasha bulshada oo idil. Waxay se si gaar ah u sii saaran tahay taliska hadda xukunka haya oo looga fadhiyo xilkasnimo masuuliyadeed oo xaaladdan daran looga gudbayo. Isbeddellada adduunka ka socda iyo habfekerka hurweynta siyaasadeed ee Soomaalida waa labo aad u kala duwan. Sida adduunku u yaallo kuma qaabbili karno kalaqaybsanaan, iyo khilaaf siyaasadeed. Waxaan u baahannaay midnimo, wadatashi iyo yoolal qaran, oo dalkeenna kaga badbaadinayno duufaannada soo socda.
