🔥 Health Alert: There’s a new sexually transmitted fungal infection making headlines!

Trichophyton mentagrophytes genotype VII (TMVII). It’s the only known fungal STI and causes ringworm-like rashes in some very unfortunate places (genitals, buttocks, etc.)

Minnesota is reporting the largest known U.S. outbreak right now — 13 confirmed + 27 suspected cases since last July, mostly in the Twin Cities area. It started showing up in NYC in 2024 and has been rising in Europe for years, often among men who have sex with men.

Symptoms: Itchy, round, scaly patches (not always classic ring-shaped), super inflammatory, and can scar if not treated. It’s treatable with oral antifungals, but it can take up to 3 months!

Health officials say get checked at an STI clinic if you’ve got a suspicious rash and recent sexual contact with someone who had one. Prevention: Avoid skin-to-skin during symptoms, don’t share towels/razors, wash hands after touching affected areas.
Stay safe out there — knowledge is power! 

 #RINGWORM #fungus #HealthAlert #STD

“I’m a Friend of Somalis” — Kikuyu Leader Gachagua Pushes Back Against Anti-Somali Hatred Accusations

Somali Report - Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has described himself as “a friend of the Somali community,” even as controversy continues to swirl around his recent remarks linking Somali-owned businesses to alleged financial impropriety abroad.

In a statement, Gachagua said Somalis and Kikuyus share a common entrepreneurial philosophy rooted in culture and history. 

He referenced the Somali phrase “soo maal,” which he described as the obligation to seek sustenance and opportunity, and compared it to the Kikuyu concept of “witeithie” — the moral duty to fend for oneself and build through effort.

“Across Kenya and especially in Nairobi, they are the foundation of our economy,” he said, praising the business spirit of both communities.

However, Gachagua sharply criticised leadership in Northern Kenya, arguing that despite over a trillion shillings allocated to counties such as Mandera, Garissa, Wajir, Marsabit and Isiolo since devolution in 2013, little development is visible on the ground. 

He blamed what he called a chronic lack of accountability, accusing leaders of investing in Nairobi real estate instead of delivering services back home.

“This is not a failure of the people. It is a failure of leadership and accountability,” he said.

The remarks come amid fallout over comments that allegedly linked Business Bay Square (BBS Mall) in Eastleigh to a fraud case in Minnesota, United States. 

Lawyers representing the mall’s owners have filed a complaint with the National Cohesion and Integration Commission, accusing Gachagua of ethnic profiling.

Opposition leader Kalonzo Musyoka has since stepped in, defending Gachagua against claims of targeting the Somali community. 

Speaking at a burial in Kipipiri, Kalonzo said the focus should remain on fighting crime through evidence and due process, not stigmatizing entire communities.

“We want criminals exposed, but Somalis and every other Kenyan who is not a criminal should not be attacked or feared,” Kalonzo said.

Waa uraah uu yiri nin Soomaaliyeed oo mar arkay arrin dhaayihiisa iyo dhageysigiisaba fajac geliyay. yeelkadeed e' Jamhuuriyaddii sedexaad ee Soomaaliya waxa ay hana qaaday 2000 waxaana Madaxweyne loo dortay Abdiqaasiim salaad Hassan ka dib daal iyo fadhi dheer oo ay galeen ergo odayaal iyo bulshada rayadka ah u badnaa Madaxweyne Abdiqaasim wuxuu dhisay xukumad wuxuuna xoog iyo xeeladba Ku bixiyay sidii uu ku imaan lahaa madatooyada Soomaaliya oo ay markaa heysteen maleeshiyo ay heyb ahaan is xigeen, Madaxweyene Qaasim waa keenay Dawlnimadii Soomaaliya waxaasa  caqabada ku noqotay gaarsiinta aqalka looga taliyo  Soomaaliya ee Villa Somalia. mudda ka dib waxaa dhashay khilaaf sababay in la isla aado Kenya halkaana lagu dhiso dawlad ku meel gaar ah waxaana  xilka Madaxweynanimo loo doortay AUN Cabdulaahi Yuusuf Axmed oo markaa aad loogu xaglinayay in uu Saxiib firfircoon u yahay nidaamkii (TPLF) ee ka talinayay Itoobiya. 

Ethiopia waxa ay eheed jilaa kaalin weyn ku lahaa wixii ka dhacayay inbagaati_kenya  sida ay caddeeyeen dad badan oo wax ka qoray arimahaa goob joogna ahaa. Itoobiya waxa ay diidaneed mira dhalka dhismihii Carta oo  waxa ay loolan adag kula jirtay Jabuuti oo mar  ka baxday shirkii ka socday Kenya dareerkaa dartiis. si kastaba ha noqotee waxaa Ra'iisulwasaare loo magacaabay Cali Maxamed Geeddi oo isagana ay Saaxiib dhaw ahaayeen Meles Zenawe Ra'sulwasaarihii itoobiya. jiibta iyo jaanta ayaa la isla helay waxaana barqa cad la keenay Ciidan ka socda taliskii Itoobiya Caasimadda Muqdisho, magaalada mugadisho ayasa waxa ay mar qura marti geelisay dhacda lama filaan ah taas oo sababtay in dhiig badani daato, waxaana faraha isula tagay ciidankii Itoobiya kuwii Dawladda KMG oo dhinac ah iyo shacab Soomaaliyeed oo difaaca dadka iyo dalka u istaagay walow la sheego in ay ku dhex jiiren kooxa u jeedoyiin kala gedisan laha. Geeddi iyo Cabdulaahi waxaa hareeyay khilaaf xoogan caasimaduna waxa ay faraha la gashay dagaal qarar oo faraha looga gubtay, ugu dambeyn  Geeddi ayaa ku baxay khilaafkii hareeyay waxaana ra'sulwasaare noqday Nuur Xasan Xuseen"Nuur Cadde" oo isaguna daaqadda kala baxay Cabdulilaahi Yuusuf, wada hadal ay garwadeen ka eheed QM ayaa lagu qabtay Jabuuti waxaana looga kala dab qaadayay Isbaheysigii Asmara oo ka koobnaa Midowgii Maxkamadaha, Baarlamaankii xorta ahaa oo uu hoggaaminayay Shariif Sakiin iyo dad Soomaaliyeed oo qurbajoog u badnaa oo dhinac ah iyo Dawladdii KMG ee uu hoggaaminayay Ra'iisulwasaare Nuur Cadde. 

2009 waxaa Madaxweyne loo doortay Shariif Shiikh Axmed oo hoggaaminayay Isbiheysiga dhanka Asmara ka socday, Eretariayana  dhuumaaleysiga uga yimid sida uu buuggiisa (Adkeysi) ku caddeeyay CCSh Warsame. Shiikh Shariif wuxuu dhisay xukumad wuxuu ra'iisulwasaare u magacaabay Cumar Cabdirashiid wuxuuna keenay magaalada Caasimadda ah ee Muqdisho in doora ka dib waa is khilaafeen Shariif iyo Cumar waxaana ra'sulwasaare noqday Maxamed Cabdulaahi Farmaajo mudda aan dheereyn ka dib khilaaf dhashay ayaa sababay heshiiskii loogu magac daray (Kambala Accord) oo uu ku baxay Farmaajo waxaana Ra'sulwasaare noqday Cabdiweli Maxamed Cali Gaas oo isaguna qeyb ka ahaa dhammeystirka dastuurkii KMG ahaa iyo qabashadii doorashadii 2012. Shariif iyo Gaas waxa ay ammaan ku mudan yihiin in ay dalka gudihiisa doorasho ku qabteen waxaana doorasho lagu qabtay xarunta tababarada Policeka Soomaaliyeed ee Generaal Kaahiye. 10 September 2012 waxaa maxdaxweyne loo doortay Xasan Shiikh Maxamuud oo noqday mudda ka dib qof kusoo baxay doorasho ka dhacday Dalka gudihiisa in Xasan noqdo Madaxweyne waxaa qeyb lixaadle ka qaatay Gaas oo ahaa Ra'isulwasaarihii Shiikh Shariif wuxuuna codadkiisa siiyay Xasan Shiikh, Xasan wuxuu magacaabay sedex Ra'sulwasaare oo midba ku baxay khilaaf sababay harjad adag marka laga reebo Cabdi Faarax Shirdoon Saacid, isagu dagaal badan lama gelin marka uu arkay in uu waayay kalsoonida madaxweynihii  magacaabay, waxaase soo jeed badan sababay saariddii Cabdiwile Shiikh Axmed, dhawr jeer baa Baarlamaanka la iskula laabtay wuxuuna ahaa shaqsi abaabul badan balse wuxuu sababsaday qaar ka mid ah wasiiradiisa oo toos ugu xirnaa madatooyada is jiijiid dheer ka dib waa baxayay asiguna. waxaana la magacaabay markii labaad Cumar Cabdirashiid, Cumar ayaa Dalka doorasho gaarsiiyay wuxuuna si xirfadeysan u ilaaliyay in khilaaf soo kala dhexgalo isaga iyo madaxweynaha dadka yaqaanna waxa ay ku tilmamaan in uu yahay nin gaws-heyn leh oo aan aragtidisa laga dhex aqrisan karin, ugu dambeyn waxa ay wada noqdeen musharixiin isaga iyo Xasan 8 Faberury 2017 wuxuu daadaqada kala baxay Xasan Shiikh wuxuuna codadkiisa siiyay Maxamed Cabdulaahi Farmaajo oo doorashadii xiligaa dhacday  kusoo baxay.

Farmaajo wuxuu magacaabay Xasan Cali Kheyre billowgii xukunka mudda xilheyntooda  waxa ay u muuqdeen shaqsiyaad is afgarad ku jooga waxaasa la sheegaa in ay eheed xilkaaga ilaasho oo ma jirin qaangaarnimo keeni kartay in ay si adag usii wada jiran, amaanta Kheyre waxa ay eheed in uu ka adkaa xukumaddiisa dhiniciisana aanu mari Karin qof uu magacaabay haddii uu isku dayana wuxuu la kulmayay ciqaab adag balse wuxuu ku baxay 7daqiiqo uu inta uu ku bixinayay maamulka golihiisa kuma bixin kalsooni uga raadinta kuwii shalay gacanta bidix u taagay, Maxamed Xuseen Rooble ayaa loo magacaabay xilkaas ka dib bixitaankii Kheyre. Rooble waayaha siyaasadda oo Ku cusbaa awagii  iyo raggii xilka u magacaabay oo u diidanaa luuqyada badan maridooda wuxuu ku billowday indha taag balse ugu dambeyn waxa uu saaxiib siyaasadeed la noqday qeyba ka mid ah mucaaradkii waagaa jiray waxaana halkaa ku baxay madaxweynihii magacaabay iyo xulafadii la jaalka eheed. 15 may 2022 waxaa doorasho ka dhacday teendhada Afisyoone mar labaad Madaxweyne ku noqday Xasan Shiikh Maxamuud oo isaguna maalma ka dib Ra'sulwasaare u magacaabay Xamse Cabdi Barre oo ay jaal ahaayeen mudda dheer, dhawr madal-siyaasadeedna qeyb ka wada noqdeen, kalsooni badanna uu ku qabay. magacaabistiiso waxa ay soo dhaweysay Axmed Madoobe oo u arkayay beel ahaan iyo baal ku heynba mudda xileedkaan in loo hagar baxay tahayna in uu ilaashadu Wiilkiisa uu siyaasadda keensaday iyo Walaalka abtirsiiamadu ay mideysay, waxaasa biloowgii mudda xileedka xassan tareenka ka dhacay Saciid Cabdulilaahi Dani oo isugu qeyb weyn ka qaatay soo bixiddii Madaxweyne Xasan isaga oo u heystay in uu shaqeyn doono heshiis siyaasadeedka aan qorneyn ee soo jireenka ah una dhaxeeya beelaha Mudulood iyo ilama Maxamuud Saleebaan masa dhicin.

Dani iyo Madoobe labaduba isku si ayay ka yihiin sii joogitaanka  Xamse khilaaf xooggan ayaana kala wada dhexeeya Dawladda dhexe waxa ayna Caasimadda ku joogaan safar imaanshiyihiisa dhafar iyo soo jeed  badan loo maray, sii joogistiisuna aaney caga adag ku taagneyn, war suuqeedka siyaasaddu wuxuu tibaaxaya in bedelka Xamse yahay fool-horaadka axdi-siyaasadeedka ay la geli doonaan Madaxweyne Xasan Shiikh walow ay uga muhiimsan tahay caddeynta jahada doorashadu haddana haddii aan Xamse la saarin waa ku adag tahay in ay aaminaan shaqeynta farsamada mala awaalka ah ee ay isku aadiyeen. Cumar Cabdi Rashiid ayaa mar 3aad loo saadaalinayaa in uu noqdo Ra'iisulwasaaraha badali doono Xamse walow aaney isku fiicneyn hogaamiyaha Putland Dani, haddaba su'aasha is waydiinta mudan ayaa ah  waxa arintaasi ka bedali karto xaaladda siyaasaded ee dalka , iyo marxalada kala guurka ah iyo sidoo kale suurtagalnimada in uu mar 2aad  Cumar daaqada kala baxo Madaxwayne Xassan.

Dhibaatada aqoonsiga (identity crisis) waxay ku dhacdaa qof marka uu dareemo hubanti la’aan ku saabsan cidda uu yahay, meesha uu ka tirsan yahay, ama qiyamka dhaqan ee qeexaya. Qaar ka mid ah bulshada qurbaha ku nool, oo ay ku jiraan Soomaalida dibadda joogta, dareenkan wuxuu ka dhalan karaa ku koridda luqado, dhaqan, iyo filashooyin bulsho oo kala duwan. Ku noolaanshaha bulshooyin kala dhaqan ah, is-guurka qoomiyado kala duwan, iyo la kulanka diimo ama hab-nololeedyo cusub mararka qaarkood waxay dhalin karaan jahawareer dhalinyarada marka ay isku dayayaan inay isku dheelli tiraan hidahooda qoys iyo deegaanka ay ku nool yihiin.

Si kastaba ha ahaatee, dhibaatada aqoonsigu micnaheedu ma aha in qofku lumiyay asal ama qiimo. Aqoonsigu kuma xirna dhiig ama muuqaal; wuxuu ku dhisan yahay dhaqan, tarbiya, aaminsanaan, iyo waayo-aragnimo. Dad badan ayaa awooda inay wataan aqoonsiyo badan isla mar ahaantaas—iyagoo ixtiraamaya hidaha Soomaaliyeed isla markaana la qabsada bulshada ay ku nool yihiin. Hagidda qoyska, bulshada, waxbarashada, iyo is-fikirka ayaa ka caawin kara qofka inuu dhiso aqoonsi adag oo kalsooni leh isaga oo aan dareemin kala-qaybsanaan.

Security agencies bust massive mule account network in Jammu and Kashmir.

 #Srinagar February 15//
 Security agencies have reportedly disma_ntled a large network of mule accounts operating in Jammu and Kashmir. Officials said these accounts were acting as the financial backbone of international scam operations. Authorities fear that the funds routed through these accounts could be misused for separatist and anti national activities.
More than 8000 mule accounts have reportedly been identified and frozen during the last three years. Officials described the network as highly organised and linked to money laundering operations. They said mule accounts are a critical link in cybercrime because they help convert stolen money into untraceable cryptocurrency.
Central agencies have reportedly directed Jammu and Kashmir Police and other law enforcement bodies to coordinate with banks. The aim is to stop the rise of such accounts and identify middlemen known as mulers who arrange these bank accounts for fraudsters.
Officials suspect that after the 2017 crackdown by the National Investigation Agency on illegal funding in Jammu and Kashmir anti national elements may have shifted towards digital hawala methods. In this system mule account holders reportedly earn commissions which may be diverted for activities against the country.
A muler usually does not directly contact victims. Instead they arrange multiple bank accounts that scammers use to receive and transfer stolen money without revealing their identity. Many ordinary people are reportedly lured with promises of easy commission and low risk. They hand over bank credentials believing the accounts will be used briefly.
In several cases accounts are opened in the name of fake companies allowing transactions of up to Rs 40 lakh in a single day. Officials said the money trail is intentionally complicated with rapid transfers across multiple accounts to avoid detection.
Security agencies said mule account holders may not design scams but they knowingly provide financial support to organised cybercrime networks. A senior official said without these accounts scams would fail at the first stage.
A detailed probe reportedly found that handlers based in China Malaysia Myanmar and Cambodia were directing individuals in the Union Territory to create private crypto wallets using VPN services to avoid detection and bypass KYC verification. Authorities in Jammu and Kashmir have reportedly restricted VPN usage in the valley as it can be misused by te_rrori_sts and sep_arat_ist groups.

För några veckor sedan hade jag möjlighet att träffa flera presidentkandidater i Somalia. En av dem är Hassan Ali Khaire som kandiderar till presidentposten och har en bakgrund i Skandinavien, särskilt i Norge.

Jag är stolt över att ha fått möta politiker som vill representera och utveckla mitt hemland Somalia. Samtidigt var jag stolt över att själv representera Socialdemokraterna och Järva S-kvinnor i dessa samtal.

Jag var nyfiken på att höra deras visioner för Somalia och delade med mig av mina erfarenheter från det politiska arbetet i Sverige – särskilt kring kvinnors organisering, ledarskap och delaktighet. Vi samtalade om hur vi kan stärka kvinnors politiska inflytande i Somalia och hur samarbeten kan byggas mellan kvinnliga politiker i Somalia och här hemma i Sverige.

Mitt mål är att öppna dörrar för kvinnor i politiken – något som är självklart för vissa men ljusår bort för andra. Att dela kunskap, erfarenheter och strategier är avgörande. Den kunskap jag fått genom mitt parti och genom mitt andra hem i Sverige vill jag använda för att stärka kvinnor politiskt, både här och i Somalia.

Tillsammans kan vi skapa förändring – över gränserna.🇸🇪🇸🇴

F.d. Premiärminister (2017–2020) Hassan Ali Khaire.

Boocame ilaa Taleex: Xus oo Xasuuso 30 Sano ka dib Guushii  Halganka 2023.
================
Boocame 1993 ayay ahayd, xilli aan jirin maamul mideysan, Boocame waxay noqotay halkii ugu horreysay ee la isugu yimaado, laguna bilaabo wada-tashi iyo isu-imaansho  Halkaas ayuu ka dhashey fikradda ah in bulshadu isu timaaddo markii dawladnimadii Soomaaliyeed luntay, si rajadu u sii noolaato.

Baradii Taleex iyo Barde Khaatumo ayaa noqotey madashii ibo-furka Khaatumo 2 baridihii hadhaca qaboobaa ee isu keenay qurba-joog iyo gudo-joog. 2012 wuxuu ahaa xilli ay qalbiyada ku kululaayeen himilo iyo go’aan adag oo dib loogu unkayey maamul iyo mustaqbal.

Saaxdheer iyo Togga Eerigo iyaguna waxay ahaayeen goobo marti geliyey xilligii  halgan iyo in aan la is dhiibin. Halkaas waxaa ka hanaqaaday shirar iyo go’aanno masiiri ah, laguna muujiyey in isku-duubnidu tahay saldhigga midnimada.

Buuhoodle, Karin Dabayl Weyn,  ilaa Ballicad waxay ahaayeen goobo door weyn ka qaatay halgankii ku dhowaad 30-ka sano socday. Casharradii laga bartay marxaladahaas ayaa noqday kuwo cadowga lagu jebiyey 2023. Halgan dheer oo ku bilowday samir iyo adkaysi ayaa ugu dambayntii isu beddelay guul iyo midnimo.

Intaas waxaa laf-dhabar u ahaa Garaadadii kala duwanaa -qaar Alle oofsadey AUN, qaarna weli nool -kuwaas oo taariikhda u galay doorkoodii hoggaamineed iyo mideynta bulshada. 
Sidoo kale, madax iyo aqoonyahanno kala duwan oo uu hormuud u ahaa Allaha u naxariistee Cali Khaliif Galaydh iyo rag kale oo la safnaa, waxay qaateen doorkoodii halganka dheer, iyagoo ku suntanaa aragti, abaabul iyo go’aan adag oo lagu gaadhayo himilada.

Goobahan oo dhan Boocame, Taleex, Barde, Saaxdheer, Saaxdheer, Togga Eerigo, Buuhoodle, Karin Dabayl Weyn iyo Ballicad waa silsilad taariikheed oo isku xiran. Waa bogag muujinaya in marka bulsho isu timaaddo, halganto, midowd, ay ka adkaan karto qabow, colaad iyo kala daadsanaan, una beddeli karto halgan dheer guul waarta, iyadoo hoggaan iyo midnimo ay noqdaan tiirarka lagu gaadho himilada.

Somali Ambassador's meeting with the Somali religious leaders in Oslo, Norway

Oslo, Norway | 14 February 2026:  H.E. Abdikarim Ahmed Mohamed, Ambassador of the Federal Republic of Somalia, met yesterday with Somali religious leaders in Oslo, Norway, for a constructive and cordial engagement.

During the meeting, the Ambassador briefed the religious leaders on his recent audience with His Majesty the King of Norway and his consultations with Norwegian authorities. He also outlined the mandate, priorities, and consular services of the Embassy of the Federal Republic of Somalia, underscoring the Embassy’s readiness to serve Somali nationals and to strengthen engagement with the Somali community throughout Norway.

The discussions focused on enhancing cooperation between the Embassy and Somali religious institutions, promoting unity and cohesion within the Somali community, and supporting initiatives that foster social harmony and positive integration.

H.E. Ambassador Abdikarim Ahmed Mohamed expressed his sincere appreciation for the warm welcome extended to him. He reaffirmed his commitment to working closely with religious leaders to advance the interests of Somalia and the Somali community in Norway.

The End

The UK is home to a vibrant Somali diaspora, many of whom regularly send money to support families and communities back home. In partnership with RISE Projects, @womensinclusiveteam (WIT), @movementatm (ATM), and @dahabshiil_uk il, IOM in the UK has delivered digital financial literacy workshops to help community members send money more safely, affordably, and efficiently.

Since 2024, over 670 participants have learned to use digital tools with confidence, reducing transfer costs by an average of 45% and ensuring more support reaches those who need it most. Beyond finances, these workshops strengthen community ties and empower diaspora members to make a real impact in their families’ lives.

Markay Aamusnaan u Noqoto Mowqif: Akhrin Ku Saabsan Ka Fiirsashada Bulshada Caalamka Khudbadda Abiy Axmed

Shalay, hadalka uu Raiisel Wasaaraha Itoobiya ka jeediyay madal Ururka Midowga Afrika ma ahayn khudbad caadi ah oo lagu jeediyo shir xilliyeed ah.
Marka uu si cad u sheego in amni iyo xasilloonida Geeska Afrika ay ku xidhan yihiin helitaanka dalkiisu"waddo bad oo sugan oo bad ah oo waaraysa", fariintaasi looma akhriyo sidii dalab saad oo kaliya, ee waa ku dhawaaq siyaasadeed oo sidaya dib-u-qeexida isla'egyada madax-bannaanida iyo xuduudaha gobolka.
Wixii ka khatar badnaa nuxurka khudbadda ayaa ahaa duruufaha lagu jeediyay:
Khudbadda waxaa lagu jeediyay iyadoo uu goob joog ahaa Xoghayaha Guud ee Qaramada Midoobay,madaxda dowladaha, Xafiiska Fulinta ee Ururka Midowga Afrika, iyo Golaha Nabadda iyo Amniga Afrika, oo ay weheliyaan masuuliyiin caalami ah oo sare.
Si kastaba ha ahaatee,wax aan caddayn ama xusuusin ahayn oo ku saabsan mabda'a ixtiraamidda xuduudaha la dhaxlay lama soo saarin, waxna lama xaqiijin ku saabsan muqaddasnimada madax-bannaanida qaran, xitaa digniin dublaasiyadeed oo khudbadda gelinaysa qaabkeeda shareiga ee saxda ah lama arag.
Halkan,aamusnaantu waxay noqotaa mowqif.

Marka hore: Saamaynta Aamusnaanta Caalamka — Loo dhexgalka ilaa Raadinta ogolaansho

Xiriirrada caalamka, ka jawaab la'aanta khudbad ay ku jiraan tilmaamo hanjabaad ah ama dib-u-eegis ku saabsan xuduudaha looma fahmo sidii loo dhexgal, laakiin waxaa laga yaabaa in loo akhriyo sidii duldheedid ama wakillad maldahan.
Marka ay ku celcelaan hadallo muddo saddex sano ah oo ku saabsan"xuquuqda badda", oo ay si tartiib tartiib ah u sii kordhaan darnaantooda, ka dibna ay heerka ugu sarreeya ka gaadhaan madal qaran iyada oo aan la diidmin, fariinta ku gaadhaa fale siyaasadehu waxay tahay in saqafka hadalka la kicin karo.
Aamusnaantu halkan ma dejiso xiisadda,waxay ballaarisaa meesha uu ku dhaqaaqo kii tijaabinaya falcelinta.

Marka labaad: Ururka Midowga Afrika oo imtixaan mabda'a ah hor taagan

Mid ka mid ah mabaadi'da ugu muhiimsan ee lagu aasaasay nidaamka Afrikaanka casriga ahi waa ixtiraamidda xuduudaha laga dhaxlay xilliyadii madax-bannaanida, si looga hortago furitaanka albaabbada colaadaha aan dhammaadka lahayn.
Mabda'aani ma ahayn mid aragtiyeed,ee wuxuu ahaa badbaado qaarad ka soo baxday xilli gumeysi oo adag iyo xuduudo ay sawireen khariidado dibadeed.
Marka la soo qaado,xitaa tilmaan ahaan, in amni dal ay ku xidhan tahay wax ka beddelka xaalad juquraafiyeed oo jirta, waajibka hay'adaha Afrikaanku ma aha aamusnaan, ee waa in xasuusin cad lagu sameeyo xeerarka aasaasaya nidaamka qaaradda.
Sababtoo ah ka fiirsashada khudbadda maanta waxaa laga yaabaa inay la macno noqoto la tacaalida cawaaqibkeeda berri.

Marka saddexaad: Qaramada Midoobay iyo Masuuliyadda Ka Hortagga ee Ma ahan Maareynta Musiibooyinka

Khibrada caalamku waxay cadaysay in ururada waaweyni inta badan dhaqaaqaan ka dib marka colaaduhu hurdaan, ee ma aha ka hor inta aysan hurin.
Markaas waxaan maqalnaa baaqyada caadiga ah ee"isdhexgalka" iyo "ka fogaanshaha kor u qaadista", sidii arrin ku saabsan khilaaf caadi ah oo u dhexeeya laba dhinac oo siman.
Laakiin waxa maanta la soo qaadayaa ma aha tartan siyaasadeed oo u dhexeeya laba cadaw oo fog,ee waa isla'egta taabaneysa mid ka mid ah marinnada badda ee ugu muhiimsan aduunka: Bab-ul-Mandab.
Colaad ciidan oo ka dhacda hareeraha Badda Cas kuma sii jiri doonto meelaha,ee waxaa isku dhex milmi doona xisaabaad goboleed iyo kuwo caalami, waxayna saamayn ku yeelan doontaa khadadka ganacsiga caalamka iyo amniga tamarta, taasoo dheer dabacsanaanta isku dheelitirka gudaha ee dalalka Geeska Afrika.
Masuuliyadda Qaramada Midoobay iyo Golaha Amnigu ma aha ku qanacsanaanta falcelinta,ee waa ka hortagga simbiriirixanka asal ahaan.

Marka afraad: Khataraha Simbiriirixanka — Waxa ka dambeeya Dhimbiil

Digniintu halkan ma aha cabsi gelin.
Geeska Afrika waa gobol dhibaatooyin isir,colaado gudaha, iyo jilicsanaansho hay'adeed ka jiraan dalal badan.
Hurinta jabhad cusub iyadoo la adeegsanayo cinwaanka"helitaanka badda" waxay u badan tahay inay keento:

· Dib-u-hubeyn balaaran oo xuduudaha ah.
· Galitaanka dhinacyo goboleed oo dano toos ah ku leh Badda Cas.
· Burburka isbahaysiyo gudaha oo jilicsan.
· Furitaanka albaabka colaadaha wakillada ah (proxy wars).
  Taariikhdu waxay ina baraysaa in dagaaladu ayan had iyo jeer ku bilaabmin go'aan lama filaan ah,ee ay ku bilaabmaan hadallo taxane ah, oo ay raacdo aamusnaan, ka dibna tijaabin goobeed oo xaddidan, ka dibna qarax balaaran.

Marka shanaad: Farriin Digniin ah oo loo diray Hay'adaha Caalamka iyo Afrikaanka

In la iska indho tiro khudbadda hadda macnaheedu ma aha in xiisadda jirto, laakiin macnaheedu waa in laga dambeeyay la tacaalideeda ilaa heer aad u khatar badan.
Tani ma aha arrin farsamo oo ku saabsan dekedaha ama khidmadaha marinka.
Mana aha dood tacliimeed oo ku saabsan juquraafiga.
Ee waa arrin taabanaysa xasilloonida gobolka iyo mabda'a ah in aan xuduudaha lagu beddelin xoog.
Farriinta ay tahay in si cad u soo baxdo:

· Qaramada Midoobay
· Golaha Amniga
· Ururka Midowga Afrika
· Golaha Nabadda iyo Amniga Afrika
  Waa in amniga gobolka lagu gaadhin dib-u-qeexida juquraafiga,ee lagu gaadho wada shaqeyn iyo heshiisyo sharci oo ikhtiyaari ah.
  Aamusnaanta marxaladan waxaa laga yaabaa in loo fahmo sidii loo dhexgal dublaasiyadeed,laakiin dhab ahaan waxay dhiirigelin kartaa tacabur siyaasadeed oo kharashkooda aan la koobi karin mar dambe.

Gunaanadkii
Wixii lagu yiri madalkii shirkii Ururka Midowga Afrika ma ahayn faahfaahin hadaleed,ee waxay ahayd meeshii ugu sarreysay ee olole hadaleed oo socday sanado.
Iska indho tirinteeduna waxay dirtay calaamado khaldan oo ku saabsan aag aad u nugul.
Geeska Afrika uma dulqaadan karo dhimbiil cusub.
Bab-ul-Mandabna ma aha masrax lagu tijaabiyo khudbado siyaasadeed.
Haddii hay'adaha caalamka iyo Afrikaanku ay ka caddaansan yihiin doorkooda ka hortagga,waa inay hadlaan hadda — ma aha ka dib marka ay madaafiicdu hadlaan.

Dapur MBG Pangeleyan Bangkalan: dari Haji Her Crazy Rich Madura untuk Warga

Program Makan Bergizi Gratis (MBG) yang digagas oleh Presiden Prabowo Subianto diluncurkan secara nasional sejak 6 Januari 2025.

MBG merupakan program prioritas pemerintah untuk memperbaiki gizi di Indonesia. Program ini juga dilaksanakan di Kabupaten Bangkalan, Jawa Timur.

Pemilik Satuan Pelayanan Pemenuhan Gizi (SPPG) Pangeleyan di Kecamatan Tanah Merah, Kabupaten Bangkalan adalah Haji Her atau Khairul Umam.

Baru-baru ini, nama Haji Her ramai menjadi perbincangan setelah membagikan uang Rp50.000 di ompreng MBG.

Sebanyak 1.877 siswa dari 19 sekolah di Kecamatan Tanah Merah, pun semringah saat menerima MBG tersebut, Rabu (11/2/2026).

Total uang yang dikeluarkan Haji Her mencapai Rp93.850.000. Uang itu berasal dari kantong pribadinya.

Meski mendirikan dapur MBG, Haji Her mengaku tak akan mengambil keuntungan dari program tersebut.
Bahkan, bagi hasil yang sudah ditentukan juga tidak akan ia ambil.

Pengusaha tembakau asal Pamekasan itu akan menyerahkan sepenuhnya keuntungan dapur MBG di Kecamatan Pangeleyan untuk warga Bangkalan.
Haji Her akan membangun rumah warga yang tidak layak huni menggunakan hasil dari program MBG di dapurnya.

ஜம்மு காஷ்மீரில் 8,000 போலி வங்கி கணக்குகள் முடக்கம்; பயங்கரவாத செயல்களுக்கு பயன்படுத்தியது அம்பலம்

ஸ்ரீநகர்: ஜம்மு - காஷ்மீரில் பயங்கரவாத மற்றும் தேச விரோத செயல்களுக்கு பயன்படுத்தப்பட்ட 8,000 போலி வங்கி கணக்குகளை பாதுகாப்பு அமைப்புகள் முடக்கியுள்ளன. இதன் மூலம் மிகப்பெரிய 'டிஜிட்டல் ஹவாலா வலையமைப்பு' செயல்பட்டது அம்பலமாகியுள்ளது.

ஜம்மு - காஷ்மீரில் பயங்கரவாத செயல்களுக்கு பயன்படும் பண பரிவர்த்தனைகளை, கடந்த 2017ல் என்.ஐ.ஏ., எனப்படும் தேசிய புலனாய்வு முகமை முடக்கியது.குறிப்பாக பயங்கரவாதிகளுக்கு ஹவாலா வாயிலாக வரும் அனைத்து வழிகளையும் என்.ஐ.ஏ., மூடியது.

இதனால், அதிர்ச்சி அடைந்த பயங்கரவாத அமைப்புகள், 'டிஜிட்டல் ஹவாலா' என்ற புதிய வழியைக் கண்டுபிடித்தன. அதாவது, பணப் பரிவர்த்தனைக்கு சாதாரண மக்களின் வங்கிக் கணக்கை வாடகை எடுத்து பயன்படுத்துவது. இதனை 'மியூல்' கணக்கு என அழைக்கின்றனர்.

வாடகை கணக்குகள்
இப்படி ஜம்மு - காஷ்மீரில் மட்டும் 8,000க்கும் மேற்பட்ட பொதுமக்களிடம் இருந்து அவர்களது வங்கி கணக்கை வாடகைக்கு எடுத்து, பயங்கரவாதிகள் பணப் பரிவர்த்தனை செய்துள்ளனர்.

இதை கண்டுபிடித்த பாதுகாப்பு அமைப்புகள், உடனடியாக அந்த வங்கிக் கணக்குகள் அனைத்தையும் முடக்கியுள்ளன.

ஒரே நேரத்தில் 10 முதல் 30 போலி வங்கிக் கணக்குகளில் பணப் பரிவர்த்தனை செய்து, அதை பயங்கரவாத செயல்களுக்கு, பயங்கரவாதிகள் பயன்படுத்தி வந்துள்ளனர். பாதுகாப்பு அமைப்புகளின் கண்களில் மண்ணை துாவ, பணத்தை சிறிய தொகையாக பிரித்து, வாடகைக்கு எடுக்கப்பட்ட வங்கிக் கணக்குகளில் செலுத்தியுள்ளனர்.

இதற்காக ஏழை, எளிய மக்களை குறிவைக்கும் பயங்கரவாதிகள், குறைந்த நேரத்தில் கை நிறைய பணம் தருவதாக ஆசை காட்டுகின்றனர். இதற்கு சம்மதம் தெரிவிக்கும் நபர்களின் வங்கிக் கணக்கு விபரங்கள், ஆன்லைன் பாஸ்வேர்டுகள் பெற்று, அந்த வங்கி கணக்கை வாடகைக்கு எடுத்து பயன்படுத்துகின்றனர்.

இதுவரை, முடக்கப்பட்ட 8,000 போலி வங்கிக் கணக்குகளில், பல கோடி ரூபாய் அளவுக்கு பரிவர்த்தனை நடந்திருப்பதும் விசாரணையில் தெரிய வந்துள்ளது. இதையடுத்து, இதில் தொடர்புடைய முக்கிய புள்ளிகளை, பாதுகாப்பு அமைப்புகளின் அதிகாரிகள் தேடி வருகின்றனர்.

'பணத்திற்கு ஆசைப்பட்டு வங்கிக் கணக்கை மற்றவர்களுக்கு வாடகைக்கு விட வேண்டாம். அது தேச துரோக செயல்களுக்கு பயன்படுத்தப்பட்டால், அந்த வங்கிக் கணக்குக்கு உரிய நபர்களும் குற்றவாளியாக கருதப்படுவர்' என ஜம்மு - காஷ்மீர் போலீசார் பொதுமக்களை எச்சரித்துள்ளனர்.

DESSU Final Signing of the Memorandum of Understanding!

La signature du Protocole d’Accord (M.O.U) du projet DESSU entre Djibouti, l’Éthiopie, le Soudan du Sud et l’Ouganda marque une étape stratégique majeure pour notre coopération régionale et le #positionnement de Djibouti comme hub logistique incontournable de la région.

Nous saluons le travail #remarquable du Major Herbert Ndibwalana, qui a coordonné avec détermination les négociations jusqu’à leur aboutissement. Nos remerciements,  également au Président du Port de Djibouti, M. Aboubaker Omar Hadi, sa diplomatie efficace et sa défense constante des #intérêts_nationaux.

Le siège non permanent de Djibouti a été occupé en 1993–1994. 

Aujourd’hui, nous devons lancer une campagne structurée, combinant un lobbying discret et une communication stratégique efficace.

La création d’alliances transnationales est essentielle. 

La diaspora peut jouer un rôle clé en établissant des partenariats avec les États insulaires (Caraïbes et Pacifique), les pays africains non alignés, les États du Golfe ainsi que les nations d’Asie du Sud-Est.

Le slogan doit être clair et inclusif. Au lieu de dire « notre pays », nous devrions affirmer :

(Nous représentons la voix de la Corne de l’Afrique, région stratégique au carrefour de l’Afrique et du Moyen-Orient)

... mal eine gute Nachricht aus heimatlichen Gefilden - Österreich hat sich im Korruptionsranking verbessert: von Rang 25 auf 21! Ob das tatsächlich weniger Korruption bedeutet oder nur eine leicht verbesserte Wahrnehmung, lässt sich aus dem "Corruption Perceptions Index" jedoch nicht eindeutig ableiten. An der Spitze stehen erneut Dänemark, Finnland und Singapur - Somalia, Südsudan und Venezuela sind die Schlusslichter.

Ich wäre ja dafür, dass Länder mit schlechten Korruptionsindex - sagen wir so ab 100 - auch keine finanzielle Unterstützung mehr erhalten dürften. In diesen Ländern versickern die Förderungsgelder noch ehe sie eingelangt sind. Bestechung, Zweckentfremdung öffentlicher Gelder, Nepotismus und politische Einflussnahme sind dort an der Tagesordnung!

P.S.: die Ukraine liegt aktuell auf Platz 104 ...

Waasiirka Arimaha Dibadda Somaliland oo waraysi ay la yeelatay idaacad laga leeyahay waddanka Ingiriiska ayaa xajiiyey jiritaanka wararka sheegaya in Somailland ay diyaar u tahay inay saxiixdo heshiiska Ibraahiimiyada ee lagu caadiyeynayo xiriirka Yahuudda.

Sidoo kale wasiir Cabdiraxmaan Daahir Bakaal waxa uu waxba-kama-jiraan ku tilmaamay qodob uu Gurguurte sheegay inuu ku jiray heshiiska ay kala saxiixdeen maamullada Talaabiib iyo Hargeysa oo dhigayay in muslimiinta Falastiin lagu barakiciyo Soomaaliland.

"Heshiiskaas Israa'iil waa ay ka hadashay, anaguna waan sheegnay wax ku saabsan arrinkaas oo aan ka wadahadalnay in aanu jirin. Asagana su'aashaas in la waydiiyo, heshiiskaas meesha uu ku arkay ha soo bandhigo", ayuu yiri Bakaal, isagoo ku doodday in Xasan Sheekh uusan haynin xogaha la xiriira heshiiskaas.

Qodob kale oo uu horey uu uga dhawaajiyay madaxa kooxda Villa Somaliya Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud oo ahaa in saldhig ciidan ay Yahuuddu ka dhisanayso Somaliland, kaas oo sida uu hadalka u dhigay noqon doona mid wax laga weeraro, ayaa wasiir Bakaal wax laga waydiiyey.

"Madaxweynaha Xamar joogaa wax uu ka og yahay heshiiska aan la galnay Israa'iil haba yaraatee ma jirto" ayuu yiri C/Raxmaan Bakaal, inkasta oo aanu caddayn dhabnimada waxa ka jira in saldhig millateri uu qayb ka ahaa heshiiskaas iyo in kale.

Bakaal waxa uu hadalkiisa raaciyay in Somaliland iyo Sahaayinadu ay ka wada shaqayn doonaan wixii dantoodu ay ku jirto. Isagoo intaas raaciyey in aysan jirin wax shuruud ah oo ku xiran heshiiska ay wada galeen labadooda dhinac.

#Warbixin_ku_saabsan_Qorshihii_Harrar_Council" ee #Somaliland

​Muuqaalkani wuxuu daaha ka rogayaa xog taariikhi ah oo ku saabsan qorshe 80 sano ka hor jiray oo loogu magac daray "Harrar Council". Qorshahan ayaa ahaa mid la doonayay in lagu midoobo qaybo ka mid ah dhulka Soomaalida (Somaliland) iyo dhulka Harrar ee Itoobiya, si looga dhigo dowlad ay degaan dadka Yuhuudda ah ee ka yimid Yurub. Dukumiintigan oo ka kooban 34 bog, ayaa muujinaya damacii gumeysiga ee xilligaas iyo sidii loo qorsheeyay in dhulkaas loo adeegsado degsiimooyin cusub.

​Qoraalka uu Jimmy Dore akhriyayo ayaa tilmaamaya in dhulka Somaliland iyo Harrar loo doortay in ay yihiin goobo ku habboon degaanka dadka reer Yurub, sababtoo ah cimiladooda oo wanaagsan iyo dhulka oo ku habboon wax soo saarka beeraha. Waxaa dukumiintiga ku cad in qorshuhu ahaa in la dejiyo dad gaaraya 60,000 ilaa 70,000 oo qof, iyada oo la rumeysnaa in dadka deegaanka ee Soomaalida ah aysan samayn doonin iska caabin weyn, si ka duwan sidii ka dhacday dhulka Falastiin.

​Sidoo kale, muuqaalku wuxuu muujinayaa in sanadkii 1935, dowladda Ingiriiska ay u soo bandhigtay Boqorkii Itoobiya in Dekedda Saylac iyo qaybo ka mid ah British Somaliland lagu wareejiyo Itoobiya, si loogu beddelo tanaasulaad kale. Tani waxay muujinaysaa in mustaqbalka dhulka Soomaalida uu ahaa mid ay ku gorgortamaan quwadaha gumeysiga iyo dowladaha deriska ah, iyada oo la doonayay in Berbera iyo deegaannada ku xeeran laga dhigo xarun dowlad Yuhuudi ah.

​Ugu dambeyntii, Jimmy Dore wuxuu isbarbardhig ku sameynayaa qorshihii hore iyo xaaladda hadda taagan. Wuxuu xusay in weli ay jirto hadal-hayn ku saabsan in dadka reer Falastiin loo rarayo dhulka Somaliland, halkaas oo la sheegay in dano ciidan iyo saldhigyo ay ku leeyihiin quwado shisheeye. Warbixintu waxay hoosta ka xariiqaysaa in xaaladda Somaliland ay leedahay taariikh fog oo ku saabsan faragelin caalami ah iyo qorshayaal qarsoon oo saameyn ku leh madax-bannaanida iyo masiirka dadka Soomaaliyeed.

‎Shaqo joojinta ayaa saameysay ku dhowaad 150 hawlwadeen oo isugu jira dhakhaatiir, kalkaaliyayaal, shaqaalaha naafadda ka shaqeeya iyo kuwa xaafad wareegga ah. Hawlwadeennada ayaa caddeeyay inaysan shaqada dib ugu laaban doonin illaa laga xalliyo tabashadooda la xiriirta mushaar yarida.
‎“Waxaan bixinnaa adeegyo naf-badbaadin ah maalin kasta, balse mushaarka naloo qoondeeyay ma muujinayo heerka shaqada aan qabanno & culeyska aan wajahayno,” ayuu yiri mid ka mid ah dhakhaatiirta, maanta Shaqo joojinta saameeyay.

‎Ilaa hadda, hay’adda IRC si rasmi ah ugama hadlin shaqo joojinta, hase yeeshee ilo ku dhow maamulka ayaa sheegay in wada-hadallo xal loogu raadinayo ay socdaan.
‎Dhinaca kale, hoggaanka xerada ayaa xaqiijiyay in ay soo gaartay cabashada iyo wararka la xiriira shaqo joojinta hawlwadeennada caafimaadka.

Somalia’s Ambassador to Sweden, Non-Resident Ambassador to Norway, Presents Credentials to King Harald V

Oslo, Norway | 16 February 2026

His Excellency Ambassador Abdikarim Ahmed Mohamed, Ambassador of the Federal Republic of Somalia to the Kingdom of Sweden and Non-Resident Ambassador to the Kingdom of Norway, presented his Letters of Credence to His Majesty King Harald V at the Royal Palace in Oslo, formally commencing his diplomatic mandate in Norway.

During the audience, His Excellency Ambassador Abdikarim conveyed the warm greetings and best wishes of H.E. Dr. Hassan Sheikh Mohamud, President of the Federal Republic of Somalia, and reaffirmed Somalia’s commitment to strengthening the longstanding and cordial relations between Somalia and Norway.

The presentation reflects the shared determination of both countries to deepen bilateral cooperation in areas of mutual interest, including development partnership, peacebuilding, and people-to-people engagement.

The Somali Mission looks forward to working closely with the Government of Norway to advance practical cooperation and further consolidate the strong and historic friendship between the Federal Republic of Somalia and the Kingdom of Norway. 🇸🇴🇳🇴

Afhayeenka Midowga Culumada Soomaaliyeed
Sheikh Cali  ayaa ka hadlay ahmiyadda ay leedahay raadinta iyo xaqiijinta aragtida Bisha Barakeysan ee Ramadaan.

Afhayeenku wuxuu sheegay in raadinta bisha Ramadaan ay tahay waajib diini ah oo ku saleysan sunnada Nebigeenna (NNKH), islamarkaana ay astaan u tahay bilaabashada cibaado weyn oo ay ku mideysan yihiin Muslimiinta caalamka. Wuxuu carrabka ku adkeeyay in arrintan loo maro hab shareeco waafaqsan, lana hubsado marqaati sax ah iyo go’aan mideysan oo ay culimadu ku gaaraan wada-tashi iyo isu-tanaasul.

Sidoo kale, wuxuu tilmaamay in midnimada bulshada ay tahay tiir muhiim u ah bilashada Ramadaanka, isagoo ugu baaqay shacabka inay ka fogaadaan warar aan la hubin iyo kala fogeynta bulshada, ayna ku kalsoonaadaan go’aamada ay soo saaraan culimada iyo hay’adaha rasmiga ah

Ugu dambeyn, Afhayeenku wuxuu ku boorriyay Muslimiinta inay u diyaar garoobaan bisha barakeysan qalbi furan, toobad-keen, is-cafis iyo u adeegidda bulshada, maadaama Ramadaanku yahay bil naxariis, dembi-dhaaf iyo xoojinta wadajirka ummadda.

From Homeland to Heartland: Bridging Kenya’s Generational Pathways in UK.

Today at the Kenya High Commission in London, we had the pleasure of meeting Susan Wangari, an Assistant Principal with over 15 years of experience in UK education, youth development, and school community partnerships. Together with our Education Attaché, Mr. Willie Machocho, we held a meaningful conversation on how best to support Kenyan youth in the diaspora to succeed while staying connected to their identity and heritage.

Our discussion highlighted the incredible potential within our diaspora youth. When they feel supported, understood, and rooted in their culture, they grow into confident young leaders who carry Kenya with them wherever they go.

 This is why the High Commissioner continues to prioritise cultural diplomacy, building partnerships that bridge the generational gap, strengthen identity  and nurture a sense of belonging among our young people.  It is work that ensures every Kenyan child abroad feels seen, valued, and connected to home.

I was also delighted to receive a copy of Susan’s book, Roots and Wings. Her commitment to sharing knowledge, celebrating identity, and uplifting the Kenyan story in the UK is a powerful contribution to our community. 

We congratulate her for using her voice and expertise to guide families, strengthen cultural roots, and inspire a vibrant generation that loves home.

As we look ahead, we remain hopeful and confident in a vibrant Kenyan young generation in the diaspora, one that embraces its heritage, cherishes its connection to home, and carries Kenya proudly into the future.

🌍 Top Countries Where Africans Feel at Home Abroad ✈️

If you’re planning to study, work, or migrate, these countries have vibrant African communities where you’ll feel connected to your roots. 💚🖤❤️

1. United Kingdom (🇬🇧)
📍 London, Birmingham, Manchester
👥 Communities: Nigerian, Ghanaian, Somali, Congolese, Zimbabwean, South African
🍲 Dishes: Jollof rice, suya, egusi soup, injera, nyama choma
✨ Why it feels like home: Afrobeat clubs, African churches & mosques, bustling Peckham (“Little Lagos”), and community markets like Ades & Obalende Suya Express.

2. France (🇫🇷)
📍 Paris, Marseille, Lyon
👥 Communities: Senegalese, Ivorian, Algerian, Moroccan, Congolese, Malian
🍲 Dishes: Attiéké, mafé, yassa, tagine, couscous, poulet DG
✨ Why it feels like home: Château Rouge & Marché Dejean in Paris bring the African spice, plus hair salons, radio, and music hubs for Francophone Africans.

3. United States (🇺🇸)
📍 New York, Washington DC, Houston, Atlanta, Minneapolis
👥 Communities: Nigerian, Ethiopian, Somali, Ghanaian, Liberian, Congolese
🍲 Dishes: Fufu, egusi, doro wat, puff-puff
✨ Why it feels like home: African churches, festivals (like Afrochella USA), and thriving hubs such as NYC’s Bronx/Brooklyn and Houston’s Bissonnet Street.

4. United Arab Emirates – Dubai (🇦🇪)
📍 Dubai
👥 Communities: Nigerian, Sudanese, Ethiopian, Somali, Ghanaian
🍲 Dishes: Suya, doro wat, ful medames
✨ Why it feels like home: Business-friendly, strong nightlife (Kiza & Club Black Diamond), plus African groceries & salons in Deira and Al Qusais.

5. Italy (🇮🇹)
📍 Rome, Milan, Naples, Palermo
👥 Communities: Nigerian, Senegalese, Ghanaian, Moroccan, Eritrean
🍲 Dishes: Jollof rice, couscous, berbere stew
✨ Why it feels like home: Via Padova (Milan) and Termini (Rome) are buzzing with African restaurants and shops, while Palermo’s Ballarò Market is full of African flavors.

🌟 Honorable Mentions
🇨🇦 Canada – Toronto & Edmonton
🇩🇪 Germany – Berlin & Hamburg
🇧🇷 Brazil – Afro-Brazilian heritage in Salvador
🇹🇷 Turkey – Nigerian & Somali communities in Istanbul

💡 Takeaway: Wherever you go, you can always find a piece of Africa waiting for you. 🌍❤️

His Excellency Ambassador Abdikarim Ahmed Mohamed, Ambassador of the Federal Republic of Somalia to the Kingdom of Sweden and Non-Resident Ambassador to the Kingdom of Norway, presented his Letters of Credence to His Majesty King Harald V at the Royal Palace in Oslo, formally commencing his diplomatic mandate in Norway.

During the audience, His Excellency Ambassador Abdikarim conveyed the warm greetings and best wishes of H.E. Dr. Hassan Sheikh Mohamud, President of the Federal Republic of Somalia, and reaffirmed Somalia’s commitment to strengthening the longstanding and cordial relations between Somalia and Norway.

The presentation reflects the shared determination of both countries to deepen bilateral cooperation in areas of mutual interest, including development partnership, peacebuilding, and people-to-people engagement.

The Somali Mission looks forward to working closely with the Government of Norway to advance practical cooperation and further consolidate the strong and historic friendship between the Federal Republic of Somalia and the Kingdom of Norway.

Warbixintan muuqaalka ah waxay si qoto dheer u falanqaynaysaa nolosha maalinlaha ah, dhaqaalaha, iyo hiddaha gaarka ah ee Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, iyadoo xoogga saaraysa booqasho indha-indhayn ah oo 𝗗𝗮𝗹𝘅𝗶𝗶𝘀𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗰𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗮𝗵 𝗲𝗲 𝗗𝗮𝘃𝘂𝗱 𝗔𝗸𝗵𝘂𝗻𝗱𝘇𝗮𝗱𝗮 uu ku tagay goobaha ugu muhiimsan ee caasimadda Hargeysa. Waxaa uu si gaar ah u sharraxayaa khibradda uu ka helay suuqa xoolaha ee magaalada, halkaas oo geela iyo idaha madaxa madow ay ka yihiin udub-dhexaadka dhaqaalaha dalka iyo dhoofka caalamiga ah, iyadoo dhanka kalena iftiiminaysa doorka firfircoon ee haweenka ku leeyihiin ganacsiga, isticmaalka casriga ah ee lacagta moobaylka, iyo booqashada maqaaxiyaha looga caanka yahay 'Camel-chino'. Ugu dambayn, indha-indhayntani waxay muujinaysaa nabadgelyada layaabka leh iyo soo-dhoweynta diiran ee dadka deegaanka, iyadoo ka tarjumaysa rabitaanka xooggan ee shacabka reer Somaliland u qabaan madax-bannaani buuxda iyo aqoonsi caalami ah oo ay kaga mid noqdaan fagaarayaasha adduunka.

𝗦𝗼𝗰𝗱𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗸𝗶𝗶 𝗦𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗮 𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗮 𝗲𝗲 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱: 
Somaliland waa dal ku yaalla Geeska Afrika oo iskiis ugu dhowaaqay madax-bannaanida sannadkii 1991 ka dib markii uu ka go'ay Soomaaliya. In kasta oo aanu caalamku weli aqoonsi buuxa siin, haddana waa dhul leh nidaam dawladnimo oo dhammaystiran, nabadgelyo laysku halleyn karo, iyo hiddaha iyo dhaqanka Soomaaliyeed oo halkaas si weyn looga ilaaliyo.

𝟭. 𝗦𝘂𝘂𝗾𝗮 𝗫𝗼𝗼𝗹𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗲𝗲 𝗛𝗮𝗿𝗴𝗲𝘆𝘀𝗮: 𝗪𝗮𝗱𝗻𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗛𝗮𝗹𝗯𝗮𝘄𝗹𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗵𝗮
Suuqa xoolaha ee magaalada Hargeysa maaha oo kaliya goob ganacsi oo lagu kala beddelto hantida, balse waa xarun bulsho oo laga dhex arki karo hiddaha, dhaqanka, iyo nolosha dhabta ah ee dadka Soomaaliyeed. Waa fagaare aad u weyn oo subax kasta ay isugu yimaadaan boqolaal ganacsato, dilaaliin, iyo dad deegaanka ah, kuwaas oo ka qayb qaata mid ka mid ah silsiladaha dhaqaale ee ugu xooggan Geeska Afrika.
𝗚𝗲𝗲𝗹𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 (𝗔𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗛𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗱𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗳𝘁𝗮): Geelu maaha xoolo caadi ah; waa halbeegga hantida iyo sharafta bulshada. Waxaa lagu qiyaasaa in Somaliland ay ku nool yihiin in ka badan 𝟭𝟰 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝘆𝗮𝗻 𝗼𝗼 𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗳 𝗼𝗼 𝗴𝗲𝗲𝗹 𝗮𝗵, taas oo ka dhigan in tirada geelu ay ku dhowaad saddex laab ka badan tahay tirada dadka dalkaas deggan. Waxaa xusid mudan in aanu jirin geel duur-joog ah; neef kastaa wuxuu leeyahay sumad (leex) u gaar ah oo lagu aqoonsado beesha ama qoyska leh, taas oo muujinaysa nidaam hantida lagu ilaaliyo oo soo jireen ah.
𝗚𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗰𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗗𝗵𝗼𝗼𝗳𝗸𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗮𝗵: Suuqan wuxuu xidhiidh toos ah la leeyahay suuqyada caalamiga ah, gaar ahaan dalalka 𝗞𝗵𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗶𝗷𝗸𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗲𝗲𝗱 sida Sucuudiga, Imaaraadka, iyo Qatar. Geela halkan laga iibsado looma isticmaalo hilib iyo caano oo kaliya; waxaa loo dhoofiyaa dalalkaas si loogu tartarsiiyo orodka geela (𝗖𝗮𝗺𝗲𝗹 𝗥𝗮𝗰𝗶𝗻𝗴) oo ah ciyaar caan ka ah Khaliijka, halkaas oo geela Somaliland looga jecel yahay xooggiisa iyo adkaysigiisa.
𝗛𝗮𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗤𝗶𝗶𝗺𝗮𝘆𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗚𝗼𝗿𝗴𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮: Qiimaha neefka geela ah wuxuu u dhexeeyaa $𝟯𝟬𝟬 ilaa $𝟭,𝟬𝟬𝟬 ama ka badan, iyadoo qiimuhu uu ku xidhan yahay arrimo dhawr ah sida:
𖣔 𝗗𝗵𝗲𝗱𝗱𝗶𝗴 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗟𝗮𝗯: Nirgaha iyo halaha ayaa inta badan ka qiimo sarreeya rabaayadda.
𖣔 𝗗𝗮'𝗱𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗫𝗮𝗷𝗺𝗶𝗴𝗮: Neefka weyn ee loogu talagalay hilibka ama dhoofka ayaa gaadha qiimaha ugu sarreeya.
𖣔 𝗖𝗮𝗮𝗳𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗮𝗱𝗸𝗮: Waxaa jira dilaaliin khubaro ah oo indha-indheeya caafimaadka neefka ka hor intaan gorgortanku bilaabmin.
𝗠𝗮𝗮𝗺𝘂𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝗵𝘂𝘂𝗿𝘁𝗮 𝗗𝗮𝘄𝗹𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮: Dawladda Somaliland waxay suuqan u maamushaa si habaysan, iyadoo neef kasta oo suuqa soo gala laga qaado canshuur lagu qiyaasay $𝟭. Marka canshuurta la bixiyo, neefka waxaa dhabarka looga calaamadiyaa 𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗮𝗻 𝗰𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗻 oo muujinaysa inuu yahay "𝗫𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗮𝗹-𝗶𝗶𝗯" oo uu maray hannaankii sharciga ahaa. Tani waxay dawladda ka caawisaa inay hesho dakhli ay ku horumariso adeegyada bulshada iyo kaabayaasha suuqa.
𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗾𝗼 𝗔𝗯𝘂𝘂𝗿𝗸𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗔𝗱𝗲𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗞𝗮𝗹𝗲: Suuqan waxaa ku hareeraysan boqolaal dad ah oo ka raadsada nolol maalmeedka, sida gowracatada, dadka hilibka qala, kuwa raqda rida, iyo haweenka iibiya shaaha iyo caanaha geela ee "𝗖𝗮𝗺𝗲𝗹-𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗼", taas oo ka dhigaysa goob isku xidha dhammaan qaybaha bulshada ee dakhligoodu kala duwan yahay.

𝟮. 𝗗𝗼𝗼𝗿𝗸𝗮 𝗛𝗮𝘄𝗲𝗲𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗜𝘀𝗯𝗲𝗱𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗡𝗹𝗼𝗹𝗼𝘀𝗵𝗮 𝗦𝘂𝘂𝗾𝗮
Marka aad dhex marto suuqyada Somaliland, gaar ahaan kuwa caasimadda Hargeysa, waxaad si dhakhso ah u dareemaysaa firfircooni iyo dhiirraan xagga haweenka ah oo aan inta badan laga filan karin dalalka leh hiddaha adag ee Islaamka iyo kuwa conservative-ka ah. Haweenku halkan maaha oo kaliya macaamiil, ee waa maareeyayaasha iyo mishiinka dhaqaalaha ee suuqyada yaryar iyo kuwa dhexe.
𝗛𝗮𝘄𝗲𝗲𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗼𝗼 𝗮𝗵 𝗟𝗮𝗳-𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗮 𝗚𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗰𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗮 (𝗦𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 & 𝗘𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗼𝗺𝗶𝗰 𝗣𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗿): Haweenku waxay si buuxda u gacanta ku hayaan nolosha suuqa maalin kasta. Waxay maamulaan inta badan dukaamada dharka, sarrifka lacagaha yaryar, iibinta qalabka guriga, iyo qaybaha khudaarta. Firfircoonidoodu waxay ka dhalatay baahi dhaqaale iyo mid bulsho, iyagoo dhabarka u ritay mas’uuliyadda qoyska iyo kor u qaadista dakhliga guriga. Waa dad leh xirfad gorgortan oo sare, dabeecad furnaan ah, iyo karti ay ku maareeyaan macaamiil kala duwan oo ka yimaada dalka gudihiisa iyo dibaddiisaba.
𝗚𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗰𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗚𝗲𝗲𝗹𝗮 (𝗗𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗯𝗸𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗱): Caanaha geela oo ah cuntada aasaasiga ah ee dadka Soomaalida, waxa iibintooda iyo qaybintooda hormuud ka ah haweenka. Subax kasta, waxay caanaha ka soo ururiyaan miyiga iyo nawaaxiga magaalooyinka, iyagoo keena suuqa iyagoo aad u cusub.
𖣔 𝗤𝗶𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗧𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮: Suuqa xoolaha dhexdiisa, koobka weyn ee caanaha waxaa lagu helaa qiimo aad u jaban oo qiyaastii ah 𝟳𝟬 𝘀𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶 (𝗨𝗦𝗗), halka badhtamaha magaalada ama maqaaxiyaha casriga ah uu ka yahay $𝟭.𝟮. Tani waxay muujinaysaa sida silsiladda saadka (𝘀𝘂𝗽𝗽𝗹𝘆 𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗶𝗻) ee ay haweenku maamulaan ay u tahay mid toos ah oo faa'iido u leh dadka danyarta ah.
𝗞𝗮𝗰𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗟𝗮𝗰𝗮𝗴𝘁𝗮 𝗠𝗼𝗯𝗮𝘆𝗹𝗸𝗮 (𝗠𝗼𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗲 𝗕𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗥𝗲𝘃𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻): Somaliland waxay ka mid tahay meelaha ugu horreeya adduunka ee laga isticmaalo lacagta moobaylka lagu diro (𝗰𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝘀𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗲𝘁𝘆). Adeegyada sida 𝗭𝗮𝗮𝗱 iyo 𝗲-𝗗𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗯 ayaa beddelay qaabka loo ganacsado.
❁ 𝗙𝘂𝗱𝘂𝗱𝗮𝘆𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗖𝘂𝗹𝗮𝘆𝘀𝗸𝗮: Maadaama shilingka Somaliland uu yahay lacag qiimaheedu hooseeyo, sidashada lacag caddaan ah oo badan waxay u baahan tahay boorsooyin waaweyn. Sidaas darteed, haweenka suuqa joogaa waxay doorbidaan in lacagta loogu soo diro talefanka.
❁ 𝗫𝗮𝘁𝗮𝗮 𝗗𝗮𝗻𝘆𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗱𝗸𝗮 𝗕𝗮𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗻: Arinta ugu layaabka badan ee dalxiisayaasha soo jiidata ayaa ah in xataa dadka danyarta ah ama kuwa magaalada wax ka barya ay qoorta ku wataan lambarro (𝗠𝗲𝗿𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝗡𝘂𝗺𝗯𝗲𝗿𝘀) si lacagta sadaqada ah loogu soo diro moobaylka. Tani waxay muujinaysaa heerka sare ee tignoolajiyadu ay u dhex gashay nolosha dadka ugu hooseeya bulshada, taas oo meesha ka saartay baahidi xisaabinta lacag caddaan ah oo tiro badan.
❁ 𝗡𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗹𝘆𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗜𝘀𝗸𝘂-𝗸𝗮𝗹𝘀𝗼𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗮: Doorka firfircoon ee haweenku wuxuu sidoo kale ka tarjumayaa nabadgelyada ka jirta dalka. In haweenku ay suuqa fadhiyaan ilaa goor dambe oo habeenkii ah iyagoo iibinaya dahab, dhar, ama xoolo, waxay markhaati u tahay kalsoonida lagu qabo nidaamka amniga iyo kala dambaynta ee ka jira Somaliland.

𝟯. 𝗜𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗮𝘅 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗼𝘄: 𝗦𝗮𝗮𝗺𝗮𝘆𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗦𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗮𝗵
Idaha reer Somaliland ee leh madaxa madow (𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶 𝗕𝗹𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗵𝗲𝗮𝗱 𝗦𝗵𝗲𝗲𝗽) maaha oo kaliya xoolo la dhaqdo, balse waa sumad caalami ah oo u gaar ah Geeska Afrika. Noocan idaha ah ayaa lagu tiriyaa mid ka mid ah kuwa ugu adkaysta adduunka, isagoo awood u leh inuu ku noolaado deegaanno engegan oo kulul, halka uu jidhkiisu u dhisnaado si ka duwan idaha kale ee dunida.
𝗦𝗶𝗳𝗼𝗼𝘆𝗶𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗚𝗮𝗮𝗿𝗸𝗮 𝗮𝗵 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗗𝗲𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 (𝗘𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗺𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗲𝘀): Idahan waxaa lagu yaqaannaa jidh cad oo baruur leh iyo madax madow oo yaryar. Waxa ay caan ku yihiin in ay baruurta ku kaydsadaan barida (𝗳𝗮𝘁-𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗹𝗲𝗱), taas oo u oggolaanaysa inay u adkaystaan haraadka iyo gaajada xilliyada abaaraha. Inkasta oo lagu arko qaybo ka mid ah Jabuuti iyo Itoobiya, haddana 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 ayaa ah hoyga ugu weyn ee ay ku tarmaan, waxaana dunida looga yaqaannaa "Somali Sheep".
𝗟𝗮𝗳-𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗮 𝗫𝗮𝗷𝗸𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗦𝗮𝗮𝗺𝗮𝘆𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗗𝗶𝗶𝗺𝗲𝗲𝗱: Sannad kasta, marka ay malaayiin muslimiin ahi isugu tagaan magaalada barakaysan ee Maka si ay u gutaan waajibaadka 𝗫𝗮𝗷𝗸𝗮, Somaliland waxay door muhiim ah ka ciyaartaa sugidda cuntada iyo qalliinka qurbanka (𝗛𝗮𝗱𝘆𝗶).
𒊹 𝗗𝗵𝗼𝗼𝗳𝗸𝗮  𝗕𝗲𝗿𝗯𝗲𝗿𝗮: Malaayiin neef oo idahan ah ayaa laga raraa dekedda weyn ee Berbera, iyadoo loo rarayo dalka Sucuudi Carabiya. Waa mid ka mid ah dhaqdhaqaaqyada xoolaha ee ugu weyn adduunka ee ka dhaca hal deked gudaheed.
𒊹 𝗗𝗼𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗦𝘂𝗰𝘂𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗴𝗮: Dadka reer Khaliijka iyo dawladda Sucuudiguba waxay doorbidaan idaha Somaliland sababtoo ah hilibkooda oo ah mid dabiici ah (𝗼𝗿𝗴𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗰) iyo dhadhankiisa oo aad u wanaagsan marka loo eego idaha laga keeno Australia ama Yurub.
𝗤𝗶𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗚𝗼𝗿𝗴𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗦𝘂𝘂𝗾𝗮: Qiimaha neefka idaha ah ee madaxa madow wuxuu suuqa Hargeysa iyo kan dhoofka ka joogaa qiyaastii $𝟭𝟬𝟬 ilaa $𝟭𝟱𝟬.
✪ 𝗜𝘀𝗯𝗲𝗱𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗤𝗶𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗵𝗮: Qiimuhu wuxuu kor u kacaa xilliyada ciidaha iyo xajka marka baahidu kor u kacdo.
✪ 𝗗𝗮𝗸𝗵𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗤𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮: Ganacsigan ayaa ah isha koowaad ee ay Somaliland ka hesho lacagta adag (𝗙𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗖𝘂𝗿𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗰𝘆), isagoo qayb weyn ka qaata dakhliga dawladda iyo nolosha reer miyiga ee xoolo-dhaqatada ah.
𝗔𝗾𝗼𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗖𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗮𝗵 (𝗚𝗹𝗼𝗯𝗮𝗹 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁 𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆): In kasta oo Somaliland ay u halgamayso aqoonsi siyaasadeed, "𝗜𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗮𝘅 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗼𝘄" ayaa u horseeday 𝗮𝗾𝗼𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶 𝗴𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗰𝘀𝗶. Idahan waxaa loo tixgeliyaa inay yihiin "𝗗𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗯𝗸𝗮 𝗡𝗼𝗼𝗹" ee dalka, waxaana lagu calaamadiyaa astaamo muujinaya inay caafimaad qabaan (𝗰𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗲𝗱) ka hor intaanan loo rarin maraakiibta ka baxaysa Gulf of Aden.
𝗖𝗮𝘀𝗵𝘂𝘂𝗿𝘁𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗠𝗮𝗮𝗺𝘂𝗹𝗸𝗮: Sida geelaba, idaha la dhoofinayo ama suuqa la keeno waxaa laga qaadaa canshuur yar oo qiyaastii ah 𝟮𝟬 ilaa 𝟱𝟬 𝘀𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶, taas oo lagu xaqiijiyo in neefku maray baadhitaanka caafimaadka (𝗾𝘂𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗲) si loo hubiyo inuu ka madax-bannaan yahay cudurrada ka hor inta uusan u tallaabin xuduudaha caalamiga ah.

𝟰. 𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗞𝗮𝗳𝗲𝗲𝗴𝗴𝗮, 𝗗𝗼𝗼𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗕𝘂𝗹𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗱𝗮, 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗼-𝗱𝗵𝗮𝘄𝗲𝘆𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗥𝗲𝗲𝗿 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱
Magaalada Hargeysa maaha oo kaliya xarun ganacsi, balse waa goob ay ku kulmaan aqoonta, sheekada, iyo hiddaha. Dhaqanka maqaaxiyaha (𝗖𝗮𝗳𝗲 𝗖𝘂𝗹𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲) ayaa ah laf-dhabarta nolosha bulshada, halkaas oo koobka shaaha ama kafeega ahi uu yahay furaha is-dhexgalka iyo doodaha furan.
𝗙𝗮𝗴𝗮𝗮𝗿𝗮𝘆𝗮𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗮 𝗗𝗼𝗼𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗦𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗮𝘀𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗮 (𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗹𝗶𝗮𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗼𝗳 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗲𝘁𝘀): Maqaaxiyaha Hargeysa waxa looga yaqaan "baarlamaanka dadweynaha". Galab kasta iyo subax kasta, boqolaal dad ah ayaa isugu yimaada si ay ugu dekeeyaan (uga doodaan) arrimaha siyaasadda dalka, isbeddellada caalamka, iyo xaaladaha nolosha. Waa goob aan kala sooc lahayn, halkaas oo aqoonyahanka, odayga dhaqanka, iyo dhalinyaradu ay si siman u wadaagaan ra'yigooda iyadoo la cabbayo kafee ama shaah. Tani waxay muujinaysaa heerka sare ee xorriyadda hadalka iyo dimuqraadiyadda hoose ee ka jirta dalka.
𝗖𝗮𝗺𝗲𝗹-𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗼: 𝗜𝘀-𝗱𝗵𝗲𝘅𝗴𝗮𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗛𝗶𝗱𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝗿𝗶𝘁𝗮𝘆𝗻𝘁𝗮: Mid ka mid ah waxyaabaha ugu xiisaha badan ee soo jiitay indhaha caalamka waa "𝗖𝗮𝗺𝗲𝗹-𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗼". Tani waa Cappuccino casri ah oo lagu sifeeyay midabka iyo dhadhanka gaarka ah ee 𝗰𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗴𝗲𝗲𝗹𝗮.
𒊹 𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗮: Maadaama caanaha geelu leeyihiin xoogaa cusbo ah (𝘀𝗮𝗹𝘁𝘆 𝘁𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗲) iyo nafaqo badan, Camel-chino-ga wuxuu leeyahay dhadhan ka duwan kafeega lagu sameeyo caanaha lo'da; waa mid aad u kareem badan (𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺𝘆), xooggan, oo leh macaanka dabiiciga ah ee caanaha geela.
𒊹 𝗖𝗮𝗮𝗻-𝗯𝗮𝘅𝗮: Maqaaxiyo badan oo casri ah oo ku yaalla Hargeysa ayaa hadda u suuq-geeya cabitaankan sidii calaamad (brand) u gaar ah Somaliland, iyadoo loo arko hab lagu casriyeynayo isticmaalka wax-soo-saarka dalka.
𝗦𝗼𝗼-𝗱𝗵𝗮𝘄𝗲𝘆𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗤𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗶𝗯𝗸𝗮 (𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗖𝘂𝗹𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗛𝗼𝘀𝗽𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆): Dadka reer Somaliland waxay caan ku yihiin kalgacal iyo soo-dhoweyn aan xuduud lahayn oo ay u fidiyaan qofka shisheeyaha ah ama dalxiisaha ah.
★ 𝗚𝗮𝗰𝗮𝗻-𝗾𝗮𝗮𝗱𝗸𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗞𝗮𝗹𝗴𝗮𝗰𝗮𝗹𝗸𝗮: Marka aad dhex lugeynayso jidadka, waa wax iska caadi ah in dadku ku joojiyaan si ay kuu salaamaan, kuu gacan-qaadaan (mararka qaarkoodna garabka kuu qabtaan iyagoo muujinaya kalsooni), oo ay kugu yidhaahdaan "Welcome to Somaliland".
★ 𝗫𝗶𝗶𝘀𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗪𝗮𝗱𝗮-𝗵𝗮𝗱𝗮𝗹𝗸𝗮: In kasta oo ay jiri karaan caqabado xagga luuqadda Ingiriisiga ah, haddana dadku kama xishoodaan inay ku weydiiyaan "Halkeed ka timid?" iyo "Sidee u aragtaa dalkayaga?". Waxay u hamuun qabaan in dunidu ogaato nabadgelyada iyo horumarka ay gaadheen.
★ 𝗡𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗱-𝗴𝗲𝗹𝘆𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗗𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗲𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗮𝗵: Dalxiisuhu wuxuu dareemayaa ammaan buuxa; ma jiro qof kugu dhibaya dhex-socodka suuqa, balse waxaa jira dad mar walba diyaar u ah inay ku caawiyaan ama kugu martiqaadaan koob shaah ah iyagoon wax abaalgud ah kaan sugeyn.
𝗞𝗮𝗳𝗲𝗲𝗴𝗮 𝗜𝘁𝗼𝗼𝗯𝗶𝘆𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗦𝗮𝗮𝗺𝗮𝘆𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗚𝗼𝗯𝗼𝗹𝗸𝗮: In kasta oo caanuhu yihiin Soomaali, haddana miraha kafeega ee Hargeysa laga cabbo inta badan waxay ka yimaadaan dalka Itoobiya, taas oo muujinaysa xidhiidhka ganacsi iyo is-dhexgal ee u dhexeeya labada dal. Kafeega waxaa loo diyaariyaa habab kala duwan, laga bilaabo habka dhaqanka ee "Jabana" ilaa mishiinnada casriga ah ee "Espresso".

𝟱. 𝗖𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗥𝗮𝗷𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗮𝘅-𝗯𝗮𝗻𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗱𝗮
In kasta oo Somaliland ay leedahay calan, baasaboor, lacag, iyo dawlad dimuqraadi ah, haddana caqabadda ugu weyn waa aqoonsi la'aanta caalamiga ah.
✫ 𝗡𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗱𝗴𝗲𝗹𝘆𝗮𝗱𝗮: Dadka deegaanku waxay ku faanaan inay dalkooda ka dhigeen mid nabad ah iyagoon helin kaalmo caalami ah oo weyn, halka gobollada deriska la ah ay la tacaalayaan xasillooni darro.
✫ 𝗥𝗮𝗷𝗮𝗱𝗮: Shacabka Somaliland waxay aad ugu rajo weyn yihiin in maalin uun ay ka mid noqon doonaan Qaramada Midoobay, iyagoo aaminsan in horumarka ay sameeyeen uu yahay mid u qalma aqoonsi buuxa.

𝗪𝗮𝘅𝘆𝗮𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘂 𝗚𝗮𝗮𝗿 𝗮𝗵 (𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗨𝗻𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗜𝗱𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗼𝗳 𝗦𝗼𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱)
Somaliland maaha oo kaliya dhul ku dhowaaqay gooni-isu-taag, balse waa tijaabo guulaysatay oo muujisay sida dadku ay u dhisato dawladnimo iyaga oo aan kaalmo weyn ka helin dunida inteeda kale. Waxyaabaha u gaarka ah waxaa loo qaybin karaa saddex tiir oo waawayn:
𝟭. 𝗫𝗮𝘀𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗼𝗼𝗻𝗶𝗱𝗮: "𝗝𝗮𝘀𝗶𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗱 𝗡𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗱 𝗮𝗵" (𝗔𝗻 𝗜𝘀𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗼𝗳 𝗦𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆)
Somaliland waxa ay ku taal gobolka Geeska Afrika oo caan ku ah colaado, abaaraha, iyo xasillooni-darro siyaasadeed, haddana waxa ay u muuqataa meel ka duwan deegaannada ku xeeran.
✪ 𝗡𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗚𝘂𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗲𝗲𝗱𝗮 𝗹𝗮𝗴𝗮 𝗱𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗮𝘆: Si duwan dalal badan oo nabaddooda laga soo dhisay dibadda, nabadda Somaliland waxa ay ku timid wada-tashi ay isugu yimaadeen odayaasha dhaqanka iyo aqoonyahanka (shirkii Boorama 1993). Tani waxa ay abuurtay nidaam nabadgelyo oo dadku iska leeyahay (Community-based security).
✪ 𝗔𝗺𝗻𝗶𝗴𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗞𝗮𝗹𝗮-𝗱𝗮𝗺𝗯𝗮𝘆𝗻𝘁𝗮: Adiga oo dalxiise ah, waxaad dhex lugeyn kartaa Hargeysa habeen badhkii adiga oo aan ka cabsi qabin amni-darro. Waa meel ay ka shaqeeyaan booliska, sirdoonka, iyo nidaamka garsoorka, taas oo ka dhigtay deegaan soo jiidasho leh oo looga soo cararo qalaasaha gobolka.
𝟮. 𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗵𝗮 𝗫𝗼𝗼𝗹𝗮𝗵𝗮: "𝗗𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗯𝗸𝗮 𝗡𝗼𝗼𝗹" (𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗟𝗶𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗚𝗼𝗹𝗱)
Halka waddamada Khaliijku ay ku tiirsan yihiin saliidda (Petroleum), dalalka reer Galbeedkuna ay ku horumareen tignoolajiyada, Somaliland dhaqaaleheeda waxaa kaxeeya xoolaha nool, gaar ahaan geela.
✪ 𝗚𝗲𝗲𝗹𝗮 𝗼𝗼 𝗮𝗵 𝗞𝗮𝘆𝗱𝗸𝗮 𝗤𝗶𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗵𝗮: Geelu halkan maaha oo kaliya cunto, balse waa bangi nool. Qoyska leh boqol neef oo geel ah waxaa loo tixgeliyaa inay yihiin taajiriin heer sare ah. Caanaha, hilibka, iyo dhoofka geela ayaa ah mishiinka bixiya mushaharka macallinka, booliska, iyo shaqaalaha dawladda.
✪ 𝗜𝘀𝗸𝘂-𝗸𝗮𝗹𝘀𝗼𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗮𝗹𝗲: In kasta oo aanay helin deymo caalami ah ama maalgelin weyn oo ka timaada Bangiga Adduunka, Somaliland waxa ay dhisatay dhaqaale ku dhisan ganacsiga xorta ah iyo dhoofka xoolaha, taas oo muujinaysa adkaysi dhaqaale oo layaab leh.
𝟯. 𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗾𝗮𝗻 𝗔𝗱𝗮𝗴: 𝗜𝘀-𝗱𝗵𝗲𝘅𝗴𝗮𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗗𝗶𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗶𝘆𝗼 𝗛𝗶𝗱𝗱𝗮𝗵𝗮 (𝗙𝗮𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻)
Nolosha Somaliland waxa ay ku dhisantay is-biirsiga diinta Islaamka oo ah hage nololeed iyo hiddaha Soomaalida oo ah nidaam bulsho oo is-caawinta ku dhisan.
᯽ 𝗜𝘀-𝗰𝗮𝗮𝘄𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗮 𝗕𝘂𝗹𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗱𝗮 (𝗦𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗦𝗮𝗳𝗲𝘁𝘆 𝗡𝗲𝘁): Ma jiro nidaam caymis oo dawladeed, laakiin nidaamka "Xigto iyo Qaraabo" ayaa ah midka shaqeeya. Haddii qof dhib ku dhaco, beesha iyo qoyska ayaa iska ururiya lacagta lagu caawinayo. Sidoo kale, xawaaladaha (remittances) ka yimaada qurba-joogta ayaa ah halbowlaha labaad ee nolosha, taas oo muujinaysa isku-duubnida bulshada meel kasta oo ay joogaan.

La Argentina registró un retroceso en el ranking mundial de transparencia elaborado por la ONG Transparencia Internacional. Según el último Índice de Percepción de la Corrupción (IPC), el país cayó del puesto 99 al 104 entre 182 naciones evaluadas durante el segundo año de gestión de Javier Milei.

📉 El informe, que mide la percepción de corrupción en el sector público a nivel global, ubica ahora a la Argentina en el mismo escalón que Belice y Ucrania.

🌎 En la comparación regional e internacional, el país quedó por detrás de Zambia, Lesoto, Gambia y República Dominicana.

🏆 En el extremo superior del ranking, los países considerados más transparentes son Dinamarca, Finlandia y Singapur.

🚨 En el fondo de la tabla aparecen Venezuela, Somalía y Sudán del Sur, señalados como los Estados con mayores niveles de corrupción percibida.

El IPC es uno de los indicadores más utilizados a nivel global para evaluar la calidad institucional y la integridad del sector público. La caída de cinco posiciones vuelve a poner el foco en los estándares de transparencia y control en la administración estatal argentina.

“Semarak Pawai Obor Menyambut Ramadhan 1447” 

Pawai Obor Tingkat Provinsi Kalimantan Barat yang digelar tadi malam berlangsung dengan penuh khidmat dan semarak. Kegiatan yang dipusatkan di halaman Mesjid Raya Mujahidin ini secara resmi dilepas oleh Gubernur Kalimantan Barat Bapak H. Ria Nursan, serta diawali dengan laporan Ketua Panitia , Bapak Agus Setiadi, yang memimpin Panitia Festival Pawai Obor Ramadhan Kalbar 2026. Panitia ini bertugas mengkoordinasikan seluruh rangkaian kegiatan, bekerja sama dengan berbagai organisasi kemasyarakatan (ormas) dan otoritas setempat. Sambutan hangat juga disampaikan oleh Wali Kota Pontianak.

Sebagai Kepala Kantor Wilayah Kementerian Agama Provinsi Kalimantan Barat, kehadiran kami dalam pelepasan pawai obor ini menjadi bagian dari dukungan terhadap syiar Islam dan penguatan nilai-nilai keagamaan di tengah masyarakat. Pawai obor bukan sekadar tradisi seremonial, tetapi merupakan ekspresi nyata rasa keberagamaan, kebersamaan, dan kebahagiaan umat Islam dalam menyambut datangnya bulan suci Ramadan.

Ribuan peserta yang terlibat menunjukkan antusiasme dan semangat persatuan. Cahaya obor yang menerangi malam menjadi simbol harapan, penerangan hati, serta komitmen untuk menyambut Ramadan dengan kesiapan iman dan amal.

Momentum ini juga memperlihatkan sinergi yang baik antara pemerintah provinsi, pemerintah kota, panitia pelaksana, tokoh agama, dan seluruh elemen masyarakat. Diharapkan kegiatan seperti ini terus menjadi media edukasi spiritual, mempererat ukhuwah, serta memperkuat harmoni kehidupan beragama di Kalimantan Barat.

📢 Fariin Muhiim ah oo Ku Socota Dhalinyarada Rabta Inay Ka Faa’iideystaan Coursera & Kiron

Waxaa la ii soo diray fariimo badan oo ka imanaya dhalinyaro jecel inay wax bartaan, iskuna dayaya inay ka faa’iideystaan Coursera iyo Kiron. 

Su’aalaha inta badan la i weydiiyay waxay ahaayeen:

1.Ma khasab baa in la dalbado Financial Aid?
2. Dadkii dalbaday oo dhameeyay course-ka maxaa shahaadada lacag looga rabay?
3.Kuwa iska diiwaangaliyay Kiron iyagoo aan wax documents dirin ma sugayaan jawaab?

Marka hore, waxaan rabaa inaan cadeeyo:

Anigu wixii aan aqoon u leeyahay oo kaliya ayaan idinla wadaagayaa. Waxaa laga yaabaa inay jiraan dad iga aqoon badan arrintaan, balse khibradeyda ayaan halkaan ku sharaxayaa si aan uga wada faa’iideysano.

🔎 Farqiga u dhexeeya Financial Aid & Kiron

Dad badan waxay isku qaldaan labada arrimood.

🔹 Financial Aid waa codsi aad si toos ah uga dalbaneyso Coursera si laguu siiyo fursad aad ku barato course bilaash ama qiimo dhimis leh.

 Laakiin mararka qaar shahaadada weli lacag ayaa laga rabaa ama codsiga waa la diidi karaa.

🔹 Kiron se waa hay’ad si gaar ah u xaqiijisa (verify) ardayda, kadibna kuu oggolaanaysa inaad si buuxda uga faa’iideysato Coursera adigoo helaya shahaado bilaash ah — haddii aad hesho Verified Status.

✅ Sida Saxda ah ee Loo Helo Fursadda Bilaashka ah

Khibradeyda shaqsiga ah:
1️⃣ Waxaan si sax ah iskaga diiwaangeliyay Kiron.
2️⃣ Waxaan diray sawir cad oo passport-ka Soomaaliyeed ah (document sax ah).

PRESIDENT RUTO LEADS KDF DAY CELEBRATIONS IN HONOUR OF FALLEN HEROES

The Commander-in-Chief of the Defence Forces and President of the Republic of Kenya, William Ruto, on 14th October 2025, led the 13th Kenya Defence Forces (KDF) Day celebrations at Moi Barracks, Eldoret. The solemn national event brought together personnel of the Kenya Defence Forces serving locally and abroad to honour fallen heroes and reaffirm their commitment to national service.

Held under the theme “Enhancing a Soldier-Centric Approach Towards Mission Readiness for National Security and Development,” the commemoration emphasized welfare, resilience, professionalism, and operational readiness. President Ruto laid a wreath at the 9 Kenya Rifles Monument in remembrance of fallen soldiers, inspected a guard of honour, toured innovation exhibitions, and commissioned a 2,700 kWh solar power project at Moi Barracks and the Defence Forces Recruit Training School to enhance sustainability and energy efficiency.

In his address, the President commended the KDF for discipline, innovation, and nation-building contributions, including infrastructure development such as Talanta Stadium and peace stabilization efforts in the North Rift. He reaffirmed the government's commitment to modernizing equipment, strengthening intelligence capabilities, and improving soldier welfare. He also lauded the establishment of the Ulinzi Construction Company, pledging to equip it fully to drive infrastructure growth and economic transformation, noting that mission readiness extends beyond combat to service, border security, and development.

Chief of the Defence Forces, Charles Kahariri, paid tribute to service members and their families, describing them as the backbone of KDF’s resilience and operational strength. Across the country, parallel commemorations were held at Defence Headquarters in Nairobi, Mtongwe Naval Base in Mombasa, and Air Force bases in Moi and Laikipia, where leaders emphasized unity, mental health awareness, and renewed dedication to duty.

Kenyan troops deployed abroad under the African Union Support and Stabilization Mission in Somalia (AUSSOM) and the United Nations Organization Stabilization Mission in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (MONUSCO) also marked the day with remembrance ceremonies, interfaith prayers, and reaffirmation of Kenya’s peacekeeping commitment.

Observed annually on 14th October, KDF Day remains a powerful symbol of unity, sacrifice, and the enduring duty of those who wear the uniform — men and women committed to defending the Republic and advancing peace, security, and national development.

On Saturday evening, the Somali Community Association of Queensland (SCAQ) had the honour of hosting a special community forum welcoming His Excellency Faysal Ahmed Salad, Ambassador of the Federal Republic of Somalia to Australia and his Secretary Huda Yasin.  

The Ambassador addressed the community and provided important updates regarding the role of the Embassy and how it will continue to support Somali Australians, including consular services, community engagement, and strengthening connections with our homeland.

The event was well attended by elders, youth, women, community leaders, and stakeholders, reflecting the unity and strength of our community here in Brisbane.

We thank His Excellency for his open dialogue and commitment to collaboration, and we appreciate all community members who attended and contributed to this important discussion. Together, we look forward to building a stronger partnership between the Embassy and our community.

O Índice de Percepção da Corrupção (IPC) de 2025, divulgado pela Transparência Internacional, aponta avanço da corrupção inclusive em democracias consolidadas. O levantamento, em sua 31ª edição, avaliou mais de 180 países e territórios com base na percepção de corrupção no setor público.

O Brasil manteve a 107ª posição entre 182 nações, com 35 pontos, sua pior colocação histórica. O país ficou abaixo da média global, abaixo dos índices apresentados em 2020, durante o governo Bolsonaro, e abaixo da média das Américas.

O relatório destaca queda no número de países com parâmetros associados a uma governança limpa. Há dez anos eram 12, em 2025, apenas cinco. A Dinamarca lidera pelo oitavo ano consecutivo, seguida por Finlândia e Singapura.

Os Estados Unidos registraram sua menor pontuação histórica. A organização cita como motivos a deterioração do clima político, escândalos éticos na Suprema Corte e medidas que, segundo o relatório, envolvem politização de decisões e enfraquecimento da independência judicial. Países como Reino Unido, Canadá, Suécia, Nova Zelândia e França também registraram recuos.

O estudo também aponta declínios significativos desde 2012 em países como Turquia, Hungria e Nicarágua, associando-os a retrocessos democráticos e enfraquecimento institucional. Na América Latina, a entidade alerta para maior vulnerabilidade ser o crime organizado.

Mais de dois terços dos países avaliados ficaram em posições consideradas muito baixas. Entre os piores resultados estão Somália e Sudão do Sul e Líbia, Iêmen e Eritreia. O relatório cita avanços graduais em países como Albânia, Angola, Ucrânia e Uzbequistão.

📊 Durante el segundo año de mandato de Milei volvió a aumentar la corrupción

La Argentina registró un retroceso en el ranking mundial de transparencia elaborado por la ONG Transparencia Internacional. Según el último Índice de Percepción de la Corrupción (IPC), el país cayó del puesto 99 al 104 entre 182 naciones evaluadas durante el segundo año de gestión de Javier Milei.

📉 El informe, que mide la percepción de corrupción en el sector público a nivel global, ubica ahora a la Argentina en el mismo escalón que Belice y Ucrania.

🌎 En la comparación regional e internacional, el país quedó por detrás de Zambia, Lesoto, Gambia y República Dominicana.

🏆 En el extremo superior del ranking, los países considerados más transparentes son Dinamarca, Finlandia y Singapur.

🚨 En el fondo de la tabla aparecen Venezuela, Somalía y Sudán del Sur, señalados como los Estados con mayores niveles de corrupción percibida.

El IPC es uno de los indicadores más utilizados a nivel global para evaluar la calidad institucional y la integridad del sector público. La caída de cinco posiciones vuelve a poner el foco en los estándares de transparencia y control en la administración estatal argentina.

Security agencies in Jammu and Kashmir have frozen more than 8,000 mule bank accounts after uncovering their suspected use in digital hawala operations. Officials said the accounts were allegedly opened or controlled using fake, stolen, or misused identities and were used to move illicit funds through online channels. The action is part of an intensified crackdown on terror financing, cyber fraud, and money laundering, with agencies working closely with banks and financial intelligence units to trace suspicious transactions, disrupt illegal money flows, and strengthen safeguards within the digital banking system.

Someone sent me this from Somalia. They appear to be the elder cousins of OMENA. I'm told they're called king mackerel. Norway is the largest exporter of this fish, selling $734 million in 2024 alone. Curiously, China and Nigeria are the largest buyers/consumers of it. Nigeria, Ghana, and the Ivory Coast purchase 70.5% of all South Korean mackerel. In 2023, Korea sold $163 million worth of that fish. Somalia, with a 3,333-kilometer coastline, ought to have tapped this low-hanging fruit to create jobs and boost its economy. I've always said if they can't learn from Norway, they can always go to Busan Cooperative Fish Market in South Korea (sells 80% of all mackerel caught in Korean waters) and learn how to make the most from this fish. Imagine the distance from Somalia, say, to Nigeria is 4,200 by air, while Nigeria to South Korea is about 11,000 kilometers. Another example is Russia; in 2025, they imported this fish worth $160 million. What is the distance from Somalia to Russia? The leaders in Somalia must wake up and think outside the box.

#Centrafrique: Célébration du 1er anniversaire de l'Association Femmes Inspirantes et Solidaire (AFIS)

L'Association Femmes Inspirantes et Solidaire (AFIS) a célébré son premier anniversaire le dimanche 15 février 2026 au Restaurant Relais des Chasses. Dirigée par Mme Nadine Senzongo, AFIS est une association apolitique, laïque et à but non lucratif qui regroupe des femmes dynamiques et engagées issues de toutes les régions du pays et de la diaspora.

Cette occasion a permis de renforcer les liens entre les membres et de partager les objectifs de l'association, qui vise à promouvoir la solidarité et l'inspiration entre les femmes centrafricaines.

"تعيين الفنلندية من أصول صومالية "مريم عبدي افرح" في الإدارة العليا لمتحف العمارة والتصميم الجديد"

هلسنكي - 17 فبراير 2026 ( غرفة الأخبار )

أعلنت وزارة الثقافة الفنلندية، بالتعاون مع مجلس مدينة هلسنكي، عن تعيين السيدة "مريم عبدي افرح"، الخبيرة الفنلندية من أصول صومالية، عضوًا في المجلس التنفيذي.

كما تم تعيينها مديرةً لاستراتيجيات الشمول الثقافي في «متحف العمارة والتصميم الجديد» (AD Museum)، لتكون مسؤولة عن تعزيز التنوع والمشاركة المجتمعية في هذا الصرح الثقافي الكبير.

ويُعد متحف العمارة والتصميم الجديد أحد أكبر المشاريع الثقافية في شمال أوروبا، والمقرر افتتاحه بالكامل بحلول عام 2030، مما يعكس أهمية الدور القيادي للسيدة "مريم عبدي افرح" في تطوير المشهد الثقافي الفنلندي.

ويُعد هذا التعيين خطوة بارزة في مسار تحديث المؤسسات الثقافية الفنلندية، ويعكس توجهًا رسميًا لتعزيز التعددية الثقافية وإشراك الكفاءات ذات الخلفيات المتنوعة في مواقع صنع القرار داخل المؤسسات الوطنية الكبرى.

وتُعتبر "مريم أفرح " من أوائل الشخصيات الفنلندية من أصول صومالية التي تتولى منصبًا تنفيذيًا بهذا المستوى في قطاع المتاحف الوطنية

حيث ستتولى مسؤولية تطوير السياسات المتعلقة بالشمول الثقافي، وضمان تمثيل التنوع المجتمعي الفنلندي في المعارض الدائمة، والبرامج التعليمية، والأنشطة الثقافية للمتحف الجديد.

كما يُنتظر أن تسهم خبرتها المهنية في مجال الإدارة الثقافية والعمل المؤسسي في تعزيز دور المتحف كمنصة للحوار الثقافي والتبادل المعرفي.

هذا في وقت تسعى فيه فنلندا إلى إعادة تعريف دور المؤسسات الثقافية الكبرى بوصفها فضاءات للتفاعل المجتمعي وبناء جسور التفاهم بين مختلف مكونات المجتمع.

ويأتي هذا التعيين ضمن جهود فنلندا لترسيخ نموذج ثقافي أكثر شمولًا وتمثيلًا للتنوع السكاني، بالتزامن مع مشاريع استراتيجية تهدف إلى جعل هلسنكي مركزًا إقليميًا للعمارة والتصميم والثقافة الحديثة في أوروبا الشمالية.

Yurub oo kordhinaysa doodda ku saabsan hubka nukliyeerka

Ra’iisul Wasaarihii hore ee Finland Sanna Marin ayaa sheegtay in inkastoo ay qalbiyan tahay qof nabad jecel, haddana ay fahamsan tahay xaqiiqda ah in nabadda mararka qaar lagu ilaaliyo awood ciidan iyo hannaan cabsi-gelin ah. Marin ayaa tilmaantay in Yurub ay u baahan tahay inay si wadajir ah uga dooddo arrimaha la xiriira hubka nukliyeerka, isla markaana ay muhiim tahay in wadamada qaaraddu iskaashi sameeyaan.

Hadalkan ayaa yimid xilli doodaha amniga Yurub ay sii xoogeysanayaan. Shirkii amniga ee Munich Security Conference, Ra’iisul Wasaaraha Jarmalka Friedrich Merz ayaa shaaciyay inuu wadahadallo hordhac ah la yeeshay Madaxweynaha Faransiiska Emmanuel Macron, kuwaas oo ku saabsan suuragalnimada in Jarmalku ka faa’iideysto dalladda nukliyeerka ee Faransiiska.

Sidoo kale, Madaxweynaha Poland Karol Nawrocki ayaa sheegay in dalkiisa ay tahay inuu bilaabo qorshe lagu horumarinayo difaac ku dhisan awood nukliyeer, isagoo xusay khatarta amni ee ka imanaysa Ruushka.

Doodahan isdaba joogga ah ayaa muujinaya in dalalka Yurub ay dib u qiimeyn ku sameynayaan istaraatiijiyadahooda difaac, iyadoo si gaar ah loo eegayo doorka hubka nukliyeerka ee ilaalinta amniga qaaradda.

Qalbigeennu wuxuu ku jiraa walwal iyo murugo, balse rajadeennu waxay ku xirantahay Alle SWT oo wax kasta awood u leh. Waxaan idinka baryayaa inaad u ducaysaan

Haddii uu geeriyooday, inuu Alle u naxariisto, qabrigiisana u waasiciyo, jannatul Firdowsana ka waraabiyo
Inuu Alle qalbiyadeenna samir iyo iimaan nagu siiyo
Fadlan ku xusuusta ducadiinna, gaar ahaan waqtiyada la aqbalo ducada.

Somali Community Worldwide Service (SCWS), in collaboration with the Urban Refugee Youth Network and their partner hospital, Gombe Medical Service (GMS), organized a free medical outreach for Somali refugee women.

During the program, professional gynecologists and physicians provided essential medical check-ups and consultations at no cost. Many women received important screenings and discovered health conditions they were previously unaware of.

The participants expressed sincere gratitude to GMS Hospital for their generosity, professionalism, and commitment to supporting vulnerable communities. 

Initiatives like this play a vital role in improving health awareness, promoting early detection, and strengthening community trust in healthcare services.

The Somali community has over 108,000 people in Minnesota, just about 2% of the state's population. "About 44% of those children are under 17, which is an interesting statistic. A younger population," Bruce Corrie, an economist who studies local immigrant populations, said. WCCO asked Corrie what the group's contribution has been to the workforce. "Somalis are concentrated in certain sectors. Healthcare, transportation, retail. They are also very entrepreneurial, and as we go to places like the Karmel Mall, you see so many entrepreneurs and some own multiple businesses," he said. Corrie added that in three generations in Minnesota, there's a rising number of professionals. And they spend $1 billion a year.

Xiisad siyaasadeed oo cusub oo ku xeeran wada xaajoodyada Gaza, Mahmoud Mardawi, oo ah hogaamiye sare oo ka tirsan Dhaqdhaqaaqa Iska caabinta Islaamiga ah (Hamas), ayaa xaqiijiyay diidmada guud ee dhaqdhaqaaqa ee kama dambaysta ah ee hub ka dhigista oo uu sheegay sarkaal Israa'iili ah. 

Muddada kama dambaysta ah ayaa lagu soo waramayaa in ay u oggolaatay dhaqdhaqaaqa muddo 60 maalmood ah inay ku soo dhiibaan dhammaan hubkooda. 

Mardawi waxa uu caddeeyey in khatarta ah in dib loo bilaabo dagaalka Marinka Gaza aanay wax sal ah ku lahayn wada-xaajoodyada socda. 

Hadallo uu siiyay Al-Jazeera Mubasher ee barnaamijka “Al-Masaiya”, ayuu Mardaawi ku sheegay in xarakadu aysan helin wax ogeysiis rasmi ah oo ku saabsan go’aankan oo kale. 

Waxa uu sharraxay in bayaannada ay soo saareen Ra’iisal-wasaaraha Israa’iil ee Benjamin Netanyahu iyo warbaahinta Cibraaniga ay yihiin kaliya hanjabaad siyaasadeed iyo mid warbaahineed, oo aanay qayb ka ahayn wax heshiis ama isfaham ah oo hadda miiska wada-xaajoodka saaran. La-taliye sare oo Netanyahu ayaa horey ugu dhawaaqay in "Israa'iil" ay doonayso in ay siiso Hamas daaqad 60-maalmood ah si ay si buuxda hubka uga dhigto, iyada oo ku hanjabtay in ay dib u bilaabi doonto hawlgallada milatari haddii dhaqdhaqaaqa uu diido. 

Digniin Qarax Gobolka ah Mardaawi oo ka jawaabaya halista ku soo laabashada dagaalka, waxa uu ka digay in xiisad kasta oo milatari ka dib wakhtiga kama dambaysta ah ay saamayn weyn ku yeelan doonto gobolka.

Waxa uu carabka ku adkeeyay in "Falastiiniyiintu aysan isdhiibin oo aysan kor u qaadi doonin calanka cad." 

Mardawi waxa uu intaa ku daray in siyaasadaha qabsashada Israa’iil ee Daanta Galbeed iyo Quds (Jerusalem) ay ka dhigan tahay “dagaal diimeed” halkii ay ka ahaan lahaayeen hawl-gallo milatari oo kaliya, isaga oo soo xiganaya qabsashada goobo diimeed iyo barakicinta iyo hawlgallada isku xidhka ee looga dan leeyahay in lagu beddelo aqoonsiga Quds. 

Diidmada Barakaca iyo u hogaansanaanta Dhulka:

Hogaamiyaha Xamaas ayaa tilmaamay in siyaasadahan ay uga dan leeyihiin in ay Falastiiniyiinta ku riixaan in ay u tahriibaan wadamada dariska gaar ahaan Urdun. 

Waxa uu carabka ku adkeeyay in tani "aan la gaari doonin sababtoo ah dadka reer Falastiin waxay weli u heellan yihiin dhulkooda, degaankooda, iyo tuulooyinkooda inkastoo go'doominta iyo dilka joogtada ah ee Gaza iyo Daanta Galbeed." 

Ku Baaqa Midnimada Falastiin iyo Mowqif Carbeed:

Mardawi ayaa shaaca ka qaaday in uu socdo wadahadal u dhaxeeya kooxaha Falastiiniyiinta, oo ay ku jiraan maamulka Falastiiniyiinta iyo Fatax, si loo gaaro mawqif mideysan oo ka dhan ah Yahuudda iyo qabsashada dhulka ee ka dhacaya Daanta Galbeed. 

Waxa uu ka digay in maqnaanshaha midnimada qaranku ay khatar gelinayso qadiyadda Falastiin, isaga oo carabka ku adkeeyay sida ay lagama maarmaanka u tahay in la sameeyo mawqif midaysan oo Carab iyo Islaami ah si looga hortago siyaasadaha qabsashada Israa’iil loona ilaaliyo dhulka iyo goobaha barakaysan.
