Golaha Fatwada iyo Cilmi‑baarista Yurub ayaa ku dhawaaqay in Khamiista la bilaabayo soonka bisha Ramadaan.
Sidoo kale, Golaha Masaajidda Soomaalida ee Jarmalka ayaa sheegay inay badankood raacayaan go’aankaas, iyadoo masaajiddo badan ay shaaciyeen in Khamiista la soomayo.
Dalal kale oo ka tirsan Yurub ayaa iyaguna qaatay isla go’aankan.

Guddoomiye Goobdoon Somaliswiss Diaspora oo ka warbixinaya siminaarka Integration ee lagu qabtay magaalada Zürich ayaa ku booriyay dhalinyarada Soomaaliyeed inay ka faa’iideystaan fursadaha aqoon-kororsi iyo is-dhexgal ee la heli karo.

Guddoomiyuhu wuxuu sheegay in siminaarkani uu muhiim u yahay dhalinyarada si ay u bartaan nidaamka nolosha, waxbarashada, shaqo raadinta iyo la qabsiga bulshada Switzerland. Wuxuu xusay in barnaamijyadan ay gacan ka geystaan horumarinta mustaqbalka dhalinyarada, isla markaana ay u sahlaan inay fahmaan xuquuqdooda iyo waajibaadkooda.

Sidoo kale wuxuu ku dhiirrigeliyay dhammaan dhalinyarada inay si firfircoon uga qeyb qaataan siminaarrada noocan oo kale ah, maadaama ay yihiin fursad lagu helo aqoon, khibrad iyo is-barasho bulsho.

Yasmin Abdi caruurnimadeedi iyada iyo qosykeeda waxay qaxooti ahaan ugu guureen Maraykanka. 

Iyadoo yar ayay xiisayn jirtay teknoolojiyadda iyo hacking-ga, xitaa waxay kala furfuri jirtay telefonnada si ay u fahanto sida ay u shaqeeyaan. 

Jaamacadda Maryland ayay ka baratay Computer Science (cybersecurity) kadibna waxay deeq waxbarasho ka heshay Google. 

Tababaro (internships) ayay u samaysay shirkado waaweyn sida Google, Meta iyo Snap — taasoo albaab u furtay shaqooyin waaweyn. 

Heerka ay gaartay (Shaqo & Ganacsi) 

Shirkadaha waaweyn Waxay ka shaqeysay Google, Meta iyo Snap (Snapchat) dhinaca amniga software-ka iyo ilaalinta xogta. 

Waxay noqotay gabadhii madow ee ugu horeysay ee injineer ka noqota Snap, 

Nidaamyadii ay dhistay waxay caawiyeen ilaalinta xogta boqolaal milyan oo isticmaaleyaal ah maalin kasta. 

Waxay ka mid ahayd aas-aasayaashii Meemo, app AI-ah oo maaliyadeed. 

App-kaas waxaa lagu iibsaday $95 milyan sanadkii 2021 — guul weyn oo Silicon Valley ah. 

CEO & hoggaamiye 

Waxay aasaastay shirkad cybersecurity ah oo la yiraahdo noHack, halkaas oo ay CEO ka tahay. 

Shirkaddu waxay bixisaa:
qiimeyn khataro cyber
naqshad software ammaan ah
tababar amni digital
difaac AI-ku caawiyo 

Waxaa la sheegay in ay Somalia ka caawisay Dhisida badqabka cybersecurity-ga kadib markii dhawaan la jabsaday nidaamki E-VISA 

Waxay ku guuleysatay abaalmarinta Innovation of the Year Award (2024) 

Waxaa loo aqoonsaday mid ka mid ah dadka Soomaalida ugu saamaynta badan teknoolojiyadda.

Kooxda Galatasaray ayaa soo bandhigtay soo laabasho cajiib ah qeybtii dambe ee ciyaarta.

Juventus ayaa qeybtii hore ku hogaamineysay 2-1 (labada gool waxaa dhaliyay Teun Koopmeiners), laakiin qeybtii dambe Galatasaray ayaa garoonka la wareegtay iyagoo dhaliyay 4 gool!

Xaaladda Juventus ayaa sii xumaatay markii Juan Cabal casaan la siiyay daqiiqadii 67-aad (xilligaas oo ciyaartu ahayd 3-2), taasoo keentay in Galatasaray ay labo gool oo kale raacsato.

Xiddigaha kala ah Noa Lang (2), Gabriel Sara, Davinson Sanchez iyo Sacha Boey ayaa dhaliyay goolasha lagu xasuuqay Juventus. 

Juventus, hadda waxaa loo diray buur dheer oo ay tahay inay ka talaabaan lugta labaad!

post_author_name_pi: Midowga Ardayda Kulliyadda Injineeriya Ee Jaamacadda Ummadda Soomaaliyeed
post_text_pi:
🌙 RAMADAAN KARIIM

Midowga Ardayda Kulliyadda Injineeriyadda ee Jaamacadda Ummadda Soomaaliyeed (JUS) waxuu hambalyo ku aaddan munaasabadda bisha barakeysan ee Ramadaan udirayaa dhammaan muslimiinta caalamka si gaar ah bahda wax barashada ee jaamacadda Ummadda Soomaaliyeed. 

Ramadaan waa bil kheyr, iyo dambi dhaafba ku suntan  waana fursad qaali ah oo sanadkiiba mar inasoo marta. Allah naga yeelo kuwii kafaaideysta.
Iyadoo sanadkan dalkeenna ay ka jiraan abaaro baahsan oo saameyn ku yeeshay qoysas badan oo danyar ah, waxaan ku baaqeynaa in aan muujinno dareenkeenna walaaltinimo iyo ka qeyb qaadashada afurinta kuweenna danyarta ah.

Waxaan Alle (SWT) ka baryeynaa inuu naga dhigo kuwii ka faa’iideysta bishan barakeysan, acmaasheenna aqbalo, dalkeenana ka dulqaado dhibaatada abaaraha, kana yeelo Ramadaan nabad iyo barwaaqo lagu gaaro.

     RAMADAAN MUBAARAK

DAGAAL SOKEEYE OO LAGA DHIGAY MID ARGAGAXISO CAALAMI AH.
Dalalka Afghanistaan iyo Ciraaq oo ay ka jireen dagaaĺlo sokeeye u  dhaxeeyey bulshooyinkii ku noolaa dalalkaas, kuwaasoo loo sababay  arrimmo siyaasadeed, mid bulsho iyo dhaqaale.
11 September 2001 dagaaladoodii ee sokeeye waxay isu bedeshay dagaal caalamka uga soo  horjeeddo ka hortagga argagixisadda isaga gudba qaaradaha (  international terrorism ).
Somalia waxaa dagaalkeeddii ee sokeeye si rasmi ah isagu bedelay mid argagaxiso  markii midowga maxkamadaha islaamka gacanta ku dhigeen Caasimaddii  dalka iyo ku dhawaaqidooddii jihaad ka dhan ah ciidamadda Ethiopia ( 2006 ).

Ku dhawaaqidii jihaadka oo loo fasiray iney aheyd in dalka Somalia  noqdo meel gabood iyo xarun abaabul u ah dhammaan ururadda islaamiga ee  xukun doonka ah. 
Dhinaca kalena, waxaa dad badani aaminsan yihiin;  la dagaallanka argagixisnimadda inuu bedelay dagaalkii qaboobaa ( cold  war ) ee ka dhexeyn jiray is gaashaanbuursigii ( Nato & Warsaw ) ee  leysu adeegsan jiray awr kiraaleyaal dagaal ( proxy war ).

Dariiqa ama wadadda waa dheer tahay oo waxaa weli jidka ku soo jira   dalalka Syrië, Libië, Sudan iyo Yemen oo weli ku dhex jira mowjadaha  dagaalladda sokeeye.
Waxaa la yiri; guud ahaan shucuubta  muslimiinta, gaar ahaan ummadda Somalida waa dad wax akhriyo (أمة  الاقراء) laakin aan waxba garanin ama fahmin Siyaasadda. 
Sidaas si la mid ah siyaasadda waa jecel nahay oo waa akhrinaa, laakin ma fahamno mana garanno biyo shubkeedda ( no comprehension ).

Weriyanimadu Baaluq ayey u Baahan tahay.  

Waxa aan arkay inan Somali-American ah oo baraha bulshada la wareejinayo oo cay iyo af-lagaado lagu miisayo.  Inantu waa yaasmiin Cabdi, waa inan cilmiga Tignoolajiyada ku takhakhustay; iyada oo da’yarna guul qofnimo iyo mid dhaqaaleba gaadhey.  Hadda ka hor ayaan arkayey dad inanta wareejinaya oo leh ‘ma Xijaabna.”  Marka ugu horaysa inantani Maraykan ayey ku dhalatay, waxan ay u badan tahay in ay ka akhlaaq badan tahay Kuwo badan oo “Xijaaban.”  Qofka Ilaahay uun baa xisaabin kara. Haddii Ilaahay laga baqayo gabdhaha Soomaalida ah ee dharka tuurtay tiktok-na is walaaqaya, waxa ay u badan yihiin kuwo dhulkii jooga.  Kuwaas ayaa waano u baahan. Waxa waano u baahan kuwa waddankii jooga ee masaajida kabaha ka xada.  Waxa waano u baahan, dhiigyo cabyada dadka dila. Waxa waano u baahan kuwa xoolaha dadweynaha xada, ee aan weligood shay xalaal ah cunin.  Waxa waano u baahan adigaa qaaqlaha ah ee aan habeen edeb iyo akhlaaq midna meel kula hoyan.  Aniga oo aan qaaqla yaasha tooda ku dheeraan; waxa erey mudan, ninkan weriyaha sheegtay Abdijaliil Osman ee inta uu la balamay; adduunka ku shaaciyey inaan direeskeedu xurmo lahayn (Dress code), Aanan u malaynayo in uu waraysigiiba joojiyey.  
Horta inantaasi iyada ayaa meel iskaga dhacday; waayo qof weriyenimada galay isaga oo aan baaluqin; waxa uu Sharaf dilayaa qofkii uu waraysanayey.  Haddii qofku wariye ruug caddaa ah yahay kuma mashquulo qofka lebiskiisa amaba fekerka ay isku khilaafsan yihiin.  Gabadhaasna meel ayuu kaga dhacay, mana istaahilo in waraysi la siiyo.  Awal telifoon ayaa lala wareegi jirey; laakiin maanta waxa soo batay; in inan yar oo laba boqol oo doolar awooda laba makarafoon inta uu qol dhigto; ileyn qof taba baran maahee, waxa uu doono ku hadaaqo.  Wariye nimadu waxa ay u baahan tahay waayeelnimo iyo inuu qofku leeyahay waayo-aragnimo soofaysan oo hadalka siduu yahay u kala jarta.

On 13/02, SHEWISE delivered a powerful workshop on domestic abuse and harmful practices with the Somali senior Citizen centre in Tower Hamlets.

We discussed coercive control, emotional and economic abuse, forced marriage, and FGM, creating space for honest dialogue and shared experiences.

With 2.3 million people experiencing domestic abuse annually in England and Wales, and hundreds of forced marriage cases supported each year by the Forced Marriage Unit, community education remains critical.

We also acknowledged the global impact of FGM, including its high prevalence in Somalia, and the importance of culturally informed prevention work within diaspora communities.

Grateful to the women who shared their strength and resilience. The conversation continues.

𝗬𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗶𝗻 𝗖𝗮𝗯𝗱𝗶 waxay ahayd gabar qaxooti ku gashay dalka Maraykanka, halkaas oo ay ku qaadatay waxbarashadeeda heer jaamacadeed, gaar ahaan Jaamacadda University of Maryland. Waxay ahayd ardaydii kaliya ee madow ee fasalkeeda dhigata.

Yasmiin waxay noqotay qofkii ugu horreeyay ee dhista nidaam amni (security system) oo ilaalinaya xogta shirkadda Snapchat, kaas oo ka hortagay in la jabsado xogta in ka badan 850 milyan oo isticmaaleyaal ah.

Kadib, waxay aasaastay shirkad gaar ah oo ka shaqaysa cyber security, taas oo ka ilaalisa ganacsiyada yaryar in laga qaato madaxfurasho (ransom) ama la jabsado mareegahooda. Muddo kooban gudaheed, waxay ka hortagtay in ka badan 120 weerar oo afduub xogeed ah, iyada oo badbaadisay shirkado badan.

Sidoo kale, waxay samaysay barnaamij maaliyadeed oo ku shaqeeya AI, loona bixiyey Memo (AI Finance App), kaas oo ay markii dambe ka iibisay shirkadda Coinbase qiimo dhan 95 milyan oo doollar.

Yasmiin waxay casharro muhiim ah ka jeedisay shirweynaha AfroTech oo ku saabsanaa amniga internetka (cyber security), halkaas oo ay ka soo qaybgaleen in ka badan 35,000 qof isugana jiray muslim iyo gaal oo doonayay inay ka faa’iidaystaan aqoonta ay la wadaagtay.

Dadaal iyo shaqo joogto ah awgeed, waxay ka mid noqotay 18 qof oo ku guulaystay deeqda waxbarasho ee Google’s Code Next/Success Scholarship, tartankaas oobsoo codsadeen malaayiin qof oo Maraykan ah lakin iyadu noqotay 18qof kaliya ee guulaystay. (Bal suurayso  dadaalka ay u gashay)

Sanadkii 2022, waxay si weyn uga yaabisay dunida markii ay dhistay shirkaddeeda caanka ah ee “NoHack”, oo adeegsanaysa AI si ay uga hortagto jebinta amniga (security breaches) kahor inta aysan dhicin.

Hadda, Yasmiin waxay wadaa barnaamijyo ay ku tababarto hablaha madow si ay ugu biiraan culuumta AI iyo cyber security.

Ujeeddadu waa in laga faa’iidaysto aqoonta iyo safarkeeda guusha, si aan casharro uga baranno dadaalka iyo halganka ay soo martay.

Somali IT Professional Yasmin Abdi Gains Attention in Global Tech Circles Amid Online Debate

A Somali cybersecurity professional, Yasmin Abdi Qaraare, has recently drawn public attention on social media following claims about her role in the international technology sector and her involvement in cybersecurity initiatives. Supporters have praised her as a Somali woman working in the global IT field, highlighting her participation in technology conferences and her specialization in cybersecurity and information technology.

According to publicly available event profiles and conference listings, Yasmin Abdi has been presented as a cybersecurity expert and founder associated with tech and security initiatives, and she has reportedly participated in international technology events. Her professional focus is described as being in areas such as data security, privacy, and digital protection—fields that are increasingly critical in today’s technology-driven world.

Her visibility has sparked widespread discussion within Somali online communities, where many have celebrated her as a role model for young Somali students pursuing careers in IT, engineering, and digital innovation. Observers note that representation in global technology spaces, including cybersecurity and software sectors, is often limited, making the emergence of Somali professionals in such fields a source of pride and motivation for the diaspora and youth in Somalia.

However, some claims circulating on social media—particularly those suggesting major financial achievements and large-scale tech acquisitions—have not been independently verified by major international technology media outlets. Analysts caution that viral narratives can sometimes amplify unconfirmed figures, and they emphasize the importance of distinguishing between verified professional milestones and unverified promotional claims.

Despite this, commentators argue that the core focus should remain on educational and professional advancement rather than personal scrutiny. Critics have also expressed concern over online discourse that shifts attention toward personal appearance, clothing, or clan-based commentary, rather than professional qualifications and technical contributions.

Technology experts and community leaders stress that discussions about Somali professionals in global industries should prioritize merit, skills, and impact. They warn that tribal or personal attacks risk discouraging young professionals—especially women—from entering competitive fields such as cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and software engineering.

As Somalia and its global diaspora continue to expand their presence in the digital economy, figures associated with international tech platforms and cybersecurity initiatives are increasingly seen as symbolic of a broader shift toward knowledge-based careers. Advocates say that encouraging education in STEM fields and supporting emerging professionals will be more productive than engaging in divisive or speculative online debates.

Ultimately, the growing conversation surrounding Yasmin Abdi reflects a larger societal issue: how emerging Somali professionals in global industries are perceived, discussed, and represented in the digital age. For many supporters, her story—regardless of online exaggerations—highlights the importance of education, professionalism, and constructive recognition in shaping the future of Somali participation in the global technology sector.
By Dahir Alasow

Dr. #OMAR #OSMAN #RABEH "ILLAHAY HAA KUU NAXARIISTO " 🤲🏼🤲🏼🤲🏼💔💔💔👇🏾👇🏾👇🏾

🫱🫱🫱 Il y a 50 ans, un commando du mouvement FLCS kidnappait un car de ramassage scolaire français et l’emmenait jusque devant le poste frontière somalien de Loyada. 30 heures plus tard, les forces françaises donnèrent l’assaut. La victoire est principalement politique. Cette tragédie intimement liée à l’indépendance du pays m’intriguait depuis que je me suis penché sur notre histoire. Des questions taraudaient mon esprit :
1. Pourquoi la Somalie, qu’on disait acquise à la cause djiboutienne, n’a-t-elle pas laissé le bus franchir le barrage, l’exposant à l’assaut du commando français ?
2. Quelle influence cette tragédie a eue sur la destinée du pays et de son peuple ?

J’ai eu la chance de rencontrer Rabeh. Notre échange sur cette tragédie a été long et douloureux. J’ai trouvé un homme plein de regret. Il aurait préféré que les choses se passent autrement. J’avais appris de source sûre que l’idée du kidnapping venait d’officiers somaliens et non du comité central du FLCS. Ce que m’a confirmé Rabeh. Me vient alors la brûlante question du pourquoi. Pour Rabeh, la prise d’otages de Loyada était un piège ourdi contre le mouvement. D’ailleurs, la majorité du comité n’était pas en faveur de cela. Pour mieux comprendre, il faut revenir une année en arrière, en 1975. La Somalie avait discrètement négocié avec la France. En contrepartie de sa non-ingérence, elle avait obtenu la garantie que la France serait neutre vis-à-vis du différend frontalier Éthio-somalien et à ce que la puissance coloniale réoriente la politique intérieure du TFAI en faveur des leaders somalis au détriment des Afars. La seule exigence de la France a été la liquidation pure et simple du mouvement FLCS.

Rabeh dira dans son livre Le cercle et la spirale : [...] Car la Somalie, il faut bien le dire, ne voyait en fait le FLCS que comme un élément, comme une donnée de sa politique de Grande Somalie, principalement axée sur la perspective de libération de la Somalie occidentale. Ce qui expliquait, entre autres, la passivité volontaire de l'armée somalienne dans l'affaire du bus à Loyada (1976) lorsque les forces françaises envahirent le village. Mogadiscio entendait éviter tout accrochage sur ses flancs, et notamment avec l'importante base militaire française de Djibouti. Ces considérations déterminèrent la manière dont la RDS brada pour ainsi dire l'indépendance de la « Somalie Française ».
 
Le grain de sable capable d’enrayer cette machine bien huilée était bien le FLCS. La France pouvait compter sur le LPAI, favorable à un transfert de pouvoir contrairement à l’indépendance totale à la Sékou Touré prônée par le mouvement. 

Rabeh, amer, écrira : « […] la France, la RDS, l'Éthiopie et la LPAI pouvaient, par un accord de fait, et bien que poursuivant des objectifs différents, s'entendre tacitement sur l'élimination préalable du FLCS : la France n'envisageait nullement que le Front prît le pouvoir à Djibouti ; cela bouleverserait les données dans la Corne d'Afrique. »
« La magie de Giscard consista à transvaser tout un régime de la période coloniale à celle de la liberté et de l'indépendance. Souveraineté signifia continuité et non pas rupture avec le passé. » (Le cercle et la spirale)

La Somalie saisit cette occasion pour envoyer les principaux dirigeants du FLCS en prison. Rabeh et ses camarades se retrouvèrent dans une prison appelée Laanta Buro à 60 km de Mogadiscio, sans procès. Ils y restèrent pendant environ 13 mois, le temps que ceux qui étaient prêts pour le transfert du pouvoir partent négocier à Paris et que l'indépendance soit proclamée. Il a fallu donc ériger le piège de Loyada en héroïsme pour légitimer d'un côté le transfert de pouvoir qu'on faisait passer pour une indépendance et d'autre part pour alimenter le " mythe du grand frère somali". Il a fallu créer de toutes pièces ce mythe du grand frère somalien à qui nous devons tant. Et jusqu’à aujourd’hui, nous sommes embrigadés dans ce mythe qui participe pleinement au processus d’infantilisation. Il fallait justifier tout cela et donner une couronne à chacun pour préserver les apparences. La Somalie, c’est le grand frère, le sauveur de Djibouti des griffes du colon. Le FLCS a, par son héroïsme, précipité l’indépendance, forçant la France à négocier. 

Un jeu de dupes. Le piège s’est subtilement refermé sur le mouvement qui, décapité, n’a plus jamais eu droit au chapitre. De ce jour du 3 février, découlent beaucoup d’autres tragédies qui endeuillent notre conscience collective, comme le meurtre de Janaleh, pour ne citer que celui-là. Puisqu’il a été question de que faire du reste du mouvement une fois les leaders en prison, il a été le seul à s’opposer à la dissolution pure et simple du mouvement. Que faire de plus de trois mille hommes ? Ceux qui avaient pris le pouvoir œuvraient dans la continuité de la puissance coloniale : ces hommes étaient les damnés de la République. Beaucoup furent bannis pour des raisons tribales. Très peu avaient été admis à fouler le territoire national. Les grands galonnés issus de l’armée coloniale ne firent qu’une bouchée d’eux. Quand le sergent de l’armée coloniale devenait capitaine, commandant ou général, les officiers du FLCS durent se contenter de caporal ou de deuxième classe. Très rapidement, ils furent accusés de rébellion ou de mutinerie et renvoyés de l’armée ou de la police. Ceux qui avaient trouvé un poste dans l’administration publique n’allaient pas mieux. 

Rabeh regrettait beaucoup cette prise d'otages. "Nous n'avions rien fait d'utile, disait-il, nous nous sommes nous-mêmes enchaînés et livrés à nos ennemis. C'est ce jour-là que le destin a basculé, en défaveur de Djibouti, quoiqu'on raconte autre chose aujourd'hui. Des milliers d’hommes sont subitement devenus des parias pour avoir voulu la liberté pour leur pays. Un homme que j’aimais bien a été assassiné à Loyada, là où quelques semaines auparavant l’armée française a tué nos camarades."
Et de là, notre discussion glissait vers ma seconde question : qu'a changé la tragédie de Loyada ?

C'est une question qui mérite d'être étudiée en profondeur. Pour Rabeh, c'est l'événement qui a précipité Djibouti vers un transfert de pouvoir, chose voulue par la LPAI. 

" Quand nous sommes sortis de prison, Djibouti était déjà là. Il y avait un président, des ministres que nous ne connaissions pas et qui ne nous connaissaient que de nom. Tout a été fait sans nous. À part quelques-uns qui ont rapidement changé de train en cours de route. Nous étions les intrus. Et eux les braves qui se sont sacrifiés pour l'indépendance. Il fallait se contenter des miettes et fermer sa gueule. Et moi, je n’ai pas pu la fermer. Tu sais la suite."

Je ne pouvais qu’être d’accord avec Rabeh. Le destin de Djibouti s’est retrouvé entre la France, la Somalie et la LPAI. La prise d’otages de Loyada n’a été que le sceau à la cire pour le sceller définitivement. Mais que savons-nous de cette période douloureuse, à part ce qu’ont écrit des Français, eux aussi victime de cette tragédie ? Rien. Tout comme Rabeh, je suis convaincu que le malheur de Djibouti a débuté le 3 février 1976. Tout le reste n’a été qu’une banale formalité. Alors que le peuple opprimé pendant plus d’un siècle attendait enfin la libération, il est plongé dans un cycle infernal de violences et d’oppressions.

Et les diamants noirs qui ont pris le pouvoir n’ont aucun intérêt à ce qu’il soit autrement. Il faut un jour faire le procès de la tragédie de Loyada pour que nous soyons enfin libérés de nos démons. Et pour que ce pays ne soit plus un désert d'histoire.

Marea rupere: momentul în care diaspora nu mai privește înapoi.

Statul român a făcut o greșeală fatală de calcul. A crezut că miliardele trimise de românii de afară vor curge la nesfârșit. A crezut că oamenii vor munci „la negru” sau „la stăpân” prin străinătate doar ca să trimită bani acasă, alimentând un sistem pe care îl detestă.

DAR REALITATEA I-A LOVIT CRUNT.

Marea Rupere s-a produs deja. Românii nu mai trimit doar bani; ei își mută viața definitiv. Întâi a plecat tatăl, apoi mama, apoi au tras copiii după ei. Astăzi, investițiile nu se mai întorc. Planurile de „reconstrucție a casei de la țară” au fost înlocuite cu rate la bănci din Germania, Anglia sau Spania.

OAMENII NU AU PLECAT DIN CAPRICIU, AU PLECAT DIN SCÂRBĂ.

S-au săturat să fie tratați ca niște „bancomate vii” de către o clasă politică arogantă. S-au săturat să vină în concediu și să plece cu un gust amar pentru că la orice ghișeu sunt priviți ca niște străini cărora li se cere „o atenție”.

Consecințele? Sunt economice, demografice și structurale. Rămânem în urmă cu un aparat de stat uriaș, dar fără contribuabilii care să îl mai poată ține în picioare. 

CÂND ÎNCREDEREA DISPARE, NU SE MAI REFACE PRIN DISCURSURI ELECTORALE.

Un om care a gustat respectul într-un spital din afară nu se va mai întoarce niciodată să aducă „fașe de acasă”. Un părinte care vede că fiul lui este evaluat pe merit la o școală străină nu îl va mai aduce înapoi în sistemul „pilelor” și al nepotismului.

Aceasta este Marea Rupere. Este tăcută, este dureroasă și, pentru mulți, este I RE VER SI BI LĂ.

Voi, cei de departe... în ce moment ați simțit că „ruptura” e definitivă? Ce v-a făcut să spuneți „nu mă mai întorc niciodată”?

Spuneți-vă povestea mai jos. E timpul ca cei de la putere să înțeleagă că nu mai au pe cine să păcălească.

Dacă vrei o Românie care să nu își mai alunge copiii, rămâi alături de noi. Apasă Follow. Aici suntem Oameni cu Sens.

Le #CODIR d'Orange Centrafrique a entamé un workshop stratégique sur le thème "Leadership numérique & Intelligence Artificielle" animé par les experts de DHI Centrafrique. L'objectif est de renforcer les compétences des dirigeants en matière de leadership numérique et d'IA pour relever les défis de la transformation digitale.

Cette initiative illustre l'engagement d'Orange Centrafrique à rester à la pointe de la technologie et le rôle central de DHI Centrafrique dans l'accompagnement des dirigeants africains vers une transformation numérique réussie

Après Ecobank Centrafrique, Le comité de direction (CODIR) d’Orange Centrafrique a entamé un workshop stratégique sur le thème  Leadership numérique & Intelligence Artificielle », animé par les experts de DHI Centrafrique, entreprise de transformation digitale.

Cette initiative vise à renforcer les compétences des dirigeants en matière de leadership numérique et d’Intelligence Artificielle, et à les préparer à relever les défis de la transformation digitale.

 DHI Centrafrique, entreprise de services numériques (ESN), accompagne les organisations dans la transformation digitale, l’IA, la cybersécurité, les solutions ERP & GED, et la formation exécutive, en combinant expertise technique et pédagogie adaptée aux dirigeants.

Objectifs du workshop :
* Développer les compétences des dirigeants d’Orange Centrafrique en leadership numérique et IA
* Accompagner la transformation digitale stratégique de l’entreprise
* Identifier des cas d’usage concrets pour stimuler l’innovation et l’efficacité au sein du CODIR

Cette journée illustre l’engagement d’Orange Centrafrique à rester à la pointe de la technologie et le rôle central de DHI Centrafrique dans l’accompagnement des dirigeants africains vers une transformation numérique réussie.

Dhanaal Furan: Baaq Nabad, Cadaalad iyo Midnimo Qaran.

Dhanbaal furan oo ku socda Dowladda Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, gaar ahaan Madaxweynaha, hoggaanka qaranka, madaxdhaqameedka, culimada, haweenka, dhalinyarada, iyo aqoonyahanka bulshada.

Waa baaq ku qotoma damiir, dareen qaranimo, iyo rabitaan nabadeed. Waxaa la joogaa xilli loo istaagi lahaa xal u helidda tabasho muddo 30 sano ka badan soo jiitamaysay mudadaas ee ay qabaan   beelaha gobta ah ee Gadabuursi, oo ahna mid jirta oo run ah.

Tabashadaasi maanta waxay maraysaa heer khatar ah — heer ay u eg tahay holac qarxi kara, haddii aan si degdeg ah oo daacad ah wax looga qaban, hadday tahay saami,iyo horumar dhul iyo dadba.

Waa arrin murugo leh in tabashooyinkaas dalal iyo dadka qaarkood ka dhigtaan meel iyo gabood wax laga  dheefsanayo, iyadoo ay u  arkaan xili dadku  jiliceen oo uu jiro niyad jab xoogan gaar ahaan qurba joogta iyo dhalinyarada deegaankaasi iyo meelahaas ka soo jeeda  iyo dil dillaac muuqda wax wada lahaanshihii iyo u sinaantii Somaliland la wada leeyahay. 

Taasi ma aha waddo horseedaysa midnimo, mana aha mid dhisaysa kalsooni qaran & qanaaco bulsho, hadaan cadaalad run ah la helin.

Sidoo kale, colaadda ka aloosan Salal ee bilaha badan jirsatay waxay u baahan tahay in si dhab ah loogu gurmado, loona wajaho wada-hadal, run-sheeg, iyo dib-u-heshiisiin dhab ah. 

Nabadu ma dhalato haddii dhaawac la qariyo; nabadu waxay dhalataa marka caddaalad la helo.

Waxaan soo jeedinayaa in hoggaanka qaranku si toos ah u tagaan Boorama, Awdal, Salal, iyo deegaannada kale ee ay tabashooyinku ka jiraan, lana fadhiistaan bulshada — dhallinyaro, haween, waxgarad iyo odayaal —Madaxdhaqameedka Laguna soo daro Qurbajoogta si xal waara loo helo.

Gargaar degdeg ahna ha la gaadhsiiyo dadka ay saameeyeen colaadaha iyo abaartu; kuwa barakacay, kuwa nugul, iyo kuwa tabaaleysan.

Qaranimada dhabta ahi waa marka la garab istaago kuwa dhibaateysan.

Aragtideennu yeysan ku koobnaan reernimo iyo dano gaaban. Aynu ka gudubno aragti dhow oo ku eeg maanta, una gudubno aragti fog oo badbaadisa berri.

Dhanbaal Furan: Baaq Nabad, Cadaalad iyo Midnimo Qaran.

Dhanbaal furan oo ku socda Dowladda Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, gaar ahaan Madaxweynaha, hoggaanka qaranka, madaxdhaqameedka, culimada, haweenka, dhalinyarada, iyo aqoonyahanka bulshada.

Waa baaq ku qotoma damiir, dareen qaranimo, iyo rabitaan nabadeed. Waxaa la joogaa xilli loo istaagi lahaa xal u helidda tabasho muddo 30 sano ka badan soo jiitamaysay mudadaas ee ay qabaan   beelaha gobta ah ee Gadabuursi, oo ahna mid jirta oo run ah.

Tabashadaasi maanta waxay maraysaa heer khatar ah — heer ay u eg tahay holac qarxi kara, haddii aan si degdeg ah oo daacad ah wax looga qaban, hadday tahay saami,iyo horumar dhul iyo dadba.

Waa arrin murugo leh in tabashooyinkaas dalal iyo dadka qaarkood ka dhigtaan meel iyo gabood wax laga  dheefsanayo, iyadoo ay u  arkaan xili dadku  jiliceen oo uu jiro niyad jab xoogan gaar ahaan qurba joogta iyo dhalinyarada deegaankaasi iyo meelahaas ka soo jeeda  iyo dil dillaac muuqda wax wada lahaanshihii iyo u sinaantii Somaliland la wada leeyahay. 

Taasi ma aha waddo horseedaysa midnimo, mana aha mid dhisaysa kalsooni qaran & qanaaco bulsho, hadaan cadaalad run ah la helin.

Sidoo kale, colaadda ka aloosan Salal ee bilaha badan jirsatay waxay u baahan tahay in si dhab ah loogu gurmado, loona wajaho wada-hadal, run-sheeg, iyo dib-u-heshiisiin dhab ah. 

Nabadu ma dhalato haddii dhaawac la qariyo; nabadu waxay dhalataa marka caddaalad la helo.

Waxaan soo jeedinayaa in hoggaanka qaranku si toos ah u tagaan Boorama, Awdal, Salal, iyo deegaannada kale ee ay tabashooyinku ka jiraan, lana fadhiistaan bulshada — dhallinyaro, haween, waxgarad iyo odayaal —Madaxdhaqameedka Laguna soo daro Qurbajoogta si xal waara loo helo.

Gargaar degdeg ahna ha la gaadhsiiyo dadka ay saameeyeen colaadaha iyo abaartu; kuwa barakacay, kuwa nugul, iyo kuwa tabaaleysan.

Qaranimada dhabta ahi waa marka la garab istaago kuwa dhibaateysan.

Aragtideennu yeysan ku koobnaan reernimo iyo dano gaaban. Aynu ka gudubno aragti dhow oo ku eeg maanta, una gudubno aragti fog oo badbaadisa berri.

Somaliland mideysan, lagu wada qanacsan yahay, lana wada ilaashanayo, loo wada siman yahay ayaa ina deeqda oo jiri kartana— waa himilada & hiigsi mudan in loo wada istaago sidii loo gaadhi lahaa, waanaynu qaban karnaa hadday Somalilandnimadu dhab inaga tahay.

Seconda notizia: gli europei ora vogliono l'atomica. Poiché costruirla richiede tempo, vorrebbero ospitare sul loro suolo le testate francesi. Pare che Parigi sia in trattative con Germania, Polonia, Finlandia e i tre Baltici. La seconda notizia conferma la prima. In sintesi, dobbiamo constatare che gli Usa prima hanno messo l’Europa contro la Russia, poi l’hanno abbandonata al suo destino, come già fatto coi vietnamiti, i somali, i libici, gli afghani, i curdi in Siria. Aggiungo un’annotazione. Quegli europei che ora vogliono l’atomica sono gli stessi che urlano come polli spennati al solo sospetto che l'Iran voglia usare l'energia atomica per costruirsi la bomba. Quindi è confermato che le famose "regole" e i famosi "valori" dell’Occidente erano solo grida di ciarlatani al mercato, slogan da bancarellaio per circuire i gonzi.

🚫 Concejo de Minneapolis analiza represealias contra gerente de hotel donde se hospedaban los de ICE

El Concejo Municipal votó en contra de recomendar a Michael Berk, gerente del Graduate Hotel, para un asiento en un consejo asesor. La decisión surge por protestas y preocupaciones sobre alojamiento de agentes de ICE en el hotel y cómo se manejaron las manifestaciones.

⚖️ La votación del comité fue 8-4, y ahora el pleno decidirá.

Soon-qaad wanaagsan¹

Ilaahay Bishan Barakaysan khayrkeeda, wanaageeda, fadligeeda intaba ha inna waafajiyo, kuwii sida ugu quruxda badan uga faa'idaysta, iskuna beddela eebbe ha innaga yeelo dhammaanteen.

Talooyinka hoose way ku anfacaayaan:👇

1. Afurka ku bilow 3-5 xabbo timir ah iyo biyo aan qaboobayn.

2. Cuntooyinka sonkorta badan yarayso, sambuuska iyo burka cunistooda kuma fiicna, haddaad ka iska dayso waa ii mahadcelin doonta.

3. Jimicso oo intaad wax cunto ha ku fariisan ama seexan ee socod samee 30 daqiiqo illaa saac way kugu filan tahay.

4. Salaadaha faralka ah iyo sunnayaashooda aad u ilaali kuna tuko ammintooda.

5. Taraawiixda iyo Taajudka tukashadooda inaad ku dadaasho aad ban kugu dhiirigelinaaya ajar weyn baa ku sugan,weliba inaad imaamka la bilowdo lana dhammayso baa kugu adkeenaaya haddii aysan jirin markaas hawl aad u deg-degayso.

6. Sadaqayso waxaad awoodo, hadal wanaagsanna raaci marka aad wax bixinayso, lacag uun maahan sadaqadu, qof aad ku taagan tahay oo ka furato oo kurbada ka feeddo baa u fiican inaad ku sadaqdaysato.

7. Waxyaabaha soonkaaga hoos u dhigaaya ajarkiisa ka fogow waxay ahaataba.

8. Hurdada yarayso.

9. Biyaha cabistooda ku dadaal afurka ilaa suxuurta inta u dhexeysa adigoo isku badinayn.

10. Wardi Qur'aan akhris ah samayso, isku day Bishan Barakaysan inaad ugu yaraan hal mar khatinto ama dhammayso Qur'aanka Kariimka ah haddaad ka badin kartana kaba sii fiican.

11. Durraansi badan la imow, hana noqon mid ka caajisa innuu Alle wax weydiisto

  قال رسول الله ﷺ "أعجز الناس من عجز عن الدعاء، وأبخل الناس من بخل بالسلام

Rasuulka SCW baa yidhi: "Dadka waxaa u caajis badan, qofka ka caajisa durraansiga, waxaana ugu dhabcaalsan qofka ka bakhayla salaanta". 

Ilaahay kuwii uu soonkooda, salaaddooda, durraansigooda, bixintoodaba ka aqbalo ha innaga dhigo. Aamiin.

Την πούλησαν για 5 δολάρια σε ένα στρατόπεδο προσφύγων – και έγινε η γυναίκα που ανάγκασε τον κόσμο να σταματήσει και να ακούσει.

Πριν γίνει Γουάρις Ντίριε, ήταν ένα νομαδικό κορίτσι στην έρημο της Σομαλίας, ένα από τα δώδεκα παιδιά μιας οικογένειας που μετακινούνταν με τις καμήλες και τα κατσίκια της, επιβιώνοντας με γάλα και ανθεκτικότητα.

Όταν ήταν πέντε ετών, η μητέρα της την κράτησε κάτω ενώ μια γυναίκα χρησιμοποίησε ένα ξυράφι για να κάνει ακρωτηριασμό των γεννητικών οργάνων. Χωρίς αναισθησία. Χωρίς νοσοκομείο. Μόνο αφάνταστος πόνος που θα στοίχειωνε το σώμα της για πάντα.

Στα δεκατρία, ο πατέρας της ανακοίνωσε ότι θα παντρευόταν έναν εξηντάχρονο άντρα με αντάλλαγμα πέντε καμήλες. Η Γουάρις έκανε μια επιλογή που θα έπρεπε να την είχε σκοτώσει: έφυγε τρέχοντας, μόνη, μέσα στην έρημο της Σομαλίας τη νύχτα. Περπάτησε για εβδομάδες χωρίς φαγητό, χωρίς νερό, χωρίς χάρτη. Την κυνήγησαν λιοντάρια. Παραλίγο να πεθάνει από αφυδάτωση. Αλλά συνέχιζε να κινείται, καθοδηγούμενη από κάτι πιο δυνατό από τον φόβο – την άρνηση να αποδεχτεί τη ζωή που άλλοι είχαν επιλέξει γι' αυτήν.

Τελικά βρήκε τον δρόμο της για το Μογκαντίσου, μετά για το Λονδίνο, όπου έζησε με μακρινούς συγγενείς και δούλεψε ως οικιακή βοηθός. Δεν μιλούσε αγγλικά. Δεν είχε μόρφωση. Καθάριζε σπίτια τη μέρα και μάθαινε μόνη της να διαβάζει τη νύχτα. Και τότε, σε μια από εκείνες τις στιγμές που μοιάζουν απίστευτες για να είναι αληθινές, την ανακάλυψε ένας φωτογράφος μόδας ενώ δούλευε σε ένα McDonald's το 1987.

Μέσα σε μήνες, η Γουάρις Ντίριε έγινε διεθνές σούπερ μόντελ, κοσμώντας τα εξώφυλλα των Vogue, Elle και Glamour. Περπάτησε στις πασαρέλες του Παρισιού, του Μιλάνου και της Νέας Υόρκης. Εμφανίστηκε σε ταινία του Τζέιμς Μποντ. Ο κόσμος της μόδας γιόρταζε την εξωτική ομορφιά της, τα εντυπωσιακά χαρακτηριστικά της, τον φαινομενικά ξαφνικό μετασχηματισμό της από το πουθενά στο παντού.

Columbus considers limits on ICE officers

Proposal also includes detention center ban

Jordan Laird

Columbus Dispatch

USA TODAY NETWORK

The Columbus City Council is moving quickly to advance legislation that would restrict federal Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers operating in the city, although council members acknowledge what they can control is limited.

The proposed legislative package also includes provisions to prevent the construction of immigrant detention facilities, gather evidence of crimes by ICE officers, and increase penalties for harassing employees of school and daycare facilities. The latter is aimed at civilians after local Somali-Americanrun day care centers faced harassment and trespassing attempts in December and January.

Columbus City Councilmember Lourdes Barroso de Padilla, Council President Shannon Hardin and Council Pro Tempore Rob Dorans are introducing about a half-dozen ordinances and resolutions. They held a hearing on the evening of Feb. 17 at which they heard supportive testimony from advocates for immigrants, the Columbus Division of Police and dozens of supportive residents.

No one spoke in opposition to the proposed legislation.

The council members intend to vote on at least some of the legislation at their next meeting on Feb. 23.

“I believe deeply that local government has a responsibility to ensure that every person in our community feels safe, respected and protected under the law,” Barroso de Padilla said. “We cannot ignore federal law or federal policy, but we can decide how our city interacts with it.”

She said she believes the law and the U.S. Constitution are on Columbus’ side on this.

Dorans told media ahead of the hearing that the council doesn’t want to overpromise what they can do because the city can’t control federal law enforcement. But Dorans said this is about limiting what the City Council believes was chaos and overreach of aggressive immigration enforcement seen recently in Minneapolis and across the country.

Oman’s National Carrier SalamAir Launches Mogadishu Route, Joining Turkey, Qatar and Egypt in Somalia Skies

Somali Report - Oman’s national low-cost airline, SalamAir, has announced it will begin direct flights between Muscat and Mogadishu on September 3, 2026, marking the first nonstop air connection between the Sultanate of Oman and Somalia.

The new service will operate twice weekly between Muscat International Airport and Aden Adde International Airport in Mogadishu, strengthening air links between the Gulf and the Horn of Africa. 

One-way Lite fares will start from 79.99 Omani rials (approximately $208), positioning the route as an affordable option for business travelers, families and the Somali diaspora across the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC).

Under the published schedule, Thursday flights will depart Muscat at 4:00 a.m., arriving in Mogadishu at 7:00 a.m. 

The return service will leave Mogadishu at 7:45 a.m. and land in Muscat at 12:55 p.m. Sunday flights will depart Muscat at 10:05 a.m., arriving in Mogadishu at 1:05 p.m., with the return leg leaving at 1:50 p.m. and arriving in Muscat at 7:00 p.m.

Somalia becomes SalamAir’s fourth African destination as the carrier continues to expand its regional footprint. The airline currently operates to more than 40 destinations across Asia, Africa and Europe.

The launch places SalamAir alongside established international carriers already serving Mogadishu, including Turkish Airlines, Qatar Airways and EgyptAir, further increasing competition and connectivity in Somalia’s growing aviation market.

SalamAir Chief Executive Officer Adrian Hamilton-Manns said the decision reflects rising economic activity in Somalia and increasing travel demand between the two nations.

“Somalia has seen significant economic growth and development in recent years. Our direct flights will further stimulate the economy and help create new travel and trade opportunities,” he said in a statement.

He added that SalamAir plans to continue expanding in East Africa, with additional destinations under consideration.

The new route also aligns with Oman Vision 2040, the Sultanate’s long-term strategy to enhance global connectivity, boost tourism and diversify the economy.

For Somalia, which is steadily rebuilding after decades of conflict, the addition of another Gulf carrier signals growing investor confidence and renewed regional engagement as air traffic to Mogadishu continues to rise alongside economic recovery efforts.

It should have faced decisive consequences; up to and including being dropped down from the sky, for blatantly violating national airspace.

Kidnapping by criminal gangs
Detention in unofficial prisons or warehouses
Torture and physical abuse
Extortion calls demanding ransom from families abroad. Forced labor or sexual exploitation

Human rights groups and the United Nations have repeatedly described conditions in Libya as extremely dangerous for migrants.

Dhuusamareeb- Galmudug 

Waxaan si qoto dheer ugu mahadcelinayaa masuuliyiinta iyo shacabka Caasimadda Dhuusamareeb sida diirran, qadarin iyo sharaf leh ee ay ii soo dhaweeyeen

Mahad gaar ah waxaan u dirayaa Guddoomiye Ku-xigeenka Maamulka Caasimadda ahna Kusimaha Guddoomiyaha Degmada, Mudane Cabdisamad Salaad Aadan (Sanweyne), Xoghayaha Maamulka Caasimadda Cabdisalaam Aabi Aadan, iyo dhammaan xildhibaannada iyo masuuliyiinta heer gobol iyo heer deegaan ee ka qaybgalay munaasabadda soo dhaweynta.

Sidoo kale, waxaan uga mahadcelinayaa Wasiirrada, Guddoomiyaha Gobolka, Hoggaanka Dhallinyarada iyo qaybaha kala duwan ee bulshada sida ay u muujiyeen midnimo, waddaniyad iyo kalgacal ku wajahan qurba-joogta.

Anagoo matalayna Jaaliyadda Soomaaliyeed ee Koonfur Afrika, waxaa naga go’an xoojinta xiriirka iyo wada shaqeynta kala dhexeysa Dowladda iyo bulshada reer Galmudug, gaar ahaan maalgashiga, aqoonta, iyo taageeridda mashaariicda horumarineed ee Caasimadda.

Qurba-joogtu waa laf-dhabarta isku xirta dalkooda iyo dunida kale. Waxaan markale caddeynayaa in aan diyaar u nahay kaalin muuqata oo wax ku ool ah ka qaadashada dib-u-dhiska iyo horumarka Galmudug.

জাভেদ খানানি এবং ২০১৬ সালের নোটবন্দি বা ডিমোনিটাইজেশন নিয়ে একটি তথ্যবহুল ও রোমাঞ্চকর নিবন্ধ নিচে দেওয়া হলো :-

জাভেদ খানানি: এক অদৃশ্য যুদ্ধ এবং ভারতের নোটবন্দির নেপথ্য কাহিনী

আপনি কি মনে করেন সিনেমার পর্দায় দেখা ভয়ংকর সব ভিলেনরাই সবচেয়ে শক্তিশালী? যদি তাই ভেবে থাকেন, তবে আপনি হয়তো জাভেদ খানানি নামক এই রক্তমাংসের মানুষটি সম্পর্কে জানেন না। অপরাধ জগতের বড় বড় ডন বা ষড়যন্ত্রকারীরা একদিকে, আর এই জাভেদ খানানি ছিল অন্যদিকে। সে ছিল এমন এক ব্যক্তি, যে চাইলে একাই পুরো ভারতের অর্থনীতিকে পঙ্গু করে দিতে পারত।

এশিয়ার সবচেয়ে বড় হাওয়ালা নেটওয়ার্ক

২০১৬ সালের আগে পর্যন্ত জাভেদ খানানি এশিয়ার সবচেয়ে বড় হাওয়ালা নেটওয়ার্ক পরিচালনা করত। তার এই জাল এতটাই বিস্তৃত ছিল যে, কোনো শারীরিক নগদ অর্থ লেনদেন ছাড়াই সে পৃথিবীর এক প্রান্ত থেকে অন্য প্রান্তে কয়েক হাজার কোটি টাকা পাচার করে দিতে পারত। কিন্তু তার আসল চাল ছিল অন্য জায়গায়।

পাকিস্তানের মাটিতে বসে সে উন্নত মানের জাল ভারতীয় মুদ্রা (Fake Indian Currency) ছাপাত এবং তার নিজস্ব হাওয়ালা নেটওয়ার্কের মাধ্যমে তা ভারতের বাজারে ছড়িয়ে দিত।

ভারতের অর্থনীতিতে ক্যানসারের মতো বিস্তার

বিভিন্ন তথ্য অনুযায়ী, জাভেদ খানানি প্রতি বছর ভারতে প্রায় ৫০০ থেকে ৭০০ কোটি টাকার জাল নোট পাচার করত। এই জাল নোটের কারণে ভারতের হাজার হাজার কোটি টাকার আর্থিক ক্ষতি তো হতোই, সাথে এই টাকা সরাসরি ব্যবহার করা হতো ভারতের বিভিন্ন প্রান্তে জঙ্গি হামলা ও নাশকতামূলক কর্মকাণ্ডে। এটি ছিল ভারতের অর্থনীতির ওপর এক ধরণের নিঃশব্দ ক্যানসার।

২০১৬ সালের সেই ঐতিহাসিক সিদ্ধান্ত

২০১৪ সালে নতুন সরকার ক্ষমতায় আসার পর এই জাল নোটের নেটওয়ার্ক ভাঙার কাজ শুরু হয়। যখন এই চক্রের ভয়াবহতা সামনে আসে, তখন গোয়েন্দা সংস্থাগুলোও অবাক হয়ে গিয়েছিল। অবশেষে ৮ই নভেম্বর, ২০১৬ তারিখে প্রধানমন্ত্রী এক ঐতিহাসিক ঘোষণা করেন— ৫০০ এবং ১০০০ টাকার পুরনো নোট বাতিল (Demonetization)।

এক ঝটকায় গুঁড়িয়ে গেল সাম্রাজ্য

গোটা ভারত যখন নোট বদলানোর লাইনে ব্যস্ত, তখন পাকিস্তানের করাচিতে বসে এক ব্যক্তি সবচেয়ে বড় ধাক্কাটি খেয়েছিল—সে হলো জাভেদ খানানি। তার গোডাউনে পড়ে থাকা হাজার হাজার টন জাল ভারতীয় মুদ্রা রাতারাতি স্রেফ কাগজের টুকরোয় পরিণত হয়। লগ্নিকৃত কয়েক হাজার কোটি টাকা এক লহমায় ধূলিসাৎ হয়ে যায়।

এই ধাক্কা সইতে না পেরে, নোটবন্দির ঠিক এক মাসের মাথায় (ডিসেম্বর ২০১৬), জাভেদ খানানি নিজের বাড়ির চারতলার বারান্দা থেকে ঝাঁপ দিয়ে আত্মহত্যা করে (অনেকের মতে এটি ছিল এক রহস্যময় মৃত্যু)।

উপসংহার

যদি সেই সময় নোটবন্দির মতো কঠোর পদক্ষেপ না নেওয়া হতো, তবে জাভেদ খানানির এই বিষাক্ত জাল ভারতের অর্থনীতিকে পুরোপুরি ধ্বংস করে দিত। মুদ্রাস্ফীতি আর জঙ্গি অর্থায়নে ভারত এক গভীর সংকটে পড়ত। আমাদের নিরাপত্তারক্ষী এবং সরকারের এই দূরদর্শী সিদ্ধান্ত ভারতকে এক বড় বিপর্যয় থেকে রক্ষা করেছে।

এই গুরুত্বপূর্ণ তথ্যটি আপনার বন্ধু এবং পরিবারের সাথে শেয়ার করুন যাতে সবাই ভারতের অর্থনীতির এই অজানা যুদ্ধের ইতিহাস জানতে পারে।

Wuxuu ku dhashay deegaanka Ajdir oo ka tirsan gobolka Rif ee waqooyiga Marooko, qiyaastii sanadkii 1882.
 * Waxbarashada: Wuxuu bartay diinta Islaamka iyo shareecada, isagoo wax ka bartay Jaamacadda caanka ah ee Al-Qarawiyyin ee magaalada Fez. Sidoo kale wuxuu bartay luqadda Isbaanishka iyo sharciga reer galbeedka.

 🧔 Aabbihii Cabdikariim waxa uu ahaa garsoore (Qaadi) iyo hoggaamiye beeleed saameyn leh, isaga ayaana wiilkiisa baray in diinta iyo aqoontu ay yihiin asaaska nolosha.

2.  Sanadkii 1915 ayaa la xiray ka dib markii lagu eedeeyay inuu xiriir la leeyahay Jarmalka, xabsiga dhexdiisa ayuu ku go'aansaday inuu hubka qaato.
3. Dagaalkii Anwal (1921): Mucjisadii Milatariga
Kani waa mid ka mid ah dagaallada ugu yaabka badan taariikhda:
 * Ciyaarta Tirada: Al-Khattabi wuxuu haystay qiyaastii 3,000 oo dagaalyahan oo reer miyi ah. Isbaanishka waxay wateen 25,000 oo askari oo ku hubeysan madaafiic iyo diyaarado.
 🪓 Natiijada: Al-Khattabi wuxuu dilay 13,000 oo askari oo Isbaanish ah, wuxuuna qabsaday hub aad u badan. , taas oo layaab ku noqotay caalamka.

🚓 Jamhuuriyaddii Rif (1921–1926)
Al-Khattabi ma uusan rabin inuu noqdo madax-beeleed, wuxuu dhisay Dawlad:
 Wuxuu sameeyay Dastuur Islaami ah 
 Wuxuu dhisay Wasarado (Maaliyad, Arrimaha Dibadda, Gaashaandhigga).
 Wuxuu soo saaray Lacag u gaar ah (Riffan).
 Wuxuu mamnuucay qabyaaladda, isagoo isku xiray beelihii is-dili jiray si ay ula dagaalamaan cadowga guud.

Maadaama uu khatar weyn ku noqday danaha reer galbeedka, Faransiiska iyo Isbaanishka ayaa isbahaysi ka sameeyay sidii ay u jebin lahaayeen. Waxay adeegsadeen hubka kiimikada ah oo mamnuuc ahaa.

 Hubka Kiimikada ah (Xasuuqii Qarsoonaa)
Maadaama Isbaanishka iyo Faransiiska ay ku fashilmeen inay dhulka kaga guuleystaan, waxay isticmaaleen hab ka baxsan 

 Waxay gobolka Rif ku garaaceen Sunta Mustard (Mustard Gas) iyagoo ka soo tuuraya diyaarado.
 Kani waa markii ugu horreysay taariikhda ee hubka kiimikada lagu tijaabiyo dad shacab ah oo Afrikaan Carab  ah. Taasi waxay keentay in beerihii gubtaan, xoolihiina dhintaan, dadkiina cudurro ku dhacaan.

Saamayntiisa Dunida (The Master of Guerrilla Warfare)
Al-Khattabi waa macallinka dhabta ah ee xeeladda "Ku dhufo oo ka dhaqaaq":
 * Che Guevara: Wuxuu u yimid Qaahira si uu ula kulmo Al-Khattabi, wuxuuna ku tilmaamay "Macallinka weyn".
 * Mao Zedong: Wuxuu sheegay inuu tixraacay buugaagta iyo taariikhda Al-Khattabi markii uu dhisayay ciidanka Shiinaha.
 * Ho Chi Minh: Hogaamiyihii Vietnam wuxuu u adeegsaday xeeladihii Al-Khattabi dagaalkii looga saaray Faransiiska iyo Maraykanka.

 * Markii uu isu dhiibay Faransiiska 1926-kii (si uu shacabkiisa uga badbaadiyo sunta), waxaa la geeyay jasiirada Managaskar go'doon ah muddo 21 sano ah.
 
Sanadkii 1947, isagoo markab laga soo saaray jasiiraddaas oo la rabo in Faransiiska la geeyo, ayuu markabkii ka booday markii uu Port Said (Masar) soo maray.

Wuxuu magangalyo ka helay dalka Masar,

 * Wuxuu Masar ka aasaasay "Xafiiska Maqribka Carabta" si uu u xoreeyo Marooko, Aljeeriya, iyo Tuuniisiya.

Diidmadiisii Waynayd
Markii Marooko ay qaadatay xornimada  sanadkii 1956, boqorkii Marooko ayaa ka codsaday inuu dalka ku soo laabto. Al-Khattabi waa uu diiday, isagoo yiri:
> "Kuma soo laabanayo dalkayga ilaa askariga ugu dambeeya ee gumeysiga uu ka baxo dhulka weyn ee Maqribka (Waqooyiga Afrika)."
> 

Wuxuu geeriyooday magaalada Qaahira 6-dii Febraayo, 1963, isagoo aan weli arkin dalkiisa oo si buuxda xor u ah oo uu raalli ka yahay.

Maanta waa maalin Jimco ah, waana bishii barakeysnayd ee Ramadaan. Waa laba fadli oo waaweyn oo is biirsaday: fadliga Jimcaha iyo fadliga Soonka. Qofkii ka faa’iidaysta maanta, wuxuu helayaa kheyr aad u badan.

Alle Subxaanahu watacaalaa wuxuu Qur’aanka ku yiri:

“إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ وَمَلَـٰٓئِكَتَهُۥ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى ٱلنَّبِىِّ ۚ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ صَلُّوا۟ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا۟ تَسْلِيمًا” (Suuratul Axzaab: 56)

Aayaddan waxay ina faraysaa in aan ku sallino Nabigeenna Muxamed ﷺ, maadaama Alle iyo malaa’igtiisuba ku salliyaan. Haddaba maxaa ka fadli badan in Jimco iyo Ramadaan la isku daro, laguna badiyo saliga iyo salaanta Nabiga ﷺ?

Sidoo kale Alle wuxuu ka yiri Jimcaha:
“يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا نُودِىَ لِلصَّلَوٰةِ مِن يَوْمِ ٱلْجُمُعَةِ فَٱسْعَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ وَذَرُوا۟ ٱلْبَيْعَ” (Suuratul Jumu’ah: 9)

Tani waxay muujinaysaa qiimaha iyo karaamada maalinta Jimcaha. Waa maalin cibaado, xus iyo u soo noqosho Alle.

Soonkuna waa gaashaan, sida uu Nabigu ﷺ yiri: “Soonku waa gaashaan.” Ramadaantuna waa bil Qur’aan:

“شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُنزِلَ فِيهِ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ” (Suuratul Baqarah: 185)

Waa bil naxariis, dambi dhaaf iyo xoreynta Naarta.
Haddaba maanta oo Jimco ah, adigoo sooman, ku dadaal: – Inaad badiso saliga Nabiga ﷺ
Inaad akhrido Qur’aan Inaad ducada badiso, gaar ahaan saacadda la aqbalo

Inaad sadaqo bixiso iyo camal kheyr ah samayso
Aan carrabkeenna ka dhigno mid qoyan oo leh: Allahuuma salli calaa Muxamed wa calaa aali Muxamed.

Ilaahay ha inaga aqbalo soonkeena, salaaddeena, saligeena iyo camalladeenna oo dhan, hana inaga dhigo kuwa ka faa’iidaysta Jimcaha iyo Ramadaanta si buuxda. Aamiin.

Maraykanku sida muuqata waxa uu isku diyaariyay duullaan uu ku qaado Iiraan, duullaan aad u ballaaran. Waxa uu saanaddiisii cirka oo leh noocyo kala duwan sida diyaaradaha dagaalka, kuwa hubka qaada, kuwa shidaaalka qaada, kuwa xamuulka qaada, kuwa sirdoonka iyo noocyo kale oo badan ku daabulayaa bariga dhexe. Marka ay ugu yar tahay in ka badan 200-300 oo diyaaradood ayaa ku sugan inta ka dhaxaysa aagga Cumaan illaa Urdun. Waxaa intaa dheer maraakiibtiisa dagaalka oo uu kamid yahay markabka diyaaradaha xambaara ee Lincoln oo ku sugan aagga gacanka Beershiya. 

Sidoo kale waxaa wadada kusoo jira markabka ugu weyn dunida ee diyaaradaha xambaara waa Gerald R. Ford. Waa dhaqdhaqaaq ciidan oo ka badan cadaadiska la saarayo Iiraan. Maraykanku waxa uu doonayaa in uu nidaamka Iiraan uu meesha ka saaro. Sababaha ku khasbaya waa kuwa iska cad, Iiraan waxa ay khatar ku tahay saaxiibkiisa bariga dhexe waa Israel. 

Maraykanku waxa uu doonayaa inuusan galin dagaal dheeraada oo weyn oo ku dhiig baxo taa badalkeed hawlgal gaaban oo waqti yar qaata. Waxa uu doonayaa in uu laba mid uun sameeyo, in uu nidaamka maamul ee Iiraan meesha ka saaro oo uu laayo madaxda Iiraan laga bilaabo Khamenei illaa saaraakiisha sarsare si uu nidaam cusub u abuuro, ama in uu burnuriyo nidaamka gantaallada ee Iiraan iyo si lamida barnaamijkooda nukliyeerka. Waa qorshe ku dhisan hawl gal gaaban balse halis badan leh. Waa halka Soomaalidu ay ka tiraahdo "Sidee xeero loo xagtaa, ilkana ku nabad galaan". 

Waxa uu ku fikirayaa kala doorashada is badal nidaam oo ka hanaqaada Iiraan ama in nidaamku sii jiro balse uu curyaamiyo halista gantaalladooda iyo barnaamijkooda nukliyeerka. Waxaa la fahansan yahay haddii uu burburiyo gantaallada Iiraan iyo barnaamijkeeda balse uu faraha ka qaado nidaamkeeda maamul, waxaa hubaal ah inay dib u dhisayaaan waayo Iiraan waa qaran leh injinneero iyo khuburo aysan haysan dalalka kale ee gobolku. 

Haddii uu nidaamka maamul iyo madaxdooda laayo si kuwa kale uu u keeni iyana waa khmaar oo lama hubo in cidda badalaysaa ay fikir ahaan u diyaarsan tahay oo la helayo, waayo rajiimka Iiraan waxa uu muddo 45sano ka badan uu beerayay jiialal ay dhiigooda raacday afkaarta jamhuuriyadda Islaamiga ah. Sidoo kale Iiraanidu waa dad waxbartay oo lama mid aha carabta. 

Dhanka kale Iiraan iyo maamulkeedu waa kuwa u diyaarsan in haddii dagaal dhaco aysan cidna badbaadin oo cidna aysan noolaan oo ay Maraykanka iyo xulafadiisu aysan gobolka nabad ku joogayn. Waxaa kale oo ay haystaan saanad ciidan iyo hub kumannaan nooc ah oo qaybo badan oo kamida wali aan la hubin khatartiisa iyo khasaaraha uu gaysan karo. Waxaa saacidaya abuurka juquraafiyadeed ee Iiraan iyo siiba ku dagaallanka baddooda Beershiya iyo haysashada gantaallo tiradoodu lamid tahay digsi ciid ka buuxdo oo ku horyaal.  Maraykanka iyo Israel waxa ay qirsan yihiin in Iiraan aysan lamid noqon doonin Liibiya, Siiriya, Afghanistan iyo Ciraaq toona. Waayo waa nidaam 20jeer ka awood badan Ciraaqdii Maraykanku sanadaha badan ku dhiig baxayay. 

Wadamada carbeed farriinta ay gaarsiisay Iiraan waxa ay u dhignayd "waanu haynaa xogtiinna, waxaan idin ballaan qaaadaynaa in aad tihiin bartilmaameedkayaga". Sawirku waa saldhigiisa ciidamada cirka ee Jordan/Urdun.

CAE CAPTURADO EL PODEROSO CAPO INVISIBLE ALIAS ‘MEDIO LABIO’ AFUERA DEL EXCLUSIVO Y LUJOSO MALL EL INDIO DEL POBLADO EN MEDELLÍN CUANDO RECIÉN LLEGABA DE DUBAI DONDE DIRIGÍA UNA OPERACIÓN DE LAVADO DE LA MAF1A COMO DUEÑO DEL DINERO DE LOS HERMANOS PRADA MARIONES: ALIAS ‘MEDIO LABIO’ ES PRIMO HERMANO DE ‘DON MARIO’ Y ‘EL ALEMÁN’ Y DIRIGÍA OPERACIONES A EUROPA

En Medellín (Antioquia) fue capturado Jhon Henry González Herrera, conocido como alias ‘Medio Labio’, señalado por las autoridades como un presunto capo invisible vinculado a redes internacionales de n4rc0tráf1c0 y l4v4d0 de activos con alcance en Europa.

El operativo se ejecutó el martes 17 de febrero, hacia las 11:15 de la noche, cuando investigadores lo interceptaron en inmediaciones del exclusivo y lujoso mall El Indio, sobre la vía Las Palmas, en la parte alta de El Poblado, en cumplimiento de una orden de captura proferida el 16 de febrero de 2026 con apoyo de agencias internacionales.

En el procedimiento se incautaron documentos, celulares, una agenda, 18 hojas con anotaciones, un reloj Rolex y una cadena de oro, elementos que quedaron bajo cadena de custodia dentro del proceso.

Uno de los puntos que más resalta en el expediente es su vínculo familiar con cabecillas del narcoparamilitarismo: Jhon Henry González Herrera es señalado como primo hermano de Daniel Rendón Herrera, alias ‘don Mario’, y también de Freddy Rendón Herrera, alias ‘El Alemán’, figuras históricas de estructuras paramilitares que luego sirvieron de base para la organización conocida como el ‘cl4n del G0lf0’.

La investigación además lo conecta con una megaoperación de blanqueo que involucra a dos hermanos colombianos, Pablo Felipe y Santiago Prada Moriones, uno de ellos conocido como ‘Black Jack’, quienes aparecerían relacionados con movimientos financieros ilícitos de gran escala en Europa.

Según el material investigativo, el capturado habría participado en operaciones de blanqueo superiores a 147.000 millones de pesos mediante el sistema Hawala, un método informal de transferencia de dinero, y se le atribuye la coordinación de estructuras dedicadas al tráfico de estupefacientes con destino a países europeos entre 2019 y 2025.

Las autoridades también lo ubican dentro del radar de agencias extranjeras por presuntos nexos con mafias italianas como la ‘Ndrangheta’, redes criminales europeas, carteles mexicanos y estructuras asociadas al ‘cl4n del G0lf0’, con las que habría tenido un papel de socio comercial y estratégico.

El caso se soportaría en evidencia extraída de la plataforma encriptada SkyECC, donde se registrarían comunicaciones relacionadas con presuntas actividades de n4rc0tráf1c0 y l4v4d0 de activos.

En paralelo, uno de sus escoltas fue judicializado por el delito de fabricación, tráfico, porte o tenencia de arm4s de fuego, accesorios, partes o municiones.

(Toda esta información es de carácter noticioso y no busca incitar, promover ni glorificar ningún tipo de violencia, actividad ilegal o discurso prohibido.)

Duuliyihii meydka Siyaad Barre sida qarsoodiga ku keenay Soomaaliya oo markii ugu horreysay hadlay
.Xigashada Sawirka,Getty Images
Qoraalka sawirka,.
31 sano ka hor maanta oo kale, Xuseen Maxamed Canshuur iyo Maxamed Aadan (Maxamed Dheere) oo ah laba duuliye oo Kenyaan ah waxaa xafiiskooda ku yaallay garoonka diyaaradaha ee Wilson oo ku dhow caasimadda Nairobi, soo gaartay shaqo aan la filayn, taas oo xasaasi ahayd, halis waynna ay ku hoos duugneyd.

Xuseen iyo Maxamed oo shaqo maalmeedkooda ku jira waxaa u yimid diblomaasi u dhashay dalka Nayjeeriya, kaas oo ka codsaday in meydka hoggaamiyihii hore ee Soomaaliya, Maxamed Siyaad Barre ay diyaaradooda u soo qaado dalkiisa hooyo si loogu aaso, kaddib markii uu ku geeriyooday Lagos oo uu magangalyo siyaasadeed ku joogay Nayjeeriya isagoo 80 jir ah.

Maxamed Canshuur oo hore u ahaan jiray Kabtan ka tirsan Ciidamada cirka dalka Kenya, waxa ay Maxamed Aadan wada lahaayeen shirkadda duulimaadka Bluebird oo ka mid ah shirkadaha duulimaadyada gaarka loo leeyahay ee ugu waaweyn Kenya, isla markaana ay aasaaseen dhowr sano ka hor waqtigaas.

Isaga oo markii ugu horreysay warbaahinta kala hadlay hawlgalkan, Canshuur waxa uu BBC-da u sheegay in diblomaasigii Nayjeeriyaanka ahaa uu si toos ah isku dul-taagay arrinta uu doonayay, kana codsaday isaga iyo Maxamed in ay " ka kireeyaan diyaaraddooda oo si qarsoodi ah ugu qaadaan meydka marxuumka laga soo qaadayo magaalada Lagos ee Nayjeeriya, lana geeyo magaalada Garbahaarrey ee koonfurta Soomaaliya si halkaas loogu aaso Siyaad Barre.

Waxa uu sheegay in codsigaas uu ahaa mid aad loola yaabo "Isla markiiba waan garannay in safarkaan uusan ahayn duulimaad caadi ah."
(Dhamaad )

One of the things I truly enjoy doing is learning about different countries. I never get tired of it, it’s actually my hobby 😄

What even inspired this was something quite funny. A lady once went for a competition in America and was asked to mention a country in Africa, and she said America. 

Honestly, I almost felt like crying because it was really embarrassing for us.

But then again, situations like that remind us why it’s important to learn basic global knowledge. At least we should know simple things about the world around us. So I just want to share some of my research, and please feel free to correct me if there are any mistakes, we are all here to learn. And truly, one of the best places to learn these things is YouTube.

1. The country with the highest literacy rate in the world is Finland.

2. The most corrupt country in the world is Somalia.

3. The least corrupt country in the world is Denmark.

4. The most powerful country in the world is the United States of America.

5. The country with the strongest passport in the world is Singapore.

6. The country with the weakest passport in the world is Afghanistan.

7. The most democratic country in the world is Norway.

8. The least democratic country in the world is North Korea.

9. The country with the highest life expectancy in the world is Japan.

10. The country with the lowest life expectancy in the world is Chad.

11. The most expensive country to live in the world is Switzerland.

12. The cheapest country to live in the world is Pakistan.

13. The country with the highest number of billionaires in the world is the United States of America.

14. The tallest building in the world is Burj Khalifa, which is located in the United Arab Emirates (UAE).

15. The country with the largest economy in the world is the United States of America.

16. The most romantic country in the world is France.

17. The country with the highest number of twin births in the world is Nigeria.

18. The most dangerous country in the world is Afghanistan.

19. The most peaceful country in the world is Iceland.

20. The cleanest country in the world is Denmark.

21. The dirtiest country in the world is Bangladesh.

22. The richest country in the world is Luxembourg.

23. The poorest country in the world is Burundi.

24. The largest country in the world by land area is Russia.

25. The smallest country in the world is Vatican City.

26. The most populated country in the world is India.

27. The least populated country in the world is Vatican City.

28. The most visited country in the world is France.

29. The coldest country in the world is Russia.

30. The country considered among the oldest civilizations in the world is Mali.

31. The country with the highest level of education in the world is Canada.

Kunjue Ayobami

Maraykanku sida muuqata waxa uu isku diyaariyay duullaan uu ku qaado dowlada Iiraan, duullaan aad u ballaaran. Waxa uu saanaddiisii cirka oo leh noocyo kala duwan sida diyaaradaha dagaalka, kuwa hubka qaada, kuwa shidaaalka qaada, kuwa xamuulka qaada, kuwa sirdoonka iyo noocyo kale oo badan ku daabulayaa bariga dhexe.

Marka ay ugu yar tahay in ka badan 200-300 oo diyaaradood ayaa ku sugan inta ka dhaxaysa aagga Cumaan illaa Urdun. Waxaa intaa dheer maraakiibtiisa dagaalka oo uu kamid yahay markabka diyaaradaha xambaara ee Lincoln oo ku sugan aagga gacanka Beershiya.

Sidoo kale waxaa wadada kusoo jira markabka ugu weyn dunida ee diyaaradaha xambaara waa Gerald R. Ford. Waa dhaqdhaqaaq ciidan oo ka badan cadaadiska la saarayo Iiraan. Maraykanku waxa uu doonayaa in uu nidaamka Iiraan uu meesha ka saaro. Sababaha ku khasbaya waa kuwa iska cad, Iiraan waxa ay khatar ku tahay saaxiibkiisa bariga dhexe waa Israel.

Maraykanku waxa uu doonayaa inuusan galin dagaal dheeraada oo weyn oo uu ku dhiig baxo taa badalkeed hawlgal gaaban oo waqti yar qaata. Waxa uu doonayaa in uu laba mid uun sameeyo, in uu nidaamka maamul ee Iiraan meesha ka saaro oo uu laayo madaxda Iiraan laga bilaabo hogaamiyaha ruuxiga ah ee Ayatullah Ali Khamenei illaa saaraakiisha sarsare, si uu nidaam cusub u abuuro, ama in uu burburiyo nidaamka gantaallada ee Iiraan iyo si lamida barnaamijkooda nukliyeerka. Waa qorshe ku dhisan hawl gal gaaban balse halis badan leh. Waa halka Soomaalidu ay ka tiraahdo “Sidee laf loo xagtaa, ilkana ku nabad galaan”.

Waxa uu ku fikirayaa kala doorashada is badal nidaam oo ka hanaqaada Iiraan ama in nidaamku sii jiro balse uu curyaamiyo halista gantaalladooda iyo barnaamijkooda nukliyeerka. Waxaa la fahansan yahay haddii uu burburiyo gantaallada Iiraan iyo barnaamijkeeda balse uu faraha ka qaado nidaamkeeda maamul, waxaa hubaal ah inay dib u dhisayaaan waayo Iiraan waa qaran leh injinneero iyo khuburo aysan haysan dalalka kale ee gobolku.

Haddii uu nidaamka maamul iyo madaxdooda laayo si kuwa kale uu u keeni iyana waa khmaar oo lama hubo in cidda badalaysaa ay fikir ahaan u diyaarsan tahay oo la helayo, waayo nidaamka Iiraan waxa uu muddo 45sano ka badan uu beerayay jiilal ay dhiigooda raacday afkaarta jamhuuriyadda Islaamiga ah. Sidoo kale Iiraanidu waa dad waxbartay oo lama mid aha carabta kale ee reer galbeedka Madaxa uhoorsada.

Dhanka kale Iiraan iyo maamulkeedu waa kuwa u diyaarsan in haddii dagaal dhaco aysan cidna badbaadin oo cidna aysan noolaan oo ay Maraykanka iyo xulafadiisu aysan gobolka nabad ku joogayn. Waxaa kale oo ay haystaan saanad ciidan iyo hub kumannaan nooc ah oo qaybo badan oo kamida wali aan la hubin khatartiisa iyo khasaaraha uu gaysan karo.

Waxaa saacidaya abuurka juquraafiyadeed ee Iiraan iyo siiba ku dagaallanka baddooda Beershiya iyo haysashada gantaallo tiradoodu lamid tahay digsi ciid ka buuxdo oo ku horyaal.  Maraykanka iyo Israel waxa ay qirsan yihiin in Iiraan aysan lamid noqon doonin Liibiya, Siiriya, Afghanistan iyo Ciraaq toona. Waayo waa nidaam 20jeer ka awood badan Ciraaqdii Maraykanku sanadaha badan ku dhiig baxayay.

Wadamada carbeed farriinta ay gaarsiisay Iiraan waxa ay u dhignayd “waanu haynaa xogtiinna, waxaan idin ballaan qaaadaynaa in aad tihiin bartilmaameedkayaga”. Sawirku waa saldhigiisa ciidamada cirka ee Jordan/Urdun.

Wariye Hussein Abdi Ibrahim

#ሸበሌ #Shabalee #Shebele

Dear compatriots abroad,

The image you displayed at the Global Day of Action gatherings around the world was the true face of Iran—a magnificent image of peacefulness, culture, civilization, order, and respect for the law; in complete contrast to the terrorism, backwardness, violence, chaos-seeking, and extremism of the Islamic Republic.

In the days and weeks ahead, as our compatriots inside Iran look to the world for help, it is our duty to ensure that this help actually arrives. Therefore, your message to the politicians and decision-makers in your host countries is very clear: those who obstruct assistance to the people of Iran will not have the vote or support of the vast Iranian diaspora community—neither today nor in the future.

I ask all of you to continue being worthy representatives of the Iranian nation: determined and steadfast, organized and dignified. Keep moving forward just as you did on the Global Day of Action. Do not take your eyes off the main goal. Avoid any behavior unworthy of the great Iranian nation. And do not allow distractions or troublemakers to divert you from the path to victory.

Long live Iran,
Reza Pahlavi

Policía publicó #video del momento de la captura del sucesor de Don Mario

En el marco de la operación “Pandora”, la Policía Nacional (DIJIN), en coordinación con la Fiscalía General de la Nación y con apoyo internacional de Guardia Civil Española y Europol, reportó la captura en Medellín de Jhon Henry González Herrera, conocido como alias “Medio Labio”, señalado como cabecilla vinculado al Clan del Golfo y a redes criminales transnacionales. Según las autoridades, su rol habría sido estratégico en la articulación financiera entre estructuras criminales en Colombia y mafias en Europa y América Latina, con presuntos vínculos con organizaciones como la ’Ndrangheta y redes como la Mocro Maffia, entre otras. 

De acuerdo con el boletín, las investigaciones —apoyadas en información obtenida de una plataforma de mensajería cifrada— permitieron documentar posibles actividades de narcotráfico y lavado de activos a gran escala, incluyendo movimientos de dinero en efectivo mediante el sistema informal Hawala, por un valor aproximado de $147 mil millones de pesos. El capturado fue presentado ante un Juez de Control de Garantías, quien legalizó la captura, y la Fiscalía le imputó cargos por lavado de activos, tráfico/fabricación/porte de estupefacientes, enriquecimiento ilícito de particulares, cohecho y concierto para delinquir con fines de lavado, mientras avanzan los procesos judiciales correspondientes.

Oltre 85 Stati membri e organizzazioni internazionali hanno rilasciato una dichiarazione congiunta che condanna le misure unilaterali di Israele volte ad espandere la sua presenza illegale in Cisgiordania.

Si oppongono fortemente all'annessione e respingono qualsiasi azione che alteri la composizione demografica, il carattere o lo status del Territorio Palestinese Occupato dal 1967, inclusa Gerusalemme Est.

La dichiarazione ribadisce l'impegno al diritto internazionale, alle risoluzioni pertinenti delle Nazioni Unite e al Parere Consultivo della Corte Internazionale di Giustizia del 19 luglio 2024, sostenendo l'autodeterminazione palestinese e opponendosi agli insediamenti illegali, agli sfollamenti e all'annessione.

Ribadisce che porre fine all'occupazione e attuare una soluzione a due Stati basata sulle linee del 1967, inclusa Gerusalemme, rimane l'unica via per una pace duratura e la stabilità regionale.

We are sick and tired of this coup culture. And never mind those other issues - first we need be able to take a loss in an election, concede defeat, give that concession speech, and ask all Fijians to get in behind the government of the day. 
And then come back and fight another day. 
That is called a peaceful transition of power. Unless we have that, a good working democracy, every thing is secondary.
The former Fiji First was the largest party in parliament, with 26 seats, 2 short of a majority. And they already had one more MP suppprting them. 
With those numbers, they would have been a formidable opposition. 
And we could have the people’s support, and a good working democracy, we will then have, stability. 
But they went with plan B. 

With stability comes investor confidence, the pace of out migration slows down. And we see progress. And a happy people. 

And that defeats the purpose of many who do not want this government or the people succeed. 

At least, this government is a better alternative than what we had - a virtual dictatorship that ruled by power, intimidation and force. 
Any government, democratically elected would have been better. 

So let’s first look at that idiotic response, “he started it first”. 

He has apologized time and again,
And he is all set to ride into the sunset. The question is what are you going to do about it - write bad stuff about him or anyone else who supports him - this is about here and now. Not what happened in the past. 

And if we stand together, we can stand up to this - maybe not “no more coups” but we could say that coups are highly unlikely in a democracy like ours - maybe. 

Since this government came to power, folks were almost expecting a coup. Some may have even wanted a coup. And that leads to a volatile, and a very unstable country and also we can have bad race relations when the coup makers are perceived as for one race and against another. 
And most folks who are out of power do not want the next guy to succeed. 

However,  gradually there seems to be an emerging consensus against coups. The realization is setting in that democracy is a better alternative. 

This last alleged coup threat - look at the timeline - between January 1 2023 and so forth - so these guys were at it from the time they lost. Our government was sworn in on December, 22, 2022, and they went into action. 

Khaiyum, Bainimarama and the rest of them, including these idiots with fake ID, and usually from abroad have been relentless. 
The thinking seems to be, “we will make the life of this government as bad as we can, and hopefully that will bring about their downfall. 
And they, the Bai/Kai sympathizers may succeed. The question is who will replace this government. 
It could be a case of “out of the frying pan and into the fire.”

And there is another scenario - the military has always been predominant indigenous. We have a great military. But if there was a coup - either by the pro Bai/Kai folks, or another military officer on the other side of the political divide decided to do it. What do you think will happen. 

I honestly believe that a coup would mean a lot of violence. 

And maybe there are other folks who may think that there isn’t a need for a coup. 
The constitution allows for military intervention. 

We already have a constitution that will be in favour of a more dictatorial regime. 
Look at it post 2013. We had the constitution, but did it protect us against the media decree?
Did it protect folks from being hauled in for questioning - Hon Biman, Chaudhry, PM Rabuka, Ditoka, various union leaders - all were hauled in for one reason or another. 
And the next guys could legally do that also. 

The US constitution did not protect those US citizens of Japanese descent from those camps. 

And India, the proud largest democracy, had emergency imposed by Indira Gandhi. 
Here, they have gotten away with imposing a new illegal constitution - at least so far.
So almost anything is possible. 

When are we going to say enough is enough. 

I really would not want to stay in a country where there is no law and order. I would want to see a NZ, Australia, Canada type of a government. And we have been heading towards Somalia kinda government. 

Unless, there is serious desire by folks living in Fiji, to establish a good democracy, another coup is inevitable. 

Or better still, just don’t make a mistake that we did last time, have better advisors and do have the power of the gun. And we have a right wing dictatorship. 

If Khaiyum had won the last election, what do you think he would have done. First, get better entrenched, then have a succession plan, and then ride into the sunset. 
What if these guys had pulled the next coup successfully. 

I think the priority now should be - get good, smart, leaders. Move away from race based politics. 

Do not tolerate mediocrity.
And unless there is a paradigm shift in the Indo Fijian community, to end mediocrity in leadership, we are doomed. Hon Biman and Chaudhry, different but still reasonable. 

But what about Hon Bala, Ketan, Viam and the rest? 
And there will be a backlash against our community, and that is what the fight should be now. Stop that pendulum from swinging too far to the other side.

Tarweeh Night 4 -

I decided to check out the newly renovated Al Huda Masjid in Stepney/ Mile End Road.

Beeeautiful! The brothers in the Somali community built a beautiful masjid Alhamdulillah! 

I hope there's facilities there for the community to engage in community work - the Somali community in East London has, for the most part, kept themselves to themselves, especially with regards to Masjid Al Huda.

I have to say one thing though -

The fundraising is on point with the Masjid! No pledges less than 1K! MashaAllah, inspirational! And that's after the Isha salah, so the pledges were coming in even before the Taraweeh prayer even began!

The imam made a valid point -

"There are households where 3,4,5 people are working so what's £1000 between everyone in a household?"

Correct, yaa sheikh, correct. 

We often look at what need's to be done - in this case funds to use for the running costs of a mosque - and hide away thinking 'I can't do this, it's too much for me.' 

Yaa akhiul kareem! Yaa ukhtil kareemah!

Perhaps the task was never meant to be done alone, but as a collective! Is the burden not made lighter when everyone collectively chips in?

Let's take an example from this.

The Project Barakah 2026 Campaign is in need of funds for the running costs of the institute.

The volunteers, like myself, don't need or want a penny - that is for the support of the institute where the running costs alone are £90K+. I put the money in to do my part and reach out to others because I know I cannot maintain the running costs alone.

I look to my community.
I look to my brothers.
I look to my sisters.

Wherever you are, you can contribute to a cause greater than yourself.

Make a donation tonight for you and your family as a sadaqatul jaariyah:

Ilhan Omar Defends Somali Americans: “We Are Not Terrorizing This Nation—We Are Helping It Thrive”

In the face of escalating political attacks and immigration crackdowns, Rep. Ilhan Omar (D-MN) has forcefully defended the Somali American community, declaring that Somalis are integral contributors to the United States rather than a threat.

“Somalis are not terrorizing this nation. We are helping it thrive,” Omar stated in a widely circulated November 2025 video address to Somali communities in Minnesota and nationwide. 

She added that Somalis “have always seen themselves as a fabric of this nation,” emphasizing resilience against efforts to marginalize them. “We are not going anywhere… we are not going to allow anybody to make us feel less Minnesotan or less American.”

The remarks came amid heightened tensions following President Trump’s renewed focus on Minnesota’s large Somali population—the biggest in the U.S., with estimates around 80,000–100,000 people, many concentrated in the Twin Cities. 

Trump has repeatedly criticized the community, calling them “garbage,” accusing them of fraud, and linking them to broader immigration enforcement actions like ending Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for Somalis and launching operations such as “Metro Surge” by ICE. 

These moves have included aggressive raids, racial profiling allegations, and reports of unlawful stops of U.S. citizens.

Omar, who fled Somalia as a child refugee and arrived in the U.S. at age 12, has positioned herself as a staunch advocate. In press conferences, op-eds (including one in The New York Times), and congressional letters, she has condemned what she calls “hateful rhetoric,” “xenophobia,” and “militarized racial terror” from the administration. 

She argues that such attacks distract from real issues and dehumanize Americans who are doctors, teachers, business owners, and elected officials enriching the country.

The Somali American community has indeed made significant strides since many arrived as refugees in the 1990s fleeing civil war. 

Minnesota Somalis run businesses, work in healthcare, education, and tech, and participate actively in civic life. Omar herself became the first Somali American in Congress in 2019, symbolizing upward mobility.

However, the statement has drawn sharp backlash online and in conservative circles. Critics on platforms like Facebook and X point to ongoing federal investigations into alleged fraud in Minnesota’s social services programs—particularly child care and pandemic-related benefits—where some cases involve Somali-run entities and sums potentially exceeding $1 billion. 

Detractors mock the “thrive” claim, accusing the community of overburdening welfare systems or failing to integrate.

Omar and supporters counter that fraud cases are isolated, not representative, and that scapegoating immigrants ignores systemic issues while fueling division. 

In recent months, she’s faced personal threats, including an incident where she was sprayed with an unknown liquid during a town hall.

As debates over immigration, fraud, and identity rage on, Omar’s words serve as both a defiant celebration of Somali contributions and a flashpoint in America’s polarized discourse on who truly “helps it thrive.”

There is so much going on here at home and so much I can say about the heartbreaking things the immigrant community is experiencing here in the US. I also feel a personal responsibility to speak about what’s happening in Cuba, I still have family on the island that we speak to and send medicine, food and clothes to.

It has been 67 years of a failing dictatorship and an oppressive regime. The Cuban people are suffering in an echo chamber where no one can hear them because to speak is to risk your life. Many people are starving, looking for food in trash heaps, and the only way to survive is having relatives ship you boxes of medicine because not even the hospitals have medicine.

The power is gone for so long that food spoils and water becomes scarce . When people have peacefully protested, they have disappeared or been put behind bars, some as young as 13 years old. This is a reality where a post online costs you your life. The Cuban people have lived without dignity and without hope for too long. It’s no wonder so many Cubans have thrown themselves into shark infested waters, making boats out of tires and sticks and risking their lives for freedom.

Forgiveness & Reconciliation Thread Intro: A Journey of Forgiveness and Reconciliation 
I confess to almighty God
and to you, my brothers and sisters,
that I have greatly sinned,
in my thoughts and in my words,
in what I have done and in what I have failed to do,
through my fault, through my fault,
through my most grievous fault;
therefore I ask blessed Mary ever-Virgin,
all the Angels and Saints,
and you, my brothers and sisters,
to pray for me to the Lord our God.

With these words from the confiteor on my lips and in my heart, I come humbly asking forgiveness from anyone, anywhere, who has been hurt, angered, or offended by something attributed to me, whether it was actually mine, taken out of context, twisted, edited, or completely fabricated.
I’m apologizing publicly because the attacks have been one-sided, covert, and relentless: distorted clips, manipulated images, whispers, street theater, fake accounts, and algorithms that push lies. I don’t have the full picture, and no one has come to me directly, so I can’t even defend or clarify properly. But I refuse to let pride keep me from doing what love requires. So here I am, striking my chest saying (through my fault, through my fault, through my most grievous fault), owning what is mine, and releasing what isn’t, so healing can begin.
If anything has hurt you, please comment or DM. I will listen, clarify, retract, and apologize specifically where needed.

The groups I’m sensing (from the pieces I’ve been able to gather) may have been wounded will be listed below as a thread. I welcome each group/individual to respond to the thread that correlates to them or DM me.  #forgiveness #reconciliation #confiteor #unityandlove #lovethyneighbor
